
Jesus Cristo otodaiwuge. 1Jesus Cristo, Davi Onaregedu, Abraão onaregedu, jeture otojiwu uwobe ekie epadui bapera kejedu. 2Abraão ure Isaac towuje. Isaac ure Jacó touje. Jacó ure Judá towuje, ure Judá umanamage uwiemage etowuje jamedu. 3Judá mare Tamar ere Farés mare Zara etowuje. Farés ure Esron towuje. Esron ure Arão towuje. 4Arão ure Aminadabe towuje. Aminadabe ure Naasson towuje. Naasson ure Salmon towuje. 5Salmon mare Raabe ere Booz towuje. Booz mare Rute ere Obede towuje. Obede ure Jessé towuje. Jessé ure brae eimejera Davi towuje. 6Uria bokware pijiwu aredu apore, brae eimejera Davi ure Salomão towuje. 7Salomão ure Roboão towuje. Roboão ure Abias towuje. Abias ure Asa towuje. 8Asa ure Josafá towuje. Josafá ure Jorão towuje. Jorão ure Ozias towuje. 9Ozias ure Joatão towuje. Joatão ure Acaz towuje. Acaz ure Ezequias towuje. 1 Ezequias ure Manassés towuje. Manassés ure Amon towuje. Amon ure Josias towuje. 1 Josias ure Jeconias towuje, ure umanamage etowuje jamedu, Babilônia rorerui Judeudoge eidu kodiwu keje. 1 Nowu Babilônia rorerui judeudoge eidu kodiwu rekodaji, Jeconias ure Salatiel towuje. Salatiel ure Zorobabel towuje. 1 Zorobabel ure Abiude towuje. Abiude ure Eleacim towuje. Eleacim ure Azor towuje. 1 Azor ure Sadoc towuje. Sadoc ure Aquim towuje. Aquim ure Eliude towuje. 1 Eliude ure Eleazar towuje. Eleazar ure Matam towuje. Matam ure Jacó towuge. 1 Jacó ure José towuje. José mugure Maria apo, dutabore Jesus ure tudowuje ai, dure iere Cristo. 1 Dukodire ere pudato pudatodure ikera pudogidure ewudure iwurekoto pobe puibiji Abraão piji jii Davi ae. Jii Davi piji Babilônia rorerurewo kae dure ikera pudogidure ewudure pobe puibiji iwurekoto jii Cristo ae. 
Jesus buturedu. 1 Ica, Jesus butu kodiwu uce Maria mare José ei tuienado puidu, emugumode puapodu otodaire, awu inodure tudowuje Maria ji kuiarure Aroe Pemegarewu koia. 1 Nowu mugumode apowu José, imedu jetororewu, aidukare akaru pegawo: icare padure tugajeje tuwo turodo oino piji podu tabo. 2 Meardaere oino kimo, dukejere icare Pao Aroe Eimejera ia o Tupare towadudo ji unuiao tada. Akore José, Davi onaregedu, apagudu kaba Maria makuduwo akai akoredujece. Paga karega, kejere Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje keje. 2 Ema kuributumode ia tonaregedu rogu apo, dure amode iedo Jesusce; emare umode tuwobe einorudo turo pegarewu piji kodi. 2 Nowu inodu jamedu ure tudowuje uwo nono Aroe Eimejera makore profetadogei jiboe reore. 2 Ica, ia virgem kuiarumode, onaregedu butumode, du iemode Emanuel (nowu bataru inodure oino aroe Eimejera mugui pagabodu). 2 Icare, tuiedadu kejere, José rore nono Tupai turoiagudu reore. Ure tugeragu ji pudae rugadu. 2 Boekarema, emugukai puapo dutabo, Maria onaregedure, dure ure iedo Jesusce. 

Magodoge etaregoduredu. 1Jesus buture ia Judéia kejewu bakurirewu iei Belém cedu keje, brae eimejerai Herodes cedu kodiwu kodi. Dukejere icare magodoge etaregodure meri rutu piji nowu bakurirewu iei Jerusalém cedu kae. 2Enorare: - Kaiba judeudoge eimejera buture? Ceerudure o kuieje kurirewu ji meri rutu kuda, kodire cedaregodure cewo cebujodo ji. 3Tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, nowu brae eimejera Herodes rore toku, nowu Jerusalém kejewuge erore toku apo jamedu. 4Icare ure baire eimejerage, escribadoge, ure edo tudo pui, unorare ei kaibamodeba Cristo butumode. 5Icare egore ji Belém keje, Judéia moto keje, oinore bapera atugododure profeta koia: 6Aki, Belém, Judéia kejewu, aki boe biegarewu karega ure aki Judéia kejewu bakurirewuge etada. Paga karega, apijire boe eimejera jetumode inore emawuge Israeldogeiwu umode tudawuje. 

7Kodire Herodes mako podure nowu magodoge ewogai. Icare unorare ei kakoduwu ia boe kejeba nowu kuieje kurirewu ure towadudo eegai. 8Ure etuiagu nowu Belém kae, akore ei toro taeruduwa birigodudo nowu negedurogu bogai. Taerudui jitu kejere tamode iwie, ituwo bogai, iwo ipujodo ji jamedu. 9Tumearudui nowu brae eimejera bataru jitu kejere icare, eture pugeje. Icarema, cewu eerudure ji meri rutu kudawu kuieje kurirewu kodure etododai jii cewu negedurogu mugurewo kae, nonore icare ure tuwuredo. 1 Cewu kuieje kurirewu ui towadudo dukoiare icare ure aidurewu gigirewu jekarerewu ure enogorawu tabo. 1 Tui turemo dukejere eerudure cewu negedurogu ji tuje Maria apo. Ere turodo tuku. Ere tubujodo ji, tui kurido dutabo: tui toroe jado dukeje, ere meriri ekurewu bu tu je, ere kidoguru rorewu, kidoguru jirirewu, ere bu tu pugeje, ere jodo tuku keje. 1 Ewiedure tunuiao tada ekawo tugirimi cewu Herodes ae, du kodi icare ere tugirimi to moto kae ia awara tuginoiwu ji pugeje. 
Jesus uo, uce, eregodui apo Egito kaedu. 1 Etu uiagejere icare ia Tupare towadudo José unuiao tada, akore ji Aragojedo, akeragu nowu negedurogu ji, uceji, tarego Egito kae, taedudo toro jii imode tawie pugeje du kae, mare paga karega, Herodes jemarumode nowu negedurogu bogai tuwo bito. 1 Icare José ure turagojedo, boe cokao rugadu, ure tugeragu nowu negedurogu ji, uceji jamedu, icare uture ebo Egito kae. 1 Nonore eragojere jii Herodes bi kae. Boe koduwo Aroe Eimejerare profetadoge egoiaguwo reore imagore itonaregedu bogai Egito piji. (Os 1.). 
Herodes ui boe etore ewidodu. 1 Herodes, tui boe pa magodogei tuie kuri pagadodu jitu dukeje, bire boe kori koia; ure boe etore o joru buture pobe tu tu jewuge eeda kedodo Belém keje, oiei jamedu, cewu tunorai magodogei du tonaji, dukejere ro oino. 1 Kodire Profeta Jeremias makore jiboe ure pudumi rugadu: 1 Rama moto kejere boe emearudure ia makorewu makoji, boe etoragudui boe ji maidoduji: boekarema, Raquel rabodure ako oino toragudu tabo tore ewogai; ia butugugodure kejeboe bokwa, emagigokare kodi. 
Jesus uo, uce, ei tugirimi apo Egito pijidu. 1 Herodes bi rekodaji, Pao o tupa ure towadudo José jekai unuiao tada, akore ji 2 Aragojedo, akeragu nowu negedurogu ji, nowu uceji, akirimi Israeldoge eno moto kae; mare paga karega, cewu onare awu negedurogu jiwuge ewire. 2 Kodi icare José ure turagojedo, ure tugeragu nowu negedurogu ji, nowu uceji, uture Israeldoge eno moto kae. 2 Boekarema, tumearudui Arquelao jetui Judéiaji tuo Herodes mugato dukeje, pagudugodure tuduwo toro. Tumearudu birigodui tunuiao tada pugeje dukeje, ure turodo paci woje Galiléia moto kae. 2 Aregodure, ure turagojedo Nazaré bakurirewu keje, boewo nono profetadoge emagore jiboe reore Ema iemode Nazareno... 

3 João Batista uwadodae. 1Nowu du kodi, João Batista ure towadudo tumago tabo, tuwadaru tabo, boe matadu keje, Judéia moto keje. 2Akore: - Tagodorogado tai. Pao o boe pemegarewu puredugodunure. 3Awu jire profeta Isaia makore, cewu akoi oinodu kodiwu ia akorewu akore toro boe makodu tada boedo turugadu Aroe Eimejera togi, utawara jetorodo . 4João, barege ewiri meture ji, ia iku kogure kajeje. Wagere bokokwadogei, okwagere moiawei. 5Jerusalém ejewuge eiamedu boe, Judéia kejewuge eiamedu boe, Jordão ieiwu boe, etu kigodure ae. 6Emagore turo pegarewu ji biegai, ure etao pego pegodo, nowu Jordão po tada. 7Mare tuiorudui fariseudoge, saduceudoge etu kigodui to boe etao pegododu kae dukeje, João akore ei Awague etumedage, ioguduba ure taeruduwado tawo taginorudo aregodumodewu boe ekorigodae piji? 8Boe eerududo tagodorogai tai boe rugaduji. 9Tamago kaba tadoda ceore Abraão rema. Oino. Kode, inagomode tai Pao roiware tuwo Abraão onaregedudo awu torice. 1 Paro padure urugadu iguru ukwa paru tada; pemegakarewu iguru kadodumode bariguduwo joruto. 1 Ire tagao pegodo pobo tabo uwo nono tagodorogai taidure; mare aregodumode iregodajiwu, emare ro raka remawure ikori, ikare irugadu iwo bure tadawu reko ai. Ema umode tagao pegodo Aroe Pemegarewu tabo, joru tabo. 1 Iedure bakuji tuwo to iro bakujukodo, tuwo to iro tugu tuiato, tuwo iwo barigu joruto, bi bokwarewu joruto. 
Jesus ui taopegododu. 1 Jesus uture Galiléia moto piji, Jordão kae, João bogai, uwo taopegodo. 1 Icare Joãore turodo duku tuibagi, akore itaopegododumode akera tabo, macare ature itae? 1 Mare Jesus akore Nowu inodu piji jao. Parowo nono Pao aidu reore. Kodi icare Joãore turodo duku tuibagi ako oinodu keje. 1 Jesus ure tudawuje pobo piji taopegododu rekodaji. Dukejere icare barure tuiado, dukejere jorudure Pao Utaroe ui nono metugu reore duji ui tudawuje tuwugeje duji. 7Baru piji ia bataru ure turawuje tagoi: - Ica, imearudu kuricigore jiwu itonaregedu reo, kejere ire itaidae pemegarewu jamedu bu. 

Aroe pegarewuge eimejera ui turokogado Jesus jitu. 1Dukejere Aroe Pemegarewu ure Jesus reko toro boe mataduto Aroe pegarewu wo turokogado jitu bogai. 2Jesus otorogare pudui meri ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure, ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure. Dukejere icare uke boi buture keje. 3Podure jiwu ure tuburedo ji, akore ji Aroe Eimejera Onaregedumode aki dukeje, amagodo awu toriguruji tuwo amirewudo pudumi. 4Icare Jesus akore Bapera atugo pemegarewu keje atugododure oino amirewu mitodu tabo karega imedu jere, mare Pao bataru jamedu boe tabo. 5Dukejere icare Aroe pegarewu re Jesus reko bakurirewu pemegarewu kae, ure rakojedo Pao uwai oto mitodu keje, akore ji 6Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure aki rugadu dukeje, akaredo moto kae. Paga karega, bapera atugododure oino ure to tupadogedo tudo turugadu ai. Etumode ai tugera tabo, akawo awure okorido ia tori tabo (Sl 9, 1 1). 7Jesus akore Jamedu bapera atugododure akaba akimejera Aroe Eimejera matadudo aegai. 8Dukejere icare Aroe pegarewu re Jesus reko pugeje ia tori raicigorewu ao kae, ure jordudo moto jamedu boeji, motui puduiduji jamedu, akore ji 9Imode awu jamedu boe makakai, ai apujodo ii dukeje. 1 Jesus akore bataru jipagi Toro aibagi, Satans! Paga karega, atugodure oino jamedu amode apujodo akimejera Aroe Eimejera ji, jire awiapagamode tu rugadu . 1 Du inodu keje, Aroe pegarewu re tugera ra piji, dukejere tupadoge ere tuburedo ji tuwo tuwiapagado ji. 
Jesui tugirini Galiléia kaedu. 1 Jesus, tumearudui boe ji tugeragu João jitu kejere icare ure turodo oino Galiléia kae. 1 Tui tugera ra Nazaré jitu kodi, rakojere Cafarnaum keje, ia kuruga kurirewu jipa keje, Zabulon, Neftali eno moto keje. 1 Uwo nono Profeta Isaia makore jiboere: 1 Zabulon, Neftali eno moto, puredu pobo maerewu okwa kejewu, Jordão kejewu moto, Galiléia kejewu boe. 1 Nowu boe emedure boe cotadawuge, icare eerudure ia boe urugu kurirewu ui boe awadudoduji. Barogwa kododureure nowuge ebo, ewi tugui eidu kajeje . 1 Nowu piji mato icare Jesus okituware boe ji, akore tagodorogado tai. Pao o boe pemegarewu puredugodunure. 
Jesus makoi kare ecebage ei pobe puibijidu bogai. 1 Jesus, tumerui Galiléia kejewu pobo maerewu jipa jitu dutabo, jorudure boe ji pobeduji: umana, uwie. Simão duwure iere Pedro, mare uwie André, ei buke barigu pobo to duji; icarema kare ecebage rabodu. 1 Akore ei Mato iregodaji, iwo uwogure boe remawuge eiwugedo tagi. 2 Ako oinodu kejere, ere tugera ra tuwuge piji, ekodure apo. 2 Tugodui tododai dutabo, jorudure iage ei pobe pugeje duji, umana, uwie pugeje tiago, Zebedeu onaregedu, mare uwie João, eeduradure tuo Zebedeu apo, enure tuwuge pemegado. Makore etae. 2 Ere ika pijido, ere tuo pijido, ekodure apo. Jesus ui boe eruduwado, ui boe makarewuge epemegago. 2 Jesus merure Galiléia oiagi, tui boe eruduwado dutabo sinagoga keje, tui boe eruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewu ji, ciogoi ekogodae pegarewu jamedu boe, okorireboe, urureboe jitu dutabo etada. 2 Dukodi icare akaru ure tumaedo Síria moto jamedu boe joki, boe eture ae kogodurewuge ebo, boe okorire, boe urure jiwuge ebo, Aroe pegarewu re taredo towuge ebo, aora bai bairewuge ebo, pogora koborewuge ebo, Ure eiamedu boe epemegago. 2 Kodi icare boere turodo taci apo Galiléia kejewuge, Decápole kejewuge, Jerusalém kejewuge, Judéia kejewuge, Jordão okwa bakowu kejewuge eiamedu. 

Jesus makoi tori aoporu kejedu. 1Jesus, tuiorudui nowu boe emagai jitu dukeje, ruture ia boe aoporu ao kae. Ure tumugudo tu je, dukejere ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji. 2 Icare makore ei, ure eruduwado tagoi oino dutabo: 3Uwabore nono marenarue ewabo reorewuge eiwo aidugirimode, eonare Pao o boe pemegarewu ji kodi. 4Oragudurewuge, boe birigodure jiwugere emage, butugugodureboe makudumode etai kodi. 5Boe okori bokware jiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode, emage enomode motoce. 6Boe jetororewu boire jiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode, ewudugugodumode kodi. 7Okudurewuge, oiagudurewuge, eiwo aidugirimode, okudureboe, oiagudureboe makudumode etai kodi. 8Uwabo pemegarewuge tuwabo pemega koia, eiwo aidugirimode, eerudumode Pao ji kodi. 9Ure boe butugugodudowuge, eiwo aidugirimode, ekiemode Pao oreie ure emage kodi. 1 Boe etonare jiwuge, egoi boe jetorogodureboeji du kodiwuge, eiwo aidugirimode, eonare Pao o boe pemegarewu ji kodi. 1 Boe emode taroiaododu pegado dukeje, boe etonamode tai dukeje, boe emode tuwadararodaedo tai dukeje ma, taiwo aidugirimode. 1 Taegaredo tai, tagaidudo tai, more kuricigomode tagai baru tada; kode, oinonore onare profetadoge eiwuge etonare ei, duwugere ekodure tagododai. 
Sal mare urugureboe, jiwu bakaru. 1 Tagire sal reoreboemode tagi moto keje. Sal rododu okwamode taci piji ma, inoba umode pudae pugeje? Kiogwamodukare pugeje, ure turugadu bariguduwo, boe ewure jowo keje. 1 Tagire moto kejewu boe urugureboere tagi. Ia bakurirewu padui torekodu oagejedu boe eroiwamodukare tuwo biado. 1 Jamedu, boe emodukare ia jorugu mugudo aria kuda, mare jorugu mugumode tumuga keje, uruguwo mugure bai tadawuge eiamedu boeji. 1 Oinore tarugureboe awadudo boe eegai; nowu inodu koia umode boe eerududo taro pemegarewu ji, ewo aidurewudo, ewo gigirewudo Tao baru tadawu ji. 

Boe eroiagudu. 1 Tadugu kaba itaregoduie iwo profetadoge ero, ego, ewadaru okwado. Iwo okwado karega, mare iwo uporu kororogo pudui. 1 Ica, boe jokodu jire inagore tai baru, moto, okwamode mare ia Pao bataru paru rogu okwamodukare. 1 Ure Pao bataru biega inodu rogu uredugodudowu, umode boe eruduwado nowu inodu jitu keje, biega torimode baru tada. Mare cewu rore nono Pao bataru reore, umode boe eruduwadowu, ie kurimode baru tada. 2 Kode, inagomode oino tai: taro jetororewu kurimodukare nowu fariseudoge, escribadoge ero kori ma, tamodukare taremo baruto. 2 Tamearudure mariguduboe eiwu bakaruji tagaba boe ewido. Ure boe ewidowuge emagere boe eimejerage erorerumode ei. 2 Mare inagomode oino tai kodu kagirire tumana, tuwie jiwu, jiwomode ema remawu boe eimejerage enogituwa koia. Cewu akore boe kioga karega ino jiwu, boe eimejerage emode boe pegado ji; akomode aora bai bairewu oino jiwu, jiwomode joruce. 2 Kode, atumode altar jokora kae awo aro pemegarewu maku Pao ai, mare nono awiabutumode ia amana, ia awie ro pegare aiwu keje ma, 2 nowu akoe jetu nono altar jokorai jao, atudo amana rabodu, awie rabodu ae jao, amagodo ji, butugugoduwo ai; dukejere icare atumode mato awo nowu aro pemegarewu maku. 2 Apemegado onare aiwu ji akodui apo boe eimejera ae du tonaji, ukawo amagu boe eimejera ai, boe eimejera ukawo amagu tugoboigare ai, ukawo atugu baicorewu to. 2 Boe jokoduji inagomode ai: amodukare atawuje, akai jamedu boe morido du kae. 
Jesus akoi boe ero pegarewu jidu. 2 Tamearudure mariguduwuge eiwu bakaruji akera keadu kaba ia areduji. 2 Mare inagomode tai: cewu aiwore tagemo pegarewu tabo ia aredu jiwu, ure tubegado ji tuwabo tada. 2 Kodi icare, aeku pemegarewu koiamode ure awududo boe pegarewu to ma, tawuje, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ure turugadu ai ia akoe rogu bariguduwo apiji mare umode aiamedu boe bariguduwo joruto dure ema karega. 3 Akana pemegarewu koiamode ure awududo boe pegarewu to ma, kado, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ure turugadu ai ia akoe rogu bariguduwo apiji, mare aiamedu boe bariguduwo joruto dure ema karega. 
Jesus akoi boe ei pu barigudu jidu. 3 Awu bakaru reo jamedu ure tugera ra tuwire pijiwu, umode bapera maku ai tui tugera ra piji dutabo. 3 Mare inagomode oino tai boere tugera maku puai boe jetororewu tabo, dukeje oredu umode toreduje barigu tubiji ma, unure toreduje ro pegado. Cewu mugumode barigudurewu aredu apowu, ro pegamode jamedu. 3 Tamearudure mariguduwuge eiboe jituji akaba akogwatugu ia pagaboe kori koia, mare amagore Pao ji jiboe boe pemegarewu akaba pijido. 3 Mare oino ingomode tai tagaba tagogwatugu rugadu, jamedu baruto karega jamedu, mare paga karega, Pao muganure ema kodi. 3 Jamedu moto keje akaba ino, mare paga karega, nonore ure tuwure bu dukoia. Jamedu, Jerusalém keje karega jamedu, mare paga karega Boe Eimejera kurirewu o bakurirewu rema kodi. 3 Jamedu, akaba akogwatugu akaora tabo, amodukare ia akao ira corewu kigadudo, amodukare ia akao kigadurewu codo. 3 Tamagomode u! U! Rugadu dukeje. Tamagomode boro, boro rugadu dukeje. Kodure nowu koriboe aregodure Aroe pegarewu piji. 
Jesus makoi boe ero kirimidu jitu. 3 Tamearudure oinoie ure duji Joku umode tumorido jokuji, o umode tumorido oji. 3 Imirema inagomode oino tai tagaba tabewudo tai ia pegare taiboe togi. Mare iaboe umode tugera to akana pemegarewu jaogwaiwu aeji ma, ae mekido pai ae awubowu tabo ji pugeje. 4 Iaboe aidumode akudawu poru kejewu ji ma, awiri kejewu maku ai jamedu. 4 Iaboe emode akodudo pudabo kuri iaboe kae ma, ako doku kori inodu otobiji apo. 4 Ia boe enogwamagudumode ai ia ure tu akabo boeji ma, makai rugadu. Ia boe enogwamagudumode ai ia akoroe rogu ji jao ma, maku jao rugadu. 
Jesus makoi boe emearudu kuriiagu onare puduiwuge eidu. 4 Tamearudure jaowu kodiwu bakaruji amearudu kurimode ameduia ji, akorimode onare aiwu ji. 4 Imirema inagomode oino tai tamearudu kurido onare taiwugei, taro pemegado kodu kagirire taiwugei, tamagodo onare taiwuge, rorerure taiwuge eparu tabo. 4 Nowu inodu tabo, Tao baru tadawu oremode tagi, duwure meri rutudo pegarewuge ewugeje, pemegarewuge ewugeje, ure bubutudo pemegarewuge, pemegakarewuge ewugeje. 4 Tamearudu kurimode mearudu kurire taiwugei ma, kaboba morimode ema? Nowu publicanodoge erokana ino jamedu? 4 Tamago pemegamode tu tawobei ma, inoba urewu boe kurireuba tare udo? Ao pegokarewuge erokana ino jamedu? 4 Kode, tabemegado tawo nono Tao baru tadawu pemega magadure. 

Jesus makoi boe enogudae jidu. 1Tagaba taro pemegai boeidu boe eerududo ji. Umodukare ino ma. Tao baru tadawu umodukare morido tagai. 2Kode, amode akogududo tu ia ameduia apo dukeje, akaba aebogodudo inoduji, ukawo nono sinagoga kejewuge ero magai pui du reore, ere pu kurido tuiegai nowu inodu koia. Boe jokodu, inagomode oino mori makudure etai marigudu. 3Are akogududo ia boe ebo, mare akana koborewu joruduwakado akana pemegarewu ro oinoduji. 4Nowu inodu tabo, ai akogududo ia boe ebodu biadure, Ao, jorudure biadodureboe jamedu jiwu, umode mori maku akai. 
Jesus makoi boe emagoi barutodu. 5Amagomode aparu tabo dukeje, arokaba nono ure boe ee to puiboe reore; emage emagore tubaru tabo turagojei sinagoga keje, boe eeruduwo pudui du bogai. Inagomode boe jokoduji tai nowu ure oinowuge mori makudure etai marigudu. 6Amagomode aparu tabo dukeje, aremo awaito, baiporo mi, amagodo Aoji bia tabo, Ao, jorudure biareboe jiwu, umode morido akai. 7Tamagomode tabaru keje dukeje, tagaba nowu tamagoi tabaru kejewu kodiwu tawadaru tagaba itodudo nono aopegokarewuge ego reore, emeardaere nowu tuwadaru awadu koiaie boe emearudumode nowu tagoinodu jituji. 8Tagaba tadugu nowu ero oinoduto; mare paga karega, Tao joruduware kaboba tagaidure bogaiboeji tagogwamagudure bogaidu otodai. 9Oinore tagagomode tabaru tabo Pao, rakojere baru tadawu, boe etaidudo akieji. 1 Aeto cei. Boedo nono akaidu reore oino moto keje boe magai baru tadadure. 1 Cege maku cenai, boe jamedu jiwu maku cenai. 1 Awudugugo cei cero pegarewu ji, nono cewudugugodu magai ro pegare ceiwuge eidure. 1 Akaba cewududo boe pegarewu to, mare ceginorudo pegareboe piji. 1 Mare tawudugugodumode boe ji ero pegare taiwu keje ma, Tao baru tadawu butugugodumode tai jamedu. 1 Mare tawudugugodumodukare ro pegare taiwugei dukeje, jamedu Tao baru tadawu butugugodumodukare tai jamedu. 
Jesus makoi boe etodoroga jitu. 1 Tagodorogamode tai dukeje, tagaba tagiarigo nono ure boe pagado puduiwuge ero magadure, duwuge ere tuie kiarigodudo, boe eeruduwo oinoie todorogare pudui du koiaie tuie makodure oinono. Boe jokoduji inagomode oino tai: morire etai marigudu. 1 Akodorogamode ai dukeje, roreboe tugu akaoto, ae kabi jamedu. 1 Nowu inodu tabo amodukare nono otorogare puduiboere boe eegai, mare Ao jorudure biadodureboe jiwu, jekai tu rugadu; Aore, jorudure biadodureboe jiwu, dure umode morido akai. 
Boe enoroe kurirewu ema remawu. 1 Tagaba moto kejewu boe enoroe itodudo tagai; mare paga karega, moto keje uruguro borewuge emode pegado, iwogu kigodurewuge emode bai porodo, eiwogumode ji. 2 Boe enoroe pemegarewu itodudo tagai baru tada. Torore uruguro borewuge emodukare pegado, iwogu kigodurewuge emodukare bai porodo, eiwogumodukare ji. 2 Kode, nowu akoroe pemegarewu jeturewo kejere awabo mugure keje jamedu. 
Boe erugu. 2 Boe eekure jorugu rema boe etai; aeku pemegamode dukeje, umode aredu jamedu boe urugudo. 2 Jamedu, aeku pemegamodukare ma, aredu jamedu metumode boecorewu tada. Jorugu metui atodadu boeconure emadu ma, inoba boe cocomode? 
Pao baru tadawu mare awu moto kejewu boe enoroe. 2 Boe emodukare tudo puibiji ia cimejeraji, mare kodu kagirimode iaji, mearudu kurimode iaji rabodu, iarema biapagamode iaji, umode ia pijido rabodu. Taroiwamodukare tamearudu kuriwo Pao ji, tamearudu kurii boe enoroeji dutabo. 2 Dukodi icare inagomode oino tai tagogea kaba tamode kowuje taewo du bogai, tagogea kaba metumode taiboe bogai. Kode taei tu jedu karega kodure tagogwagemodedu kori? Tagodu, tawiri karega kodure metumode taiboe kori? 2 Tagaiwodo cebojewu kiege baregei: ekare boe tugu, ekare tugeragu ture tugu boeji, ekare tugu tuiato, mare Tao baru tadawu ure enogwagedo. Tagodukare remawu ekori? 2 Kakoduwu ia tagiba umode tabewudo tai taragoje raiwo biega tu je du bogai? 2 Kode, kodiba tagogeare metumode taiboe bogai? Tagado tu okureboe botu ji ka! Emaragodukare, ekare akigu to. 2 Nowu inodu boe oiado, inagomode tai ica, Salomão, boe remawu pudumidu inodu tabo, ukare tugudaedo nono awu okureboe reore. 3 Paore igurudo oino, ipogurudo oino, iwaragurudo oino, du boture awu ji, barogwato barigudumode joruto. Ica, kode, tagi, ime mearutoru bokwarewuge? 3 Kode, tagiarigodu kaba, tamago kaba kaba jiba pagogwagemode, kaba ceba pagudumode, kaboba pamode tugu pai? 3 Ao pegokarewuge erore gara gara gara nowu inodu jamedu bogai. Aro! Tao baru tadawu joruduware tagogeai nowu inodu bogai duji. 3 Tameardaedo tamuguwo Pao o boe pemegarewu tada du bogai boeto ji. Pao o boe jetororewu bogai jamedu; nowuia boerema makudumode tagai jamedu. 3 Kode, tagogea kaba barogwatoboe bogai, barogwatoboe okeamode pudui du kodi. Ia boe etogeare bogaiboe padure tu tu tuwugeje meri kodu uroduji, du ure turugadu. 

Boe ji tugogado puidu. 1Tadugu kaba boe ji, boe etugu kawo tai. 2Mare paga karega, tadugui boe ji du reore, umode tai jamedu: tai boe remagu du reore taremagudumode jamedu. 3Kodiba akaiwore nowu boe gigudu rogu padui amana, awie, eeku keje duji, macare aerudukare baimogajejewu mugui aeku keje duji? 4Mare kodiba akidare akagowo amanaji, awieji iwo nowu boegigudu rogu rawuje aeku piji, ia baimogajejewu padui aeku kejedu inodu tabo? 5Ro biadodureboe, baimogajejewu rawuje aeku piji jao, dukejere amode boegigudu rogu rawuje, amana, awie eeku piji. 6Boe pemegarewu baru tadawu tagaba barigu arigaodoge etae, tagaba tago torikuieje barigu jugorewuge etae, boe jokodukare kare emode tuwure to co co ji, emode tuie kirimi tai tuwo togwado bo bo tawugeje. 
Boe ji tumearutorudo Pao jitu. 7Tagogwamagududo makuduwo tagai; taemarudo boe bogai, taeruduwo ji; tagera to toe toe baiporoji, jadoduwo tagai. 8Mare paga karega, okwamagudurewu, okwamagudure bogaiboe makudumode ai; jemarure boe bogaiwu, jordumode ji; umode tugera to baiporo jiwu, baiporo jadodumode ai. 9Ica, kode, kakoduwu ia tagiba umode tori maku tonaregedu ai, okwamagudui amirewu bogai dukeje? 1 Okwamagudumode karo bogai ma, awaguna tamode makai? 1 Kode, tabegare, mare du inodu tabo tare boe pemegarewu maku tagore etai. Kode ica, Tao baru tadawu ukamodukare boe enogwamagudure bogaiwu boe pemegarewu makudu bokwado etai? Umode maku. 1 Tagaidumode boe erowo taiboe jamedu boe, tarodo ino ei boeto ji. Awu bataru keje, boe eroiagudu jamedu boe, mare profetadoge egoino jiboe jamedu boe padure keje. 
Awarare pobe. 1 Taremo baiporo biegarewu ji; mare paga karega, baiporo ja kurireure awara bari kurireure boe ewarigu pegareboeto, makarewuge ere turemo nowu awaraji. 1 Mare baiporo biegarewu, awara bari biegareure, kodure boe eemodewo kae, nowu awara jiwuge emagagirikare. 
Profetadoge pegarewuge. 1 Tamearudu awadudo tai profetadoge pegarewugei, emode tuburedo tai barge pemegarewuge ewiri tabo, mare etada, adugodoge emedure. 1 Ero koiare tamode epawuje. Botoguru ikurewu tudumodukare figeira kuroduji. 1 Iguru pemegarewu tudu pemegare: i pegarewu tudu pegare. 1 Ia i pemegarewu tudu pegamoduka, jamedu ia i pegarewu tudu pemegamoduka. 1 Iguru tudu pemegakarewu jamedu boe, kadodumode, barigudumode joruto. 2 Kodi icare profetadoge pegarewuge ero koiare tamode epawuje. 
Umode turemo baru towu. 2 Akore Ikimejera, Ikimejera, inowuge eiamedu karega etumode baruto, mare rore nono Ioga, rakojere baru tadawu, aidu reorewugere etumode baruto, boe pemegarewu to. 2 Makarewuge emagomode ii nowu meri keje cegimejera, cegimejera, cemagokare akie tabo? Akie tabo karega, cere Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu? Akie tabo karega cere boe pemegarewu kurirewu makarewu to? 2 Dukejere imagomode ei ioruduwakare tawogai jii je rugadu. Taiaedo ii, maragodu pegare inaiwuge. 
Baidoge ei pobedu. 2 Ica, kode, cewu mearudure iwadaru jiwu, romode oinono rugadu du, ure nono ia imedu ro jetororewu, dure ure tuwai mugudo tori aogeje. 2 Bubuture ji, pobo kododure ji, bakuru buture ji, nowu inodu jamedu ure tudo ji, mare butukare; mare paga karega, mugure tori aogeje kodi. 2 Mare cewu mearudure iwadaru jiwu, rokare nono iwadaru reoredu, dure ure nono imedu aora bokwarewu, dure ure tuwai mugudo kugaru tada. 2 Bubuture ji, pobo kododure ji, bakuru buture ji, nowu inodu jamedu ure tudo ji, dukeje buture, boe pegarewu kurirewu ure tudowuje ji. 
Jesus ro raka, ako raka. 2 Jesus ui togwa ra tuwadaru piji dukeje, boe eiamedu boe eebogodure bataru ji. 2 Mare paga karega, ure eruduwado nono boe remawuie pudumi du reore, mare nowu escribadoge ereore karega. 

Jesus ui moci mugure kejewu pemegago. 1Ica, Jesus ui turawuje boe aoporu joki dukeje, ia makarewu boe ekodure apo. 2Dukejere icare ia moci bare jiwu ure tuburedo ji, ure tubujodo jokorai, tagoi oino dutabo: - Cegimejera, akaidu kejere amode ipemegago. 3Icare Jesus ure tugera awogado, iera jeture ji, akore ji Itaidure. Kode, apemegago! Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, moci okware nowu imedu piji. 4Dukodi icare Jesus akore ji Amago kaba boe ewiegai, mare toro Pao burejoia ae, jordudo ai, Moisés ure boe eroiagudu jiboe morido, uwo nono jekai apemegagodure oinodu kodiboeji. 
Jesus ure ia Roma kejewu tugobaigarege eimejera utugare pemegago. 5Jesus ure turemo nowu bakurirewu iei Cafarnaum ceduto, dukeje, ia brae eimejera kodure kuri ae, okwamagudure ji, akore 6Cegimejera, ia ierabrarere iiwu mugure iwai keje, padure tuba keje, pogora rakaguraganure, kori rakaguragare ji. 7Jesus akore Itumode toro iwo pemegago. 8Icare nowu brae eimejera akore ji Cegimejera, boe karega ure imi awo aremo iwaito, mare amagomode ia awadaru mito tu je duji, du ure turugadu uwo nowu ierabrarere iiwu pemegago. 9U! Imi jamedu irojaidodunure. Ieture tugobaigaregei jamedu. Imagomode iaji toro. Utumode rugadu. Imagomode iaji mato. Utumode mato rugadu. Imagomode ierabrarere iiwu ji arodo oino, romode oino rugadu. 1 Icare Jesus, tumearudui awu inodu jitu keje, jebogodure, akore oino pudabowugei Boe rugadu jire inagomode oino tai iorudukare ia Israeldoge emearutorui nono awu mearutoru reore. 1 Dukodire inagomode oino tai. Makarewu boe etaregodumode meri rutu piji, meri butu piji, emode tumugudo Pao o boe pemegarewu keje, Moisés, Isaac, Jacó mage ebo. 1 Jeonare Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwugerema, ewarigudumode toro baawadu kae boecorewu to; nono oragudureboe, boe eto to puiboe umode nono. 1 Dukejere ure turodo bai, nowu brae eimejera keje, akore Toro, boere nono amearutoru reore. Nowu brae eimejera utugare pemegagodure kuri je. 
Jesus ure makarewuge epemegago. 1 Dukejere Jesus uture Pedro uwai kae. Boekarema, Pedro ucarugo padure tu tuba keje tuwiri uru tabo. 1 Icare Jesus ure tugeragu ieraji, icare nowu biri uru okware kuri je, ure boe eke bu iraji etai. 1 Nowu meri rekodu tabore, boere Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge eregodu kuricigodo ae. Tuwadarui mito tu je dutabo, Jesus ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu epiji, ure kogodurewuge eiamedu boe epemegago. 1 Nowu inodu ure nono profeta Isaias mako reore: 
Ure tugeragu pagogodae ji, ure toredudo tabo. 
Iaboe etaidure tugoduwo Jesus rekodaji. 1 Ia meri keje Jesus jorudure turagojei boe etoiakodu tadaduji, icare akore ture joruduwadowugei eiagu turego nowu kuruga kurirewu ia jipa kae. 1 Nowu inodu tonaji, ia esciba ure tuburedo ji, akore ji Cegimejera, ikodumode akabo, akodurewo jamedu boe kae. 2 Icare Jesus akore ji Okwadoge eiarire, kiege barege ewaradu rogure, mare Imedu Onaregedu umode taora buwo kejeboe bokwa. 2 Ia pugeje, ia ure joruduwadowu ui mito tu jedu akore ji Cegimejera, iwo ioga tugu moto to jao. 2 Mare Jesus akore bataru jipagi Ako itabo! Ado birewuge pu bi tugu moto to. 
Jesus ui bakuru, pobo, butugugodudodu. 2 Jesus ruture ia ika kurirewu to ture joruduwadowuge ebo. 2 Kuri je, bakuru kurirewu buture ika kurirewu ji, pobo maerewu pobuto rorire ika kurirewu joki; mare nowu inodu tonaji Jesus unudu rabodu. 2 Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, ere jetadudo, egore ji Cegimejera, ceginorudo, cewogwagodunure! 2 Icare Jesus jetadure, unorare ei: - Kodiba tabagudure? Marenarunure tagi tamearutoru bogai. Icare ure turagojedo, makore bakuru ji, makore pobo maerewu ji, boe butugugodure kuri je rugadu. 2 Dukodi icare nowu boe makarewuge egore tuiebogodu tabo Kakoduwu imedubao? Ica, bakuru, pobo maerewu, emearutorure kuri bataru ji! 
Jesus ure Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge ei pobedu pemegago. 2 Nowu kuruga kurirewu okwa bakowu keje, Gadarenodoge eno moto keje, Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge ei pobedu, ere tuiebu ia aroe eiao piji togi. Boekori remawunure ei, dukoia boe ekodu ekodukare nono. 2 Icarema enoiogwarigodure, egore Inoba aromode cei, Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu? Akaregodure mato awo cemorora amagadudo, boe kodu kimoi mai dukeje? 3 Ia jugorewuge makarewuge eedure nono puredu, togwage tabo boebutuji. 3 Aror pegarewudoge enogwamagudure Jesus ji, egore ji Amode cewarigu dukeje, cewarigu jece, jewu jugorewuge etae. 3 Akore ei Toro! Icare ere tuiebu, ere turemo jugorewugeto. Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, nowu jugorewuge eiamedu boe ere tuwarigu boito joki toro pobo to, tuwi pobo tada du kae. 3 Jeture eiwu ime eregodure tureadodui bakurirewu tada du kae nowu boere tuiegaiwoji, boere Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge eiduji jamedu. 3 Dukodi icare boe eture Jesus ae, enogwamagudure ji uwo tugera ra nowu nonowuge eno moto piji. 

Jesus ure ia pogora pegarewu imedu pemegago. 1Jesus ure taredo ika kurirewu to pugeje, ure pagado tai, kuruga kurirewu kajeje, aregodure to bakurirewu to. 2Icarema, ere ia pogora pegarewu imedu cedo ae, padui kamorewu keje dutabo. Icare Jesus tuiorudui nowu boe emearutoru raka inodu jitu keje, akore nowu pogora pegarewu ji Itonaregedu, akiwa rakado, aro pegarewu jamedu boe ire pijido, iwudugugodure ai. 3Dukejere, ia escribadoge, tumearudui nowu bataru jitu keje enogiru pegare pu biegai nowu ako oino duji, icare egore Awu imedu bataru peganure. 4Icare Jesus, tuiorudui nowu emeardae inodu jitu dukeje, unorare ei: - Kodiba tameardae pegare tawabo tada? 5Kakoduwu boe ewadaruba boe egoiwamode cai je: egomode iwudugugodure aro pegarewu ji oino rabodu, iarema aragojedo, amerudo oino rabodu? 6Ica kode, kakoduwu kodumode cai pudui? Aro kode, taeruduwawo oinoie Imedu Onaregedu roiwai moto keje tuwudugugoduwo boe ero pegarewu ji. (akore nowu pogora pegarewu ji) - Aragojedo, akirimi toro awai kae. 7Kuri je, cewu imedu ure turagojedo, uture tuwai kae. 8Nowu boe makarewuge, tuiorudui nowu inoduji dukeje, epagudugodu kuricigore, eegarere Pao ji ui ime ero raka maku etaiduji. 
Jesus mare Mateus. 9Icare Jesus uture nowu piji. Dukeje icare jorudure ia imedu iei Mateus ceduji, mugui nowu boere toroe kobo maku maku cimejerage etai kejewu ira keje, icare akore ji Ako itabo! Icare nowu imedu ure turagojedo, kodure apo rugadu. 1 Dukeje icare, Jesus, tumugui ira keje togwagewo nowu imedu uwai tada dukeje, publicanodoge, ro pegarewuge emagaredu etaregodure, ere tumugudo apo, ure joruduwadowuge ebo jamedu. 1 Icare fariseudoge, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore ure joruduwadowuge ei Kodiba tagimejera okwagere publicanodoge, ro pegarewuge ebo? 1 Icare Jesus, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, akore Boe okorikare jiwuge ewiapagamodukare jorubo kuru epa bogai, mare u kogodurewuge. 1 Toro, taeruduwado kodiba awu bakaru kodiboeji itaidure inogudu bogai, mare bitodureboe bogai karega. Itaregodure, mare imagowo pemegarewuge ewogai karega, mare pegarewuge ewogai. 
Jesus makoi boe etodorogai puduiboe jidu. 1 Nowu inodu tonaji, Joãore joruduwadowuge, ere tuburedo Jesus ji, enorare ji: - Kodiba cedorogare cei, fariseudoge etodorogare pudui, are joruduwadowuge ekar oino? 1 Icare Jesus akore Kodiba uwiredodure maiwu metage ekiarigodumode, nowu uwiredodurewu rakojei tu oino pudabo de keje? Boe aregodumode nowu uwiredodurewu tawujedumode epijiwo kae, dukeje etodorogamode pudui. 1 Boe emodukare aroia maiwu bu aroia codurewu poro keje; mare paga karega, nowu aroia maiwu umode aroia codurewu bowuje ma, mega kodumode tugori. 1 Jamedu, boe emodukare parera kuru maiwu tugu pori codurewu to. Boe eromode ino ma, ia dukeje, pori codurewu umode tuwowuje ma, nowu parera kuru umode ceredo, nowu pori pijimode jamedu. Mare boe ji parera kuru maiwu tugu pori maiwuto, mugu raka raimode tabo. 
Jesus ure ia aredu pemegago, ia nogwaredurogu jamedu. 1 Jesus makore kimo du tonaji, ia brae eimejera, sinagoga kejewu, aregodure ae, ure tubujodo ji, akore ji.
Cegimejera, itonaregedu aredu rogu akurure, bokware maigodu. Mare, mato! Amode akera bu keje ma, jemode kuri pugeje. 1 Icare Jesus ure turagojedo, kodure kuri apo, ture joruduwadowuge ekodure apo jamedu. 2 Icarema, joru butu makaguragare arii turopegado jiwu ia aredu ure tuburedo ji kujeto, ure tugera raido ukudae oto kae. 2 Akore oino tudada.
Ikera jetumode toe ukudaeji ma, ipemegagodumode. 2 Icare Jesus ure tumegido jice ae, jorudure ji, akore ji Akiwa rakado, itonaregedu! Ica, ameartoraere akinorudo. Icare nowu aredu pemegagodure kuri je. 2 Taregodui sinagoga kejewu brae eimejera uwai kae dukeje, Jesus jorudure okwa akore parira jiwuge enogwa akoi parira jituji, makaguragarewuge epadui pugajeje duji jamedu, 2 Akore ei Tagorodo oino! Nogwaredurogu okwa karega ure, mare unudunure. Emagerema enogwarire ji, enure ako oinodu perodudo. 2 Icai nowu boe ei tuiebu dukeje, ure turemo, ure tugeragu nowu nogwaredurogu ieraji, du ure turagojedo taci je. 2 Nowu inodu akaru ure tumaedo nowu moto kejewu boe eiamedu boeji. 
Jesus ure ia joku bokwarewuge ei pobedu pemegago. 2 Icare Jesus uture nowu piji. Awaraji icare ia joku bokwarewuge ei pobedu ekodure jice rekodaji, toiogwari tabo, egore Davi Onaregedu, akogududo cedabo! 2 Icare Jesus aregodure ia baito, dukejere cewu joku bokwarewuge ere tuburedo ji. Icare unorare ei: - Tamearutorure iroiwamode nowu inodu jituji? Egore U! Cemearutorure. 2 Kodi icare Jesus ure tugera bu eeku keje, akore Udo nono tamearutoru reore. 3 Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, eekure tuiado. Icare Jesus okituware ei, akore Taerudu rakado, tagaba boe eerududo nowu inoduji. 3 Mare tui tuiebu kuri je dukeje, ere nowu inodu akaru reko nowu moto jamedu ji. 
Ia imedu bataru bokwarewu pemegagoduredu. 3 Etu uiageje kuri je, boere ia bataru bokwarewu imedu reko mato ai, Aroe pegarewu metui tada dutabo. 3 Aroe pegarewu barigudure piji dukeje, nowu bataru bokwarewu bataru padure kajeje. Boe etoiakodu jebogodure, emago pemegare, egore Boe eerudukare iaboe eroi oino awu Israeldoge etada duji. 3 Mare fariseudoge egore Aroe pegarewuge eimejera ro raka koiare ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu. 
Jesus okudui boe ebodu. 3 Jesus merure nowu bakurirewu jamedu oiagi ia babuturogu boe oiagi jamedu, tui boe eruduwado dutabo, sinagoga keje, tui boe eruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewu akaru pemegarewu ji dutabo, tui kogodurewuge epemegago dutabo. 3 Tuiorudui nowu boe etoiakodu jitu keje, Jesus okudure ebo, mare paga karega, ekugudugodui, etaguru akedugodui, nono boe eetukare jiwu barege kugure ereore du kodi. 3 Icare akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei Tugudureboe kuricigore, mare maragodure jiwuge enowarore tu je. 3 Kode, tamagodo nowu oere oinowu ji makowo maragodumode jiwuge ewogai. 

Apostolodoge. 1Jesus ure ture joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotowuge eto pui. Ure ero raka maku etai ewo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu, ewo kogodurewuge epemegago tugogodae eiamedu boe piji. 2Ica, cewuge eie reo Simão, du iere Pedro oino jamedu; uwie André; Tadeu onaregedu iei Tiago cedu, mare uwie João; 3Filipe, Bartolomeu, Tomé; cewu publicano iei Mateus cedu; Alfeu onaregedu iei Tiago cedu; 4Simão Cananeu; mare Judas Iscariote, duwu koiare ure Jesus maku. 
Apostolodoge emaragodae. 5Jesus ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge etudo emaragodae kae, tui eruduwado du rekodaji. Akore ei Tadukaba judeukare emawuge ewai kae. Tagaba taremo Samaria moto to jamedu. 6Tadudo boeto ji okware boeto Israeldoge ewai kejewu barege kugure ewogai. 7Tagodurewo jamedu boe kejere, tamagodo: - Pao o boe pemegarewu puredugodunure. 8Kogodurewuge epmegago, birewuge eewodudo, moci bare jiwuge epemegago, Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu boe epiji. Makudure tagai paga tu jeboe tamode maku paga tu je jamedu. 9Tagaba meriri ekurewu, meriri kigadurewu towuje tagabo, diiero jamedu tagaba towuje tabegajejewu tada. 1 Tameru kaba tagodobo tabo jamedu. Tagaba tagudae tugu pugujiagi, tameru kaba tawure tadawu tabo, taiodo tabo karega jamedu. Nowu inodu boe piji. Mare paga karega, maragodurewu uke makudumode ai tumaragodae koia. 1 Tamode taremo ia bakurirewu to rabodu, ia bakurirewu roguto rabodu dukeje, taemarudo iaboe etaidui tuwo tugeragu tai du bogai, taedo nono ebo jii tadumode du kae. 1 Tai taremo ia baito dukeje, tagimadudo nowu boebo, tagagoi: - Boe pemegawo awu baiji, oino. 1 Nowu bai tadawu boe emode tudo turugadu dukeje, nowu tagagoi oinodu butumode ewugeje. Mare umodukare ino dukeje, nowu tagagoi oinodu umode tugirimi tagae. 1 Emodukare tugeragu tai ma, emearudumodukare tawadaru ji ma, tamode taebu nowu bai piji, iarema nowu bakurirewu piji dukeje, tamode tawure jukodo tu tawure urugudu rogu jamedu ji ewugeje. 1 Imagomode boe jokoduji tai: - Meri aregodumode mori makudumode kaewu dukeje, Sodoma, Gomorra bakurirewuge boe pemegamode ei nowu bakurirewu kori. 
Boe etonai Cristo oge eidu. 1 Imode tarojai nono barege kugure ereore adugodoge etoiado. Kode, tado nono awague ereore, mare jamedu metugue ereore jamedu. 1 Tamearudu awadudo tai imei emode tarego tugimejerage etae, emode iwara to tai, to sinagoga keje. 1 Tajedodumode brae eimejerage etae iwugeje. Nowu inodu tabo tamode ro oino taiwuge eruduwado bakaru pemegarewu ji; tamode aopegokarewuge eruduwado jamedu. 1 Emode tugeragu tai dukeje, tagogea kaba inoba tagagomode du bogai. Nowu inodu keje, tamagomode jiboe butumode tawugeje. 2 Mare paga karega, tagi karega tagagomode, mare Tao baru tadawu koiare umode tawadaru bu tagajeje. 2 Umanarewu umode tuwie maku bitoduwo, uo umode tonaregedu maku. Boe etore emode taredo tuomagei tuwo ewido. 2 Boe eiamedu boe ekodu kagirimode tai ikie koia, mare umode tudurudo jii boe oto kaewu, umode cinorudo. 2 Boe etonamode tai ia bakurirewu tada ma, tarego iato pugeje. Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai tamodukare Israel kejewu bakurirewuge eiado jii Imedu Onaregedu ui tugirimi du kae. 2 Ia jorduadodurewu kodukare ure tuioruduwadowu kori, utugare kodukare tugimejera kori. 2 Ure turugadu joruduwadodurewu ji tuwo nono ure tuioruduwadowu reore; ure turugadu boe etugareji tuwo nono tugimejera reore jamedu. Boe egore Aroe pegarewu eimejeraie ure boe etuoce, kode, jeture bai tadawuge eina, boe egomodukare ino? 
Ioguduba ceba pabagudumode. 2 Kode, tabagudu kaba. Ia biadodureboe bokware urugureboe piji, ia podureboe umodukare pudumi boe eruduwa kawo pudui. 2 Imagore tai boe cotadaboe, tamagodo ji urugureboe tada; tamearudure ji podu tu jeboe, tamagodo ji bai aogajeje. 2 Tabagudu kaba cewu ure boe ekodu, boe ewiri bitowugece, mare emodukare boe etaroe bito. Tabagududo boeto ji, roiware tuwo boe ewarigu tugodu, tuwiri, tudaroe tabo jorutowu ji. 2 Boe emodukare kiege barege ei pobedu maku emori rogu biega tu jedu morice? Mare iage ewudumodukare moto kae Tao aiduka dukeje. 3 Tagaora towu tagao ira jamedu rogu remagudure jamedu. 3 Kode, tabagudu kaba, tagire tagodure kiege barege ekori. 
Boe ei Cristo ogedo pudumi, iarema ei tuioruduwa bokwado jidu. 3 Kode, cewu mako pemegare ii boe eegaiwu jamedu boe, imi imago pemegamode ei Ioga baru tadawu biegai jamedu. 3 Mare ure tuioruduwa bokwado ii boe eegaiwu, imi jamedu imode ioruduwa bokwado ji Ioga baru tadawu jekai jamedu. 
Cristo ure boe erugodui puidu arego. 3 Tadugu kaba itaregoduie boe butugugodurewu tabo moto kaeduji; itaregodukare boe butugugodurewu tabo mare boe erugodui puidu tabore itaregodure. 3 Itaregodure iwo onaregedu okwacedo tuo piji, iwo onaregedu aredu okwacedo tuje piji, iwo urago okwacedo tujarugo piji. 3 Onare imedu jiwugere nowu uwai kejewuge emidodu. 3 Cewu mearudu kurire tuoji, tujeji, ikoriwu, ukare turugadu ii. Cewu mearudu kurire tonaregeduji ikoriwu, ukare turugadu ii. 3 Cewu ukare tugeragu to cruzji itabo ma, ukare turugadu ii. 3 Cewu ure tubewudo pudui tuwi kawowu, bimode rugadu, mare cewu bitodumode iwugejewu, nowu jewodumode pugeje. 
Boe enogudui puapodu mori. 4 Ure tugeragu taiwu, iire ro oino jamedu. Ure tugeragu iiwu, ure tugeragu ure irojaiwu ji jamedu. 4 Ure tugeragu ia profetaji nono profetaie emadu reore ma, ema jamedu morimode ai nono ia profetaie emadu kodiwore. Ure tugeragu ia jetororewu ji nono jetoreuie emadu reore ma, ema jamedu morimode ai nono ia jetororeuie emadu kodiwore. 4 Ia ure pobo akurewu rogu maku awu ia biegarewu rogu ai, ia ire joruduwadodureuie emadu koia ma, boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai mori okwamodukare piji. 

João Batista o rojaidodurewuge. 1Jesus, tui cewu ture joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko todu eruduwado du akedu keje, uture nowu nonowu boe etae, tumagowo ei, tuwo eruduwado. 2João Batista mugure baicorewu tada, dutabore mearudure Jesus roji. Icare ure ia ture joruduwadowuge etudo toro bogai enorawo ji. 3Egore ji: - Akina akagarure akaregoduwo, iarema cekana umode cewudugudo ia bogai? 4Jesus akore ei Toro, tareadodudo João biegai tamearudure jiboe ji, taerudure jiboe ji. 5Joku bokwarewuge etaiwore, pogora koborewuge emerure, moci bare jiwuge etagurugudure, bakaru pemegarewu readudodure marenarue ewiegai. 6Jiwo aidugirirewuge emodukare turo pegado igoia. 7Icare cewu João Batista ure joruduwadowuge eture nowu piji dukeje, Jesus makore oino João jiboe ji, nowu makarewuge ewiegai: - Tadure João togi boe mataduto de keje, kaba bogaiba tadure togi? Taeruduwo bakuru ure amagadudowu kadoji kana? 8Taeruduwo imedu ukudae pemegai jitu duji kana? Mare nowu ukudae pemegare ino jiwuge eedure boe eimejerage ewai tada. 9Kode kodiba tadure toro? Taeruduwo ia profetaji kana? U! Inagomode tai, kodure ia profeta koriwu ji. 1 Mare paga karega, João jire atugododure oino imode itugare rojai akododai, uwo akawara pemegado akododai. 1 Inagomode boe jokoduji tai areme etorei oinodu ekodukare João Batista kori. Mare du inodu tabo, biegare tu Pao o boe pemegarewu tadawuge etadawu kodure kori. 1 Nowu João Batista rekodajiboe jii oino maigoduboe, tubewu tabowu ure turemo Pao o boe pemegarewu to, tubewu tabowuge emode turemo to. 1 Moisés mare profetadoge emagore jii João kae Pao bataru ji. 1 Kode, tagaidumode tawo inodu pawuje ma, emare Elia rema, dure aregodumode, du reno. 1 Biajarewu mearudumode awu inoduji. 1 Kakoduwuge eiba imode awuge eebato? Ere nono ia boe etore kugurere tumugui tu ba oiadoda, duwugere ekudure tumedage ei, egore 1 Cenogwa akore pariraji, mare tarerukare; ceroiare mare tagoragudukare. 1 João Batista aregodure, okwagekare, kudukare boece, kodi icare egore Aroe pegarewu meture tada. 1 Imedu Onaregedu aregodure, okwagere, kudure, kodire egore Okwage kurirewu, kudu kurirewunure ema. Publicanodoge, ro pegarewuge etumeduianure ema. Mare Pao joruduwareboe ure towadudo turo pemegarewu koia. 
Meartorukarewu bakurirewuge. 2 Dukeje icare Jesus rore ja tuiogi cewu ture turo pemegarewu kurirewu makaguragare jiwu bakurirewugei, etaidukare tuwo turo pemegado kodi. Akore 2 Biododumode ai, Corozaim bakurirewu! Biododumode ai, Betzaida bakurirewu! Mare paga karega, cewu ure tudowuje taiwu boe pemegarewu kurirewu, umode nowu Tiro ji, nowu Sidoniaji jamedu ma, marigudu etodorogamode pudui tugajejewu bukigu okorirewu tabo, jorugudu tabo jamedu. Tagirema takare tagodoragado tai. 2 Kodire inagomode oino tai nowu meri aregodumode nowu mori kae dukeje, boe pegamodukare Tiro ji, Sidoniaji nono boe pega magai tai du reore. 2 Kode, aki Cafarnaum bakurirewu, aki kana acedodumode tu baruto? Boro! Awarigudumode jii toro joruto. Mare Sodoma bakurirewu jordumode boe pemegarewu kurirewu ui tudowuje atoda ma, umode kimo jii awu meri kae. 2 Kodire inagomode oino ai: - Nowu mori makudumode jiwu meri ji boe pega jokodumodukare ji nono boe pega magai ai du reore. 
Tadudo itae tawo tagamudo. 2 Nowu du kodi Jesus akore oino awu tuwadaru ji Ioga, iwadaru pemegamode ai, ore baru cewu, ore moto cewu, mare paga karega, are awu inodu biado joruduwarewuge epiji, are awadudo biegarewuge etai kodi. 2 U! Ioga, iwadaru pemegamode ai; mare paga karega, oinore ure akaidu reore kodi. 2 Boe jamedu boe makudure inai Ioga koia. Boe eruduwakare Onaregeduji mare Uo tu rugadu; jamedu, boe eruduwakare Uoji, mare tu Onaregedu; Onaregedu koiare umode awadudo ia boe ji jamedu. 2 Taiamedu boe, kiarigodure motudureboe kudawuge! Mato itae, imode boe iwaripodo tai. 2 Tagoredudo inoredure taboboe tabo, taeruduwado inure taeruduwado jiboe ji; mare paga karega, imire boekori metukare iwabo tada, inojarokare ii iwabo tada. Nowu inodu kodire taerudumode tai tagamudo duji. 3 Imode tagoredudo taboboe biakare, imodudu barire. 
Jesus ore Sábado rema jamedu. 1Jesus unure pagado ia trigo pa kajeje sabadore jiwu meri ji. Ure joruduwadowuge eke boire ei dukoia ere tugeragu ia enariji tuwo kowuje. 2Dukodi icare fariseudoge tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore Jesus ji Akaiwodo are joruduwadowuge eroi boe eromodukare ji Sábado jiboe ji. 3Icare Jesus akore ei Tamagokare Davi ro padure kejewu bapera atugoji, tuge boire pudui sabadore jiwu meri ji dukeje? 4Ure turemo Pao uwaito, ure Pao bataru padure kejewu amirewu kowuje. Aró! Ema mare metage emodukare nowu amirewu kowuje, nowu amirewu jetu otorogare tu Pao burejoiadoge etai. 5Tamagokare boe eroiagudu padure kejewu bapera atugoji: sabadore jiwu meri ji Pao burejoiadoge emaragodure Pao uwai tada, du inodu tabo inodu pegamodukare ei? 6Kode, imode awadudo tai: kodure Pao uwai koriwu rakojere woe. 7Tamode awu bakaru pawuje itaidure okudureboe bogai, mare bitodureboe bogai karega, oino ma, tamodukare ro pegakarewuge eiwodo. 8Mare paga karega, Imedu Onaregedu onure sabadoce jamedu. 
Jesus ure ia iera birewu imedu pemegago. 9Icare Jesus uture nowu piji, ure turemo sinagogato. 1 Nonore ia iera birewu imedu rakojere nono. Iaboe emedure nono jamedu duwuge enoragodure Jesus ji, togiru pegawo jitu bogai, egore Boe emodukana ia kogodurewu pemegago sabadore jiwu meri ji? 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Ia tagi, tagagu barogorogu umode mitotu tagabo, du butumode ia motoiato sabadore jiwu meri ji ma, tagaiwomodukare bogai tawo tawuje piji? 1 Kode, imedu kodukare nowu ia barogo rogu kori? Kode, boe ero pemegamode sabadore jiwu meri ji jamedu. 1 Dukodi icare akore nowu imeduji Akera raido! Ure tugera raido, du ure nono cewu tumeduia reore. 1 Kodi icare fariseudoge eture nowu piji, emagore pui inoba turomode tuwo Jesus bito du bogai. 
Pao utugare pemegarewu. 1 Jesus joruduware nowu fariseudoge emeardaeji, du kodire uture nowu eeda piji. Ia boe makarewuge ekodure apo. Ure kogodurewuge eiamedu pemegago. 1 Mare makore ei ereadodu kawo inoduji iaboe ewiegai. 1 Nowu inodu uwo nono profeta Isaia makore jaoboe reore: 1 Pao Aroe Eimejera akore ica, cewu inogwa kuridodure jiwu reo, jire ire ikeragu, imearudu kurire ji, kejere itaidae pemegarewu jamedu boe bu keje. Imode Itaroe udo tamudo keje. Umode ia moto tuginoiwu kejewuge ewie jetororeboeji. 1 Ema okimodukare, umodukare tumago awogado, boe emearudumodukare makoji ba oiadoda. 2 Umodukare ure tuwowu kado kado, umodukare uredudu kimorewu upea paru bitudo, jii ukai jetororeboedo tumorido du kae. 2 Moto jamedu boe epagamode bogai . 
Jesus mare Aroe pegarewuge eimejera. 2 Dukeje, boe ere ia Aroe pegarewu meture tadawu joku bokwarewu, bataru bokwarewu imedu reko ae. Jesus ure pemegago kuri je, dukoiare makore, aiwore. 2 Kodi icare nowu makarewu boe eebogodure, egore Cewu Davi onaregdu karegao? 2 Mare fariseudoge, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore Aroe pegarewuge eimejera koiare ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu. 2 Mare Jesus, turemodui emeardaeto, akore Boe eeda jamedu boe epadui pumekejedu, emode tubegado rugadu. Bakurirewu jamedu boe, baidoge eiamedu boe epadui pumekejedu emodukare pugeje jamedu. 2 Aroe pegarewu umode Aroe pegarewu barigu ma, onare pudui jamedu. Kode, inoba romode tuwo turo utudo todobiji? 2 Kode, ire Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu Aroe pegarewuge eimejera ro tabo ma, kode, ioguduba ro taboba tagore ere ewarigu? Nowu inodu koia emage rugadure emagomode morimode tagaiboeji. 2 Mare Pao Utaroe koiare ire Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu ma, kode, nowu inodu ure Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodui tagaidu awadudo. 2 Iaboe iaboe emodukare turemo ia imedu ro rakarewu uwaito, tukai nowu imedu ro rakarewu kogudo dukeje. Du inodu tabo boe eiwogumode uwai ji. 3 Mugukare itabowu onanure ii; ukare boe ako itabowu, unure boe barigu. 3 Kodire inagoino tai: boe ero pegarewu jamedu boe, boe ewadaru pegarewu jamedu boe, butugugodae aregodumode etae; mare ro ako pegare Aroe Pemegarewu jiwu, butugugodumodukare ji. 3 Bataru pegare Imedu Onaregdu jiwu, butugugodae aregodumode ae, mare bataru pegare Aroe Pemegarewu jiwu butugugodae umodukare, woe moto keje, ia aregodumodewo keje karega jamedu. 
I tudu. 3 Tamagomode ia i pemegaie, kode, tudu pemegamode jamedu; iarema tamagomode ia i pegaie, kode, tudu pegamode jamedu. Mare paga karega, tudu koiare ure boedo boe pawuje iji. 3 Awague ereorewuge! Tabegare, dukoia, inoba tagagomode boe pemegarewu ji? Mare paga arega, boe ewabo okorobadu koia aregodure boe enogwa kae. 3 Ica, imedu pemegarewu ure tugeragu ia toroe pemegarewu ji tubiji; mare imedu pegarewu ure tugeragu ia toroe pegarewu ji tubiji. 3 Inagomode tai: meri aregodumode mori makudumode kaewo dukeje, ime ewadaru pagawu jamedu boe mori makudumode etai. 3 Padure akajejewu awadaru koia, boe pemegamode ai rakudu, boe pegamode ai rakudu. 
Boe emagoi ia Jesus ro kurirewu bogaidu. 3 Dukejere ia escribadoge, ia fariseudoge egore Jesus ji Cegimejera, cedaidure ceeruduwo ai ia aro kurirewu towuje duji. 3 Mare Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi Awu du kodiwu boe ero pegarewu ego pegarewu, emearutorukarewu, enogwamagudure ia kodiboe bogai. Mare makumodukare iadure iakare pugeje mare profeta Jonas o kodiwu umode tudowuje ei tu rugadu. 4 Mare paga karega, ure nono Jonas meture karo kuri tada meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, boe copobe ma jewu metuia bokware du reorere Imedu Onaregedu metumode moto tada meri pobe ma awu metuia bokware, boe copobe ma awu metuia bokware jamedu. 4 Mori makudumode jiwu meri ji, Ninivitadoge emode turagojedo nowugei tuwo ewarigu boe pegarewu to; mare paga karega, edorogare pudui Jonas bataru keje. Aró, kode, kodure Jonas koriwu rakojere woe. 4 Mori makudumode jiwu meri ji, Sul jaogwaiwu brae eimejerago umode turagojedo nowugei tuwo ewarigu boe pegarewu to, mare paga karega, jaegiriboe pijire aregodure tumearuduwo Salomão joruduwa rakaguragare jiboe ji. Aró, kode, kodure Salomão koriwu rakojere woe. 
Aroe pegareui tugirimidu. 4 Ia Aroe pegarewu, tui tudawuje ia imedu pijidu, uture toro boe mataduto, tuiemaru tabo ia tumuga bogai, mare boekimore, jordukare boeji. 4 Do koiare akore kode, iwo ikirimi cewu ire iebu pijiwoto. Tui tugirimi dukeje, aregodure cewu ture tuiebu pijiboe kae pugeje. Aiwore tu je ma, biorore, akurugodure, oroere. 4 Dukejere ure tugirimi ia tumedage emode ikera awubodure ere pobe ikera awubowuto pega jokodure tugoriwuge ewogai, icare eiamedu tabo ere turemo to pugeje, nonore icare emugure nono. Dukoiare ecewu kodure boiwu, pega kodure turewo kori. Du reorere umode awu oinowu boe pegarewugei. 
Jesus uce mare uwiemage. 4 Jesus mako kimore nowu makaguragarewugei, du tonajire icare uce aregodure uwiemage ebo, ere tuwudugudo baawadu keje tumagowo ji. 4 Icare iage egore Jesus biegai, egore Ace, awiemage ere tuwudugudo awogai baawadu keje, etaidure tumagowo ai. 4 Icare Jesus akore Ioguduba imugaba? Ioguduba iwiemageba? 4 Icare, tui ciemagu ture joruduwadowugei dutabo, akore Awuge imugare, iwiemagere emage. 5 Nowu rore nono Ioga aidu reorewuge, iwie imedurewu, iwie aredurewudo, imugare emage. 

Ure boe a tuguwu. 1Nowu meri ji Jesus ure tudawuje nowu bai piji, kodure kuri, ure tumugudo kuruga kurirewu okwai. 2Boe makarewuge ere taiado tu apo. Dukodire ure turemo ika kurirewu to epiji. Ure tumugudo tada, nowu makarewuge eedui jipa kejedu otoi. 3Icare uwadodure, makore jiwu bakaru makaguragare. 4Akore: - Ia imedu ure tudawuje tuwo boe a tugu. Ui boe a tugu dutabo, ia boe a buture awara keje; kiege barege etaregodure ma, ere kowuje. 5Ia a buture tori pegato, moto kurikarewu keje; boture kuri je, moto okwatorikare ji kodi. 6Mare meri rutui kuri je dukeje, kidure tugwa bokwa koia. 7Ia a buture botoguruto; nowu botoguru ricodure, ure okwado tudo. 8Boe iwa tabo, ia a buture moto pemegarewu to, du ia a botu kurire, ia botu biegare. 9Aidure tumearuduwowuge emearuduwo. 
Bakarue kodiboe. 1 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, egore ji kodiba amagore ei nowu bakaru tabo? 1 Jesus akore ei paga karega, tagaire nowu Pao o boe pemegarewu boe biarewu makudure taeruduwawo ji. Emagarema karega. 1 Mare paga karega, ure apowu, ia makudumode ai pugeje, du itodumode todobiji. Mare boe kimore apowu, ure tu apowu rogu arudumode piji. 1 Ica, du kodire imagore ei bakaru tabo, duma, etaiwore ma, eerudukawo; emearudure ma, ewiapaga kawo, ekawo boe pa jamedu. 1 Ica, oinore profeta Isaias makore jiboe ure tudowuje ei tamearudumode tawiaja tabo, mare tamodukare pawuje: taerudumode taeku tabo, mare taerudumodukare boeji. 1 Mare paga karega, nowu boe ewabo rire marigudu, ere tuwiaja mi, ere tuioku mi, tuiorudukawo tuioku tabo, tumearudukawo tuwiaja tabo tukawo boe pawuje, ikawo epemegado (Is 6, s). 1 Tagirema, jiwo aidugirirewuge tagi: taeku jorudure, tawiaja mearudure kodi. 1 Imode boe rikirewu awadudo. Makarewu profetadoge, makarewu pemegarewuge etaidure tuioruduwo taerudure jiboe ji, mare eerudukare; etaidure tumearuduwo tamearudure jiboe ji, mare emearudukare ji. 
Jesus ui ure boe a tuguwu o bakaru kogadodu. 1 Kode, tawiapagado cewu ure boe a tuguwu imedu o bakaru ji ka. 1 Imedu mearudui Pao o boe pemegarewu o bakaruji tu kai boe pa dutabo, du Aroe pegarewu aregodure ure tugudure uwabo toboe tawuje piji, cewu a buture awara kejewu reoreboe reno. 2 Cewu a buture tori pegatowu ure nono mearudure tuiegare tabo bakaru jiwu reore. 2 Mare raikare, ukwa bokware, ia kiarigodure kejeboe, ia onare nowu bakaru koiawu aregodu keje, ewudumode kuri je. 2 Cewu a buture botoguru towu ure nono mearudu pemegare bakaru jiwu reore. Mare nowu okeare moto kejeboe ro jitu koia, ure okwado tuku, dukoia tudu bokware. 2 Tugudure moto pemegarewu toboe ure nono mearudure bakaru jiwu, ure pawuje, dure tudu pemegare, ia botu kurire pugori pugori. 
Boebutu pegarewu. 2 Jesus ure ia to bakaru bu pugeje, akore Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu ui boe a pemegarewu tugu to boepato du reore. 2 Mare boe ei tamudo dukeje, enudure dukeje, onare nowu imedu jiwu aregodure, ure boebutu pegarewu a tugu nowu boe a pemegarewu kao, dukejere uture. 2 Iro pemegarewu ricodure, enari boture, mare boebutu pegarewu padure kajeje jamedu. 2 Dukodi icare nowu imedu pemegarewu utugarege etaregodure, egore ji Cegimejera, are boe a pemegarewu tugu ako boepato. Kode, kaiba boebutu pegarewu aregodure? 2 Akore ei Cewu onare iiwu imedu ure ro oino nowu inoduji. Emagore ji pugeje Akaidure ceduwo toro kae, cewo tawuje? 2 Akore Boro. Tamode tawuje ma, tamode nowu iro tawuje tabodu umode. 3 Ricodo rugadu jii, pudonaji jii boe ji tugeragu jitu kae. Kadodumode dukeje, imagomode umode kadowugei: - Boebutu pegarewu kado jao boeto ji, upodo kogudo tawo barigu joruto; dukeje tamode tageragu iroji, tamode reko mato tuiato. 
Mostarda a. 3 Dukejere Jesus ure ia bakaru bu tu pugeje, akore Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu ui tugeragu mostarda a jitu, icare ure tugu to boepato du reore. 3 Nowu a biega remawure awuia tudugureboe rogu boe a kuda, mare boture dukeje, ricodure dukeje, kurire, kodure nowu boepa rogu tadaboe jamedu kori. Dukoiare kiege kugure ere tuwaradu bu itura boe keje. 
Ure amirewu barodudoboe. 3 Nowu inodu otobiji pugeje, Jesus akore awu ia bakaruji pugeje, akore Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia aredu ui amirewu barodudoboe tugu trigo kuduto, tuwo kudu jamedu pemegado du reore. 
Kodiba Jesus mako makore boe jeonare jiboe ji. 3 Awu inodu jamedu boere Jesus bakarudo ema boe ewiegai. Oinore ako kigodure boe ji. 3 Boewo nono profeta makore jiboe reore: - Imode iia barido bakaruji, imode biareboe mariguduwu awadudo boe ji. 
Jesus ure boebutu pegarewu jiboe kogado. 3 Dukejere icare Jesus imadure boe ebo, ure etudo. Du inodu otobiji, ure turemo baito pugeje, icare ure joruduwadowuge ere tudo pui ae, egore ji Cewie cewu boebutu pegarewu tugudui boepato du kodiboeji. 3 Icare Jesus akore Ure boe a pemegarewu tugu ure nono Imedu Onaregedu. 3 Boepare ure nono awu moto reore. Boe a pemegarewu ure nono Pao o boe pemegarewu tadawuge ereore. Boebutu pegarewu ure nono Aroe pegarewu orere. 3 Ure boe a pegarewu tuguwu imedu pegarewu Aroe pegarewu rema. Boe ei tugeragu iro jitudu ure nono awu moto akedumodedu kodiboe reore. Ure iro kadowugere Pao o tupadogere emage. 4 Boebutu pegarewu kadoduredu barigudure jorutodu ure nono awu moto akedumodedu kodiboere. 4 Imedu Onaregedu umode to tupadoge edo boe pegarewu jamedu boe barigu to boe pemegarewu piji, umode edo ro pegarewuge ewarigu piji jamedu. 4 Nono etoragudumode, eto ako kororogodumode pui. 4 Dukejere pemegarewuge erugumode Pao o boe pemegarewu keje nono meri joku urugure. Biajarewu mearududo awu inoduji. 
Boe enoroe biadodurewu. 4 Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia boe enoroe moturewu pemegarewu biadodui ia boepa tada du reore. Ia imedu jorudure ji, mare ure biado pugeje. Dukeje, tuiegare tabo, ure toroe jamedu boe, toe jamedu boe ure akirodo tabo, tuwo cewu boepa aru. 
Tori mori kuricigorewu. 4 Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu jemarure tuwo akirodo tori moturewu jiwu reore. 4 Jorudure jitu du pemegare, mare mori kuricigore. Dukejere ure tuieture jiboe jamedu boe akirodo tabo tuwo cewu tori moturewu mori kuricigorewu aru. 
Buke jiwu bakaru. 4 Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono buke barigudui pobo todu ui tugeragu kare epadui pumekejedu boe jitu reore. 4 Buke okorobadu keje, nowu kare ecebage ere tumugudo keje, karebo, boeki kae tu je; ere tumugudo, icare ere tado karei: kare pemegarewuge ere tugu kodoto, kare pegarewuge ere ewarigu. 4 Oinore awu moto akedu keje boemode. Pao o tupadoge etaregodumode tuwo pegarewuge etawuje pemegarewuge epiji. 5 Emode ewarigu joruto, etoragudu jetui nono du kae, eto akoi pui du kae. 5 Dukejere icare Jesus unorare ture joruduwadowugei: - Tare boe pa awu inodu jamedu ji? Egore U! 5 Jesus akore Awu inodu kodire, ia joruduwarewu joruduwai Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwu ure nono boe etuo magai ui tugeragu ia toroe maiwu ji, ia toroe codurewu ji du reore. 
Jesus rakojei Nazaré kejedu. 5 Jesus, tui awu bakaru akedudo dukejere icare, uture nowu piji. 5 Ure tugirimi to bakurirewu roguto, ure sinagoga kejewuge eruduwado. Dukodire boe egore tuiebogodu tabo Mure, kaiba awu joruduwa rakareboe aregodure bogai? 5 Kode cewu ira epa onaregedu karegao? Maria, oino karega uce iere? Uwiemage karega Tiago, Jos, Simão, Judasnure emage? 5 Utuiemage karega ere oino paiogi? Kode, kaiba awu inodu jamedu boe aregodure ae? 5 Eeruduwakare inoba tagowo jituji. Mare Jesus akore ei Tu to moto keje, tuwobe ewai keje, ia profeta barigodudodu kigodure pudui. 5 Emearutoru bokwa koiare ukare turo kurirewu towujedu makado nono. 

João Batista bi. 1Nowu kodiwu kodi brae eimejera Herodes mearudure boe emagoi Jesus jituji. 2Dukejere akore tuwai tadawu tudugaregei U! João Batista jewodure dure ema rugadu. Kodire ure turo kurirewu towujedu makaguragado oino. 3Mare paga karega, Herodes koiare ure boe edo tugeragu João Batistaji, ure edo ieragogudo, ure edo tugu bai corewu to. Mare Herodiade, Filipe oreduje koiare ure nowu inodu jamedu boedo oino João ji. 4Marigudu João akore Herodeji Akaba akeragu awie oredujeji akoredujece. 5Herodes aidure tuwo bito, mare pagudure boece, boe emearutorure ji, profetare ema kodi. 6Mare Herodes o joru butu keje, Herodiade onaregedu nogwaredu rogu rerure nowu Herodes ure utuiagu tuwai kae nowu peta kaewuge etoiadoda, ure Herodes jekaredo. 7Dukodire Herodes makore ji, tui togwatugu dutabo, akore.
Akogwa magudumode bogaiboe jamedu boe imode makakai rugadu. 8Dukodi icare nowu nogwaredu rogu, tuje bataru rekodajire akore Amode João Batista aora makinai awu baku keje. 9Icare Herodes kiarigodure tu... Mare, ure togwatugu dukoia, nowu brae eegai, kodire ure tudugarege edo makai rugadu. 1 Ure edo João itoru kado baicorewu tada. 1 Icare João Batista ao cedodure mato baku keje, ere maku tu nowu nogwaredu rogu ai, ema ure maku toro tuje ai. 1 Dukeje nowu Joãore joruduwadowuge etaregodure mato bogai tuwo tugu moto to. Dukejere ere nowu akaru cedo Jesus bogai. 
Jesus ure makarewu boe enogwagedo. 1 Jesus, tumeradui nowu inodu akaru jitu keje, uture nowu piji, ia ika kurirewu tabo, tuwo turodo oino ia boe biorewu to. Mare boe emearudure dukeje, nowu bakurirewuge etadawu boe makarewuge eture tuwure tabo rekodaji. 1 Icare Jesus, tui tudawuje nowu ika kurirewu piji dukeje, jorudure nowu boe etoiakoduji, okudugodure tu ebo, ure kogodurewuge epemegago. 1 Meri rekodu buture tu dukejere, ure joruduwadowuge, tuiedui nono apo dutabore, egore Jesus ji Boe matadu tadaboenure woe, boere marigudu. Kode, awu boe etudo, ewo akirodo iaboe rogu boeji tugeje. 1 Mare Jesus akore ei Umodukare ino. Tagi rugadu tamode enogwagedo. 1 Icare egore ji Amireure ikera awubodure tu woe, kare kugurere pobe tu je. 1 Jesus akore Mato tabo! 1 Dukejere ure boedo tumugudo boebutu tada, ure tugeragu nowu amireui ikera awubodure tu je duji, mare cewu kare ei pobe tu je duji, ure tuie aogado baruto, makore boe pemegarewu ji keje. Ure kado, dure ure maku ture joruduwadowuge etai, emagere icare ere pedo toro boe etai. 2 Eiamedu boe ere kowuje, enogwa amogodure, ekuredure. Kobo jetu kimorewu tabore ure joruduwadowuge ere kododoge ikera pudogidure iwurekoi pobe tu jedu enogorawu. 2 Aró kode, okwagerewu ime ere 5. 0 boe kadui areme, boe etore, eremagu dutabo. 
Jesus merui pobo aojidu. 2 Dukejere icare Jesus ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge edo taredo ika kurirewu to ewo pagado jece bakowuto tododai, cimadui nowu makarewu boe ebo du tonaji. 2 Imadure nowu boe ebo dukeje, Jesus ruture tori rairewu ao kae nonowo ure togwakurido tuginoigodu boe biaru keje. Boecodure ji toro tuginoigodu. 24 Nowu inodu tonaji, ika kurirewu mugu jaegirire pobo maerewu oiadoda, akurugodure jice woje, jice woje pobuto koia, mare bakuru okwace pegare dukoia. 2 Ba aregodu tabore, Jesus aregodure etae tumerui pobo ao jitu tabo. 2 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge, tui boe pa pobo aoji raboduie meruredu jitu tabo, epagudugodure, enoiogwarire tubagudu koia, egore Ia aroe boe! 2 Mare Jesus akore kuri ei Taedo kiorodo, tabagudu kaba, imire iro oino. 2 Dukodi icare Pedro akore ji Cegimejera, aki rugadu dukeje, amagodo ii imeruwo pobo aoji kuri toro akae. 2 Jesus akore ji.
Mato! Icare Pedro ure turawuje ika kurirewu piji, merure pobo aoji Jesus togi. 3 Mare bakuru ure togwamudu rakado dukeje, pagudugodure, akore Ikimejera, ikinorudo! 3 Nowu inodu keje kuri je, Jesus ure tugera raido ae, ure tugeragu ji, akore ji Marenarure aki, imedu, amearutoru bogai! Kodiba amearutoru bokware? 3 Ei taredo ikato du tonajire bakuru butugugodure tu je. 3 Dukoiare cewu ika tadawuge ere tubujodo ji, egore Boe jokodu radu Pao Onaregedure aki. 
Jesus ure boe epemegago Genesaré keje. 3 Ere pagado nowu kuruga kajeje, etaregodure Genesaré kae. 3 Nowu jeture nonowuge ere pawuje. Dukodire ere nowu tuieda oieiwu boe eiamedu boe ewie. Dukodi icare ere kogodurewuge eiamedu boe erego ae. 3 Enogwamagudure ji uwo edo tugera jetu toi nowu tugudae okwa rogu jitu bogai. Iera jeture jiwuge eiamedu boe epemegagodure. 

Jesus mare judeudoge ero. 1Jerusalém kejewu ia fariseudoge, ia escribadoge eture mato Jesus ae, egore ji 2Kodiba are joruduwaduwuge emearutorukare jawuge eroiaji? Ekare tugera kabi togwagemodedu otodai. 3Icare Jesus akore ei Kode, kodiba tamearutorukare Pao bataru ji taro koia? 4Pao akore ado nono iaboere aoji, aceji! Akore jamedu ure tuwadaru pegado tuo jiwu, tuje jiwu, bimodedure morimode ema. 5Tagirema tagagore Cewu akore tuo, tuje jiwu: cewu ire ikerabraredo tai taboboe ire maku Pao ai. 6Dukodiwu umodukare tugurido pudabo tuoji, tujeji pugeje. Kode ino taro koia, tare Pao bataru barigududo. 7Ro biadodurewuge, tai rugadure profeta Isaias akore 8Awu boe emearutorure ii tu togwa tabo, mare ewabo rema mugu jaegirire ii. 9Enogwamagudure iwogaidu boe pagawunure ema; mare paga karega, ere boe eruduwado tu aregodure ime epijiwu ewadaru ji. 1 Dukejere Jesus ure cewu makarewuge edo tudo pui pudae, akore ei 1 Tamearududo, taeruduwado ure turemo boe eiagiboe karega ure boe erorogodudo; mare aregodure boe eiabijiboe koiare ure boe erorogodudo. 1 Dukejere icare cewu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, egore ji Aeruduware fariseudoge eerudu pegai awu awadaru jituji? 1 Jesus akore.
Ioga baru tadawu ukare tuguboe jamedu boe ukwa tawujedumode. 1 Nowuge epijido. Eeku bokware dutabo ere joku bokwarewuge ekoduiagu turegodaji. Kode ia joku bokwarewu kodumode tumeduia joku bokwarewu otodai ma, ewudumode moto oiakoto puapo. 1 Dukodi icare Pedro akore Nowu bakaru kogado cewiegai. 1 Jesus akore Kode, tagi jamedu tajekare taeruduwawo du bogai? 1 Ure turemo boe eiagiboe jamedu boe buture boe ekurito, dukeje barigudure toro boe biadoduto. 1 Mare aregodure boe eiabijiboe aregodure boe ewabo piji; nowu koiare ure boe erorogodudo. 1 Mare paga karega, boe ewabo pijire boe emeardae pegarewu, boe eiwogu, boe ji pu roiaododu, boe ewadaru pegai puidu aregodure kodi. 2 Nowu inodu jamedu koiare ure imedu rorogodudo. Mare boe ekai tugera kabi togwagemodedu otodai dukoia karega ure imedu rorogodudo. 
Ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu aredu meartorae. 2 Jesus uture nowu piji, ure tuburedo Tiro, Sidônia eno moto kae. 2 Dukejere ia aredu Canaa kejewudo, ure tuburedo ji, oiogwarire, akore Cegimejera Davi onaregedu, akogududo itabo! Itonaregedu aredurogu Aroe pegarewu meture tada, ukare padu kiorodo pudui. 2 Mare Jesus makokare ia tuwadaru boeji ji. Dukodi icare ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, enogwamagudure ji, egore Awu aredu utudo toro: oiogwari kuricigore paregodaji. 2 Icare Jesus akore Irojaidodure mare jeture Israel kejeu barege kugure ewogwai boeto du bogai tu je. 2 Mare cewu aredu kodure kuri ae, ure tubujodo tuku jokorai, akore Cegimejera, akerabraredo ii! 2 Jesus akore Boe emodukare tore eke barigu arigaodoge etai. 2 Icare nowu aredu akore Boe jokodu, mare arigaodoge kugure emode akure pudumiwuge eke gigudu rogu boe butui moto kaedu kowuje. 2 Icare Jess akore ji Aredu, amearutoru remawunure. Boedo nono akaidu reore. Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, onaregedu pemegagodure. 
Jesus ure boe makarewuge epemegago. 2 Icare Jesus ure tudawuje nowu piji, ure tugirimi Galiléia kejewu pobo maerewu puredu tu je, ruture ia boe aoporu ao kae, ure tumugudo nono. 3 Dukejere makarewu boe ere tuburedo ji. Boe karema, bataru bokwarewuge, pogora pegarewuge, ia ure awubowu tujewuge mare ia kogodurewuge ebo jamedure ero oino. Ere edo tuburedo bure paru, ure epemegago. 3 Dukodi, nowu inodu koia, boe erore ta... Nowu bataru bokwarewuge ewadaru padui ekajeje duji, nowu ure awubowu tujewuge epemegago duji, nowu meru bokwarewuge emerure duji, nowu joku bokwarewuge etaiwore duji. Dukodire icare eegarere Israeldoge eno Aroe Eimejera ji. 
Jesus ure ime ei 4. 0 cedu enogwagedo pugeje. 3 Jesus rema, ure ture joruduwadowuge edo tudo pui, akore ei.
Inogudure awu boe makarewuge ebo. Ica, kode, merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware eedui itabo dukeje, ia eke bokware ewo kowuje. Imodukare etudo tukai boe ko dutabo dukeje, ewogwa kawo awara keje. 3 Icare ure joruduwadowuge egore ji Inoba paromode paemaruwo awu boe matadu tada amirewu makamode du bogai pawo awu boe makarewuge enogwagedo? 3 Jesus akore Inoba amireure tagabo? Egore Ure ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, mare ia kare kugure jamedu. 3 Kodi icare Jesus ure boe makarewuge edo tumugudo moto keje. 3 Dukejere ure tugeragu nowu amirewu ji, nowu kare kugurei, makore ia tuwadaru pemegarewu ji ewugeje. Icare ure tugera bu kajeje toku je, ure maku ture joruduwadowuge etai, emagere icare ere maku toro nowu boe makarewuge eiamedu boe ai. 3 Eiamedu boe okwagere ji, enogwa amogodure. Jeture tuiagejewu tabo, ure joruduwadowugere kododoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu enogorobadudo. 3 Aró, kode, okwagerewu ime ere 4, areme eremagudu ka dutabo, etore eremagudu ka dutabo jamedu. 3 Dukejere icare Jesus ure nowu boe etudo, icare ruture ika kurirewu to, ure tugirimi Magadan kejewu boe eeda kae. 

Boe emagoi Jesus ji ia ro kurirewu bogaidu. 1Ia fariseudoge, ia saduceudoge ere tugirimi Jesus ae, toebatodu pegarewu tabo ji, enogwamagudure ji, egore uiagu baru tadawu ia turo kurirewu towuje tuiegai. 2Kodi icare Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi Meri rekodu tabore tagagore nonore boe motumode, baru kujagure kodi. 3Meri togire tagagore awu jire bubutu pegarewu butumode, baru kujagu tugure kodi. 4Ro biadodurewuge! Taeruduware ure tudo baru tadawu boeji. Kodiba taeruduwakare awu meri jiwu ia koiaboeji? Awu ro, ako, pegarewuge enogwamagudure ia boe kurirewu toduwo tuiegai. Ia kodiboe makudumodukare etai, mare cewu ure tudo Jonas kodiboe tu rugadu. Awu tuwadaru rekodajire icare Jesus uture nowu piji. 
Fariseudoge mare saduceudoge ewadaru. 5Tui pagado kuruga kurirewu okwa bakowuto dukeje, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ewiagodurade amirewu piji. 6Jesus akore ei.
Taeto tai, tamearudu awadudo tai nowu fariseudoge, nowu saduceudoge eno boe barodudoboeji. 7Emeardaere tu kae amirewu to du kodie ako oino. 8Mare Jesus, tuiorudui emeardaeji dukeje, akore ei Marenarure ema tumearutoru bogaiwu ime, kodiba tameardaere amirewu bokwai du koiaie inagoino? 9Takaradu boe pawuje roga? Tawia jetukare ikera awubodure tu jedu amirewu ji, tai kododoge enogorao duji? 1 Tawia jetukare jamedu amirewuge ei ikera awubodure ikerakoi pobe ikera awubowuto du mare imei 4. 0 ce duji, tai kododoge enogorao duji? 1 Kodiba takare boe pa amirewu ji kaegae inagoino tai cewu inagoi tai taeto tai, tamearudu awadudo tai nowu fariseudoge, nowu saduceudoge eno fermentoji, oino? 1 Dukejere ere boe pa nowu inoduji karadega ako oino, mare fariseudoge, saduceudoge ewadaru ji raboduie ako oino. 
Pedro meartorae. 1 Etaregodui Filipe o moto iei Cesaria cedu kae dukeje, Jesus unorare nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore ei Nowu boe egoino du kodi, ioguduba Imedu Onaregedu ure ema? 1 Egore Iage egore João Batistaie, iage egore Eliaie, iage egore Jeremiaie, iarema ia profetaie. 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Kode, tagi, inoba tagagore ii? 1 Icare Simão Pedro akore Akire Cristore aki. Bi bokwarewu Pao Onaregedure aki. 1 Kodi icare Jesus akore ji Aiwo aidugiri pemega remawunure, Simão, Jonas onaregedu, mare paga karega, moto kejeboe koia karega ure akagodo oino, mare Ioga baru tadawu koiare ure akagodo oino. 1 Kode iwo awadudo awiegai. Ica, akire tori rema. Awu tori aogejere imode ino Igreja mugudo. Ica, Aroe pegarewu ro jerimagamodukare ji. 1 Imode Pao o boe pemegarewu o baiporo epa maku akai. Are kogudo woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kogudodumode baru tada jamedu; are kiwuje woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kiwujedumode baru tada jamedu. 2 Dukeje, makore ture joruduwadowugei, enogwajetukawo boe ewiegai Cristoie ure pudumiduji. 
Jesus makoi tuwiji, tuiewodu jidu. 2 Kode, nowu piji matore icare Jesus ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge eruduwado akeie pudui tuduwo Jerusalém kae, tuiwo kuricigomoduie, boe codudoge, baire eimejerage, escribadoge, eigoia; tuwimodeduie, dukeje, merimode pobe ma awu metuia bokware dukejere tuiewodumodeduie. 2 Icare Pedro makore ji: 
- Aroe Eimejera kaiagu nowu inodudo oino, cegimejera, nowu inodu umodukare tudowuje ai. 2 Mare Jesus ure tugirimi pai ji, akore ji Aiaedo ii, Aroe pegarewu, awo iwogwado boetodunure aki. Pao meardaere karega ameardae rema, mare ime emeardae. 2 Inodu otobiji, Jesus akore nowu ture joruduwadowuge ei Ia aidure tugoduwo itabowu, umode tuwia ra tubiji, umode tugeragu to cruzji tugoduwo itabo. 2 Mare paga karega, cewu aidure tuwo cinorudo tuwimodedu pijiwu, bimode rugadu; mare cewu ure tuwidodudo inaiwu, jordumode pudui. 2 Kode, inoba imedu romode toi moto jamedu boe keje, mare tuwo tudaroe okwado? Kode ica, kaboba imedu umode maku tudaroe morice? 2 Mare paga karega, Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode Tuo reoredu tada dutabo, to tupadoge ebo, dukejere umode boe ero mori maku boe etai. 2 Boe jokodu remawure imode awadudo tai: awu jeture oino woewuge makarewuge eerudumodukare tuwiji, tuiorudukai Imedu Onaregedu ui tugirimi tuguricigo tabo, to boe pemegarewu tabo pugeje du kae. 

Jesus ui tudo tuginoidu. 1Meri ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto dukeje Jesus ure Pedro, Tiago, João, ekodudo pudabo, ure eko tuginoi pudabo paci ia tori rairewu kae. 2Dukejere icare ure tudo tuginoi taci. Je urugure nono meri urugure, ukudae kigadu kurukurure eegai. 3Dukejere icare Moisés, Elias ere tuguo Jesus jaogwai pudogi, tumagoi jitu tabo. 4Dukodi icare Pedro makore ji, akore Cegimejera, pemegare paeduwo woe. Akaidu keje, imode baido pobe ma awu metuia bokware: awaimode ia, Moisés uwaimode ia, Elias uwaimode ia. 5Ako oinodu tonajire, ia boetugu urugurewu ure tubodo ebo taci je. Nowu boetugu pijire ia mako padure, akore Awure imearudu kurire jiwu itonaregedu rema. Kejere imearudu kuriae jamedu boe bu keje. Tawiapagado bataru ji. 6Tumearudui nowu inodu bataru jitu kejere, ure joruduwadowuge ewudure, ee jore moto to tuku je, ewire tubagudu koia. 7Mare Jesus ure tuburedo ei, ure tugera jodo ewugeje, akore ei Taragojedo, tabagudu kaba. 8Etaiwore ceboje, eerudukare boeji, mare Jesus jire eerudure tu je. 9Tui turawuje nowu tori rairewu joki du tonajire, Jesus akore ei Tamago kaba boe ewiegai taerudure jiboe ji jii Imedu Onaregedu jewodui birewuge epiji du kae. 1 Du inodu otobiji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji, egore Kodiba escribadoge egore Elia aregodumoduie boeto ji? 1 Jesus akore ei Boe jokodure Elias aregodumode rugadu tuwo boe jamedu boe udo turugadu. 1 Mare inagomode tai Elias aregodure mare boe emearutorukare ji, mare ere barigodudo pudui taidu reore. Nowu inodu reorere erorerumode Imedu Onaregeduji. 1 Kode, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere boe pawuje João Batista ji raboduie ako oino duji. 
Jesus ui ia iparedu pemegagodu. 1 Ei tudo pui ia boe makarewuge ebo pugeje dukejere icare ia imedu ure tuburedo Jesus ji, ure tubujodo jokorai, akore ji 1 Ikimejera, akogududo itonaregedu apo, meardae bokware du ure ro pega remawunure ji, iadure buture joruto, iadure buture pobo to; oinore ure. 1 Ica, iture mato apo nowu are joruduwadowuge etae, mare eroiwakare tuwo pemegago. 1 Jesus akore Mure, tamearutoru bokwa remawunure! Tabega remawunure! Jii inoba du kejeba ikiwa rakamode tagabo? Mato apo! 1 Icare Jesus makore Aroe pegarewu ji du ure tudawuje nowu negedurogu piji, du kodiwu tonaji pemegagodure kuri je. 1 Dukodire nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji: - Kodiba ceroiwakare cewo cewu Aroe pegarewu barigu? 2 Jesus akore ei Tamearutoru bokwa koia. Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai tamearutoru rogu umode nono mostarda i a rogu reore tu je ma, tamagomode awu tori rairewu ji akorodo oino toro! Oino dukeje, romode ino rugadu, iaboe iaboe upewumodukare pudui tagai pugeje. 2 Awu ure oinowu Aroe pegarewu barigudumode, mare boe enogwamagudui Pao ji, boe etodorogai pudui dutabo tu rugadu. 
Jesus makoi tuwiji, tuiewoduji pugejedu. 2 Jesus merunure Galiléia oiagi, du tonajire makore nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore Imedu Onaregedu makududodumode ime ekera kai. 2 Emode bito, mare meri pobe ma awu metuia bokware dukejere jewodumode. Nowu inodu kejere icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge erore toku je, ekiarigodu kuricigore. 
Imposto makudui Pao uwai kaedu. 2 Etaregodui Cafarnaum kae dukeje, ia imposto epage ere tuburedo Pedro ji, enoragodure ji: - Ure taeruduwadowu umodukare imposto morido? 2 Pedro akore ei U! Umode morido. Mare etaregodui tuwai kae dukeje, Jesus ure tuwu taci otogajeje tagoi oino dutabo: - Simão, inoba ure aegai? Moto kejewu brae eimejerage, ioguduba umode imposto morido etai: etore na? Iarema ia tuginoiwuge na? Pedro akore Ia boe tuginoiwuge. 2 Dukodi icare Jesus akore pugeje Kode, ore emodukare morido. 2 Mare pemegamodukare boewo eruduwa pegado. Kodi icare, toro pobo maerewu to, amode akeragu jiwu boeto jiwu karo, amode ja barido, nono aerudumode meriri mito tu je duji, akeragu ji, maku etai pagai. 

18 Kurireboe ema emawu. 1Dukeje kuri je, nowu Jesus ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, enorare ji: - Kakoduwuba kuri remawure Pao o boe pemegarewu tada? 2Jesus makore ia negedurogu ae, ure rakojedo tu etoiadoda, 3Akore: - Boe rugadu jire inagomode oino tai: tamodukare tado nono boe etore kugure ereore ma, tamodukare taremo Pao o boe pemegarewu to rugadu. 4Cewu ure tuwiegado nono awu boe etonaregedu rogu reoreure kurimode Pao o boe pemegarewu keje. 5Ia ure tugeragu ia negedurogu ji ikie tabodu, dure ii rugadure ure tugeragu. 
Boe ewarigududodui Pao Aroe Eimejera pijidu. 6Mare iaboe umode awu ia negedurogu mearutorui iidu ro pegado ma, ema remawu umode boewo ia tori kurirewu bararedo ruwoji ewo barigu tabo pobo maerewu to du rema. 7Boe ji joruduwa bokwarewuge eruduwado boe pegarewu jitu koia, moto jiwomode boe ebo. Boe emodukare tuwo awu inodu bokwado, mare ia imedu romode akomode inowu jiwomode. 8Kode ica, akera, awure, koiare umode awududo aro pegarewu to ma, kode, kado, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ema remawure atumode baruto apogorai awubowu tu je dutabo, akanai awubowu tu je dutabo du rema, mare awarigudumode joru pegarewu to apogorai pudogi dutabo du rema, ema karega. 9Aeku koiare umode aro pegado ma, kode, tawuje, barigudu jaedo apiji. Ema remawure atumode baruto aekui mito tu je dutabo du rema, mare awarigudumode joru pegarewu to aekui pudogi dutabo du rema, ema karega. 
Ovelha okwai boetodu. 1 Tamearudu awadudo tai, tagaba awu biegarewuge kugure ewarigududo pudui, mare paga karega, inagomode oino tai: eno tupadoge etaiwonure Ioga jeto baru tada jii je. 1 Ica, Imedu Onaregedu aregodure tuwo okware boetowuge einorudo du bogai. 1 Inoba ure taegai? Ia imedu aku ovelhadoge emode 1, duwugere ia okwamode boeto mito ma, inoba romode? Umode iage eedo toro tori aogeje, turegoduwo cewu okware boeto rogu bogai. 1 Jordumode rogu ji ma, jekare kodumode tugori cewu okwakare boetowuge ei 99 cedu koiadu kori. 1 Oinore Tao baru tadawu aidure awu ia biegarewuge ewogwa kawo boeto. 
Boe enogituwai tumeduia jidu. 1 Amana ro pegamode ai ma, amagodo ji, aki, ema, tu rugadu. Meartorumode awadaru ji ma, aiwo aidugirire amanaji. 1 Biapagamodukare ai ma, akeragu iaboe ei mito rakudu, pobe rakudu, du kejewo cewu tagorigodaere tubemegado nowu pobe tu je du rabodu, iarema boe ji pobe ma jewu metuia bokware tu je du rabodu ewadaru koia. 1 Kiarimode tuwiapagawo ma, kode, amagodo Igreja ji. Kiarimode tuwiapagawo Igreja ji jamedu ma, aopegokare emawu reorewu umode ema, ro pegarewunure ema.
