 Jesus ui ture joruduwadowuge ero raka maku etaidu. 1 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: tare kogudo woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kogudodumode baru tada jamedu. Tare kiwuje woe moto kejeboe jamedu boe, kiwujedumode baru tada jamedu. 1 Inagomode tai awu inoduji kimo: ia tagi tamode tado pobe tu tagogwamagudu tabo iaboe boe bogai ma, Ioga baru tadawu umode maku tagai. 2 Mare paga karega, iaboe emode tudo pobe tu je rakudu, pobe ma awu metuia bokware rakudu ikie tabo ma, nono iragojemode ebo. 
Boe etugare pegarewu. 2 Dukodi icare, Pedro ure tuburedo ji, akore ji Cegimejera, inoba iwudugugodumode imana ro pegai iiwu keje? Jii ikera awubodure pobe taci ikea awubowuto du reore na? 2 Jesus akore Imagomodukare tu oinono tu rugaduie, mare jii je rugadu. 2 Mare paga karega, Pao o boe pemegarewu remagudure moto kejewu ia brae eimejera ui tuiagu tudugarege edo mori maku pudai du reore. 2 Nowu ui turoiagu inodu jitu kejere, boe etaregodure ia umode morido diiero makaguragarewu ji du apo. 2 Mare umode morido tu emaboe bokware apo, dukoia nowu brae eimejera akore makuduiagu toreduje apo, tore ebo, toroe jamedu tabo, du tabowo ure nowu umode moridoboe morido. 2 Dukodi icare nowu utugare ure tubujodo moto keje jokorai, okwamagudure ji, akore Awudugugo ii jao, dukejere imode jamedu boe morido akai. 2 Nowu brae eimejera, togudu kuricigoi apo dutabore, akore ji atudo! Boe jamedu boe moridodure. 2 Kuri tudui pijidu kejere, nowu utugare jorudure ia tumeduia umode morido biega tu pudaiwu ji, ure tugera kogudo ruwo kajeje, boce kodi umodukare okwado ake koia, akore ji Cewu amode morido inaiboe makinai. 2 Nowuia buture bure paru, okwamagudure ji, akore Ado oino ia jao tu je. Imode jamedu boe morido akai. 3 Mare biapagakare ako oinoduji. Ure boedo cewu tumeduia barigu baicorewu to jii ui nowu tumode maku pudaiboe morido du kae. 3 Metage, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, ekiarigodu kuricigore, icare eture nowu cimejera ae ereadodure biegai nowu inoduji. 3 Icare cewu eimejera makore bogai, akore ji Itugare pegarewu! Iwudugugodure ai, akogwamagudure ii dukoia. 3 Kodiba awudugugodukare nowu ameduia ji nono iwudugugodu magai ai du reore? 3 Kodire nowu brae eimejera korigodure, ure maku rorerure boeiwuge etai jii, ui nowu tumode moridoboe jamedu boe maku pudai du kae. 3 Oinore Ioga baru tadawu romode tai, tawudugugodu kai tamana ji, tawieji, tawabo jamedu boe tabo dukeje. 
Jesus makoi divórcio jiboe ji. 1Jesus, tumagoi nowu bataru jitu rekodaji, uture Galiléia piji, Judéia kae, Jordão kujebiji. 2Ia boe makarewuge ekodure apo, ure kogodurewuge emedui etodadu epemegago. 3Ia fariseudoge ekodure ae tunorawo ji, tui tagokogado jitu tabo, egore ji Umode turugadu ia imeduji tuwo toreduje barigu tubiji iaboe boe koia? 4Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi Taeruduwakare bapera atugo inoduji ure boe jamedu boe towujewu boe paruto ure imedu towuje, ure aredu towuje, 5Akore kodire imedu umode tugera ra tuo piji, tuje piji, mugumode toreduje apo, icare ei pobedu emode nono tui mito tu je du kodiwore? 6Nowu inodu tabo ekare pobe pugeje, mare ere mito tu je. Kode, imedu umodukare Paore mugudo puapowuge ewarigu pubiji. 7Icare Fariseudoge egore Kode, kodiboe Moisés ure boedo bapera maku barigudurewu aredu ai, barigudumodedu otodai? 8Jesus akore ei Mare paga karega, ewabo pegarewu koiare Moisés rore oino. Mare boe paru keje, ukare ino. 9Boe jokodu jire imode inodu awadudo tai: cewu ure tuwire ewariguwuge, ei tugoge pemegado du rekodaji, tumuguwo iarodo apo pugejewuge eiamedu boe, ero peganure. 1 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge egore ji Oinono umode imeduji, areduji ma, kode, inodu keje, pemegamode emugukawo puapo. 1 Icare Jesus akore Boe eiamedu karega emode awu bakaru kodiboe pawuje, mare makudure aiwuge tu rugadu. 1 Mare paga karega, iage eroiwakare tuwirewo turedu koia, iagere ino mare ia etumedage eigoia, iagerema, ere tudo oinono taidu koia, Pao o boe pemegarewu koia. Roiware tuwo pawujewuge emode pawuje. 

Jesus mare boe etore kugure. 1 Boe ere ia boe etore kugure ecedo ae uwo tugera bu ewugeje, okwamaguduwo eparu tabo, mare ure joruduwadowuge ere erodo boku ji. 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Boro! Ekugure etudo itae, tagaba erodo boku ii, mare paga karega, Pao o boe pemegarewu jetumode tu ure tudo nono awuge kugure ereorewuge ebo tu je. 1 Dukejere ure tugera bu ewugeje. Dukeje uture nowu piji. 
Iparedu oroe kurirewu. 1 Ia boe kajeje, ia iparedu ure tuburedo Jesus ji, unoragodure ji, akore Ikimejera, kakoduwu boe pemegarewu jiba ikodumode, ikoduwo baruto? 1 Jesus akore ji Kodiba anorare ii boe pemegarewu bogai? Paore pemegare tu je. Akaidumode akoduwo baruto dukeje arodo nono Pao Aroe Eimejera ui boe eroiagudu reore. 1 Akore Inoba? Kakoduwuba? Jesus akore Amodukare boe ewido, akera keadu kaba, akiwogu kaba, akaba boe ewadaraodo. 1 Amearutorudo aoji, aceji, amearudu kurimode amedagei areore. 2 Icare nowu iparedu akore Irore ino nowu jamedu boeji jii je. Kaboba okwa kimore inai? 2 Jesus akore Akaidumode apemega remawuwo dukeje, toro, akirodo akoroe jamedu boe tabo, maku marenarue etai, nowu inodu koia boe pemegarewu kurirewu mugumode atogi baru tada. Dukejere, mato itabo! +Tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, nowu iparedu uture tugiarigodu kuricigo tabo, mare paga karega, oroe kuricigore kodi. 2 Nowu inodu keje, Jesus akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai raka remawunure ia oroe kurirewu uwo turemo baruto. 2 Inagomode tai pugeje: ure turugadu ia camelo tuwo tuie bu meriricira pororogu kajeje, mare ia oroe kurirewu rema uwo turemo baruto dure, ema karega. 2 Awu bakaru keje, nowu ure joruduwadowuge erore toku, epagudugodure, dutabore enoragodure: - Kode, ioguduba umode cinorudo? 2 Jesus aiwore ei tu je, akore Nowu inodu ime eroiwamodukare ji; mare Paorema ia roiwamodukare jiboe bokwa. 2 Dukejere Pedro akore U! Kode, cere cegera ra boe jamedu boe piji. Kaboba morimode ema cenai? 2 Jesus akore Boe jokodu jire imode awadudo tai ia kodiwu maiwu pemegarewu keje, Imedu Onaregedu umode tumugudo tumuga pemegarewu keje, dukeje, tagire tagodure itabodu, tamode tamugudo ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowutowu boe emuga keje, tawo tagogado ure nono ikera pudogidure ikerako umode pobe turegodajiwu reorewu Israeldoge etuwobei. 2 Cewu tumearudu kuri koia iiwuge emode tugera ra tumanamage, tuwiemage, tuo, tuje, tore, epiji, tuwai pijiwuge, duwuge nowu inodu makudumode etai pugeje du makaguragamode, eemode jii je jamedu. 3 Boeto jiwu makaguragarewuge ekodumode boi; boiwu makaguragarewuge ekodumode boeto ji. 
Pao Aroe Eimejera ui boe emaragodae moridodu. 1Jesus akore pugeje Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia boe etuo utui barogwa kododu tabo, tuioruduwo iaboe ji ma, tumagowo ei etuwo to boepa kae du reore. 2Akore tumoduie morido diieroji mito tu tu meri ji, ure etudo to boepato. 3Meri akurui gu baruto dukeje, uture pugeje, dutabore jorudure iaboe eedui ba oiagi paga tu je duji. 4Akore ei tadudo ino boepato jamedu, imode mori pemegado tagai. 5Eture rugadu. Meri jetui baru oia keje dukeje, uture pugeje. Meri jogodu tabo pugeje, rore nono turomagai iagei du reore. 6Boekarema, meri rekodugodu tabo, jorudure iagei ba oiagi pugeje, unoragodure ei: - Kodiba taedu pagare jii meri ji taro kai ia taroji dutabo? 7Egore: - Mare paga karega, boe emagokare cei kodi. Kodi icare akore ei Tadudo ino boepato jamedu. 8Icai meri buture dukeje, cewu ore boepa cewu akore ture jetu boepa jiwu ji Amagodo maragodurewuge ewogai, awo mori maku etai, paru bu kodure boiwuge ewugeje jii boeto jiwuge etae. 9Cewu meri butu kejewuge etaregodure; eiamedu boe enore diiero mito tu tu pureore. 1 Aregodure cewu boeto jiwuge etae dukeje, emeardaere mori kurimoduie pudaiduji. Mare eno diierore mito tu tu pureore jamedu. 1 Makudui etai dukeje, emago pegare nowu ore boepacewu ji tagoi: - 1 Boigoduwuge emaragodae rogu biegare tu je, macare enore nono pago reore; pagire pabewure pai meri ji boe eruji jii je! 1 Dukodi icare eimejera makore ia ei: - Imeduia, ikarega ure aekuri pagado. Imagokare imoduie morido diiero mito tu tu je duji? 1 Makudure akaiwu, toro tabo. Imire itaidure iwo kodure boigoduwu odo nono ako reore, 1 kode, iromodukare nono itaidu reore inoroeji? Kode, akaiwomode ii aeku pegarewu tabo ipemega bogai? 1 Nowu inodu reore, kodure boiwuge boeto jiwugemode emage, boeto jiwuge boiwugemode emage. Pao makore bogaiwuge emagaguragare, mare ure tugeragu jiwuge enowarore tu je. 
Jesus makoi tuwiji, tujewoduji, metuia bokware pugejedu. 1 Erudunure Jerusalém kae du tonajire icare Jesus ure tugeragu ture joruduwadowugei paci woje pudabo, akore ei 1 Icare parudunure Jerusalém kae. Nono Imedu Onaregedu makudumode baire eimejerage etai, escribadoge etai, emode boedo bito. 1 Emode maku ao pegokarewuge etai ewadaru keadu pegawo ji, ewo pogurudo, ewo barigodudo, ewo redugodudo pudui, ewo boe to ji, ewo bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Mare meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, jewodumode. 
Zebedeu ore. 2 Nowu inodu keje, Zebedeu ore etuje ure tuburedo tu tore ebo, ure tubujodo tuku Jesus jokorai togwamaguduwo ji. 2 Icare Jesus unoragdure ji: - Kaba jiba akaidure? Du tabore nowu aredu akore. - Awo awu itore ei pobedu edo tumugudo ako boe pemegarewu keje akabo: ia mugudo akana pemegarewu jaogwai, ia mugudo akana koborewu jaogwai. 2 Jesus akore ji Taeruduwakare kaboba bogaiba tagogwamagudure. Tagudumode ikudumode ce calice to boece? Egore U! 2 Akore Boe jokodu, tagudumode ino calice to rugadu. Mare tamugui ikana pemegarewu jaogwai, iarema ikana koborewu jaogwai, nowu inodu imi karega; nowu boe emugare tu Ioga ure jeonaiagu jiwuge ewogai. 2 Ia ure joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure emearudure nowu inodu jamedu boeji, dukoia ekorigodure nowu tumedage ei pobeduji. 2 Mare Jesus makore eiamedu bogai, akore ei Taeruduware awu moto kejewu brae eimejerage emugui tudugarege ewugejeduji, kurirewuge ei tumugudo ewugeje turo rakarewu tabo duji. 2 Mare tagaba oino pudada. Mare paci oino: cewu aidure tuwo tugurido, u rumode boe etugaredo pudumi. 2 Aidure tuwo boeto jiwudo pudumi tadodawu, umode tadugaregedo pudumi. 2 Oinore Imedu Onaregedu rore: aregodure, mare tudugaregewo boece karega, mare boe etugarewo pudumi. Jamedu tuwo tumagu tuwo makarewuge einorudo. 
Jesus ui ia joku bukwarewu ime ei pobedu pemegagodu. 2 Jesus unure tudawuje ia bakurirewu iei Jericó cedu piji, du tonajire icare ia boe makarewuge ekodure apo. 3 Du tabore ia joku bokwarewuge ere pobe tu tumugui awara okwai, tumearudui Jesus kodui nono dukeje, ekudugodure, egore Cegimejera, Davi onaregedu, akogududo cedabo! 3 Mare nowu boe makarewuge emago okorire ei emago kaiagu. Du tabore icare ere tugudu raka remawudo: - Cegimejera, Davi Onaregedu, akogududo cedabo! 3 Icare Jesu ure tuwuredo, makore etae, unoragodure ei, akore Kaboba tagaidure irowo ji tagai? 3 Egore Cegimejera, ceeku uwo tuiado du bogai. 3 Icare Jesus okudure ebo, ure tugera jetudo eeku kajeje. Du inodu tonaji kuri je, eeku ure tuiado poku, dukejere ekodure apo. 

Jesus ui turemo Jerusalém bakurirewu todu. 1Jesus ure tuburedo Jerusalemji nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo. Icai taregodui babuturogu iei Betfajé mugui Oliveira kejewu aoporu puredu tu je du kae dukeje, Jesus makore ia ture joruduwadoge ei pobe tu je duji, akore ei 2Tadudo bakurirewu rogu mugui tu padogi du kae. Nono taerudumode ia jumento rogu okwa iku kogui tu nono duji, onaregedurogu rakojere tu apo. Okwa iku kiwuje, mato ebo itae. 3Iaboe emagomode tai dukeje, tamagodo ei: - Cegimejera aidure ei jao; raimodukare umode emagu tu tuibagi pugeje. 4Oino dutabore boe kodure profeta bataru reore: 5Tamagomode Sião tadawu areduji ica, icare akimejera aregodumode akae tubemega tabo, tumugui ia jumento rogu, jumenta onaregedu keje dutabo. 6Cewu Jesus ure joruduwadowuge eture, erore nono ui turoiagudu reore rugadu. 7Etaregodure jumenta apo, onaregedu rogu apo, ere tugudae bu bukeje, ere Jesus udo tumugudo keje. 8Dukodi icare makarewu boe ere tugudae baado awaraji otodai, ere ipo, iwara, itura boe kado, ere roto ja ja awaraji jamedu. 9Cewu boe makarewuge ekodure otodaiwuge, ekodure rekodajiwuge enoiogwarire, egore Hosanado Davi Onaregeduji, cewu akaru meririrewu aregodui Pao ie tabodu, paegarewo ji toro baruto. 1 Jesus ui turemo Jerusalém to dukeje, nowu bakurirewu tadawuge erore toku, ekodo jice, ekodo woje, tunora tabo pui: - Kakoduwubao? 1 Makarewuge egore Jesus reno! Galiléia kejewu bakurirewu rogu iei Nazaré cedu pijiwu profeta reno. 
Jesus ui ure akirodo Pao uwai tadawuge ewarigu baawadu kaedu. 1 Jesus ure turemo Pao uwai kurirewu to, dukejere jeture pa! Boe eroi akiró tabo puai Pao uwai tada duji. Kodi icare ure ewarigu baawadu kae; kodi icare ure nowu ro oinowuge emuga ira boe butudo. 1 Akore ei Bapera atugo batarure oino tabaru tabodu iwaire boe enogwamagudu epa rema, dure icare tare arodurewuge, okwarigudurewuge eiarido ema. 1 Dukeje icare, joku bokwarewuge, pogora meiorewuge etaregodure ae, ure epemegago. 1 Du tabore icare baire eimejerage, escribadoge, ekorigodu kuricigore, taiwoi nowu ro pemegarewu kurirewu boeji, tumearudui boe etore enoiogwarii Pao uwai tada eegoi paegarewo Davi Onaregeduji inoduji dutabo. 1 Icare egore Jesus ji Amearudure egoinoduji? Jesus akore U! Imearudu pemegare. Tamago tamagokare bapera atugo akoi nege kugure, boe etore kugure eedui tujemage etodojiwuge eiabijiwuge eigoiare ere akurido inodu jituji? 1 Nowu inodu kjere icare uture epiji, uture bakurirewu piji, turagojewo ia bakurirewu rogu iei Betânia cedu keje. 
Jesus jordui ia figueira i jidu. 1 Barogwato, meri togi, tui tugirimi bakurirewu to pugeje dukeje, Jesus uke boire ji. 1 Tuiorudui ia figueira iji awara okwai dukeje, ure tuburedo ji, mare jordukare tuduji: aru rugadure ure tu je. Dukodi icare akore nowu figueira iji Atudumodukare jii rugadu. 2 Kuri je, nowu figueira i bire. Tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje, ure joruduwadowuge epagudugodure, egore U! Icare awu figueira bire taci je! 2 Icare Jesus akore Boe jokodu jire imode awadudo tai tamearutoru remawumode ma, taromodukare awu inoduji tu je, mare jamedu tagagomode awu torirairewu ji: akorodo oino toro pobo maerewu to, dukejere nowu inodu umode ino rugadu. 2 Tagogwamagudumode dukeje, tagogwamagudure bogaiboe jamedu boe makudumode tagai. 
Jesus ro raka. 2 Jesus uture jice Pao uwai kae pugeje. Tui boe eruduwado nowu Pao uwai tada du tonaji, baire eimejerage, boe kuridoge, codudoge, ere tuburedo ji, egore ji.
Kakoduboe koiaba ure arodo ino? Ioguduba koiaba ure aroiagu ino? 2 Jesus akore ei Inorawo tai jamedu ka tamode tagogiegi ji ma, dukejere imode tawie kakoduboe koiaba ure irojino. 2 Tamagodo ii kaba ro raka koiaba João Batista ure boe etaopegodo? Pao Aroe Eimejera ro raka koia kana? Iarema ime ero raka koia na? Dukejere ere tumeardae kado kado boeji, egore Pamagomode Pao Aroe Eimejera ro raka koiaie, ino ma, akomode kode kodiba tamearutorukare ji? 2 Pagagomode ime eigoiaie, ino ma, pabagudumode boe makarewugece, mare paga karega, boe eiamedu boere emearutorure profetaie ure Joãoce duji. 2 Du icare egore Jesus ji Ceruduwakare! Icare Jesus akore Kode, imi jamedu imodukare tawie kaba koiaba ure irodo inoduji jamedu. 
Boe etore ei pobedu. 2 Dukodi icare Jesus akore ei pugeje Inoba tameardaemode? Ia imedu orere pobe. Tumagoi boeto jiwu ae dutabo, akore ji imedu, toro, amaragoduwo ino boepa tada awu ji. 2 Du tabore cewu onaregedu akore ji boro. Itaiduka. Mare kuri je inodu korire ji, kodi icare uture rugadu, tumaragoduwo tuo boepa tada. 3 Du tabore icare cewu ipare etuo makore ia tonaregedu ae, akore ji nono tago magai ia jitu reore. Icare nowu onaregedu rekodajiwu akore u, ioga. Mare utukare rugadu. 3 Kakoduwu ia emageba rore nono tuo aidu reore? Egore Boeto jiwu. Icare Jesus akore ei Boe remawu jire inagomode oino tai ropegarewuge, ropegarewu areme etaregodumode baruto tagoda piji. 3 Paga karega, João aregodure tagae awara jetororewu tabo, mare tamearutorukare ji. Mare ro pegarewuge, ropegarewu areme emearutorure ji. Tagi taerudure inoduji, mare takare tabemegado tamearutoruwo ji,, Boepa tadawu ime pegarewuge. 3 Jesus akore ei pugeje Tawiapagado ia bakaruji pugeje ka: ia boe etuo ure ia boepa bu, ure tori aiado tabo, ure ia pobo aia mugudo tada, ure ia bairairewu towuje keje. Tui maku ia jetumode jiwuge etai, dukejere, uture nowu moto piji. 3 Icai boe aregodui boewo tugeragu nowu boepa tadaboe jitu dukeje, ure ia tudugarege etudo toro nowu jeture boepa jiwuge etae, ewo tugeragu nowu boepa tadaboeji. 3 Mare nowu jeture nowu boepa jiwuge, ere tubodo nowu utugarege ebo, ere boe to iato, ere ia bito, iage ere tori to ei. 3 Boekare, ure iage emagodo toro cewuge ekori pugeje. Erore nono turo magai cewuiage ei du reore jamedu. 3 Icarema, tonaregedu remawure icare ure utudo toro pugeje, tagoi awu itonaregedu jire eromodukare ia turo. 3 Mare nowu jeture nowu boepa jiwuge, tuiorudui onaregedu jitu keje, egore pui ica, awu aire uo oe makudumode ai; pawo bito, pagiwo pagoere nowu oemode emaboece. 3 Icare ere tubodo apo, ere tawuje boepa piji, icare ere bito. 4 Kode, nowu ore nowu boepa cewu, ui tugirimi dukeje, inoba romode nowu jeture nowu boepa jiwugei? 4 Egore Umode nowu meridoge Aroe pegarewuge ewidodudo togudu bokwa tabo, dukeje umode iage eto ji pugeje, duwuge emode nowu boepa tadaboe makai boe aregodui pudae dukeje. 4 Icare Jesus akore ei Tamagokare bapera atugo akoi ure bai mugudo tori tabowuge ere pijidowu tori icare ema remawure ema pugeje. Pagimejera maragodae rema du jire paebogodure ji? 4 Dukodire imagomode oino tai: boe pemegarewu baru tadawu arududodumode tabiji, makudumode iaboe etai, nowuge eigoiare emode kurodureboe tawuje piji pugeje dukoia. 4 Buture awu tori kejewu romode ja... Rito nowu ri buture kejewu begugwamode ri kuda. 4 Baire eimejerage, fariseudoge emearudure nowu inoduji, ere boe pawuje pudui raboduie Jesus ako oinoduji. 4 Eemarure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare epagudure boece, emearudure profetaie ema kodi. 

Boe ekera makudui puaidu kodiwu boe enogwage. 1Jesus makore boe ji pugeje ia bakaru tabo pugeje, akore 2Boe pemegarewu kejeboe ure nono ia brae eimejera awu moto kejewu ui tonaregedu uwiredo du reore. 3Du makore tudugaregei emagowo ture bakarudo jiwuge ewogai. Mare etaidukare tuduwo bataru jipagi. 4Dukejere, ure iage etudo pugeje, tagoi ei oino dutabo tamagodo ire bakarudo jiwugei: inagu tapiradoge, inagu jugorewuge ewararu kuricigoi dure ire ewido. Boe jamedu boere turugadu, mato peta kae. 5Mare boekare, ekare tuwiapagado nowu ako oinoduji. Iage eture to boepato, iage eture ia turo kae. 6Iage ere tubodo nowu utugarege ebo, emago pegare ei, etokire ei, ere ewido. 7Nowu brae eimejera, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, korigodu kuricigore, ure to tugobaigarege etudo toro ewo cewu pegarewuge ewido, ewo joru tugu nowu eno bakurirewu to. 8Dukejere makore nowu tudugaregei, akore petare turugadu, mare ire bakarudo jiwuge ekare turugadu ji. 9Tadudo awara padui pugajejedu boe kae, bakarudo tu tu taerudumode jiwuge eiameduji etuwo mato peta kae. 1 Ere taodo toro awara boeji, ere tuiorudure jiwuge eiamedu boe ere tudo pui, pegarewuge, pemegarewuge. Dukodi icare boe enogwagemode tadawu bai kurirewu okorobadure bakarudodure jiwuge ebo. 1 Nowu brae eimejera ure turemo tuioruduwo ei. Du tabore icare jorudure ia imedu ukai tugudae pemegarewu tugu pudui duji. 1 Icare unoragodure ji imedu, kodiba are aremo woe akadui peta kejewu akudae tugu ai dutabo? Boekare, nowu imedu akokare ia tago. 1 Icare nowu brae eimejera makore tudugaregei, akore ei tageragu ji, buregogudo, ieragogudo, barigu toro baawadu kae, boecorewu to, nono boe eto akomode do do do do do pui nono. 1 Mare paga karega, bakarudodure jiwuge emagaguragare, mare tawujedure epijiwuge enowarore tu je. 
Boe enoroe mori makudui César aidu. 1 Dukejere icare fariseudoge ere tudo pui emagore pui inoba turomode tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji jepaga inoduji ia bataru boe keje. 1 Dukejere icare ere ture joruduwadowuge etudo toro, Herodes jaogwaiwuge ebo, enorawo Jesus ji, emagowo ji: - Cegimejera, ceruduware akie amagore boe rikirewu ji, akie are boe eruduwado Pao aewu awaraji boe jokodu, boe remawu tabo, apagudu kai boece dutabo. Mare paga karega, akaiwokare boe eeji du kodi. 1 Kode, amagodo cei ka inoba ure aegai: umode turugadu boewo toroe mori maku César ai, iarema umodukare turugadu? 1 Icare Jesus, tui emeardae pawuje dukeje, akore Kodiba tagago kogadodure ii, ro biadodurewuge? 1 Iordudo tare maku maku César aiwu meririji ka! Icare ere iado mito tu je ai. 2 Icare Jesus unorare ei: - Ioguduba padure awu meriri keje, awu tuwadaru tabo? 2 Egore César reno! Dukodi icare Jesus akore ei Kode, César jeonare jiboe maku César ai. Pao jeonare jiboe maku Pao ai jamedu. 2 Eebogodure nowu ako oinoduji, ekare tagokogado ji pugeje, eture piji. 
Boe enorai Jesus ji boe eewodu jiboe jitu. 2 Nowu meri mitoduji, saduceudoge, duwugere egore boe eewodumodukae, enoragodure Jesus ji. 2 Egore Cegimejera, Moisés akore ia imedu bimode tore bokwa tabo dukeje, oreduje mugumode uwie apo, oinodu tabo oremode. 2 Aro! Umanamagere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu reore. Boeto jiwu uwiredodure, icarema bokware. Mare ore bokware, ure toreduje muguiagu tuwie apo. 2 Rekodajiwu ure ino jamedu; ia rekodajiwu ure ino pugeje jamedu. Oinore ure ino jii eiamedu boeji. 2 Dukejere icare cewu aredu bokware jamedu. 2 Ica, eewodu keje, kakoduwuba oredujemode cewu aredu? Mare paga karega, eiamedu mugure apo. 2 Jesus akore ei Tawogware boeto, takare bapera atugo pawuje. Takare Pao ro raka pawuje jamedu. 3 Ica boe eewodu keje, ime etuwiremoduka, areme etugogemodukare jamedu, mare erumode nono Pao o tupadoge pemegarewugere baru tada. 3 Kode, nowu boe eewodumodedu, tamagokare bapera atugoji: 3 Abração aiwu Aroe Eimejeranure imi, Isaac aiwu Aroe Eimejeranure imi, Jacó aiwu Aroe Eimejeranure imi? Aró, kode, birewuge etaiwu Aroe Eimejera karega, mare jerewuge etaiwu Aroe Eimejeranure ema. 3 Tumearudui awu bataru jitu keje, boe eebogodu kuricigore. 
Boe eroiagudu ema remawu. 3 Fariseudog ei boe pa Jesus ui saduceudoge ekeru kadodu jitu keje, ere tudo pui. 3 Dukejere ia emage ia joruduwarewu unoragodure Jesus ji toebato dutabo ji, akore 3 Cegimejera, Kakoduwu Pao o boe eroiagudu ema remawu rema? 3 Jesus akore Amearudu kurido Pao Aroe Eimejera ji awabo jamedu tabo, akaroe jamedu tabo, ameardae jamedu tabo. 3 Awure Pao o boe eroiagudu ema remawu boeto jiwu rema. 3 Rekodajiwu ure nono boeto jiwu reore amearudu kurimode ameduia ji nono amearudu kuri magai ai du reore. 4 Awu Pao batarui pobe oinodu boe eroiagudu jamedu boe ure to pui nono. 
Jesus unorai boe ji Messias jiboe jitu. 4 Fariseudoge ere tudo pui. Dukejere icare Jesus unoragodure ei, akore ei 4 Inoba tameardaere Messias ji? Ioguduba onaregeduba? Egore Davi Onaregedu. 4 Jesus makore pugeje, akore Kode, kodiba Davi, tumagoi Aroe Pemegarewu koia, akore 4 Pagimejera akore ikimejeraji amugudo ikana pemegerewu jaogwai jii, ii onare aiwuge ewu awure kuda du kae? 4 Kode, Davi akore tugimejeraie, kode, kodiba icare onaregedumode ema? 4 Ia emagokare ia pubiji ia pubiji. Nowu inodu piji pugejere icare ekidakare tumagowo ji pugeje. 

Jesus okituwai fariseudogei, escribadogei. 1Jesus ure turodo pai nowu boe makarewuge mare nowu ture joruduwadowuge ewugeje, dukejere akore 2Escribadoge, fariseudoge ere tumugudo Moisés muga keje tuwo boe eroiagudu kogado du bogai. 3Tarodo nono ewadaru jamedu reore; mare taro kaba nono ero magadu reore; mare paga karega, emagore mare erokare ino. 4Ere boe motudurewu udo turugadu tuwo bu ime eporu keje, mare emagerema etaidukare tuwo tugera amagadudo nowu motudureboeji. 5Ere turodo tagodo boe eeruduwo du bogai, ere aroia arudugodurewu kuru kururewu bu tuwugeje ia raire, ia boa kurire tugajeje. 6Etaidure boe emuga boeto jiwu ji boe enogwage keje, Sinagoga keje jamedu. 7Etaidure boewo tugurido pudui ba oiagi. Etaidure boe egowo tugimejeraie ure pudumi. 8Mare tagi, tagaba boe egodo tugimejeraie ure tagi; mare paga karega, tagimejerare mito tu je; tamanamage, tawiemagenure puje. 9Tagaba taomagedo iaboece iaboece woe moto keje, mare paga karega, taore mito tu je: cewu mugure baru tadawu. 1 Jamedu, tagaba boe egodo tugimejeraie ure tagi, mare paga karega, tagimejerare mito tu je, dure Cristo rema. 1 Cewu kurire tadodawu, romode duku tumedage ekuda. 1 Cewu ure tuwiegatoridowu, kurimode tumedage ekori. 1 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tare baru tadawu boe pemegarewu baiporo mi ime etai, tagi rugadure tamodukare taremo to. 1 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tagire tare ukoge okware pijiwuge enoroe akedudo, tai tagogwa kuridodu raicigodo taiaki dutabo, kodire awu taro mori pega kuricigomode tagai. 1 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tare tagaiwodo motoji, pobo maerewu ji, tawo ia boe etaru tagai du bogai, dukejere tare jeonare joru jiwudo ema pobe tagori. 1 Joku bokwarewuge etododaiwuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tagagore iaboe emode togwa tugu Pao uwai ie tabo ma, nowu inodu boe karega, mare umode togwatugu Pao uwai tadaboe tabo ma, nowu ako oinowu romode ino rugadu. 1 Matadure turo towuge, joku bokwarewuge! Kode, kakoduwuba ema remawu: meriri ekureuna? Iarema Pao uwai, koiare ure meriri ekurewu motududo pudui du rema? 1 Tagagore jamedu Iaboe emode togwatugu altar ie tabo, nowu inodu boe karega, mare iaboe emode togwatugu ia mori padui keje dutabo ma, romode ino rugadu. 1 Joku bokwarewuge! Kode, kakoduwuba emaremawu rema: boe ji mori makudu na? Iarema altar koiare ure mori motududo pudui du rema? 2 Cewu ure togwatugu altar ie tabowu, jamedu unure togwatugu padure bukajejeboe jamedu boe tabo jamedu. 2 Cewu ure togwatugu Pao uwai ie tabowu, unure togwatugu nowu mugure tadaboe ie tabo jamedu. 2 Cewu ure togwatugu baru towu, unure togwatugu Pao muga kae, mugure kejeboeji jamedu. 2 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tanure tawiapagado barigodurewu bakaruji, mare tanure bakaru kurirewu barigududo pudui du jire taro oino. Boe jetororewu, boe enogudurewu, boe eroi tuwadaru jitudu, oinore taromode boeto ji, mare takai nowu ia barigududo pudui dutabo. 2 Kodure joku bokwarewuge etododaiwuge, tare migimigidoge ewarigu tagogwa piji, icarema tawo camelo remo rabodu. 2 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba pado tadogi. Tare ariarogu uporu kabi, tare prato uporu kabi, tagirema tagogorobadure tagiwogae tabo, tagarodudae tabo, tagogwarigodae tabo. 2 Fariseu joku bokwarewu, aria, prato oto kabi boeto ji duwo uporu kabidure jamedu. 2 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba padure tadogi. Tare nono bireboe eiaro uporu kigadu reore. Uporu moture mare toro tada korobadure boe era tabo, boe ewi tabo, boe padui pumekejedu boe tabo. 2 Oinore tare jamedu. Tabemegarewu padure tu tawiri uporu keje boe eegai mare tadoda tagogorobadure tai boe pagadodudo tagi dutabo, tabegarewu tabo. 2 Escribadoge, fariseudoge, ro biadodurewuge, tajeba padure tadogi. Tare profetadoge eiari to, tare jetororewuge eiaro motudo. 3 Tagagore Paeia tu paomage etonaji, pamodukare pagera rorogodudo profetadoge eku tabo nono ereore. 3 Nowu inodu tabo tanure tagogiegi tai tagaobiji tagagoi nowu ure biodo profetadoge eiwuge etoreie ure tagiduji. 3 Kode, tagogorawo taomage ero reore dutabo. 3 Okorirewu awague etore. Inoba taromode tawo taginorudo joru piji? 3 Tagado, imode profetadoge, jorduarewuge etarego tawogai. Tamode ewido. Tamode iage ewu i keje, tamode boe to iagei tago sinagoga keje. Tabadumode ewugeje jice woje jice woje bakurirewu boe kao. 3 Kodire bitodure paga tu jewu boe eku butumode tawugeje, paru padure Abel ku keje jii Barakia onaregedu iei Zacaria cedu kae, cewu tare bito Pao uwai, altar enoiei. 3 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: nowu boe pegarewu jamedu boe aregodumode awu boe etuwoboe oinowuto. 
Jesus mearudu kurii Jerusalém jitu. 3 Dukejere Jesus akore Jerusalém tadawuge, Jerusalém tadawuge! Tagire tare profetadoge ewido, tagimogudure tori tabo cewu rojaidodure tagaewugei. Itaidu maeia iwo tado pui itabo, nono kogariga magai tore kugure eto pui cigodu kuda du reore, mare tagaidukare. 3 Kode, ica, taeda bioromode tawogai. 3 Mare paga karega, taerudumodukare ii pugeje jii tamagoi ii aregodure Pao ie tabowu akaru pemegawo! Oino du kae. 

Jesus makoi boe pegamoduie Pao uwai jitu duji. 1Jesus ure tuiebu Pao uwai piji, dukejere icare ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo ji, ere jordudo cewu bai kurirewuge emoduji. 2Mare Jesus akore ei Taerudure awu baikurirewugei. Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: woe awu tori padumodukare puaogeje; boe jamedu boe pegadodumode. 
Boe ekori, boe etonai puidu. 3Dukejere kodure jii tui tumugudo ia torekodu iei Oliveira cedu aogeje du kae; nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekodure ae, ere tuburedo ji, icai tuiedui tuginoigodu apo dukeje, enoragodure ji, egore ji Inoba boemodedu kejeba awu inodu umode tudowuje? Inoba boemode ai akirimi dukeje, boe akedu keje? 4Dukejere Jesus akore Taerududo. Tagaba boedo taekuri pagado. 5Makarewuge etaregodumode tagoi imire Cristore imi, oino dutabo, dutabore emode makarewuge eekuri pagado. 6Tamearudumode boe erugodui puiduji. Tamearudu awadudo tai, nowu inodu ukawo tabagududo. Mare oto padumodukare roga. 7Boe eeda, moto padui boe ebodu, onagodumode pui, rugodumode puidu umode towadudo. Nowu inodu tonaji, boe eke boimode boe ji, jorubo pegarewu umode jamedu, boe pega kuricigomode makaguragarewu boe eeda joki. 8Nowu inodu jamedu boe, boe ekori paru reno. 9Icare tamagudumode boe pegarewu jamedu kai, tawidodumode, kodu kagirire iiwuge ekodu kagirimode tai ikie koia, moto jamedu boe joki. 1 Makarewuge ewudumode, emode pu butudo, ekodu kagirimode pui jamedu. 1 Emode profetadogedo pudumi paga tu je, dutabo emode makaguragarewuge eekuri pagado. 1 Boe pegarewu umode taredo tao kae, dukoia makarewuge enogudu eiagudu biegamode tu je. 1 Mare nowu inodu tabo, cewu ure tudo tuku pudui jii oto kaewuge emode cinorudo. 1 Ica, Pao o boe pemegarewu jiwu bakaru maiwu kuodumode moto jamedu boe joki uwo turugadu boe jokoduie pudumidu reore boe eiamedu jekai. Nowu inodu keje, boe aregodumode todo pa kae. 
Boe ekori kuricigorewu. 1 Jesus akore pugeje Taerudumode cewu profeta Daniel makore jiwu boe pegarewu ui tumugudo Pao uwai tada dukeje, makore awu bapera atugo jiwugere edo pawuje. 1 Nowu inodu keje, mugure Judéia kejewuge eregodumode tori rairewu to. 1 Jeture bairairewuge etao gejewuge, ekaba turawuje tuwaito ia toroe boe bogai. 1 Rakojere toro boe tadawuge etu kaba bato tuwo tugeragu ia tugudae boeji. 1 Cewu kuiarurewu areme, nowu ure tore enogwagiridowuge nowu kodiboe keje, marenarumode emage. 2 Tamagodo tabaru keje, nowu inodu ukawo tudowuje butao kao, biaku kao, sabadore jiwu meri ji ukawo jamedu. 2 Mare paga karega, nowu kodiwu boe ecebae pegarewu kuricigomodedu boe eerudukare ji marigudu, boe etowujedu paru piji jii oino. Boe eerudumodukare inoduji pugeje. 2 Nowu inodu umodukare tudowuje kuri je ma, boe emodukare cinorudo, mare pemegarewuge eigoia, inodu umode tudowuje kuri je rugadu. 2 Nowu kodiwu kodi iage egomode tai: - Ema reo! Cristo reo! Iarema: - Ema rice! Ma, tamearutoru kaba. 2 Mare paga karega, ia boe pegarewuge emode Cristodo pudumi paga tu je, emode profetadoge pagawugedo pudumi, du, emode turo kurirewu towuje, tuwo makarewuge eekuri pagado, pemegarewuge jamedu, nowu inodu umode turugadu dukeje. 2 Tamearudu awadudo tai, inure tawie ji, umode tudowujedu otodai. 2 Kode, iaboe egomode: - Mato! Rakojere woje boe matadu tada. Mare tagaba tagorodo oino. Iarema egomode: - Rakojere jice tuwai keje. Mare tamearutoru kaba. 2 Mare paga karega, boe jeragudu magai meri rutu pijidu urugu jomode boe jameduto jii meri butu kae, du reorere Imedu Onaregedu umode taregodu tabo. 2 Cewu iaboe bi padurewo keje poburewuge emode tudo pui. 
Imedu Onaregedu aregodumodedu. - 2 Kuri nowu boe ekori pegarewu akedumode dukeje, meri joku comode, ari urugudumodukare, kuiejedoge ewudumode baru piji, baru tadawu ro rakareboe ewudumode jamedu. 3 Icare Imedu Onaregedu aregodumodedu kodiboe umode towadudo. Boe eiamedu boe emode tugera to tumororaji. Eerudumode baru pijiwu boetugu aogeje Imedu Onaregedu aregodui turugu kuricigorewu tabo, turo rakaguragarewu tabo duji. 3 Umode to tupadoge etarego togwa akoi meriri iworewu jitu tabo. Emode Pao Aroe Eimejera oge pemegarewuge edo tudo pui baru paru jamedu boe piji. 
Figueira i jiwu bakaru. - 3 Tawo boe pa awu inoduji, tagado ji kae awu figueira itura ricodu magai taru aka tabodu, ure tado boe pa butao oto puredugoduie ure duji. 3 Du reorere taerudumode nowu inodu jamedu boe jitu kejere, taeruduwamode Imedu Onaregedu puredugoduie ure baiporo kae duji. 3 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai oinowu boe ewimodukare awu inodu koda piji. 3 Baru, moto, akedumode, mare iwadarurema, okwamodukare. 
Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode boe epagakai bogai dukeje. 3 Jesus akore ei jamedu boe eruduwakare nowu inodu umode tudowuje kejeboeji. Baru tadawu tupadoge eruduwakare ji jamedu, mare tu Pao joruduware ji mito tu je. 3 Nono cewu Noé rakoje kimo tabodu reore, du reorere Imedu Onaregedu aregodumodedu kodiboe umode. 3 Cewu butao maemodedu otodai, brae enogwagere, ekudure, ere tugogedo, ere tuwiredo, jii Noé ui turemo ika kurirewu to du kae. 3 Ime ekare pawuje jii nowu butao maerewu aregodu kae, dukoia ure eiamedu reko. Du reorere Imedu Onaregedu umode tugirimi kejewu kodiboe umode. 4 Ia ime emode pobe boe tada ma, metuia rekodumode piji, metuia mugumode. 4 Aremei pobedu tumaragodae kejedu, boe emode tugeragu iarodoji, iarodo pijidodumode. 4 Tamearudu awadudo tai, mare paga karega, taeruduwakare inoba boemodedu kejeba Tagimejera aregodumode. 4 Taeruduwado awu inoduji ia boe etuo joruduwamode ia iwogu kigodurewu aregodumoduie tuwai kae jiwu boe co ji ma, oebatodumode tukawo udo tuwai rawuje. 4 Kodire, tagi jamedu, tado tarugadu, mare paga karega, Imedu Onaregedu aregodumode tameardaekare jiwu kodiboe keje. 
Boe etugare pegarewu mare ia pemegarewu. 4 Jesus akore jamedu Kode, kakoduwuba jetorogodumode tugumode turojiwu ia boe etugare, cewu tugimejerare jetudo ia tudugarege eidu tuwo enogwagedo togwagere tu tu jewo keje? 4 Jiwo aidugirimode cewu boe etugare romode nono tugimejerai turoiagudu reore jii ui tugirimi du kae. 4 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: umode rakojedo toroe pemegarewu jamedu boe keje. 4 Mare ia utugare pegarewu akomode tudada: 4 Ikimejera aregodumodukare kuri je dutabore umode boe to tumedagei, okwagemode, kudumode ure kuru tugu jetu puduiwuge ebo ma, 5 nowu utugare eimejera aregodumode upagakare tuwogai jiwu meri ji jepadumode taci je. 5 Icare umode kado dogo dogo je, umode jebato ro biadodurewuge ereore. Nono oragudureboemode, o akore do do do do do puiboe umode nono. 
Nogware kugure ei pagera pudogiduredu. - 1Kode, baru tadawu boe pemegarewu umode nono nogware kugure ei ikera pudogidu reore, duwuge eridui mugumode tumedago apowu togi jorugu tabodu reore. 2Ure ikera awubodu reorewuge ekera kiarire, ikera awubodu reorewuge emedure tudada. 3Tui tugeragu jorugu ja jitu keje, nowu iera kiarirewuge ekare jorugu kaguru reko pudabo. 4Cewu ure todogido puduiwuge ere jorugu kaguru ja towuje jorugu kaguru tabo to joru ja bogai. 5Nowu eridure togiwu aregodukai kuri je dukoiare, nore kori butu onare eiamedu jokuto, boekarema, enudure rugadu. 6Mare boe cooia keje emearudure iaboe enoiogwariji inoie cewu uwiremodewu koduie jeto, kode toro togi. 7Nowu nogware eiamedure ere tugera pemegado cewu to joruguji. 8Cewu iera kiarirewuge egore cewu meture tudadawugei, egore ia tago jorugu kaguru maku cenai, ceno jorugu bitugodu. 9Nowu meture tudadawuge egore boro! Umodukare turugadu cenai, tagai jamedu; kodire tadudo ure akirodo tabowuge etae tawo ia aru tagai. 1 U! Kode, etui bogai dukejere uwiredodumodewu aregodure. Cewu ure tudo turugadowuge ere turemo apo petamodewo kae, baiporo mitodure eperagajeje. 1 Gu rakatorure icare cewu iage etaregodure, egore cegimejera, cegimejera, baiporo jado cenai. 1 Mare uwiredodurewu akore boe rugadu jire inagore oino tai ioruduwakare tai! 1 Kode, tadugudo tai, taeruduwakare kakoduwu meri jiba, kakoduwu ia kodiboe jiba. 
Boe etugarege ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu. - 1 Jamedu, Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono ia imedu ui tuduiagu ia toro duotodai, ure tudugarege eto pui, ure toroe maku etai. 1 Ia mitodu ai ure diierodo ikera awubodure, ia ai ure udo pobe, ia ai ure udo mito, eruduwa reore. Dukejere icare uture. 1 Icare nowu ore ikera awubodurewu ure akirodo kuri je, ure oroe oto tawuje gu todobiji ikera awubowuto pugeje. 1 Du inodu reorere ore pobewu rore jamedu, ure ui pobedu oto tawuje gu iai pobe du kae pugeje. 1 Mare cewu ore mito tu jewu uwaigodure moto to, ure cewu tugimejera o diiero biado moto to. 1 Boe raicigore dukejere, cewu utugarege eimejera ure tugirimi, dukejere makore ei emaragodaemode du bogai. 2 Cewu ore ikera awubodu reorewu ure tuburedo ji, ure jordudo ia ikera awubodu reorewu pugejewu ji, akore Ikimejera, amearutorure ii ikera awubodu reore duji. Ica, ia ire ikeragu jiwu ikera awubodu reorewu pugejedu reo. 2 Nowu imejera akore ji ema remawu itugare pemegarewunure aki, jetorogodurewunure aki. Aedorogodure nowu biegarewu inodu tabo, kode imearutoru kurimode ai rugadu. Mato aegarewo akimejera apo. 2 Dukejere, cewu ore pobe tu jewu ure tudaru gu ae, akore Ikimejera, amearutorure ii pobe tu je duji. Ica, iage ei pobedu reo, dure ire itodudo gu pugeje. 2 Imejera akore ji ema rugadu, itugare pemegarewu, jetororewu; aedorogodure nowu biega inodu tabo. Imearutoru kurimode ai. Mato, aegarewo akimejera apo. 2 Du inodu rekodaji, cewu ore mito tu jewu aregodure, akore Ikimejera, ioruduware apewuie rugadu duji, are akeragu boeji akai boe tugu dutabo, are akeragu boeji, akai a roto ja ja je dutabo. 2 Kodire ipagudure, ire cewu are maku inaiwu rogu mito tu jedu ire biado moto to. Emareo, awure aenare ji. 2 Imejera akore ji itugare pegarewu, iera kiarirewu, aeruduware ie ikeragu boeji, ikare boe tuguwo keje, ie ikeragu boeji ikare boe a roto ja ja jewo keje duji. 2 Aia rumode ino diiero jetu diiero jeta keje, duma, ii ikirimi dukeje, nowu ino diiero makudumode inai ia padumode tu keje dutabo. Dukejere icare akore ia tudugaregei 2 Awu o diiero aru piji, maku cewu ore ikera pudogiduredu reorewu ai. 2 Mare paga karega, cewu ore makarewu, ia makudumode ai pugeje, nowu inodu tabo, oroe kuricigomode. Mare cewu oroe bokwarewu, jamedu meardaere uie tu pudaboboe jitu arudumode piji jamedu. 3 Awu itugare boe kimo jokodure jiwu, tamode barigu toro baawadu kae boecorewu to. Nono boe etoragudumode, boe eto akomode do do do do do pui nono. 
Jesus aregodumode tuwo tugogado boe eiamedu boe ji. - 3 Nowu du kodiwu keje, Imedu Onaregedu ui tugirimi tumedui turugu tada to tupadoge ebo dutabo dukeje, umode tumugudo tumuga pemegarewu keje, boe eimejerai pudumi dutabo. 3 Moto padui boe ebodu jamedu boe emode tudo pui jokorai, umode boe etawuje pubiji nono cewu akure cabritodoge, akure ovelhadoge umagai etawuje pubiji du reore. 3 Umode ovelhadoge enogwacedo tugana pemegerewu jaogwai, umode cabritodoge enogwacedo tugana koborewu jaogwai. 3 Dukejere eimejera akomode oino okwacere tugana pemegarewu jaogwaiwugei mato, Ioga bataru pemegare jiwuge, taeduwo boe pemegarewu jetu otorogare tawogai jii boe parui towujedu kodiwu keje. 3 Mare paga karega, ike boire ii, tare ikuno; pobo boire ii, tare ikududo; awararere imi, tare tageragu ii. 3 Iwiri kedore, tare aroia tugu ii: ikogodure, tare tagado tu tu iwogai; iragojere baicorewu tada, tadure iwogai jamedu. 3 Dukodi icare, nowu pemegarewuge enoragodumode ji, egomode cegimejera, inoba boere du kejeba ceerudure ake boi aiduji, du kodi cere akogwagedo? Inoba boere du kejeba ceerudure pobo boi aiduji du kejeba cere akududo? 3 Inoba boere du kejeba ceerudure awararei akiduji, dukejere cere cegeragu ai? Kakoduwu kejeba ceerudure awiri kedoji dukeje cere aroia tugu ai? 3 Inoba boere du kejeba ceerudure akogoduji, ceerudure amedui baicorewu tadaduji, dukejere cedure tu tu awogai? 4 Icare eimejera akomode boe jokodu jire imode boe awadudo tagai taroi tu tu oino awu iwiemage biegarewuge kugurei dukeje, dure nono iie taro oinodu kodiwore. 4 Dukeje umode tugirimi pai tugana koborewu jaogwaiwugei, akomode ei tagorodo oino ipiji, pegarewuge! Toro, joru akedu bokwarewu ure turugadu Aroe pegarewu mare metage ewogaiwuto. 4 Mare paga karega, ike boire ii, takare inogwagedo, pobo boire ii, takare ikududo. 4 Awararere imi, takare tageragu ii; iwiri kedore, takare aroia tugu ii; ikogodure, imedure baicorewu tada, tagaiwokare tu tu iwogai. 4 Awuge jamedu enoragodumode ji cegimejera, inoba boeredu kejeba ceerudure ake boi ai duji, pobo boi ai duji, awararei aki duji, awiri kedoji, akogodui, amedui baicorewu tada duji, cedaokare ai, cewiapagakare ai? 4 Eimejera akomode oino ei boe jokodu jire imode boe awadudo tai taro kadui ino awu iwiemage biegarewuge eidu jamedu reorere, ure nono ii taro oino du kodiwore. 4 Duwugere etumode mori pegarewu akedu bokwarewu to jamedu. 
Judeudoge etaidui tuwo Jesus bitodu. 1Tui awu bakaru jamedu boe akedudo dukeje, Jesus akore ture joruduwadowugei 2Taeruduware merimode pobe tu je dukeje Pascoamode duji. Imedu Onaregedu makudumode tubaduwo i padui pugajejedu keje. 3Baire eimejerage, boe codurewuge, ere tudo pui ekodure tumedage ekoriwu sacerdote iei Kaifás cedu uwai kae. 4Dukejere egore pui inoba turomode tuwo tugeragu Jesus ji, je paga inoduji, du bogai, tuwo bito du bogai. 5Egore turo kaiagu ino jii petamodedu tonaji. Boe jokodukare kare boe ekorigodumoduie inodu koiadu moduie. 
Jesus rakojei ia bakurirewu rogu iei Betânia cedu kejedu. 6Jesus rakojere Betânia keje, Simão, moci bare jiwu, uwai tada. 7Mugui ira kejedu kaere ia aredu ure tuburedo ji ia meriri kuru okorobadui roreboe mori kuricigorewu tabo dutabo. Ure redo Jesus aoto. 8Icare ure joruduwadowuge, tuiorudui inodu jitu keje, ekorigodure, egore Kodiba ure barigudu pagado? 9Nowu roreboe makuduia umode tumori kurirewu tabo, dutabo ia umode nowu diiero maku marenarue etai. 1 Jesus mearudure egoino duji, akore ei Kodiba tare awu aredu pogurudo? Turo pemegarewu jire ro oino ii. 1 Marenaru reoreboe emode tagabo jii je, mare imi imodukare tagabo jii jokodu. 1 Tui awu roreboe reko iiogidu ure nono tuie ure redo iiogi imedui iiaro tadadu kodiwore. 1 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai bakaru Pemegarewu kuodumode kejewu moto jamedu boe, awu ro oinodu kogadodumode boe ewiabutui keje dutabo. 
Judas ui Jesus maku sacerdotedoge eimejerage etaidu. 1 Dukodi icare ure joruduwadowuge iai mito tu jedu, uture sacerdotedoge eimejerage etae. 1 Unoragodure ei: - Kaba tamode makinai, imode maku tagai dukeje? Icare ere diierodo trinta ae. 1 Nowu inodu piji, jemarure turoiwamode tuwo Jesus maku etai jiwu meri bogai. 
Jesus ure Páscoa towuje. 1 Judeudoge enogwagere okokare jiwu amirewu jiwu boeto jiwu meri ji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tuburedo Jesus ji, enoragodure ji: - Kaiba akaidumode cewo pagogwagemode jiwu Páscoa pemegado? 1 Jesus akore ei Tadudo bakurirewu to, ia imedu uwai kae, tagagodo ji ure ceruduwadowu akore cemagoiagu ai boe puredugodunure ii, awai kejere imode Pascoado awu ire joruduwadowuge ebo. 1 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge erore nono Jesus turoiagudu reore, ere tugera pemegado Pascoaji. 2 Meri rekodu tabore, Jesus aregodure, ure tumugudo ira keje togwagewo Pascoaji nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo. 2 Nowu togwage tonaji, akore Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: ia tagi tamode imagu. 2 Tugiarigodu tabore icare enoragodure ji: - Imi kana, cegimejera? 2 Du akore Cewu ure tugera tugu pratoto itabowu, duwu koiare umode imagu. 2 Imedu Onaregedu utumode, bapera atugoi pudui du reore. Mare nowu ure Imedu Onaregedu makuwu imedu jiwomode. Ema remawure nowu imedu butumodukare du rema. 2 Judas, koiare umode makuwu, makogodure jamedu, unorare ji: - Cegimejera, imi kana? Jesus akore ji U! Aki rugadu. 
Jesus ure tumagu boe ewugeje. 2 Nowu togwage inodu tonaji, Jesus ure tugeragu amirewu ji, ure kado dogo dogo je, ure maku nowu ture joruduwadowuge etai, tagoi oino dutabo: - Emareo, kowuje, ikodu reo. 2 Dukeje ure tugeragu parera kuru jaji, rore oino tu baruto Tuo ae, ure nowu parera kuru maku ture joruduwadowuge etai, tagoi oino dutabo: - 2 Ca, tagu ce, taiamedu tabo: iku reo, bakaru maiwu jiwu iku reo; redodumode tuwo makarewuge ero pegarewu okwado. 2 Inagomode tai ikudumodukare awu kurureboece pugeje jii meri aregodumode ikudumode ce tagabo Ioga o boe pemegarewu kejedu kae. 3 Turai ia tugeroia jitu kejere icare, eture Oliveira tadawu torekodu kae. 
Jesus ui Pedro bie. 3 Dukejere Jesus akore ei Awu boe cojire tawudumode igoia. Mare paga karega, bapera atugore oino kodi imedu jeture ovelhadoge eidu okorido, dukejere icare nowu ovelhadoge emode tado tuieda piji. 3 Mare iewodu rekodaji itumode tagododai Galiléia moto kae. 3 Icare Pedro akore ji Eiamedu boe ewudumode aigoia ma, mare imi iwudumodukare tu rugadu. Imodukare apijido. 3 Jesus akore ji Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai awu boe comitoduji rugadure amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, kogariga akogodumodedu otodai. 3 Pedro akore akoi pudui duji Iwidodumode akabo rugadu, mare imodukare iioruduwa bokwado ai. Dukodire icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge eiamedu boe egore nono ako magadure. 
Jesus makoi Tuo ji iturarogu iei Getsmani cedu kejedu. 3 Jesus ure tudaru ebo ia boe eeda iei Getsmani cedu kae. Taregodui toro dukejere, akore ei Tamugudo tu woe jao, ikodui kuri woje imagowo Pao ji jao. 3 Dukeje, tui tugera kogudo Pedro iera ra paru kajeje, mare Zebedeu ore ei pobedu jamedu, ure erego pudabo. Dukejere kiarigodu okwari buture keje. 3 Akore Itaroe kiarigodu kuricigore jii iwimode du kae. Taedo woe itabo. 3 Dukejere ure tudaru gu epiji, ure tuie jodo moto to, akore oino Tuo ji Ioga, umode turugadu dukeje, amode awu kuru jirireboe roto oino ipiji. Mare umodukare itaidu reore, mare akaidu reorere umode. 4 Icare ure turagojedo, uture ture joruduwadowuge etai, boekarema enu padu bi rabodu. Icare akore Pedro ji Kode, taetu karade itabo! 4 Tadugudo tai, tamagodo Pao ji tarokawo domi domi je. Boe etaroe ure turugadu, mare boe ekodu rakakare. 4 Ure tudaru gu epiji pugeje, makore Tuo ji pugeje, akore Ioga, umodukai turugadu awo awu kuru jirireboe roto oino ipiji, ikudukai ce dukeje, kode udo akaidu reore. 4 Ure tugirimi etae pugeje, jeture pa enu padu biji pugeje, mare paga karega, nore kori remawunure eekuji kodi. 4 Uture epiji pugeje, pobe ma jewu metuia bokware pugeje, togwa kodui mitodu jitu tabo. 4 Dukejere, ure tugirimi ture joruduwadowuge etae pugeje, akore ei Ica, tanududo oino, tagamudo. Ica, boe aregodure pudae. Imedu Onaregedu makudumode ropegarewuge ekera kai. 4 Taragojedo, marigu! Cewu umode imaguwu rakoje puredure woe. 
Brae ere tugeragu Jesus ji. 4 Jesus makore kimo, cewu Judas, cewu ia ure joruduwadowu aregodu keje, apowuge emagare tugedui toriga bigodu jitu tabo, tugedui ipo jitu tabo, nono baire eimejerage, boe codudoge ei turoiagudu reore. 4 Cewu umode makuwu ure bakarudo turugadu ei: - Emare cewu imode inogwabi jiwu rema. Tageragu ji. 4 Icare ure tuburedo Jesus ji, akore ji Itaregodu, ikimejera. Icare ure togwabi ji. 5 Jesus akore ji Imeduia, nowu inodu bogaiba aro oino woe? Du inodu kejere ere tuburedo Jesus ji, ere tugera raido ae tuwo tugeragu ji. 5 Mare ia Jesus metuia, ure toriga tawuje tuia piji, ure baire eimejera kurirewu ia utugare okorido tui bia kado dutabo. 5 Mare Jesus akore ji Atoriga tugu tuiato, cewu ure tumedage etogorido toriga tabowuge ewimode toriga tabo jamedu. 5 Amearutorukare imagomode Ioga bogai ma, umodukare Tupadoge makarewuge etudo iwogai duji? 5 Kode inoba umode ukai nono bapera atugo reore dukeje? 5 Dukejere ure tuie kirimi pai nowu ro oino puduiwugei, akore ei Tadure mato toriga tabo, ipo tabo, tawo tageragu ii du bogai. Tanure tarodo nono iro pega kurie, imago pega kurie du kodie taro oino iwogai du kodiwore. Mare du inodu boe tada, boe jamedu boere imugure tadoda ii taeruduwado dutabo Pao uwai tada, mare takare tageragu ii. 5 Mare au inodu jamedu boere tudowuje uwo nono profetadoge ewadaru reore. Nowu inodu keje, ure joruduwadowuge eiamedu boe ere pijido, eregodure piji. 
Jesus rakojei judeudoge eimejerage ei tudo puidu eegoraidu. 5 Ure tugeragu Jesus jiwuge ere reko baire eimejera iei Caifás cedu ae. Escribadoge, codurewu boe eedui apo du kae. 5 Pedro kodure rekodaji, mare ukare tuiedu puredu ji, jii baire eimejera uwororo kae. Ure turemo, ure tumugudo nowu utugarege ebo, tuioruduwo inoba nowu inodu akedumode duji. 5 Nowu inodu tonaji, baire eimejerage eemarunure tuwo Jesus roiaodo ma, tuwo reko bitoduwo. 6 Emode roiaodo jiboe, emode batararodo jiboe makaguragare duwugere towadudo eegai, mare eroiwakare, egoiwakare. 6 Nowu inodu oto kejere, iage ei pobedu egore Awu imedu akore imode Pao uwai pegado mare meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje imode towuje pugeje. 6 Icare nowu baire eimejera ure turagojedo taci je, unorare Jesus ji, akore ji Ia amagore jiboe bokware awu emago pegare aidu jipagi? 6 Mare Jesus makokare. Dukodi icare nowu baire eimejera makore ji, akore Pao Aroe Eimejera ie tabo imode amagodo Pao Onaregedu iei Cristo cedunure aki? 6 Jesus akore U! Imi rugadu. Boe jokodu jire inagomode tai jamedu ia meri keje taerudumode Imedu Onaregedu mugui Pao ro rakarewu ako rakarewu kana pemegarewu jaogwai duji, tui turawuje baru tadawu boetugu aogeje dutabo. 6 Nowu bataru keje, nowu baire eimejera ure tugudae rugadu bowuje toiogwari tabo: - U! Pawiapagamode iaboe bogai kimo? Ica, maigodure tamearudure mako pegai oinoduji. 6 Inoba umode taegai? Egore Bitodu rumode nowu inodu morice. 6 Du ere todoguru to jeto, ere tugimori to ji, ere tugera to jeji, tagoi oino dutabo: - 6 Cristo, ure tugera to aiwu pawuje. 
Pedro ure tuioruduwa bokwado Jesus ji. 6 Nowu inodu otoi, Pedro mugure toro ewororo keje. Ia maragodure nonowu aredu, ure tuburedo ji, akore ji Aki jamedu aragojere Jesus Galiléia kejewu apo. 7 Mare ure tuioruduwa bokwado ji boe oinodu oiado, tagoi oino dutabo: - Ioruduwakare akagoino jiboe ji. 7 Dukejere kodure kuri baiporo kae tuwo tuiebu du bogai. Nowu inodu otoi, nowu maragodure nonowu ia aredu pugeje jorudure ji, akore jeture nonowugei Awu imedu rakojere jamedu Jesus Nazaré kejewu apo. 7 Ia pugeje Pedrore tuioruduwa bokwa jokodudo ji, akore Ioruduwakare nowu imeduji. 7 Du je dukejere nowu jeture nonowuge ere tuburedo jice Pedro ji, egore U! Ecewuge ia akireo. Amago tabo cere apawuje. 7 Kode, dukejere icare Pedro makore tugorigodu tabo tuiruduwakae nowu imeduji. Nowu inodu tonaji kogariga akogodure. 7 Pedro biabuture Jesus akore puduiwo keje Kogariga akogodumodedu otodai, amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. Dukejere Pedro uture nowu piji, toragudu kuricigo tabo. 

Boere Jesus reko Pilato ae. 1Ba aregodu tabore baire eimejerage, codurewu boe ere tudo pui tumago tabo tuwadaru tabo tuwo Jesus maku tuwidodu kae. 2Ere kogudo, ere reko brae eimejera Pilato ae. 
Judas biredu. 3Judas, cewu ure makuwu, tuiorudui Jesus makudui tuwi kae dukeje, tori buture jagi, pagudugodure, uture nowu baire eimejerage, nowu codurewuge etae, ure cewu diiero ui trinta cedu maku etai pugeje, tagoi oino dutabo: - 4Iro pegare ii imedu pemegarewu ku maku dutabo. Egore ji Cedaomodukare nowu inoduji, akabore nowu inodu padure. 5Du, nowu inodu keje, ure nowu diiero barigu toro Pao uwaito. Ure tuiebu, uture toro tuwo tuwido, tui bukigu kogudo turuwo kajeje du kae. 6Baire eimejerage ere tugeragu nowu diieroji, egore Pamodukare jetu Pao uwai tadawu boe enoroe pemegarewu tabo, mare paga karega, kureboe mori rema kodi. 7Cewu tui batarudo puidu akedu keje, ere maragodure motori jiwu o boepa aru cewu diiero tabo, uwo moto tuginoiwu pijiwuge eno aroe eiao rema. 8Dukoiare iere oino boe eku jeta boepa, jii oino kimo rugadu. 9Awu inodu ure nono profeta Jeremia makore jiboe reore: - Meririre trinta makudure etai, Israeldoge emeardae reore, 1 Ere maku nowu maragodure motori jiwu o boepa morice, nono ikimejera uiagudu reore. 
Jesus rakojei Pilato jokoraidu. 1 Ere Jesus reko brae eimejera ae, du unoragodure ji, akore Akina judeudoge eimejera kurirewu ure aki? Jesus akore U! 1 Mare nowu baire eimejerage, boe codudoge emagoi pudui dukeje, makokare ei. 1 Icare Pilato unoragodure ji pugeje: - Amearudukare boe ji aroiaodo boeji? 1 Mare nowu brae ime, jera je rore ta.., makokai ia tuwadaru jipagiduji. 
Jesus bitodumodedu. 1 Boekarema, Páscoa jiwu meri keje tu tu tu, nowu brae eimejerare nowu mugure baicorewu tadawuge epijiwu ia imedu tawuje tawuje, boe enogwamagudui dukeje. 1 Ica, nowu du kodi, ia akaru pegarewu imedu iei Barrabás cedu meture baicorewu tada. 1 Icare Pilato akore nowu ure tudo pui nonowugei, akore Kakoduwu tagaidure iwo inorudo? Barrabás na? Iarema Jesus iei Cristo cedu na? 1 (Joruduware emagere Jesus maku tugorii jitu tabo). 1 Mugui brae eimejera tumuga keje tuwo tugogado boe ji du kaere oredujere boe egoiagu ji: - Arokaba ia aro nowu imedu pemegarewu ji. Irore tuku inuiao tada jiboe koia. 2 Mare baire eimejerage, boe codudoge, ere boedo togwamaguduwo ji uwo Barrabás inorudo, uwo Jesus bito. 2 Dukodi icare nowu brae eimejera makore ei, akore Kakoduwu ia ei pobedu imode inorudo tagai? Egore Barrabás! 2 Icare Pilato unoragodure ei pugeje, akore Kode, inoba iromode Jesus iei Cristo ceduji? Icare egore tuiamedu tabo Padu rumode i padui pugajeje dukeje. 2 Icare brae eimejera unoragodure ei kimo, akore Kode, inoba ropegareure? Ere tumago rakado rugadu pugeje, egore Padudodu rumode i padui pugajejedu keje. 2 Pilato jorudure boe kimo rabuduie ure rugadu, mare eie tumago toiogwari awogado rugadu, icare makore pobo bogai, ure tugera kabi nowu brae eegai, akore Imire itagurugodure, igoia karega awu imedu bitodumode: nowu inodu tagi toro. 2 Icare boe eiamedu boe egore Ku butuwo ceiamedu bukeje, cedore ewugeje. 2 Du icare ure Barrabás inorudo, ure tudugarege edo iku oto meririrewu to to Jesus ji, dukejere ure maku bitodudoduwo i padui pugajejedu keje. 
Torigaraidogere turo tago amado Jesus ji. 2 Brae eimejera o tugobaigarege ere Jesus reko nowu tugimejera uwai iei Pretório cedu kae, eiamedure ere taiado Jesus apo. 2 Ere Jesus kudae rugadu tawuje taci, ere aroia kujagurewu tugu ji. 2 Dukeje, ere boto ikurewu enado ere oreado, ere to co aorato, ere ia iwara bu iera keje. Dukejere ere tubujodo jokorai, egore ji Kode, judeudoge eimejera kurirewunure aki! 3 Ere todoguru to jeto, ere tugeragu cewu ture bu iera kejewu iwaraji, ere to pa, aoraji. 3 Cewu turo tago amado ji du rekodaji, ere cewu aroia kujagurewu tawuje piji, ere ukudae remawu maku ai. Dukejere ere reko toro, tuwo bu i padui pugajejedu keje. 
Jesus padui cruz kejedu. 3 Tudui nowu tuieda piji dukeje, eerudure ia Cirene pijiwu imedu iei Simão ceduji, du ere udo tudugu Jesus o i padui pugajeje duji arobi. 3 Etaregodure ia eeda iei Gólgota cedu kae, du inodu jire boe egore Boe etaora ra jeta, ino. 3 Dukejere ere kududo boe eku kuru tugudui parera kuruto duce. Ure togwa pagado tu ji, mare kudukare ce. 3 Ere bu i padui pugajejedu keje, dukeje ere ukudae pedo pui, tui tuiwo aidugirimodedu bu keje dutabo. Nowu inodu kodure profeta bataru reore ere ikudae pedo pui, ikudae kejere ere tuiwo aidugiriredu bu. 3 Icare ere tumugudo toebatodu tabo. 3 Aora bukejere ere ia ira atugo bararedo turoi jitu kodiboe tabo Jesus reo, Judeudoge eimejera kurirewu. 3 Nowu inodu tonaji, ere iwogu kigodurewuge ei pobedu ewu i padui pugajejedu keje apo. Ia okwacere kana pemegarewu jaogwai, ia okwacere kana koborewu jaogwai. 3 Kodure nono koriwuge ewadaru pegare ji, ere tao ra roto bai bai, tagoi oino dutabo: - 4 Akagore amoduie Pao uwai butudo, amoduie ia towuje meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje taci je. Kode, akinorudo akaobiji. Pao Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu aki rugadu dukeje, arawuje nowu i piji. 4 Baire eimejerage, boe codudoge ewadaru pegare ji jamedu, egore 4 Ure iage einorudo, mare oino, ukare cinorudo taobiji. Kode, Israeldoge eimejeramode ema rugadu dukeje, udo turawuje i piji, nowu inodu keje cemearutorumode ji. 4 Meartorure Aroe Eimejera ji, kode, Aroe Eimejera mearudu kurimode ji dukeje, umode inorudo. Mare paga karega, akore Pao Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure imi. 4 Nowu iwogu kigodurewuge epadui i keje apodu emago pegare ji jamedu. 
Jesus biredu. 4 Meri jetui brae etoiadoda dupiji jii meri jogodu kae, boecore turorido moto jamedu boe joki. 4 Meri jogodu kejere Jesus kudu rakarewu padure boe kajeje, akore Eli, Eli, lamma sabactani. Du inodu jire akore Ioga, Ioga, kodiba are ipijido? Oino. 4 Awu bataru keje, ia jeture nonowuge egore Makonure Elias bogai. 4 Kuri je ia emage ure tugeragu ia pobo meture tadaboeji, ure tugu ia kuru jirireboeto, ure bu ia ipo oto keje, ure raido toro ae, kuduwo ce. 4 Iage egore Pi ji! Pawo pagado tu Eliamode tugerabraredo jitu bogai. 5 Icare Jesus oiogwari rakarewu padure boe kajeje pugeje, nonore icare akurure. 5 Inodu kejere, Pao uwai kejewu aroia kurirewu ure tuwowuje oiagi, moto amagadure, toridoge ere tuiado. 5 Aroe eiaodoge ere tuiado, ia pemegarewuge makarewuge eewodure tuwi piji. 5 Duwuge ere tuiebu tuiao piji, icare eture nowu bakurirewu pemegarewu to, Jesus jewodu rekodaji. 5 Toebatodure Jesus jiwu tugobaigarege mare nowu eimejera tuiorudui moto amagadui mare nowu ure tudo boe jamedu boe jitu keje, emagore pui, tubagudu rakaguragarewu tabo, egore Boe jokodu rugadu awu imedu Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu reno. 
Jesus tugudui tori todu. 5 Ia areme eedure nono jamedu, taiwo tabo: cewu kodure Jesus apo Galiléia pijiwuge tuwo tugerabraredo ji. 5 Duwuge etada, Maria Madalena meture, Tiago more José etuje meture jamedu, Zebedeu ore etuje jamedu. 5 Meri rekodu tabo, ia imedu iei José cedu, oroe kurirewu, ia Jesus ure joruduwadowu, 5 jeemarure Pilato bogai, okwamagudure ji Jesus akurui marigudu du bogai. Icare Pilato ure makai. 5 Icare José ure tugeragu ji, ure aroia kigadurewu upodo apo. 6 Ure tugu ture tudugarege edo pemegado maigodu, tuiaromode ema tuwimodedu kejedu kejewuto. Dukeje, ure ia tori kurirewu roto kororo jekai, ure bu je keje, dupijire uture. 6 Maria Madalena mare ia metago Maria, emugure nono puredu tu ji. 
Boe eetui Jesus meturewo jidu. 6 Barogwa tore icare, cewu ere tugera pemegado pudui peta paru kaedu kejere, nowu baire eimejerage mare escribadoge ere tudo pui Pilato uwai kae. 6 Egore ji Cegimejera, cewiabuture cewu batararodu barikarewu je kimo tabowu bataru keje. Akore Meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje iewodumode. 6 Kode, ia boe eetudo nowu meturewoji jii meri pobe ma awu metuia bokware du kae. Boe jokodu kare kare, ure joruduwadowuge eiwogumode ji ma, egomode jewoduie birewuge epiji, oinore egomode boe ewiegai du umode, awu batararodaereboe umode pugeje ma, kodumode nowu boeto jiwu kori tubega tabo. 6 Icare Pilato akore ewadaru jipagi Tago tugobaigaregere, tare eetudo ji tameardae reore. 6 Eture rugadu, ekedure nowu meturewoji, ere kruca bu nowu tori keje ere tugobaigarege eedo keje. 

Jesus jewoduidu. 1Nowu Sábado rekodaji nowu semana boeto jiwu meri ji, Maria Madalena, mare metago Maria, eture toro meturewo kae. 2Boekarema, moto amagadu rakaguragare dutabore icare Pao o tupare turawuje baru piji ure nowu tori roto nowu meturewo je piji, ure tumugudo tu aogeje. 3Jere nono boe jeragudu reore, ukudae kigadure nono pobo akirirewu kigadure. 4Cewu tugobaigarege, tuiorudui nowu inodu jitu keje emeardaere tuwimoduie tubagudu koia. 5Nowu tuparema, akore nowu aremei Tabagudu kaba! Ioruduware taemaruie ure padure i padui pugajejedu kejewu Jesus bogai duji. 6Mugukare woe: jewodure cewu tagoi du reore. Mato, taeruduwo ure tamudowo ji. 7Tamara tabo toro, ure joruduwadowuge ewogai, tagagodo ei jewoduie birewuge epiji. Kodumoduie tagododai Galiléia kae. Torore taerudumode ji pugeje. Oinore inagore tu tai. 8Icare eture meturewo piji tugimai dugu je dutabo, mare tuiegare tabo jamedu, eregodure ure joruduwadowuge etae nowu bakaru maiwu pemegarewu tabo. 9Nowu inodu keje kuri je, Jesus ure towadudo eegai, akore oino ei Itaregodu. Ere tuburedo ji, ere tubujodo taci jokorai, tui togwabi bureto dutabo. 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Tabagudu kaba. Toro, tamagodo iwiemagei etuwo Galiléia kae, torore eerudumode ii. 
Jeture Jesus meturewo jiwuge ewadararodu. 1 Nowu areme ekodui toro du tonaji, ia oebatodure jiwu ime eradu marigudu toro bakurirewu to tuwo baire eimejerage ewie inoba boereduji. 1 Awugere icare ere tudo pui nowu boe codudoge ebo. Ere meriri maka inodu maku nowu tugobaigarege etai, egore oino ei. - 1 Tamagomode oino boe ji ure joruduwadowugeie etaregodure bogai boe co ji tuwo reko tanudu tonaji. 1 Brae eimejera mearudumode nowu inodu jitu keje, cemode butugudo, cemode taginorudo ia boe pegamode tai dupiji. 1 Icare nowu tugobaigarege ere tugeragu cewu makudure pudaiwu diieroji, eture toro tagowo nono tagoiagudu reore. Nowu batararodae ure taodo judeudoge ekao jii oino. 
Jesus ui towadudo ture joruduwadowuge eegaidu. 1 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ei ikera pudogidure mito taci ikera awubowutowu, eture toro Galiléia kae, nowu Jesus akore tuduiagu kaewu tori rairewu kae. 1 Tuiorudui jitu keje, ere tubujodo ji, du inodu tada iage emearutoru jokodukare. 1 Mare Jesus ure tuburedo ei, akore ei Ica: ro rakareboe mako rakareboe makudure inai baru tada, moto keje jamedu. 1 Kode tadudo toro moto jamedu boeji tai boe eruduwado dutabo, tamode etao pegodo Uo, Onaregedu, Aroe Pemegarewu ie tabo. 2 Eeruduwado turowo nono imagore tai du reore. Ica! Iragojemode tagabo meri jamedu ji jii boe jamedu ji jii je. 

João Batista uwadodae. 1Pao baru tadawu Onaregedu Jesus Cristo o bakaru maiwu pemegarewu paru. Profeta Isaias o bapera keje atugododure oino: 2Ica, inure ino tupa utudo akododai, emare umode akawara pemegado. 3Iaboe mako padure boe matadu kajeje, akore Pagimejera utawara jetorodo, moto aoporu boe kororogodudo. 4Kodi icare João Batista je padure boe matadu kajeje tokituwai boe ji ewo tao pegodo ma, epemegawo, ero pegarewu pijidoduwo. 5Dukodi icare, Judéia kejewuge eiamedu boe, Jerusalém kejewuge eiamedu boe etu eture ae tumagowo ji; emagore turo pegarewu ji, dukejere ure etao pegodo Jordão po tada. 6João merure camelo biri metui pudui dutabo, ia kogure kajeje, okwagere bokokuadogei, moiawoei jamedu. 7Icare uwadodure, akore Ia kodu remawure ikoriwu imedu aregodumode iregodaji, duwu otoji icekare iwo bure tadawu iku kiwuje. 8Ire tagao pegodo pobo tabo, emarema, umode tagao pegodo Aroe Pemegarewu tabo. 
João Batistare Jesus ao pegodo. 9Boekimorema, nowu ia meri keje Jesus aregodure padure Galiléia kejewu bakurirewu iei Nazaré cedu piji. Icare ao pegododure João koia, Jordão po tada. 1 Icare ui tudawuje pobo pijidu tonajire icare jorudure barui tuiado, Aroe Pemegarewu ui turawuje tui nono metugu reore dutabo bukeje duji. 1 Boe emearudure ia boe mako aregodui baru piji duji, akore Akire imearudu kurire jiwu itonaregedure aki awugejere ire imearudu kuriae jamedu boe bu. 1 Awu inodu otobiji, Aroere utudo toro boe mataduto. 1 Merire ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure, ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure ji nono, Aroe pegarewu podure ji nono, barege eedure apo, tupadoge eedure ji. 
Jesus uwadodae. 1 Icare braere João tugu baicorewu to, du rekodajire icare Jesus uture Galiléia kae. Ure Pao o bakaru maiwu pemegarewu kuo, tagoi: - 1 Icare boe aregodure pudae, Pao o boe pemegarewu aregodunure, icare tagodorogado tai, tamearutorudo Pao o bakaru maiwu pemegarewu ji. 
Jesus ure joruduwadowu boeto jiwuge ei pobe puibijidu. Tumerui Galiléia kejewu kuruga kurirewu okwai dutabore icare, jorudure Simão ji, uwie André ji, ei buke barigu pobo to duji, boekarema, kare ecebage rabodure emage. 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Tago itabo! Iwo tuwugerurudo imeiwugedo tagi. 1 Kuri je ere tugera ra tuwuge piji, ekodure apo. 1 Ekodure gu... Je dukeje, jorudure Tiago, Zebedeu onaregeduji, uwie João ji, eedui ia ika tada duji, enure tugare pemegado tuwugeji. 2 Makore kuri etai. Eture tuo Zebedeu mugui tudugarege ebodu piji, ekodure apo. 
Jesus ui Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu ia imedu pijidu. 2 Ere turemo Cafarnaum bakurirewu to, icare, Sábado okwabiji, Jesus ure turemo sinagogato. Kejere ure boe eruduwado. 2 Eerudu moture nowu uwadodae ji, paga karega, ure eruduwado nono ia boe eimejerare boe eruduwadodu reore, mare escribadoge ereore karega. 2 Ica, nowu sinagoga tada ia Aroe pegarewu pegarewu metui tadawu imedu rakojere nono, du oiogwarire, 2 akore Inoba aromode cei, Jesus Nazaré kejewu? Akaregodure awo cewarigu boeto? Ioruduware ai aroe Eimejera o imedu pemegarewunure aki. 2 Mare Jesus akore ji Amago urugadu, atawuje nowu imedu piji! 2 Aror pegareure nowu imedu amagadudodu kuricigodo, tui toiogwari rakaguragado, tui tudawuje piji dutabo. 2 Boe eiamedu boe erore ta... Je, enorare jice woje, jice woje pui, egore Kabobao? Uwadodure boe maiwu ji tui nono boe eimejerai pudumidu reore! Roiware tuwo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu jamedu, duwugere emearutorure bataru ji! 2 Kuri je, akarure taodo moto jamedu boe kao, Galiléia oiei. 
Jesus ui Pedro ucarugo pemegagodu. 2 Ure tudawuje nowu sinagoga piji dukeje, uture Tiago apo, João apo, nowu Simão, André mage ewai kae. 3 Nowu Simão ucarugo padure tuba kamorewu keje tuwiri uru tabo. Icare emagore kuri ji inoba ure duji. 3 Ure tuburedo gu jice ji, ure tugeragu ieraji, ure tuera awogado iera tabo. Nowu inodu tonaji, biri uru akedure pi tuku je, dukejere ure enogwagedo. 
Jesus ui ia kogodurewuge epemegagodu. 3 Meri rekodu tabo, meri butu rekodaji, ere kogodurewuge eiamedu boe, Aroe pegarewuge emedure tadawuge eiamedu boe, eto pui ae. 3 Nowu bakurirewu tadawuge eiamedu boe ere tudo pui nowu baiporo kae. 3 Ure makarewuge epemegago tugogodae jamedu boe piji, ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigudu makaguragado: ukare egodo ia tago, eruduware ji kodi. Barogwa tore icare jetadure barogwa kododumodedu otodai, icare ure tuiebu, uture boe makodurewu to, nonore icare ure togwa kurido. 3 Du tonajire icare Simão jemarure bogai tumedage ebo. 3 Eerudure ji dukejere icare, egore ji Boe eiamedu boe eemarure awogai. 3 Icare akore ei Paduwo bakurirewu rogudoge etae, bakurirewu padu puredurewuge etae, iwadoduwo toro jamedu; paga karega, nowu inodu bogaire itaregodure. 3 Kodure toro rugadu, uwadodure eno sinagogadoge etada, nowu Galiléia jamedu boe kao, tui Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu dutabo. 
Jesus ure ia moci bare jiwu imedu pemegago. 4 Ia moci bare jiwu imedu uture ae, ure tubujodo ji, togwamagudui jitu dutabo, akore Akaidu keje, amode ikabi. 4 Jesus okudure apo, ure tugera raido jice ae, ure tugera bu keje, akore ji Itaidure. Kode, apemegago. 4 Nowu ako oinodu tonaji kuri je, moci okware pi tuku je. Akurugudure taci je. 4 Jesus imadure kuri apo, akore ji tumago okori tabo 4 Amago kaba boe ewiegai, mare, toro! Sacerdote jordudo ai, ia akomearogu maku apemegagodu morice, Moisés bataru reore, apemegagodu koiaboe reore. 4 Mare nowu imedu uture kuri je, ure nowu inodu boedo taodo, du kodi icare Jesus roiwakare tuwo turemo tui towadudo dutabo bakurirewu to. Rakojere bakujei, boe eragojekarewo keje. Boe eiamedu etu eture ae tu tu tubiji. 

Jesus ure ia meru bokwarewu imedu pemegago. 1Dukejere icare, Jesus ure turemo Cafarnaum bakurirewu to pugeje, icare boe eruduware mugui tuwai kejeduji. 2Kodi icare boe ere tudo pui du makaguragare ae, kodi icare boe eroiwakare pu kujiagi nowu baiporoto. Icare uwadodure ewiegai. 3Icare boere ia meru bokwarewu imedu arego nono ae, oredure apowu ime ere pobe puibiji. 4Mare eroiwakare boe ekujiagi apo jice ae. Boekarema ere ia tugoda pawuje jice bai aoji, Jesus bukajeje. Ere bai ao jado, du poro jire ere nowu kogodurewu pa kamorewu rawuje apo baito. 5Icare Jesus, tuiorudui nowu emeartorae rakarewu jitu keje, makore nowu pogora bokwarewu ji, akore Itonaregedu, iwudugugodure ai aro pegarewu jamedu boeji. 6Boekarema, ia escribadoge emugure nonodu egore pui 7Kodiba awu imedu akomode oino? Mako peganure! Ioguduba umode boe ero pegarewu okwado? Pao baru tadawu tu je karega? 8Mare Jesus, tui emeardae pawuje dukeje, akore ei Kodiba tameardaere oino tawabo tada? 9Inoba ureuba biamodukare: imagowo awu pogora pegarewu ji iwudugugodure aro pegarewu jamedu boeji, oino ji, iarema inagowo ji aragojedo, akeragu apa komorewu ji, amerudo, oino ji? 1 Aro, kode, taeruduwawo Imedu Onaregedu ro rakarewu makudui aiduji (akore nowu pogora pegarewu ji). - 1 Imire inagoino aragojedo! Akeragu apa kamorewu ji, toro awai kae! 1 Icare ure turagojedo kuri je, ure tugeragu tuba kamorewu ji, uture boe eegai rugadu. Nowu boe eiamedu boe eebogodure, ere Pao akaru kurido tuiegare tabo, tagoi oino dutabo: - Paerudu kigodukare awu inodu reoreboeji. 
Jesus mare Levi. 1 Icare uture pugeje pobo maerewu okwa kae pugeje. Nowu boe makarewuge ere tudo pui ae, ure eruduwado. 1 Boekarema, tumerui nono dutabore icere jorudure Levi, Alfeu onaregedu, mugui braei toe moridodu ja ira kejeduji. Icare akore ji Ako itabo! Icare ure turagojedo taci je, kodure apo. 1 Dukejere icare, ia meri keje, Jesus ure tumugudo togwagewo nowu Levi uwai tada. Boere toe mori maku aiwu makarewuge, mare ro pegarewuge makarewuge ere tumugudo apo, mugui nowu tudugarege ebodu apo, paga karega, kodure pudabowuge emagaguragare. 1 Icare fariseudoge eno escribadoge, tuiorudui okwagei ro pegarewuge ebo, ure tugeragu brae emori jiwuge ebo duji dukeje, egore ure joruduwadowuge ei Kodi icare, okwagenure ropegarewuge ebo, publicanodoge ebo! 1 Icare Jesus tumerudui egoinodu jitu dukeje, akore Pemegarewuge ewiapagakare jorubo kuru epa bogai mare kogodurewuge u. Paga karega, itaregodure, mare imagowo pemegarewuge ewogai karega, mare pegarewuge ewogai. 1 Ia meri keje pugeje, João ure joruduwadowuge mare fariseudoge etodoroganure pudui. Dukodire boe etaregodure ae tunorawo ji, egore Kodiba João ure joruduwadowuge mare fariseudoge etodorogare pudui, are joruduwadowuge rema, etodorogakare pudui? 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Kode, kodiba bakaru makudure aiwuge etodorogamode pudui, tugodui nowu iera makudure toreduje aiwu apo du tonaji? Nowu tugodui apo du tonaji etodorogamodukare pudui. 2 Ia meri aregodumode nowu tawujedumode epiji du kae, dukeje etodorogamode pudui. 2 Boe emodukare aroia maiwu kobo bu aroia codurewu poro keje; paga karega, aroia kobo maiwu umode aroia codurewu ia okwa rawuje piji, dukeje nowu mega pega jokodumode. 2 Boe emodukare parera kuru maiwu tugu pori codurewu to. Boe eromode ino ma, nowu kuru umode nowu pori bowuje ma, rugadu okwamode. Mare parera kuru maiwu jamode pori maiwuce. 
Jesus ore Sábado rema. 2 Sabadore jiwu meri ji, Pagimejera merunure boepadoge ekao, dutabore, kodure apowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tugeragu ia trigo enari boeji. 2 Icare fariseudoge egore ji Akaiwodo! Kodiba erore oinono sabadore jiwu meri ji, boe eromodukare ino jiwu meri ji? 2 Jesus akore ewadaru jipagi Tamagokare Davi jiwu bapera atugoji, cewu tuge boire puduidu kodiboe keje, ema mare nowu metage? 2 Kode, ure turemo Pao uwaito, Pao bure joiage eimejera iei Abiatar cedu kodiwu keje, ure enogwa kuridodure tabowu amirewu kowuje, du tu Pao burejoiage emode kowuje, ure maku tumedage etai jamedu? 2 Icare akore ei pugeje Dukodire Imedu Onaregedu ore Sábado rema jamedu. 

Jesus ui ia iera birewu imedu pemegagodu. 1Ia kodiboe keje pugeje, Jesus ure turemo sinagogato pugeje; nonore ia imedu iera birewu muguradu nono. 2Icare (onare jiwuge) enoebatodure ji tuioruduwo iogomode ji sabadore jiwu meri kejedu bogai, togiru pegawo jitu bogai. 3Icare akore nowu iera birewu ji Mato boiado. 4Icare unoragodure ei, akore Boe ero pemegamodukana, iarema boe ero pegamodukana sabadore jiwu meri keje? Boekana umode pu inorudo, iarema boekana umode pu bito? Mare emagokare. 5Dukoiare ure tuioku okorido jice eiogi, kiarigodure tuiorudui ewabo kugudukaduji, dukeje icare akore nowu imeduji Akera inogido. Ure tugera inogido, du tonaji, iera pemegagodure. 6Icare fariseudoge ere tudawuje nowu piji tumagowo herodianodogoei inoba turomode tuwo bito. 
Jesus uwadodui ika tadadu pijidu. 7Jesus ure tudawuje ture joruduwadowuge ebo nowu kuruga kae. Ia boe makarewuge etaregodui Galiléia pijidu ekodure apo. 8Judéia piji, Jerusalém piji, Idumeia piji, Jordão okwa bakoboe piji, Tiro, Sidão oieiboe piji, ia boe makarewuge etaregodure ae, tumearudui roboe jitu koia. 9Icare ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge eiagu ika kurirewu udo turugadu, nowu boe makarewuge eiokawo tu tuwugeje. 1 Ure iage epemegagodu makaguragado, du kodire kogodurewuge eiamedu boe ere tuburedo jice ji, tugera jetuwo ji. 1 Aror pegarewudoge eerudui jitu dukeje ere tubujodo jokorai toiogwari tabo: - Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure aki. 1 Mako maere ei tumago okori tabo, ekawo boedo boe pa pudui. 
Jesus ui tugeragu ture joruduwadowuge ei pagera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekoto duji pudaedu. 1 Dukejere Jesus ruture ia torekodu ao kae, makore taidure jiwuge ewogai. Eture ae. 1 Ure togiegi etoiado jetumode pudabowugei, du ere ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekoto. 1 Umode etudo boe etae, ewadoduwo boe ji, tui ero raka maku etai ewo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu du bogai. 1 Ure togiegi awugei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotowugei Simão iei Pedro cedu. 1 Nowu Zebedeu onaregedu iei Tiago cedu, mare uwie João, duwugere ure eiedo.
Boiaruru Ore oino ei. 1 André, Filipe, Bartolomeu, Mateus, Tiago nowu Alfeu onaregedu, Tadeu, Simão Aiworewu. 1 Mare Judas Iscariote, duwu koiare ure maku. 2 Dukejere, ere tuiodo tuwugeje taci tuwai kae. Du kaere ia boe makarewuge ere tudo pui ae pugeje, dukoiare eroiwakare tuwo boe kowuje jamedu. 2 Icare uwobe emearudui nowu inoduji dukeje, eture jice ae, tuwo tugeragu ji, paga karega, egore Aora bai bainure. 2 Jamedu, cewu ure turawuje Jerusalém pijiwu escribadoge egore Aroe pegarewu meture tada. Aroe pegarewuge eimejera koiare ure Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu. 2 Jesus rema, ure edo tudo pui puae, icare makore ei awu bakaru tabo: - Inoba Aroe pegarewu romode tuwo Aroe pegarewu barigu? 2 Kode, ia jeture to moto kejewuge emode tudo tuginoi ma, eragoje raimodukare. 2 Jamedu, ia boe etuwobe emode tudo tuginoi ma, umode tudo pubiji, eragoje raimodukare jamedu. 2 Aror pegarewu umode tawogado pudui ma, umode tudo puibiji, du utumodukare todobiji, mare akedu rumode. 2 Iaboe iaboe eroiwamodukare tuwo turemo ia ro rakare imedu uwaito ciwoguwo ia oroeji tukai kogudo dukeje. Mare tui kogudo dukejere, eiwogumode oroeji uwai piji. 2 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai ime ero pegarewu jamedu boe butugugodaemode, jamedu ewadaru pegarewu jamedu boe jamedu. 2 Mare cewu bataru pegare Aroe Pemegarewu jiwuge, butugugodaemodukare ji jii je, mare nowu ero pegarewu okwamodukare epiji jii je. 3 Jesus akore oino, mare paga tu je karega, egore Aroe pegarewu meture tada. Oino ji, dukoiare ako oino. 
Jesus uwobe remawuge. 3 Uce aregodure uwiemage ebo, eedure toro baawadu keje, dupijire ere boe emagodo bogai. 3 Boekarema, boe makarewuge eedure nono tumago tabo oiei du egore ji Ace rakojere nono baawadu keje awiemage ebo, eemarunure awogai. 3 Icare akore ei Ioguduba imuga rema, ioguduba mageba iwiemagere emage? 3 Icare tui tuioku maedo nowu jeture pudabowuge eiogi dukeje, akore Imuga reo, iwiemage reo. 3 Cewu rore nono Pao aidu reorewu, nowu iwienure ema, ituienure ema, imuganure ema. 

Ure boe a tuguwu jiwu bakaru. 1Jesus ure boe eruduwado pugeje kuruga kurirewu jipa keje. Boe makarewuge ere tudo pui apo pugeje, dukoia ure taredo ika kurirewu to, nowu pobo maerewu tada. Nowu boe makarewuge eiamedu boe eedure nono moto keje pobo okwai. 2Ure kogado ewiegaiboe kuricigo, bakaru tabo. 3Akore: - Tawiapagado. Ure boe a tuguwu uture to boepato tuwu boe a tugu. 4Ui boe a tugu du tonaji, ia boe a buture awara okwai; kiege barege etaregodure, ere kowuje. 5Ia a buture toripegato, moto okwatorukarewu keje. Du a boture kuri je, paga karega, moto okwatorukare jitu kodi. 6Mare meri joku aregodure kuri je, kowudure, kidure kuri je ukwa bokware du kodi. 7Ia a buture botoguru, du botoguruto boture, ure cewu a boturedu bito, du enari bokware. 8Ia a buture moto pemegarewu to. Ricodure, ure turugadu, enari boture, du ia aregodure trinta kae, ia aregodure sessenta kae, ia aregodure cem kae. 9Icare akore Biajarewu, mearudumode. 1 Dukeje icare, tuiedui tuginoi dukeje, nowu jeture oieiwuge, mare ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji inoba nowu bakaru jiba ako oino. 1 Icare akore ei Taire boe biarewu Pao o boe pemegarewu kogadodure, mare okwacere awu inodu pijiwuge eire boe emagore awu inodu jamedu ji bakaru tabo. 1 Awu inodu tabo, etaiwore tuioruduka dutabo, emearudure tukai pawuje dutabo, tukai tubemegado, dukoiare ero pegarewu butugugodae bokware. 1 Icare akore ei pugeje Takare awu bakaru pawuje? 1 Ure boe a tuguwu ure nono ure Pao bataru aododurewu rema. 1 Cewu ia a buture awara kejedu ure nono cewu mearudure Pao bataru jiwu, mare mearudui jitu keje kuri je, Aroe pegarewu aregodure, ure tawuje piji. 1 Iage ere nono cewu a buture toripegatowu reore, tumearudui jitu keje ere tugeragu ji tuiegare tabo. 1 Mare ukwa bokware dukoia, ukwa rekare kao dukoiare, eroiwakare pudabo, icare ia boe pegarewu, boe etonare puiwu aregodure nowu bakaru koia ma, erore domi domi je. 1 Iage pugeje, a makudure etai botoguru tada: emearudure Pao bataru ji. 1 Mare awu moto kejewu boe ero boe ego boe, boe ewiapagai toroe kurirewu bogaidu, boe emeardae pegarewu boe, ure inodu okwadu, dukoia otojiwu boe pemegarewu bokware. 2 Cewu a buture moto pemegarewu kejewu ure nono mearudure bataru jiwuge, ere tugeragu ji, duwu otojiwu boe pemegarewu ure trinta, ure sessenta, ure cem tubemega tabo. 
Jorugu jiwu bakaru. 2 Akore ei jamedu Boe emodukana jorugu mugudo ruwobo kuda, iarema kamorewu kuda? Kode mugudodumodukare jorugu tumuga keje karega? 2 Ia jetu biadodurewu jamedu boe, jetu biadodumodukare. Nowu boe enogwa podure jiboe jamedu boe, awadudodumode jamedu. 2 Biajarewu mearudumode. 2 Akore pugeje Tamearudu awadudo tai nowu tamearudure jiboe ji. Tago boe remagudu reorere taremagudodumode jamedu, du kodumode gu tugori. 2 Oroerewu, ia makudumode pemega ai pugeje; ia boekare apowu, ure tu apoboe arudumode piji. 
Boe a boturedu jiwu bakaru. 2 Akore jamedu Pao o boe pemegarewu ure nono cewu imedu magai boe a roto ja ja toro moto joki reore. 2 Boecodure, undure, barogwa kododu tabore ure turagojedo. Nowu inodu tonaji, cewu ure tuguboe boture, ukadui boe pa dutabo. 2 Paga karega moto taobiji rugadure ure botudo, ure ira botudo, du a makaguragare cirato. 2 Icare, kidure dukeje, ure jepara to ji, mare paga karega, boe aregodure boewo tugeragu ji du kae du kodi. 
Mostarda a jiwu bakaru. 3 Akore jamedu kakoduwuba pamode remagu Pao o boe pemegarewu ji? Iarema kakoduwu bakaruba pamode jebato nowu inoduji? 3 Ure nono mostarda a biega reore du, tugudure dukeje, a biega rogu remawure areboe jamedu boe kori. 3 Mare a tugudu rekodaji, ricodure, kurire nowu tugudure nono boe jamedu boe kori, iturare tumaedo, du inodu koia, kiege barege ere tamudo utugu tada. 3 Ure Pao bataru kogado ei makarewu bakaru tabo, awuge ekodaji rugadu, uwo nono eroiwa reore bogai. 3 Makore ei, mare tu bakaru tabo. Mare nowu ture joruduwadowuge ei, ure jamedu boe kogadu tu tuginoi. 

Jesus ure pobo bakuru maerewu butugugo. 3 Nowu meri rekodu tabo, akore ei Pawo pagado toro bakowuto. 3 Boe eedui nono dupiji ere Jesus kodudo pudabo, nono tumagai du reorere, ika kurirewu tada. Ia ikadoge ekodure meji. 3 Nowu inodu tonaji, ia boe pegarewu ure tudowuje. Dukodiwu koia ure pobo barigu ika kurirewu to, dukoia okorobadugodure pobo tabo. 3 Jesusrema padure ika kurirewu opo jaogwai, tunu tabo, tao kudawu keje. Ere jetadudo, egore ji Cegimejera, aromodukare gara gara cai pawogwagodure duji? 3 Icare ure turagojedo, makore bakuruji, makore pobo maerewu ji, akore Ieripo! Urugadu! Icare bakuru akedure, boe moturewunure pugeje. 4 Icare akore ei mure, tabagudu remawu radure. Tamearutoru bokwa kimo rabodu! 4 Enogorobadure tubagudu koia, egore jice woje pui Kakoduwu imedubao? Duwu bakuru, pobo maerewu emearutorure bataru ji? 

 Aroe pegarewuge emedure tadawu imedu. 1Ere pagado kuruga okwa bakowu kae, Gerasa kejewuge eno moto kae. 2Ei turawuje ika kurirewu piji dukeje kuri je, ia imedu Aroe pegarewu metui tadadu ure tuiebu birewuge eiao piji, kodure jice Jesus togi. 3Mugu mugure aroe eiao kao, boe eroiwakare tuwo ieragogudo, jamedu meriri iku tabo karega jamedu. 4Ica, boe erore ino ji, mare ure rugadu kado kado, iaboe iaboe eroiwakare ji. 5Boe jamedu ji, meri jamedu ji meru merure birewuge eiao kao, tori rairewu boe kao, toiogwari tabo, tui togorido tori boe tabo. 6Boekarema, tuiorudui Jesus ji jaegiri dukeje, rekodure jice togi, ure tubujodo ji, makore ji toiogwari rakarewu tabo. 7Akore: - Kaba jiba akaidure ii, Jesus, Aroe Eimejera baru tadawu Onaregedu?
