Cewu Cristo, ino jiwu, umodukana? 3 Eture bakurirewu piji Jesus ae. 3 Du inodu tada nowu ure joruduwadowuge enogwamagudure ji: - Cegimejera, akogwagedo! 3 Mare akore ei Ia ikere, mare taeruduwakare ji. 3 Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge enorare jice woje pui, egore Ia boe kana ukerogu arego mato bogai? 3 Icare Jesus Akore ei Ikere iromode nono ure irojaiwu aidu reore du rema, iwo maragodae poru kororogo tu je du rema. 3 Tagagokare arimoduie pobe puibiji du kejeie boe emode tugeragu boepa tadaboeji? Icá, kode inagomode oino tai tae aogado, tagaiwodo boepadogei: tadaboe kidunure, ure turugadu kadoduwo. 3 Cewu ure boepa tadaboe kadowu mori makudumode ai, du umode boepa tadaboe to pui jere jii je boe kae. Du tabore ure boe a tuguwu, ure kadowu, eegaremode puapo. 3 Du ure nono boe egore ure boe tuguwu ure tuginoi, ure kadowu ure tuginoi. 3 Ire tarojai tawo boe kado iage emaragodure mariguduwo keje; iage emaragodure, tare taremo emaragodaeto mariguduwo keje; iage emaragodure, tare taremo emaragodaeto. 3 Nowu aredu bataru koiare makarewu Samaria kejewuge emearutorure, cewu makoi ei du kodi makore ii iro jamedu boeji. 4 Dukodi icare Samaria kejewuge eture ae, enogwamagudure ji rakojewo pudabo. Kodi icare rakojere ebo meri pobe. 4 Kodi icare iage pugeje makarewuge emearutorure ji makore ewiegai boe koia. 4 Icare emago emagore nowu areduji Ica, mare awadaru koia karega cemearutorure, cegi rugadure cemearudure ji ceruduware moto inorudodu epaie ure ema duji. 
Jesus ure ia brae eimejera kurirewu utugare onaregedu pemegago. 4 Meri pobe dukeje, Jesus uture nowu piji Galiléia kae. 4 Ema mitodu akore marigudu, boe emearutorukae profetadogei eno moto keje. 4 Dukodi icare, aregodui Galiléia kae dukeje, nowu Galiléia kejewuge ere tugeragu ji tudada, mare paga karega, eerudure ro jamedu boeji toro Jerusalém tada, peta keje. Eturadu nowu peta kae jamedu du kodi. 4 Ure tugirimi Galiléia tadawu Caná baboturogu kae, cewu ture parera kurudo pobo cewo kae. Nowu du kodi, brae eimejera kurirewu ia utugare onaregedu kogodure, du rakojere Cafarnaum keje. 4 Nowu brae eimejera utugare tumearudui Jesus utui Jerusalém piji Galiléia kaedu jitu keje, uture ae, okwamagudure ji uwo tonaregedu pemegago puredugodure tuwiwo kodi. 4 Icare Jesus akore ji Taerudumodukare boe kodiboeji, boe ero kurirewu ji dukeje, tamearutorumodukare. 4 Mare nowu brae eimejera utugare okwamagudure ji: - Cegimejera, arawuje toro, itonaegedu rogu bimodedu otodai. 5 Icare Jesus akore ji Toro, akonaregedu pemegagodure marigudu. Nowu imedu mearutorure Jesus bataru ji, uture taci je. 5 Utugarege eridure togi awaraji, egore ji Akonaregedu pemegagodure. 5 Kodi icare unoragodure ei inobadu kejeba pemegagodure. Egore ji Jawu ji, meri roi goroci je dukeje biri uru ure tugera ra piji. 5 Icare nowu uo ure boe pa Jesus akore Akonaregedu pemegagodure marigudu oino pudui du kejeie tonaregedu pemegagodure kuri je duji. Dukodi icare mearutorure Pao ji, nowu uwobe eiamedu boe emearutorure jamedu. 5 Jesus ure awu turo kurirewu towuje dure pobedu rema, tui tugirimi Judéia piji Galiléia kaedu rekodaji. 

Jesus ure ia pogora birewu imedu pemegago. 1Dukeje icare judeudogere tuiagu ia peta towuje, du kodi icare Jesus ruture Jerusalém kae. 2Nono Jerusalém keje, ia pobo aia mugu puredure tu Ovelhadoge ewaiporoji, hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo iere Betesda cedu, uwaiporodogere ikera awubodure. 3Nowu baiporodoge ekuda, makarewu kogodurewuge emugure: joku bokwarewuge, pogora pegarewuge, pogora birewuge, tubaga tabo pobo amagadodumode du bogai. 4Paga karega, ia kodiboe keje tu tu je Pao o tupa ure turawuje nowu pobo aia kae dukejere pobore tamagadudo. Cewu ure tuiodo ca boeto ji nowu pobo aiato, pobo amagadu rekodajiwu, pemegagodure kuri, ia tugogodae boe piji. 5Ia kogodurewu imedu mugure nono, jorure ji nono ikera pudogidure, iwure pudogidure ikera awubodure pobe ma awu metuia bokware taci je du mugure nono. (8 anos). 6Icare Jesus tuiorudui padui nono, tuioruduwai mariguduie padure nonodu jitu keje, unorare ji: - Akaidure apemegagoduwo kuri je? 7Nowu kogodurewu akore ji Ikimejera, ia ure iwu pobo aiato, pobo amagadu keje, boe bokwa, du kodire ikodu kimoi mai to dukeje, iare marigudu ikoda piji. 8Icare Jesus akore ji Aragojedo, akeragu apaji, toro tabo. 9Nowu inodu tonaji kuri je, nowu imedu pemegagodure, ure tugeragu tubaji, uture tabo. Aro kode, nowu meri sabadore jiwu meri. 1 Judeudoge rema emagore nowu imedu pemegagodurewu ji, egore Amodukare nowu apa rekodudo awu meri ji. 1 Akore ei Cewu ure ipemegagowu akore ii akeragu apaji, amerudo. 1 Egore ji Kakoduwu ia imeduba ako oino ai akeragu apaji, amerudo ino? 1 Mare cewu pemegagodurewu imedu joruduwakare iogudubaba, mare paga karega, Jesus ure tadawuje nowu boe makarewuge eedui nonodu piji kodi. 1 Inodu rekodaji raka dugu je, Jesus jorudure ji Pao uwai tada, akore ji Icare apemegagodure. Aro pega kaba pugeje, ia boe pegarewu remawu ukawo ai pugeje du bogai. 1 Dukeje icare nowu imedu readodure Jesus koiaie ure tubemegago duji. 1 Nowu inodu koia judeudoge etonare Jesus ji, paga karega, ure awu turo kurirewu towuje sabadore jiwu meri jitu koia. 1 Mare Jesus akore ei Ioga maragodure jii oino rugadu; imi jamedu, imaragodunure jamedu. 1 Nowu inodu koia judeudoge etagemo raka remawure tuwo bito, paga karega, ukare Sábado pegado tu rugadu, mare akore tuoie Pao rema; ica, nowu inodu tabo unure tudo nono Pao reore dukoia. 
Pao Onaregedu ro raka. 1 Jesus akore pugeje Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai onaregedureboe tui mito tu jedu roiwakare iaboeji iaboeji. Romode tuiorudure tuo rore jiboe ji tu je. Tuo rore jiboe jamedu boeji, onaregedu romode ino jamedu. 2 Mare paga karega, Uo mearudu kurire Tonaregeduji, ure jordudo turore jiboe jamedu boeji; umode jordudo ia turo kurirewu remawu ji kimo, duma taebogodu kuriwo. 2 Mare paga karega, Uo magai birewuge ewodudo, ure jereboe maku etai, du reorere Onaregedu umode jereboe maku taidure jiwuge etai jamedu. 2 Nowu inodu reorere, Uo umodukare tugogado iaboe ji iaboe ji, mare ure boe ji tugogadodu jamedu boe mugudo Tonaregedu apo. 2 Du tabowo boe emearutorumode Onaregeduji tumearutoru magai Uo jitu reore. Cewu mearutorukare Onaregedu jiwu, Uo koiare ure rojaidu, kode mearutorukare Uoji jamedu. 2 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai mearudure iwadaru jiwu, mearutorure ure irojaiwu jiwu, boe ewi bokwarewu ure apo, utumodukare boe pegarewu to, mare jepadure tuwi piji tuierewo kae. 2 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai icare boe aregodumode pudae, puredugodunure, icai birewuge emearudumode Pao mako jitu kae. Mearudurewuge eemode. 2 Mare paga karega, nono Uo o magai jereboece tu taobiji, ure maku tonaregedu ai owo jereboece taobiji jamedu. 2 Ure ro raka maku tonaregedu ai uwo tugogado boe ji, mare paga karega, Imedu Onareedu rema kodi. 2 Taro kaba ta... Je awu inagoino jiboe ji. Boe aregodumode dukeje meture tuiao tadawuge eiamedu boe emearudumode Imedu Onaregedu makoji, emode tuiebu mako padui boe kajeje du kae. 2 Ro pemegarewuge eewodumode tuiwo pemegarewu kae. Ro pegarewuge eewodumode mare tuiwo pega remawurewu kae. 3 Imi itaobiji ikare iaboe iaboe to. Imeardae tugudure imearudure jiboe reore. Itugure jiboe boe jokodunure ema. Mare paga karega, iemarukare irowo nono itaidu reore, mare cewu ure irojaiwu aidu reore. 3 Imagomode imi rugaduie iro oino ma, imagoi oinodu umodukare turugadu. 3 Iare tagoi imi rugaduie iro oino, ioruduware cewu ako oino boe jokodu rugaduie duji. 3 Tare iaboe erojai João ae, makore boe jokoduji boe ewiegai. 3 Iomodukare iaboe iaboe ewugeje. Imagore oino, mare taginorudoduwo du bogaire inagoino. 3 Jorugu ja ururirewu urugurewunure Joãoce. Tagire tagaidure taegarewo biegatu je nowu urugu tabo. 3 Mare imirema ia iore kejewure du kodure João kori. Paga karega, Iogare iroiagudu jire iro oino, dutabore boere boe pa Iogai irojai duji. 3 Ioga, koiare ure irojaiwu, bataru jore iwugeje jamedu. Tagire tamearudu kigodukare makoji, taerudu kigodukare jeji. 3 Bataru metukare tawabo tada, tamearutorukare cewu ure rojaiwu jitu kodi. 3 Tare taeku tugu bapera atugoto, tadugu tado taerudumode boe ewi boekwarewu jitu bogai. Kode ica, nowu bapera mitodure makore ii. 4 Mare tagi tagaidukare taduwo itae, taewo du bogai. 4 Ipaga kare imewo inojorodo du bogai. 4 Imire ioruduware tai. Pao mearudu kuriae metukare tadoda. 4 Itaregodure Ioga ie tabo, mare tagare tageragu ii. Mare ia aregodumode cie tabo ma, tamode tageragu ji. 4 Inobadu taboba tamearutorumode? Tagi taemarure pui puwo tugurido du bogai, mare taemarukare tawo Pao Aroe Eimejera mitotu jewu akaru kurido du bogai. 4 Tadugu kaba imago pegamode tai Ioga biegai duji. Okirure taiboere Moisés rema, duwu kejere tare tabagaredu bu. 4 Mare tamearutorumode Moisesji ma, boe jokodu jire tamearutorumode ii jamedu, ure bapera atugodo iiboe jitu kodi. 4 Mare tamearutorukare o bapera atugoji ma, kode, inoba taboba tamearutorumode iwadaru ji? 

Jesus ure boe makarewuge enogwagedo. 1Dukeje icare Jesus ure pagado Galiléia kejewu kuruga bakowu kae (Tiberades kejewu kuruga). 2Boe makarewuge ekodure rekodaji, eerudure ro kurireui kogodurewuge eidu jitu koia. 3Icare Jesus ruture ia torekodu ao kae; nono ure tumugudo ture joruduwadowuge ebo. 4Boe puredugodure judeudoge eno peta iei Páscoa cedu kae. 5Jesus ure tuie aogado nowu kodure pudaewu boe makarewuge ei, akore Filipe ji Kaiba pamode akirodo amirewu ji awuge eiamedu boe ewo kowuje? 6Akore oinono tui turokagado ji dutabo, mare joruduware inoba turomode duji. 7Icare Filipe akore ji Diiero umode 2 0 ma, umodukare turugadu eiamedu boe ekewo ia koboroguce. 8Icare ia nowu ure joruduwadowuge, iere André cedu, Simão Pedro uwie, akore ji 9Ia negedurogu rakojere woe, du o amireure ikera awubodure tu je, kare kugurere pobe tu je, mare inoba nowu inodu rogu umode awu boe emaga inodu ai? 1 Icare Jesus akore Edo tumugudo. Boekarema, boebutu kuricigore nono du imere cinco mil cedu ere tumugudo nono. 1 Icare Jesus ure tugeragu nowu amirewu rogu ji, makore baruto keje, dukejere ure pedo nowu mugure nonowu boe etai. Du reorere rore cewu kare kugurei pobe tu jeduji, ure maku nowu boe etai etaidu reore. 1 Icare ekuredure. Dukejere icare akore nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore Nowu kobo jetu onarewu to pui, tawo jetu otorogado ma, ia okwa kawo. 1 Ere to pui. Ica, cewu iro amirewu rogui ikera awubodure tu jedu kobo jetu kimoi tuiagejedu, eiamedu boe enogwage akedu rekodaji, ere kododoge ikera awubodure pobe taci ikare awubowutodu enogorobadudo tabo. 1 Tuiorudui nowu Jesus ro kurirewu jitu keje, nowu boe egore Awure cewu aregodumode awu moto kaewu profeta remawu rema. 1 Icare Jesus tui boe pawuje ei tuiagu tugeragu pudui, tuwo boe eimejerado pudumi, dukeje, ure tudawuje epiji pugeje tuginoigodu ia torekodu ao kae. 
Jesus merui pobo ao jitu. 1 Meri rekodure dutabore nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere turawuje kuruga kurirewu jipa kae. 1 Tui taredo ia ika kuirewu to dukeje, ere pagado nowu kuruga kurirewu kajeje nowu Cafarnaum bakurirewu kae. Icare boecodure Jesus aregodukai etae dukeje. 1 Du tonajire icare pobo maerewu amagadure, ia bakuru rakarewu buture dukoia. 1 Icare ere turaiga jodo keje jii je, dukejere icare ere boe pa Jesus ui tuburedo nowu ika kurirewu jituji, tumerui pobo aoji dutabo. Dukejere icare epagudugodure. 2 Mare Jesus akore ei Imire iro oino. Tabagudu kaba. 2 Etaidure tuwo tugeragu ji nowu ika kurirewu to, mare ika aregodure kuri taregodumodewo kae. 
Boe eemarui Jesus bogaidu. 2 Nowu meri rekodajiwu meri ji, jeture bakowu kejewu boe makarewuge ere boe pa Jesus mitotu jedu ukai taredo nowu ika kurirewu to nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo, mare awuge etuie tuginoiduji. 2 Icare ia ika kurirewuge etaregodure Tiberade bakurirewu piji, puredu tu cewu enogwagere amirewu ji, cewu Pagimejerare tuwadaru pemegarewu bu kejedu kae. 2 Du karega icare, nowu boe makarewuge tui boe pa Jesus mare ure joruduwadowuge edukai nonodu ji, dukoiare icare ere taredo nowu ika kurirewuge eto, kodure tai Cafarnaum kae tuiemaru tabo bogai. 
Ure boe eedowu boe eke Jesus rema. 2 Eerudure ji nowu bakowu keje, icare egore ji Cegimejera, inoba boere du kejeba akaregodure woe? 2 Jesus akore ei Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: taemarure iwogai mare taerudure cewu iro kurirewu jitu koia, tare amirewu kowuje, tagoredure tabo dukoia. 2 Tamaragodudo, mare boe eke akedure kuri jewu koia karega, mare ure boe eedo jii boe ewi bokwarewu kaewu boe eke koia, du Imedu Onaregedu umode maku tagai. Paga karega, Uore to kruca bu keje kodi. 2 Icare enoragodure ji: - Inoba ceromode cerowo nono Pao aidu reore. 2 Jesus akore ei Pao aidure jiboe reo tamearutoruwo cewu ure rojaiwu ji. 3 Icare enoragodure ji: - Kakoduwu aro kurireumodedu jiba ceerudumode du koiawo cemearutorumode ai? Kaboba amode towuje? 3 Ica, ceomagere maná kowuje toro boe makodu tada, nono bapera atugo reore aregodure baru pijiwu amirewu ure maku etai enogwagewo ji. 3 Icare Jesus akore ei.
Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai Moisés ukare baru pijiwu amirewu maku tagai, mare Ioga koiare ure baru pijiwu boe jokoduwu remawu amirewu maku tagai. 3 Paga karega, Pao o amirewu, cewu ure turawuje baru pijiwu amirewu rema, koiare ure awu moto keje boe eedo. 3 Icare egore ji Cegimejera, nowu amirewu maku jii je cenai. 3 Jesus akore ei Imire ure boe eedowu amireure imi. Cewu utumode itaewu uke boimodukare pudui jii pugeje, cewu mearutorure iiwu, pobo boimodukare ji jii je pugeje. 3 Mare imagomode tai: taerudure ii mare tamearutorukare ii. 3 Cewu Iogare maku inai boe jamedu boe utumode itae, cewu utumode itaewu imodukare barigu. 3 Paga karega, ire irawuje baru piji, mare irowo nono itaidu reore karega, mare irowo nono ure irojaiwu aidu reore. 3 Mare cewu ure irojaiwu aidure jiboe reo: ikaiagu cewu ture maku inaiboe ia rogu okwadodudo, mare iiagu jewodudo boigoduwu meri ji. 4 U! Oinore Ioga aidure. Cewu jorudure Onaregeduji, mearutorure jiwuge eiamedu boe, boe ewi bokwareuwo etai; imode eewodudo boigoduwu meri ji. 4 Dukodi icare judeudoge ewadaru pega kuricigore ji, awu ako oinodu koia: - Imire amirewu aregodui baru piji dure imi. 4 Egore Iarema cewu Jesus kanao? Kode, kodiba icare akore. Ire irawuje baru piji oino? 4 Jesus akore Tawadaru pega kaba tadoda. 4 Iaboe iaboe etumodukare itae, ure irojaiwu Ioga ukai utudo itae dukeje. Duwuge imode eewodudo boigoduwu meri ji. 4 Profetadogere inodu bu bapera keje eiamedu boe joruduwadodumode Pao Aroe Eimejera koia. Dukodire cewu mearudure Pao bataru jiwuge eiamedu boe, joruduwadodure Pao koiawuge eiamedu boe, etumode itae. 4 Mare boe eerudukarega ure Pao ji kodi karega, mare cewu aregodure Pao pijiwu jorudure tu Pao ji. 4 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: mearutorure iiwuge eiamedu boe, ewi bokwarewu makodure etai. 4 Boe eedoduwowu amirewu imireo. 4 Taomage enogwagere manaji boe makodu tada, mare ewire. 5 Ure turawuje baru pijiwu amirewu awureo, umode kowujewuge eiamedu boe ewi kawo. 5 Aregodure baru pijiwu amirewu jerewu imireo. Umode awu amirewu kowujewuge eemaemode jii je. Imode makuwu amirewu ikodu rema, awu moto kejewuge einorudoduwo. 5 Awu bataru keje, judeudoge enorare jice woje, jice woje pui: - Inoba awu imedu romode tuwo pagogwagedo tugoduji? 5 Kodi icare Jesus akore ei Boe jokodu jire inagomde oino tai tamodukare Imedu Onaregedu kodu kowuje, tagudumodukare kuce ma, taemodukare tadoda. 5 Cewu ure ikodu kowujewu, kudure iku cewuge eiamedu boe jemaere jii jeboe jetunure ebo. Imode eewodudo boigoduwu meri ji. 5 Paga karega, boe eke jokoduwure ikodu rema, boe ekudure ceboe jokodu remawurewu iku rema. 5 Cewu okwagere ikodu jiwuge, kudure iku cewuge eiamedu boe, emedure itada, imedure etada jamedu. 5 Ure irojaiwu Ioga jemagadu reorere, iere koia jamedu, du reorere ure ikowujewu jemode igoia jamedu. 5 Awure ure turawuje baru pijiwu amirewu rema. Cewu taomagere kowujewu maná inodu karega, ere kowuje mare ewire, du inodu karega. Umode awu amirewu kowujewu jemode jii je. 5 Awu inodu jire Jesus ure boe eruduwado sinagoga tada, Cafarnaum bakurirewu keje. 6 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia makarewuge, tumearudui ji tu keje, egore Nowu inodu raka remawunure. Ioguduba aidumode nowu inoduji? 6 Jesus joruduware nowu ture joruduwadowuge ekorigodui nowu inodu koia duji, icare unoragodure ei: - Nowu inodu jetu pegare tai. 6 Kode, inoba umode taerudumode Imedu Onaregedu rutui turagojere kejewu turagoja kae dukeje? 6 Aroe koiare ure boe eedo, boe karega boe ekodu rema. Imagore tai jiwu iwadaru emare aroe rema, boe eerewu rema. 6 Mare ia tagi tamearutorukare. Mare paga karega, kuri boe paruto Jesus joruduware kakoduwuba emearutoru bokware duji, cewu umode tumaguwu ji jamedu. 6 Makore kimo pugeje, akore Dukodire inagore iaboe iaboe etumodukae itae Ioga aiduka dukeje. 6 Kuri je nowu kodiwu piji makarewu ia ure joruduwadowuge ere tuiaedo ji, du emerukare apo pugeje. 6 Dukodi icare Jesus unoragodure nuwu ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko towugei, akore ei Tagi jamedu tagaidure tawo taiaedo ii jamedu? 6 Icare Simão Pedro akore ji Cegimejera, kode ioguduba ae cedumode? Boe ewi bokwareure awadaru rema. 6 Cegi cemearutorure, ceruduware akie Pao Aroe Eimejera o Imedu Pemegareuie akiduji. 7 Jesus akore pugeje Ikare tado ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko todu ire tadawuje tamedage epiji? Mare Aroe pegareure ia tagi kodi karega. 7 Judas Iscariote jire ako oino, cewu Simão Iscariote onaregedu, emare umode maku kodi. Ica, nowu ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwureko todu ianure ema kodi karega. 

Jesus mare uwiemage. 1Nowu inodu rekodaji, Jesus kodure jice woje, jice woje Galiléia kao, aidukare tumeruwo Judéia keje, judeudoge ere tuiagu bito dukoia. 2Judeudoge eno peta puredugodunure du iere Tabernáculos (boe ewadaru ure oino aroia baidoge jiwu peta). 3Icare Jesus uwiemage eegore ji: - Atudo awu piji Judéia kae, nowu are joruduwadowuge eeruduwo aro boeji. 4Paga karega, cewu aidure boe eruduwawo puduiwu rokare ia turo jiboe podu tu je. Kode arore oino du kodi, akowadudo awu moto kejewuge eegai. 5Mare uwiemage emearutorukare ji jamedu. 6Icare Jesus akore ei Boe aregodukare pudae ii roga. Mare tagairema boere turugadu tu tu tagai boe jamedu ji. 7Awu moto kodu kagirimodukare tai, mare iire kodu kagirire, imire ireadodure ro pegarewu ji kodi. 8Toro, taru toro peta kae, mare imirema, ikodumodukare, boe aregodukare pudae ii roga kodi. 9Tagoi oino dukeje, rakojere Galiléia keje. 
Jesus rutui Aroiabaidoge eiwu peta kaedu. 1 Mare uwiemage erudui toro dukeje, ruture jamedu nowu peta kae, mare tui boe eerududo pudui dutabo karega, mare podu tabo. 1 Judeudoge eemarure bogai nowu peta keje; enorare bogai, egore Kaiba rakojere? 1 Nowu boe makarewuge etada boe emagonure tu ji rugadu. Iage egore Imedu pemegarewu reno. Dukejewuge egore Boro, ukare ino, ure boe eekuri pagado. 1 Mare du inodu tabo, boe emago awadukare ji, tubagudu koia judeudogece. 1 Nowu peta oia bukejere icare Jesus ruture Pao uwaito tui boe eruduwado dutabo. 1 Judeudoge erore ta... Je, egore Awu imedu joruduwadodukare. Kode, kaiba awu joruduware bapera atugo jitu aregodure? 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Awu ioruduware oino jiboe, inoe karega, mare ure irojaiwu oe. 1 Iaboe etaidumode turowo nono Pao aidu reore ma, eruduwamode imagore jiboe aregoduie Pao piji duji, iarema ipijie aregodure duji. 1 Makore taobijiwu jemarunure tuguriwo boe eegai du bogai, mare cewu jemarure tuwo ure rojaiwu kurido du bogaiwu, ure turugadu boe emearutoruwo ji, boe ekuri pagadodurewu ukare apo. 1 Kode, Moisés koia karega ure boe eroiagudu maku tagai? Du inodu tabo ia tagi ia tagi tagodukare ui boe eroiaguduji. 2 Kodiba tagaidre tawo iwido? Nowu boe egore ji Ia Aroe pegarewu mugure akabo! Ioguduba aidure tuwo awido? 2 Jesus akore ei pugeje Ia irore jiboere mito tu je. Ica, taiamedu boe jordu pegare inoduji. 2 Moisés ure kruca maku tagai (mare Moisés oe karega, mare uomage kurirewuge enoe), tare kruca bu boe ewugeje jii sabadore jiwu meri ji jamedu. 2 Aró, kode, Moisésre boe eroiagudu kadodu kawore kruca padumode ia imedu keje sabadore jiwu meri ji ma, kode, kodiba tagorigodure ii ire ia imedu uredu jamedu boe pemegago sabadore jiwu meri ji dukoia? 2 Tadugu kaba ure tudo boe eegaiboe rekodaji, mare tadugudo boe jetororewu rekodaji tu rugadu. 
Judeudoge emeardaei Jesus jitu. 2 Jerusalém kejewuge ia boe egore Awu karega cewu eemarure bogai tuwo bito? 2 Kode, emare akore tumago tabo boe etoiabiji oinono, mare boe emagokare ji. Kode, boe eimejerage kana ere boe pa Cristoie ure ema duji? Mare ceruduware kaiba awu imedu buture duji. 2 Mare Cristo aregodumode dukeje, iaboe iaboe eruduwamodukare kaiba aregodure duji. 2 Jesus, tui boe eruduwado Pao uwai tada dutabo, akore Taeruduware ii kaiba itaregodure duji. Ipi ji karega itaregodure. Mare cewu ure irojaiwure, boe jokoduwu jamedu boere apo, mare taeruduwakare ji. 2 Imirema ioruduware ji, itaregodure piji kodi, emare ure irojai jamedu kodi. 3 Icare eemarure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare iaboe iaboe ekare tugera puredudo ji, boe aregodukare pudae ji roga kodi. 3 Mare nowu inodu jamedu boe tada, makarewu boe emearutorure ji, enorare jice woje, jice woje pui: -Kode, Cristo aregodumode dukeje, ro pemegarewu kurirewu kodumode awu ro kori? 3 Fariseudogere boe pa boe egoi Jesus jiboe jituji, du kodi icare ere mare sacerdotedoge eimejerage ere torigaraidoge etudo bogai ewo tugeragu ji. 3 Jesus akore Iragojemode tagabo biega tu je kimo, dukeje itumode ure irojaiwu ae. 3 Taemarumode iwogai, mare taerudumodukare ii, taroiwamodukare taduwo ikodumodewo kae 3 Icare judeudoge enoragodure pui: - Kaiba kodumode paerudukawo pudui? Iarema utu kana umode cewu rakojere gregodoge etadawu judeudoge etae, tuwo nowu moto tuginoiwu kejewuge eruduwado? 3 Inobadu jiba akore oino pai taemarumode iwogai mare taerudumodukare ii, taroiwamodukare taduwo ikodumodewo kae oino? 
Ure boe eedowu pobojari. 3 Nowu peta jiwu boigoduwu meri ji, kodure tumedage ekoriwu meri ji, Jesus mako rakare turagojei, akore Ia tagi pobo boimode tai ma, mato itae, taguduwo. 3 Cewu mearutorure iiwu, ure nono cewu bapera atugo ako magadu reore pobojari jerewuge emode tudawuje piji. 3 Makore awu inoduji, tui inodu jeonado Aroe Pemegarewu jitu tabo, du makudumode mearutorumode puduiwuge etai, du jire ako oino. Mare Aroe Pemegarewu makudukare roga, Jesus aregodukare tugurimodewo kae roga kodi. 4 Nowu boe makarewuge, iage, tumearudui nowu bataru inodu jitu keje, egore Boe jokodu remawu profeta reo. 4 Iage egore Awure Cristo remawure ema. Mare iage egore nowu egoinodu me keje tu oino: - Kode, Galiléia kejewu bai piji kana Cristo aregodumode? 4 Kode, bapera atugo akore oino Davi rekodajiwuge epijire Cristo aregodumode, cewu babuturogu iei Belém cedu piji, Davi o moto piji. Oino karega? 4 Kodire boe ewadaru pegare pui jice woje, jice woje, Jesus koia. 4 Iaboe etaidure tuwo tugeragu ji, mare ekare tugera puredudo ji. 
Judeudoge eimejerage emearutorukare. 4 Torigaraidoge ere tugirimi sacerdotedoge eimejerage, fariseudoge etai tuibagi pugeje, duwuge enoragodure ei, egore Kodiba takare arego? 4 Torigaraidoge egore ei Ia imedu boe makokare awu imedu mako reore. 4 Icare fariseudoge egore ei Kode, boe kana ure tawogado boeto jamedu? 4 Iarema ia boe eimejerage, ia fariseudoge emearutorure ji? 4 Mare awu boe onawuge, eruduwakare boe eroiagudu jitu, boe pegarewugenure emage. 5 Mare ia emage, iei Nicodemo cedu, cewu jemarure bogai boe co jiwu, akore ei 5 Ceroiagudu umode ia imedu barigu boe pegarewu to tumearudui, tuiorudui ro boe jitu otodai? 5 Egore ji Iarema galileu kana ure aki jamedu? Aeruduwa pemegado aeruduwo ia profeta aregodumodukai Galiléia pijiduji. 5 Dukejere ere tugirimi tu tu tuwai kae. 

Aredu ro pegarewudo. 1Jesus kodure Oliveira tadawu torekodu kae. 2Barogwa kododu tabore ure tugirimi Pao uwaito; boe eiamedu boere tudo pui ae. Ure tumugudo tu je, dutabore icare ure eruduwado. 3Icare escribadoge, fariseudoge ere ia boe eerudure ro okeadui aredu reko mto ae. 4Ere rakojedo tu nowu boe makarewuge etoiadoda, egore Jesus ji Cegimejera, maigodu boe ere tugeragu awu areduji ro keadu tonaji. 5Moisesre bapera atugodo ceiagu tori to awu rore oinowu areme eiduji. Inoba akagomode awu inoduji? 6Ere tunorado ji tuiaki turoiwawo tuwo tugeragu ji ia bataru kejedu bogai, tagowo, onoie akore. Jesusrema, ure tuie jodo moto to, ure moto atugodo tugerako tabo. 7Enora kimo jitu koiare, ure taogado taci je, akore ei Ia ro pegakarewu ia tagi umode tori to ca boeto ji ji. 8Ure tuie jodo gu moto kae pugeje, ure moto atugodo tugerako tabo pugeje. 9Awu bataru keje, tui boe pa pudumiraboduie tuwogware boetodu jitu koia, ere tudawuje, ere tudo mito taci jii boigoduwu ae, tui paru bu codurewuge ewugeje dupiji. Dukodire Jesus mugure tuginoigodu, cewu aredu rakojere nono jamedu. 1 Dukejere icare ure taogado taci je. Boekarema, tuiorudui cewu aredu ui mito tu jedu jitu keje, unoragodure ji, akore Aredu, kaiba cewu ako oino aiwuge ekodure? Iaboe iaboe ekare awarigu boe pegarewu to? 1 Akore.
Ikimejera, boe bokwa. 

Kodi icare Jesus akore ji U! Imi jamedu imodukare awarigu boe pegarewu to. Toro! Akaba akirimi aro pegarewu to pugeje. 
Moto kejewu urugureboenure Jesusce. 1 Jesus akore ei pugeje Imire moto kejewu urugureboere imi. Cewu kodure itabowu, merumodukare boe cotada, mare jereboe urugumode ji. 1 Nonore icare fariseudoge egore ji Akire amagore aiboeji, nowu akagoi aidu ukare turugadu boe emearutoruwo ji. 1 Jesus akore ei Imire inagomode ii rugadu ma, imagore jiboere turugadu boe emeartoraeji. Paga karega, ioruduware kaiba itaregodure duji, kaiba ikodumode duji jamedu. Mare tagi taeruduwakare kaiba pijiba itaregodure, kaiba ikodumode duji jamedu. 1 Tare tagogado ure taegaiboeji. Imi ikare ikogado iaboe ji iaboe ji. 1 Imode ikogado boe ji ma, ire ikogado jiboe jetorogodumode jamedu, paga karega, ikare ikinoi tu je du kodi, Ioga mugure itabo jamedu kodi. 1 Ica, taroiagudu akore boe ji pobe tu jedu eioi puwugejedu ure turugadu boe emearutoruwo ji (Deut 1, 1). 1 Imi imagore ii itaobiji rugadu, mare ure irojaiwu Ioga jore iwugeje jamedu. 1 Icare enoragodure ji: - Kaiba Ao rakojere? Jesus akore Taeruduwakare ii, taeruduwakare Iogaji jamedu. Taeruduwamode ii ma, taeruduwamode Iogaji jamedu. 2 Makore awu tuwadaru ji tui boe eruduwado Pao uwai tada dukeje, puredu tu boere to mearogu tugu towu iraji. Mare iaboe iaboe ekare tugeragu ji, boe aregodukare pudae roga kodi. 2 Jesus akore ei kimo Itumode dukeje, taemarumode iwogai, mare tawimode taro pegarewu tada, paga karega, taroiwamodukare tagoduwo ikodumodewo kae. 2 Icare judeudoge egore Ukana umode tuwido? Akore taroiwamodukare tagoduwo ikodumodewo kae. Kodiba ako oino? 2 Icare akore ei Woje comoroiwuge tagireo; cebojewu imireo. Awu moto kejewugenure tagi, mare imi karega. 2 Inagore tai tawimoduie taro pegarewu tadaduji, mare paga karega, tamearutorumodukare imie rugadu ma, tawimode taro pegarewu tada. 2 Dukodi icare enoragodure ji: -Ioguduba akibao? Jesus akore ei.
Cewu inagore tai boe paru toboenure imi. 2 Imagowo taiboe, iwo ikogado taiboe makaguragare. Mare ure irojaiwu boe rikirewunure ema; imearudure ji pijiboe imagore ji moto kejewugei. 2 Mare ekare boe pa makoi Tuo jiboe ji. 2 Dukodi icare Jesus akore ei Tamode Imedu Onaregedu aogado dukeje, taeruduwamode ioguduba imiba; taeruduwamode irore jiboe ukae itaobiji, mare imagoi nono Iogare ioruduwado jiboe reore duji. 2 Cewu ure irojaiwu ure itabo; ukare ido ikinoi tu je, paga karega, irore nono aidu magai du reore jii je du kodi. 3 Nowu akoi oinono dukeje, makarewuge emearutorure ji. 
Jesus mare Abraão. 3 Jesus akore nowu mearutorure puduiwu judeudogei Taedumode iwadaru keje ma, ire joruduwadowu boe jokoduwuge rumodedo tagi. 3 Taeruduwamode boe rikirewu ji, boe rikirewu umode taginorudo. 3 Egore ji Abraão orenure cegi, boe etugarege karega ure cegi jii je, kodiba icare akagore taginorudodumode ino cei? 3 Jesus akore ei Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai ure tumagu turo pegarewu kaiwu ime eiamedu boe, ere turo pegarewu utugaregenure emage. 3 Aró, kode, boe etugare mugumodukare boe etuo uwai keje, mare tu onaregedu mugumode uwai keje jii je. 3 Dukodi icare Onaregedu umode taginorudo ma, boe etugarege emodukare tagi rugadu. 3 Ioruduwa pemeganure Abraão oreie tagiduji, mare tagaidure tawo iwido, mare iwadaru remodukare tadoda dukoia. 3 Imire imagore iorudure Ioga apo boeji. Tagirema, tarore nono tamearudure tao okwabiji boeji. 3 Egore ji Ceore Abraão rema. Jesus akore ei Abraão ore rumode tagi dukeje, taromode nono Abraão rore jiboe ji. 4 Imire imagore tai boe jokodure ema boeji imearudui Pao piji duji, macare tagaidure tawo iwido. Abraão rokare ino. 4 Tarore tao roiaji. Egore ji Boe ekera keadu koia kerega ure cedowuje: ceore ia ceoce, dure Pao Aroe Eimejera rema. 4 Jesus akore Taomode Aroe Eimejera ma, tamearudu kurimode ii, paga karega, Aroe Eimejera pijire itawujedure, pijire itaregodure. Ipi ji karega itaregodure, mare koiare ure irojai. 4 Kodiba takare iwadaru pawuje? Taroiwakare tamearuduwo iwadaru jitu kodi. 4 Taore Aroe pegarewu rema, tagaidure tarowo tao aidure jiboe reore. Boe paru tore boe ewidodu epa rema; rakojekare boe rikirewu tabo, boe rikirewu bokware apo kodi. Tagoi tuwadararodae jitu keje, pudui rugadure ako oino, paga karega, batararodu barikare kodi, emare boe ewadararodae uo rema. 4 Mare imi imagore boe rikirewu jitu koia, tamearutorukare iwadaru ji. 4 Kakoduwu tagiba tamode ikiegi iro pegarewu tabo? 4 Pao ore emawuge emearudure bataru ji, tagirema tamearudukare ji orekare tagi kodi. 4 Nonore icare judeudoge egore ji Kode cemagokare boe jokoduji akie samaritanore aki, atadaie Aroe pegarewu meture? 4 Jesus akore ei Aroe pegarewu metukare itada, mare ire Ioga kurido. Tagirema, tare iwarigududo. 5 Iemarukare ikuriwo du bogai; mare iare ikurido, du umode tugogado boe ji. 5 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai iaboe umode iwadaru jetu otorogado ma, bimodukare jii je. 5 Judeudoge egore ji Icare ceerudure Aroe pegarewu metui atoda duji. Abraão bire, profetadoge ewire jamedu. Icare akagore umoduie awadaru jetu otorogadowu bimodukae jii je? 5 Kode, akina akodure paedoga Abraão kori? Ema bire, profetadoge ewire jamedu kaboba ameardaere uwo aki? 5 Jesus akore ei Imode boe kurirewudo imi itaobiji ma, boe kurirewu imidu boe karega. Iogare ure ikurido. Cewu tagagore tago Aroe Eimejeraie emawu. 5 Mare taeruduwakare ji. Imagomode ioruduwakae ji ma, iwadararodumode nono tawadararodu reore. Mare ioruduware ji, irore nono bataru reore jamedu. 5 Taedoga Abraão jekarere tumearudui tuiorudumode ino meri jituji. Jorudure ji, icare jekare kuricigore. 5 Icare judeudoge egore ji Ako joru ukare 50 ce roga, mare icare aerudure Abraão ji? 5 Jesus akore ei Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai Abraão butumodedu otodai, ire marigudu. 5 Nowu ako oinodu kejere icare, ere tugeragu toriji tuwo tori to ji. Mare Jesus ure tuwogwado pi tuku je, ure tudawuje nowu Pao uwai piji. 

Jesus ure ia buture tuioku bokwa tabowu pemegago. 1Icare Jesus, tugodui ia tugodu kae dukeje, jorudure ia buture tuioku bokwa tabowu imeduji. 2Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge enoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, ioguduba ro pegare du koiaba awu imedu buture tuioku bokwa tabo? Ema kana, iarema uomage kana? 3Jesus akore ei Awu ro pegarewu koia karega, uomage eigoia karega jamedu, mare Pao uwo turo pemegarewu kurirewu awadudo ji du bogai. 4Meri jetu kimo tabore, ure turugadu iwo ure irojaiwu ro pemegarewu kurirewuge eiado. Boeco aregodumode dukeje boe emaragodumodukare pugeje. 5Dukodire, iragojei moto kejedu tonaji, urugure moto jiboenure imi. 6Tagoinodu tabore, ure todoguru to co moto to, ure moto gurugurudo todoguru tabo, dukejere icare ure nowu moto guruguru rogu reko nowu joku bokwarewu jokuji. 7Dukejere akore ji Toro, akabi boe etaimoda iei Zilo cedu keje (boe ewadaru tabo iere Roiaidodureboe oino). Icare nowu joku bokwarewu uture toro rugadu, icare ure tugirimi taiwo tabo. 8Kodi icare cewu puredure jiwuge, jorudure okwamagudui tu tu jedu jiwuge, enorare pui, egore Cewu okwamagudu kigodure tu tu tumugu tabowu karegao? 9Iage egore U! Ema. Iagerema egore Ema karega, mare reorewu. Emarema akore Imi rugadu. 1 Kodi icare enoragodure ji: - Inoba taboba aekure tuiado? 1 Akore ei Cewu iere Jesus cewu imedu ure moto gurugurudo, ure reko iokuji, akore ii toro aia iei Zilo cedu kae, awo kabi. Iture rugadu, ire ikabi, ica, oino itaiwore. 1 Icare enoragodure ji: - Kaiba nowu imedu rakojere? Akore Ioruduwa bokwa. 1 Dukodi icare ere cewu joku bokwarewu reko fariseudoge etae. 
Fariseudoge enorai joku bokwarewu jidu. 1 Aró kode, sabadore jiwu meri ji Jesus ure moto guruguru towuje, ur nowu imedu jokudo tuiado. 1 Dukodi icare fariseudoge enorare ji pugeje inoba rakuduie aiwore. Akore ei ure moto guruguru maedo ioku joki, dukeje icare ire ikabi, ica, oino itaiwore. 1 Ia fariseudoge egore Pao koia karega ure nowu imedu rojai, mare paga karega, maragodure sabadore jiwu meri ji. Iage egore Inobadu kodiba ro pegarewu imedu umode cewu turo kurirewu kuo? Enora korire pui jice woje, jice woje. 1 Enoragodure kimo nowu joku bokwarewu ji, egore Inoba ameardaere nowu ure aekudo tuiadowu ji? Akore ei Ia profetanure ema. 1 Mare judeudoge emearutorukare nowu imedu joku bokwaie duji, du kaegae icare jokuie duji, icare emago jokodure uomage ewogai. 1 Enoragodure ei: - Tagonaregedu nao? Tagagomode boe jokoduie buture tuioku bokwa tabo? Macare inobadu taboba aiwore oino? 2 Uomage egore Ceruduware awuie cedonaregedu rema duji, butuie tuioku bokwa tabo duji. 2 Mare ceruduwakare inobadu tabore aiwore oino. Tanorado ji nowu inoduji. O joru butu makare du je. Ema rugadure umode kogado tawiegai. 2 Uomage egore oino tubagudu koia judeudogece, mare paga karega, cewu mearutorure Cristoie Jesus cedu jiwuge eiamedu boe eire judeudoge egore tumoduie etawuje sinagoga piji tugorigodui ei dutabo. 2 Dukodire uomage egore. O joru butu makare, tanorado ji nowu inoduji, oino. 2 Icare emagore nowu joku bokwarewu bogai kimo pugeje, egore ji Pao kurido. Ceruduware ro pegareuie nowu imeduce duji. 2 Akore ei Ioruduwakare ro pegarewu rakuduie, ioruduware tu jiboe reo ioku bokware, du karega icare iokure oino. 2 Icare enoragodu pemegare ji pugeje; - Inoba ure turodo ai? Inoba rore tuwo aeku jado? 2 Akore Ire tawie marigudu, mare takare tawiapagado iwadaru ji, kodiba tagaidure tamearuduwo pugeje? Iarema tagaidukana ure nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia etumedagewo tagi? 2 Nonore icare ere tuwadaru pegarewu rorido joki, egore ji Akire ia ure joruduwadowure aki, cegire Moisesre joruduwadowugere cegi. 2 Ceruduware Pao makoi Moisés jituji, mare awu ceruduwakare kaibawuba ure ema. 3 Icare cewu imedu akore Ie rore ta... Taeruduwakai kaibawuba ure ema duji. Mare du inodu tabo ure iokudo tuiado. 3 Jamedu ceruduware Pao biapagakai ro pegarewuge eiduji, mare biapagae okwamagudure puduiwugei, rore nono taidu reorewuge eiduji. 3 Iaboe iaboe emearudukare tu iaboe ji ia boture tuioku bokwa tabowu joku jado duji. 3 Pao omodukare awu imeduce ma, romodukare ia turo. 3 Egore ji Awudure aro pegarewu rorii aiogi dutabo, macare are ceruduwado? Dukejere ere barigu tubiji. 3 Jesus joruduware ei barigu duji, icare tuiorudui jitu keje, unoragodure ji: - Amearutorure Imedu Onaregeduji? 3 Akore Ioguduba ure ema, ikimejera, imearutoruwo ji? 3 Jesus akore ji Aerudure ji, emare makore oino ai. 3 Akore imearutorure, Ikimejera. Icare ure tubujodo ji, ure boe kurirewudo ema. 3 Dukodi icre Jesus akore Itaregodure awu moto kae iwo boe ewu tuwugeje: iwo jordukarewuge eerududo, jorudurewuge ewo tuioku bokwado. 4 Ia fariseudoge eedure apodu emearudure ako oinoduji, egore ji Cegi jamedu kana ceeku bokware? 4 Jesus akore ei Taeku bokwamode ma, taro pegamodukare, macare tameardaere taeruduie duji, du kodi icare taro pegarewu uture todobiji. 

Jeture ovelhadoge eiwu pemegarewu. - 1Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: cewu ukare turemo ovelhadoge ewaiporoji eeda towu, mare ure turemo to boekare turemowo jitu keje, iwogu kigodurewunure ema, boe ewidodu epanure ema. 2Mare cewu ure turemo baiporo jiwu, jeture ovelhadoge eiwunure ema. 3Duwure baiporo epare baiporo jado ai, ovelhadoge emearudumode makoji, makomode etae eie tabo, umode ecedo enogwagemodewo kae. 4Tui ovelhadoge eiamedu boedo tuiebu dukeje, kodumode etododai, nowu ovelhadoge ekodumode rekodaji, eruduware makoji kodi. 5Mare etumodukare ia tuioruduwakare jiboe rekodaji, mare eregodu rumode piji, eruduwakare tuioruduwakare jiwuge emago ji kodi. 6Jesus makore ei awu bakaruji mare ekare boe pa kaba jiba aidure tumagowo nowu tagoino dutabo. 7Icare Jesus makore ei pugeje, akore Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai imire ovelhadoge ewaiporore imi. 8Cewu kodure itododai boeto jiwuge eiamedu boere iwogu kigodurewugere emage, boe ewidodu epagere emage. 9Imire baiporore imi, iaboe umode turemo ii ma, umode cinorudo: umode turemo, umode tuiebu, jordumode togwagemodewoji. 1 Iwogu kigodurewuge etaregodumode ma, cioguwo du bogai, tuwo boe ewidodu bogai, tuwo boe pegadodu bogai tu je. Mare itaregodure ovelhadoge eewo du bogai, jereboe kuriwo ebo du bogai. 1 Imire jeture ovalhadoge eiwu pemegareure imi. Jeture ovelhadoge eiwu pemegarewu ure tumagu ewugeje. 1 Mare maragodure mori bogaiwu, jeture ovelhadogei karega ure emawu, jordumode rie aregoduji ma, umode ovelhadoge epijido, rekodumode, icare nowu rie rugodumode nowu ovelhadogei, umode edo taodo. 1 Paga karega, maragodure tu mori bogai, du kodi icare biapagakare ovelhadogei. 1 Imire jeture ovalhadogeiwu pemegarewunure imi. Ioruduware inagu ovelhadogei, inagu ovelhadoge eruduware ii jamedu. 1 Nono Ioga joruduwa magai ii du reorere, ioruduware Iogaji jamedu. Imode imagu inagu ovelhadoge ewugeje. 1 Ia inagu ovalhadoge ere kimo jamedu, duwugere eedukare awu ovelhadoge eeda tada. Ieturumode ei jamedu, emearudumode imago ji, dukejere icere emode mitogodo tu je, jeture eiwu umode mitotu jamedu. 1 Ioga mearudu kurire ii, paga karega, imode imagu, mare iewoduwo pugeje, kodi. 1 Iaboe iaboe umodukare itawuje, mare imode imagu itaobiji. Iroiware iwo imagu, iroiware iwo ikeragu ii pugeje. Awu iroiagudu rema, dure Iogare maku inai. 1 Nowu inodu bataru koia judeudoge ewadaru okorirewu padure boe kajeje pugeje. 2 Ia emage makarewuge egore Aroe pegarewu metunure tada, makonure taora bai bai tabo. Kodiba tawiapagare bataru ji? 2 Iage egore Awu bataru ukare nono Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge ewadarure. Kode Aroe pegarewu umodukana ia joku bokwarewu joku jado? 
Pao Aroe Eimejera Onaregedu Jesus rema. 2 Jerusalém kejewuge enure petado ture makuboeji, biaku buture du kodiwu keje. 2 Jesus boadunure Pao uwai kejewu Salomão o bororo oiagi. 2 Icare judeudoge ere taiado apo, enoragodure ji: - Jii inobadu kejeba amode cebagado? Cristonure aki rugadu dukeje, cewiedu awadudo taci je. 2 Jesus akore ei Imagore tai, mare tamearutorukare. Ioga ie tabowu iro jamedu boe makore itagaruji. 2 Mare tamearutorukare, paga karega, inagu ovelhadoge ia emage karega ure tagi kodi. 2 Inagu ovelhadoge emearudure imago ji, ioruduware ei, ekodure itabo. 2 Imode jere jii jeboe maku etai, etagedumodukare tu rugadu, iaboe iaboe eiwogumodukare ei ikera piji. 2 Ioga, koiare ure emagu inaiwu, ro rakare boe eiamedu boe ekori, iaboe iaboe emodukare etaru Ioga iera piji. 3 Imi, Ioga, cere mito tu je. 3 Icare judeudoge ere tugeragu toriji tuwo tori to ji pugeje. 3 Icare Jesus akore ei Ire taerududo Ioga ie tabowu iro pemegarewu makarewu ji. Kode kakoduwu ia koiaba tare taiagu tori to ii? 3 Judeudoge egore ji Ia aro pemegarewu koia karega cere ceiagu tori to ai, mare awadaru pegarewu koia. Paga karega, imedui aki dutabo are Aroe Eimejerado aki. 3 Jesus akore ei pugeje Taroiagudu padure kejewu bapera keje atugododukare oino tagire Aroe Eimejeragere tagi, du karega? 3 Kode, nowu taroiagudu padui bapera keje dukeje cewu Paore tuwadaru maku aiwuge eiere Aroe Eimejerage ma, (mare bapera atugo pemegarewu barigududodumodukare pudui), 3 Kodiba icare tagagore mako pegareboe iure ema cewu Paore boe pemegarewudo emawu, ure utudo moto kaewu ji, mare inagore Aroe Eimejera Onaregedunure imi oino dukoia? 3 Iromodukare Ioga iroiaguduji ma, tamearutorukaba ii. 3 Mare iromode ino ma, tagaidukare tamearutoruwo ii ma, tamearutorudo iro oino jiboe ji, du kejewo taeruduware, tamearutorure Ioga metui itada duji, imudui Ioga tada duji jamedu. 3 Icare ere tuiagu tugeragu ji pugeje, mare ure cinorudo ekera piji. 4 Icare ure turawuje Jordão po okwa bakowu kae pugeje, cewu Joãore boe etao pegododu paru tugu kudawo kae, torore icare rakojere. 4 Makarewuge eture ae, egore Joãokare ia turo kurirewu kuo rugadu. 4 Mare João makore awu jiboe jamedu boe boe jokodu rugadu. Makarewuge emearutorure ji. 

Lázaro jewoduidu. 1Lázaro kogodure Betânia keje, Maria mare tuduie Marta rakojerewo keje. 2Maria, koiare ure roreboe tugu Pagimejerato, ure bure kidudo taga tabo. Lázaro, kogoduredu, uwuri rema. 3Uwiemage areme ere boe egoiagu oino Jesus ji: - Cegimejera, cewu amearudu kurire jiwu kogodure. 4Jesus akore awu ewadaru jipagi Nowu kogodae umodukare bito, mare ure turugadu Pao kuriwo du bogai. Dukoiare Pao Onaregedu kuridodumode jamedu. 5Jesus mearudu kuricigore Marta ji, uwie Maria ji, Lazaro ji jamedu. 6Mare tumearudui nowu kogoduiedu jitu inodu tabo, ure turodo toi meri pobe nono kimo. 7Dukejere icare makore nowu ture joruduwadowugei, akore Pawo pagirimi Judéia kae. 8Egore: - Cegimejera, maigodure judeudogere tuiagu tori to ai, macare amode akirimi toro? 9Jesus akore Meri jiwu horadoge ekare ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowuto? Merure meri jiwu romodukare cara cara tuwuduwo, paga karega, jorudure meri uruguji kodi. 1 Mare merure boe cojiwu romode cara cara je, urugure jiboe bokware kodi. 1 Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, ure oto tawuje pugeje, akore Pameduia Lázaro unudure, mare imode jetadudo. 1 Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge egore ji Cegimejera, unuduradure dukeje, pemegagodumode. 1 Mare Jesus makonure bireduji, emagerema emeardaere boe enuduji rugadu rakuduie ako oino. 1 Kodi icare Jesusre inodu awadudo taci rugadu, akore Lázaro bire. 1 Iegarere taigoia, mare paga karega, paedukare toro kodi, duma tamearutoruwo. Mare paduwo bogai. 1 Awu inodu keje, Tomé, iei Dídimo cedu, akore tumedage ei Pagoduwo jamedu, pawiwo apo. 1 Mare Jesus aregodu keje, merire pobe puibiji Lázaro metui moto tadadu keje. 1 Betânia padure puredu tu Jerusalemji. 1 Dukodire makarewu judeudoge eture Marta ae, Maria ae, tuwo boe motududo ei etuwuri bokwareduji. 2 Kuri tumearudui Jesus aregodumode duji dukeje, Marta riture togi, Maria rugadure mugure tuwai tada. 2 Icare Marta akore Jesus ji Ikimejera, aragojemode woe ma, iwuri bokwamodukare kodi karega. 2 Mare ioruduware akogwamagudumode Pao ji bogaiboe jamedu boe, Pao umode jamedu boe maku akai. 2 Icare Jesus akore ji Awuri jewodumode. 2 Marta akore Ioruduware jewodumoduie boe eewodumode boigoduwu meri jituji. 2 Jesus akore ji Imire jewodureboe, jereboere imi. Cewu mearutorure iiwu, bimode, mare du inodu tabo jemode. 2 Cewu jere itadawuge, cewu mearutorure iiwuge eiamedu boe ewimodukare jii je. Amearutorure nowu inoduji? 2 Akore U! Imearutorure akie Cristore aki duji. Pao Onaregeduie aki duji, cewu aregodumode moto kaewuie ure aki duji. 2 Awu tuwadaru akedu keje, rekodure tuwie bogai, makore ji tumago podu tabo: - Pagimejera rakojere nono, makore awogai. 2 Tumearudui kuri je dukeje, ure turagojedo, riture togi. 3 (Mare paga karega, Jesus aregodukare roga nowu babuturoguto, mare rakoje kimore cewu Marta jorudure puduiwo keje). 3 Jeture Maria uwai kejewu judeudoge, eridure aedu tuwo boe motududo jitu bogai, tuiorudui ui turagojedo taci ake tabo, ui tuiebu dukeje, ekodure rekodaji, tumeardae tabo utuie ure tuwuri meturewo kae ma, toraguduwo nono du bogai rakuduie ro oinoduji. 3 Maria rema, turegodui Jesus rakojerewo kae dukeje, tuiorudui jitu keje, ure tubujodo jice bure paru, akore ji Ikimejera, aragojemode woe ma, iwuri bokwamodukare, kodi karega. 3 Icare Jesus tuiorudui oragudui oino dukeje, nowu kodure apowu judeudoge etoragudui jamedu dukeje, kiarigodu kuricigore tudaroe tada, tugiarigodu kuricigo koia. 3 Icare akore Kaiba tare bu? Egore Cegimejera, mato, aeruduwo. 3 Icare Jesus oragudure. 3 Dukodire icare judeudoge egore Tagaiwodo inoba mearudu kuricigore jituji. 3 Mare ia emage egore Kode, ure joku bokwarewu jokudo tuiado, kode, kodiba roiwamodukare tuwo awu bi kado? 3 Tugiarigodu kuricigo tabo pugeje, Jesus uture nowu meturewo kae. Ia tori padui je kejedu tadare meture. 3 Icare Jesus akore boe ji Tori roto oino. Icare Marta, nowu birewu uwie, akore ji Ikimejera, jerimaga pega remawunure, merire pobe puibiji metui woe dukeje. 4 Mare Jesus akore ji.
Kode imagokare ai amearutorumode dukeje, aerudumode Pao Aroe Eimejera o boe kurirewu ji? Dukejere icare ere nowu tori roto oino. 4 Icare Jesus, tui tuioku awogado baruto dukeje, akore Ioga, iegare kuricigore ai, amearudure iwadaru ji kodi. 4 Ioruduware boe jamedu jie amearudure iwadaru jituji, mare imagore awu boe etoiai woe dukoia, duma emearutoruwo aigoiaie are irojaiduji. 4 Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, ure tumago rakado, akore Lázaro, aebu mato. 4 Boekarema, nowu birewu ure tuiebu aroia opoi tuwure, tugera tabo kimo dutabo. Dukodi icare Jesus akore Nowu aroia kiwuje piji, merudo. 
Judeudoge etaidure tuwo Jesus bito. 4 Cewu uture Maria aewu judeudoge, duwugere eerudure Jesus roji, ia emage emearutorure ji. 4 Mare iage eture fariseudoge etae, ereadodure ewiegai Jesus ro boeji. 4 Icare sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare fariseudoge ere boe eimejerage eiagu tudo pui, egore Inoba paromode? Awu imedu unure turo kurirewu todudo gu gu je. 4 Pamode roto oino rugadu ma, boe eiamedu boe emearutorumode ji, dukeje icare Roma bakurirewu kejewuge etaregodumode ma, emode pago bakurirewu, pago moto jamedu boe pegado. 4 Mare ia etumeduia iei Caifas cedu, sacerdotedoge eiemejera kurireui ema dutabo nowu joru jitu, akore Takare boe pa iaboeji iaboeji. 5 Taeruduwakare ema remawuie tagai, ia imedu bitoduwo mito, boe eiamedu boe etai, duma boe eiamedu bitodu kawo? 5 Mare taobiji karega ako oino, mare sacerdotedoge eimejera kurirewu ema nowu joruji, dukoiare ure Jesus bitodumoduie boe eiamedu boe etaidu awadudo. 5 Mare nowu moto kejewuge eiamedu ai mito tu je karega, mare ure taodo jice woje jice wojewu Pao ore eiamedu boe etoduwo pui du bogaire ako oino. 5 Dukodi icare, nowu du kodiwu piji, eemarure tuwo bito. 5 Nowu inodu koiare Jesus meru awadukare judeudoge ekao pugeje. Ure tudawuje taci ia boe eeda iei Efrém cedu, padu puredui tu boe eedukare kejewu moto jitu kae. Nonore icare rakoje raire nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo. 5 Judeudoge eno Páscoa puredugodunure. Makarewu boe erudure Jerusalém kae, Páscoa otodai, tuwo tubemegado. 5 Eemarunure Jesus bogai. Tuiedui Pao uwai tada dutabore egore pui Inoba tameardaere, kodiba aregodukare peta kae? 5 Mare sacerdotedoge eiemejerage, fariseudoge ere jordumode jiwuge eiamedu boe ereadoduiagu rakojerewoji, tuwo tugeragu ji. 

Betânia kejewu boe enogwage. 1Meri ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto Páscoa otodaidu kejere, Jesus uture Betânia kae, cewu ture jewodudowu iei Lázaro cedu kae. 2Nono ere ia boe enogwage towuje tui Jesus kurido du bogai. Marta unure boe eke maku boe etai, Lázaro okwagere nono nowu ira keje jamedu. 3Icare Mariare tugeragu ia roreboe kaguru jaji, ia okureboe ro rakaguragarewu metui tadadu, ure maedo Jesus bure joki, du ure kidudo taga tabo. Nowu bai okorobadure nowu roreboe ro tabo. 4Macare Judas Iscariote, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia mito tu jedu, cewu umode makuwu, akore 5Kodiba tagare akirodo nowu roreboe tabo diieromode 3 0 ce duji, tuwo maku marenarue etai? 6Akore oino, mare tuwiapagai marenarue eidu koia karega, mare tugiwogu kigodu koia. Apore diiero ja mugure, iwogu kigodure nowu boere tugu nonowu boeji, dukoiare ako oino. 7Icare Jesus akore Tagagokaba oino ji. Ure awu roreboe jetu otorogado imedumode moto tadadu paru kae. 8Marenarue emode tagabo jii je, mare imi, imodukare jii tagabo. 9Ia judeudoge makarewuge eruduware Jesus rakojei torodu, etaregodure, mare tuioruduwo Jesus ji tu je du bogai karega, mare tuioruduwo nowu Lazaro ji, du bogaire ero oino jamedu. 1 Mare sacerdotedoge eimejerage ere tumeardae bu tugajeje tuwo Lázaro bito jamedu. 1 Paga karega, makarewu judeudoge ere turodo oino epiji, tumearutorui Jesus jitu koia. 
Jesus ui turemo Jerusalém todu. 1 Nowu meri rekodajiwu meri ji ia boe makarewuge etaregodure Jerusalém kae peta kaedu, emearudure Jesuie ure tuburedo duji. 1 Icare eridure togi kodoro tabo, toiogwari kuricigo tabo, egore Akaru pemegarewu aregodui Pagimejera ie tabodu, Israeldoge eimejera aregodu. 1 Jesus tuiorudui ia jumento rogu jitu keje, ure tumugudo keje, uwo nono bakaru padui bapera kejedu reore: 1 Apagudu kaba Sion bakurirewu kejewu aredu. Ica, akimejera aregodu tumugui ia jumenta naregedu keje dutabo. 1 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekare boe pawuje nowu inoduji boe paruji, mare Jesus kuridodu kejere icare ewiabuture oinoie bapera atugore, oinoie boe erore jituji. 1 Cewu boe makarewuge eedui apo cewu makoi Lázaro bogai meturewoto, ure jewodudo eegaiwuge ere iogwarido ji tuiegare tabo. 1 Dukodire boe eridure togi, mare paga karega, emearudure Jesus ui cewu turo kurirewu kuo du kodi. 1 Mare fariseudoge egore oino pui Tagaiwodo, paroiwa bokwa radure. Boe eiamedu boe eregodunure rekodaji. 2 Ia gregodoge emugure nowu ruture tumagowo baruto peta kejewuge etada. 2 Duwuge ere tuburedo Filipe ji (cewu Galiléia tadawu Betsaida kejewu), enogwamagudure ji, egore Cegimejera, cedagemonure ceeruduwo Jesus ji. 2 Icare Filipe kodure André ae, ure bie. Icare Filipe mare André, ere Pagimejera bie. 2 Jesus akore ei Icare boe aregodure pudae Imedu Onaregedu kuridodumodedu kae. 2 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: ia trigo a butui moto todu, mare bimodukare dukeje, umode mitotu nono rugadu, mare bimode dukeje, a makaguragamode. 2 Cewu mearudu kurire puduiwu, umode tuwarigu boeto, mare cewu kodu kagirire puduiwu, ikarurunure pudui jere jii jeboe kae. 2 Iaboe eromode nono itaidu reore dukeje, ekodumode iregodaji. Cewu iragojemodewo keje, itugare rakojemode nono jamedu. Iaboe itugaremode ma, Ioga umode kuridodudo. 2 Oino, itaroe kiarigodunure. Inoba inagomode? Ioga, ikinorudo awu du kodiboe piji. Mare awu inodu koia rugadure itaregodure tu oino. 2 Ioga, akie kurido. Nowu inodu keje kuri je, ia boe emago aregodure baru piji, akore Ire kurido marigudu, imode kurido pugeje. 2 Aró, kode, nowu boe makarewuge eedure nonodu, tumearudui nowu inodu jitu keje, egore boiarurugoduie. Iage egore Ia tupare ako oino ji. 3 Icare Jesus akore Awu makore oinoboe igoia karega ako oino, mare taigoia. 3 Ure tugogado awu moto jiboe aregodure; icare awu moto ukimejera barigudumode. 3 Mare icai itaogado moto piji dukeje, imode imugudo ime eiamedu boe keje itae. 3 Akore oino, mare tuwo boe eruduwado inoba tuwimode du jire ako oino. 3 Icare egore Cemearudure Pao o bakaru akoi Cristo jemode jii je duji. Kodiba icare akore ure turugadu Imedu Onaregeduwo taogado? Kakoduwuba nowu Imedu Onaregedu rema? 3 Jesus akore Urugureboe mugumode tagabo kimo biega tu je. Tamerudo urugu kimodu otoi, boe coukawo taroiwa bokwado. Cewu merure boe cokaowu jordukare kaiba tugodumode. 3 Urugureboe ji tagabo kimodu otoi, tamearutorudo ji, duma urugureboe orewo tagi. Awu tuwadaru rekodaji, Jesus ure tudawuje nowu piji, ure tuwiado epiji. 
Judeudoge emearutorukare. 3 Ure turo kurirewu kuo du makado, mare du inodu tabo emearutorukare ji. 3 Oinore nowu inodu jia profeta Isaias akore Cegimejera, ioguduba mearutorure cereadodure jiboe ji? Ioguduba biegaiba Pagimejera ro rakarewu kogadodure? 3 Mare eroiwakare tumearutoruwo, paga karega, ia du kodi, profeta Isaias akore pugeje 4 Ure eeku mi, ure ewabo rakado, duma eerudukawo tuioku tabo, eruduwa kawo tuwabo tada, ekawo tubemegado, ikawo epemegado (Is 6, s). 4 Oinore Isaias akore tuiorudui o boe pemegarewu kurirewu jitu keje. 4 Mare ia judeudoge eiemejerage makarewuge emearutorure ji, mare fariseudoge eigoia ekare towadudo, duma tuwarigudu kawo sinagoga piji. 4 Paga karega, etaidure boewo tugurido duji, mare tuguridodu aregodui baru piji duji karega. 4 Dukodi icare Jesus ure tumago rakado, akore Cewu mearutorure iiwu, ii karega mearutorure, mare ure irojaiwu jire mearutorure. 4 Jorudure iiwu, ure irojaiwu jire jorudure. 4 Itaregodure nono urugureboe aregodui moto kaedu reore, nowu inodu tabo, cewu mearutorure iiwu rakojemodukare boecorewu tada. 4 Iaboe emearudumode iwadaru ji, mare eromodukare nono iwadaru reore ma, imodukare ikogado ji, paga karega, itaregodure moto kae, mare iwo ikogado boe ji du bogai karega, mare iwo boe einorudodu bogaire itaregodure. 4 Cewu ure iwarigududowu, ukare tugeragu iwadaru jiwu, iaboe emode tugogado ji ire awadudowu iwadaru umode tugogado ji boigoduwu meri ji. 4 Paga karega, itaobiji karega inagoino, mare ure irojaiwu Ioga, ure inagomodedudo, ure imode boe eruduwadodudo jamedu. 5 Ioruduware: ure boe eroiagudu boe ewi bokwarewu rema. Kode, Iogare inagoiagu jiboe, jire inagoino. 

Jesus ure ture joruduwadowuge ewure kabi. 1Páscoa jiwu petamodedu otodai, Jesus tuioruduai icai boe aregodui pudae, icai tudumode Tuo ae awu moto piji duji, mearudu kurire awu moto kejewu tuwobei, mearudu kurire jii ei rugadu. 2Enogwagei ira kejedu tonaji, Aroe pegareuma urade Judas, cewu Simão Iscariote onaregedu, meardae pegarewu barigu uwaboto, uwo Jesus maku onare jiwuge etai. 3Icare Jesus, tuioruduwai Tuoie boe jamedu boe bu tugera keje, Pao pijie taregodure, du tumoduie tugirimi Pao ae pugeje, 4Ure turagojedo taci ira piji, ure tugudae aroia boarewu tawuje, icare tui tugeragu ia aroia koboji, ure kogudo tu tubeagajeje. 5Icare ure pobo tugu ia ruwoboto, icare ure nowu ture joruduwadowuge ewure kabi, ure ewure kidudo nowu ture kogudo tubeagajejewu aroia tabo. 6Aregodure tu Simão Pedro ae, mare Pedro akore ji Ikimejera, arumode iwure kabi? 7Jesus akore ji Awu irore oino jiboe amodukare pawuje roga, mare dukeje kuri je, amode pawuje. 8Pedro akore ji amodukare iwure kabi rugadu. Icare Jesus akore ji Imodukare akabi ma, aragojemodukare itabo 9Kodi icare Simão Pedro akore Ikimejera, kode, iwure tu rugadu karega, ikera jamedu, itaora jamedu, amode kabi. 1 Jesus akore ji Cewu ure taimo mariguduu biapagamodukare tuwo tugabi du bogai pugeje; ema jamedu boe kabidure kodi. Aró, kode, tagi tagabidure, mare taiamedu karega. 1 Joruduware ioguduba umode tumagu tujebage etai duji, du kodire ako oino: - Taiamedu karega kabidure. 1 Tui ewure kabidu akedu keje, ure tugeragu tugudaeji, ure tugu tu pudui pugeje, icare ure tumugudo tu ira keje. Dukejere icare makore ture joruduwadowugei, akore Taerudure iro oino jiboe ji? 1 Tagagore ure taeruduwadowuie ure imi, tagagore tagimejeraie ure imi. Tagagoi oinodu pemegare, cewu imi rugadu kodi. 1 Kodi icare imire tagimejerare imi, ure taeruduwadowure imi, mare du inodu tabo ire tawure kabi. Kode ica, tamode pu bure kabi jamedu. 1 Taerudunure iroi oinoduji, du reorere taromode pui jamedu. 1 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai boe etugare emawu kurikare tugimejera kori; jamedu cewu rojaidodurewu kodukare cewu ure rojaiwu kori. 1 Tamode awu inodu boe pawuje ma, boe pemegarewu jetumode tagabo, mare tamode inodu towuje dukeje. 1 Taiamedu boeji karega inagoino. Ioruduware cewu ire tawuje tumedage epijigugei. Mare umode turugadu boewo nono bapera atugo reore: -Cewu ure amirewu kowuje itabowu unure tuwureadu awagado ii. 1 Imagonure awu inoduji oino, nowu inodu umode tudo duotodai, duma umode tudowuje ma tamearutoruwo, taeruduwawo ioguduba ure imi duji. 2 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: - Ure tugeragu cewu ure irojaiwu jiwu, ii rugadure ure tugeragu, cewu ure tugeragu iiwu, ure irojaiwu jiwu jire ure tugeragu jamedu. 2 Tagoi oinodu rekodaji, Jesus utaroe kiarigodu kuricigore, dutabore akore Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai ia tagi tamode imagu icebage etai. 2 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge etaiwore jice woje pui, eruduwakare kakoduwu ia puduiba akomode inoduji. 2 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia mito tu jedu, Jesus mearudu kuricigore jiwu, mugure ira keje mekiwu, ure taora bu Jesus mo keje. 2 Simão Pedro ure tuiebirigido ji tunora tabo ji: - Ioguduba jiba ako oino? 2 Nowu mitodu, taora padui Jesus mo kejedu tabore, unoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, ioguduba? 2 Jesus akore Cewu imode amirewu pegodu du imode maku aiwu. Dukeje icare ure amirewu pegodo, ure maku Simão Iscariote onaregedu Judas ai. 2 Ui nowu amirewu remo dukeje kuri je, Aroe pegareure taredo to. Kodi icare Jesus akore ji Amode towujeboe todu marigudo ii. 2 Mare nowu jeture ira kejewuge, ia emage ia emage eruduwakare kodiba ako oino ji. 2 Paga karega, Judas apore akirododu epa ja mugure, dukoiare ia emage emeardaere akoe oino ji: - Akirodo ia okwamode pagai peta epa boeji. Iarema, ia maku marenarue etai. 3 Tui cewu amirewu kobo ko du rekodaji, ure akedo pudui tuwo tuiebu. Boekarema, boecoradure marigudu. 3 Judas ui tuiebu dukeje, Jesus akore Oinore icare Imedu Onaregedu kuridodure, Paore tugurirewu towuje tada. 3 Kode Paore tugurirewu towuje tada dukeje, Pao umode kurirewudo ema tudada, umode kurirewudo ema kuri je. 3 Itore kugure, biegatu kimo iragojei oino tagabo. Taemarumode iwogai, mare imago magai judeudoge eidu reorere, inagomode oino tai jamedu taroiwamodukare tagoduwo ikodumodewo kae. 

Boe eroiagudu maiwu. 3 Iwo boe eroiagudu maiwu maku tagai. Tamearudu kurido tu pui. Oino imearudu kuri magai tai du reorere tamearudu kurimode pui jamedu. 3 Tamearudu kurimode pui ma, boe eruduwamode inoge ire joruduwadowugeie ure tagiduji. 3 Icare Simão Pedro unoragodure ji: - Cegimejera, kaiba akodumode? Jesus akore ji Ikodumodewo kae, akodumodukare oino roga, mare ia boi pugejere akodumode itabo. 3 Pedro unoragodure ji pugeje: - Cegimejera, kodiba ikodumodukare akabo oino? Imode imagu awugeje. 3 Icare Jesus akore ji Amode amagu iwugeje? Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai kogariga akogodumodedu otodai, amode aeruduwa bokwado ii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. 

Boe etawara Pao ai dure Jesus rema. - 1Tawabo pagudugodu kaba. Tamearutorure Pao ji, kode tamearutorudo ii jamedu. 2Boe eeda makaguragare Ioga uwai tada; umodukare ino ma, imagomode tai marigudu. Ica, itumode toro iwo taeda pemegado. 3Itumode toro, imode taeda pemegado dukeje, imode ikirimi, imode ikeragu tai itabo, duma, taeduwo iragojemodewo keje. 4Taeruduware kakoduwu awaraba umode boe arego ikodumodewo kaeduji. 5Icare Tomé akore ji Cegimejera, ceruduwakare kaiba akodumode duji. Kode, inobadu taboba ceruduwamode nowu awaraji? 6Icare Jesus akore ji Imire Awarare imi, Boe Rikirewunure mi, ure boe eedowunure imi, iaboe iaboe etaregodumodukare Ioga ae ipiji dukeje. 7Taeruduwamode ii ma, taeruduwamode Iogaji jamedu. Oino taeruduware ji, paga karega, taerudure ji marigudu kodi. 8Filipe akore Cegimejera, ceruduwado Pao ji. Nowu inodu umode turugadu cei. 9Jesus akore Mariigudu iragojere tagabo, macare aeruduwakare ii, Felipe? Cewu jorudure iiwu, jorudure Iogaji jamedu. Kodiba icare akagore oinono ceruduwado Pao ji, oino? 1 Amearutorukare imedui Ioga tada duji, Ioga metui itoda duji? Imagore ji taiboe, itaobiji karega inagoino, mare Iogare, meture itadadu, ure turore jiboe boe towuje. 1 Tamearutorudo ii. Imedure Ioga tada, Ioga meture itada. Tamearutorudo awu inodu boeji, awu roboe koia. 1 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai: cewu mearutorure iiwu, romode nono irore jiboe ji, mare ro kodumode awu iro oino jiboe kori. Mare paga karega, itumode Ioga ae kodi. 1 Ica, tagogwamagudumode Pao ji ikie tabo bogaiboe jamedu boe, iromode ino tagai, duma Uo kuridoduwo tonaregedu tada. 1 Tagogwamagudumode ii, ikie taboboe jamedu boe, iromode ino tagai. 
Jesus akore tumoduie Aroe Pemegarewu arego. 1 Tamearudu kurimode ii ma, taromode nono ii taroiagudu reore. 1 Icare inogwamagudumode Pao ji, du umode ia Tagimejera Pemegarewu maku tagai muguwo tagabo boe jamedu ji jii je. 1 Duwure boe jokoduwu remawu Aroe rema, duwure awu moto umodukare tugeragu ji, paga karega, roiwakare tuioruduwo ji kodi. Tagirema, taeruduware ji, paga karega, rakojemode tagabo, metumode tadoda du kodi. 1 Imodukare marenarudo tagi ii ikera ra tabiji dutabo. Imode ikirimi tawogai pugeje. 1 Biegatu kimo, awu moto jordumodukare ii. Mare tagirema, taerudumode ii pugeje, iere kodi, tagi jamedu taemode jamedu kodi. 2 Nowu meri ji taeruduwamode iragojei Ioga tada duji, taedui itada duji, imedui tadoda duji jamedu. 2 Cewu jedure ino boe eroiagudu jiwu, romode ino ma, nowure mearudu kurire ii. Cewu mearudu kurire iiwu, Ioga mearudu kurimode ji jamedu, imearudu kurimode ji, imode itowadudo jekai. 2 Icare Judas unoragodure ji, mare cewu Iscariote karega, akore Cegimejera, kodiba amode akowadudo ceegai, mare amodukare akowadudo awu moto jekai? 2 Jesus akore ji Cewu mearudu kurire iiwu, remode nono ii boe eroiagudu reore, dukejere icare Ioga mearudu kurimode ji jamedu, dukejere cedumode mato ae, icare cemode ceeda bu tada. 2 Cewu mearudu kurikare iiwu, romodukare nono ii boe eroiagudu reore. Tamearudure jiwu iwadaru ji, mare iwadaru karega, mare ure irojaiwu Ioga bataru. 2 Inagore awu inodu boeji iragojei kimo tagabodu otoi. 2 Mare ure boe ewudugugowu Aroe Pemegarewu, dure Ioga umode rojai ikie tabodu, umode taeruduwado boe jamedu boeji, umode tawia jetu imagore jiboe jamedu boeji. 2 Inure boe butugurewu mugudo tagabo, inure ino boe butugurewu maku tagai. Mare imodukare maku tagai nono awu moto kejewuge magai maku du reore. Tawabo kiarigodu kaba, tawabo pagudu kaba jamedu. 2 Tamearudure imagoi awu inodu jituji itumode, mare imode ikirimi tagae pugeje. Tamearudu kurimode ii ma, boe jokodure taegare kuricigomode itui Ioga ae duji, mare paga karega, Iogare kuri remawure ikori. 2 Inagore awu inoduji oino tai, nowu inodu umode tudowujedu koda piji, duma inodu ui tudowuje dukeje, tamearutoruwo. 3 Imago kuri jokodumodukare tai pugeje, mare paga karega, awu moto ukimejera aregodunure kodi, mare ro rakamodukare iaboeji iaboeji ii. 3 Mare awu moto joruduwamode imearudu kurii Ioga jituji, iroi nono Ioga iroiagudu reore duji. Taragojedo, paduwo awu piji. 

Parera ikure Jesus rema. - 1Imire boe jokoduwu parera ikure imi; Iogare parera iguru epa rema. 2Enari botukarewu jetara kuguri jamedu boe umode kado; enari boturewu jamedu boe umode jetara kuguri rogu kado piji, duma enari makawo. 3Tagire tagabidure (jetara boe kabidure tabiji) imagore jiwu iwadaru koia. 4Tamugudo itabo, imi jamedu imugumode tagabo. Enari boe botumodukare taobiji jetukai cito dutabo. Oinore tare jamedu: taro pemegarewu umodukare tamugukai itabo dukeje. 5Imire parera ikure imi, tagire jetaragurure tagi. Mugure itabowu, imugure apowu, ro pemegarewu kuricigomode, paga karega, itabo karega dukeje, taroiwamodukare iaboeji iaboeji. 6Cewu mugukare itadawuge eiamedu boe, barigudumode toro baawadu kae, cewu enari botukare jetara boe reore. Du kidumode, boe emode ako, bariguduwo joruto, kowuduwo. 7Tamugumode itabo ma, iwadaru metumode tagabo ma, tagogwamagudumode tagaidure jiboe jamedu boe bogai, du umode ino rugadu. 8Ioga akaru kuridodunure, tai taro pemegarewu makado dutabo, tai ire joruduwadowugedo tagi dutabo. 9Nono Ioga mearudu kuri magai ii du reorere, imearudu kurire tai jamedu. Tamugudo imearudu kuriae tada. 1 Taromode nono ii taroiagudu reore ma, tamugumode imearudu kuriae tada. Nono iro magai Iogai iroiagudu reore dukoiare imugure mearudu kuriae tada du reore. 1 Inagore tai awu inodu boeji du ma iegareae metuwo tadoda, taegareae kororogoduwo. 
Boe emearudu kurii puidu. - 1 Awu ino boe eroiagudu reo tamearudu kurido pui, imearudu kuri magai tai du reore. 1 Iaboe iaboe emearudu kuriae kodukare cewu ure tumagu tuwidoduwo tumearudu kurire jiwuge etai du kori. 1 Imedagenure tagi taromode nono ii taroiagudu reore dukeje. 1 Imagomodukare itugaregeie ure tagi pugeje, mare paga karega, ire taeruduwado imearudure ji Ioga pijiboe jamedu boeji. 1 Tagire tamagokare iwogai, mare imire imagore tawogai. Ire tarojai toro taro pemegareuwo tudowuje, nowu taro pemereuwo jii je, du ma, tagogwamagudumode Iogaji ikie taboboe jamedu boe makuduwo tagai. 1 Ire taroiagu jiboe reo tamearudu kuriwo pui jice woje. 
Awu moto kejewu boe etonamode Jesus apawugei. - 1 Awu moto kodu kagirimode tai ma, taeruduwado iie kodu kagirire tagodobiji. 1 Moto omode tagi ma, moto mearudu kurimode tai, toi tagi dukoia. Mare moto o karega ure tagi dukeje, ire ikeragu tai pijidu kodi, du kodire moto kodu kagirire tai. 2 Tawia jetu imagore tai jiwu iwadaru ji boe etugare kodukare tugimejera kori. Erorerure ii, kode, erorerumode tai jamedu. Eromode nono iwadaru reore ma, kode eromode nono tawadaru reore jamedu. 2 Mare eromode nowu inodu jamedu boeji ikie koia tai, mare paga karega, eruduwakare cewu ure irojaiwu jitu koia. 2 Mare itaregodumodukare, imagomodukare ma, ero pegamodukare rabodu. Mare oino ego okwacerewu bokwa turo pegarewu ji. 2 Cewu kodu kagirire iiwu, kodu kagirimode Iogaji jamedu. 2 Iro kurirewu umodukare etada, nono ia rokare nono iro reore, ma, ero pegamodukaradu. Macare eerudure iroji, mare ekodu kagirire ii, ekodu kagirire Iogaji. 2 Mare uwo nono bataru padui eno bapera kejedu reore: 
Ekodu kagirire ii paga tu je . 2 Cewu mako kigodure boe eparu kejewu, imode rojai Ioga ie tabowu, cewu ore boe rikirewu Aroe Pemegarewu, ure tudawuje Ioga pijidu, aregodumode dukeje, jomode iwugeje. 2 Tagi jamedu, taiomode iwugeje, mare paga karega, tagi taedure itabo jii boe paruto dukoia. 

Boe etonai mearutorure Jesus jiwugeidu. - 1Inagore oino tai, tawo tabewudo tai, tawudu kawo boe pegarewu to. 2Tawarigudumode sinagogadoge epiji. Boe aregodumode pudae dukeje cewu ure tawidowuge eiamedu boe emeardaemode tuie ure Pao kurido duji. 3Eromode oino, mare paga karega, eerudukare Iogaji, eerudukare ii jamedu kodi. 4Mare inagore oino tai awu iwadaru ji, duma, boe aregodumode pudae dukeje, tawia jetuwo inagoi tai marigudu duji. Mare ikare tawie nowu inoduji boe paruto, iragoje kimore tagabo kodi. 
Aroe Pemegarewu maragodae. 5Icare itumode cewu ure irojaiwu ae, macare ia tagi ia tagi tanorakare ii: - Kaiba akodumode? 6Mare awu inagoinodu ure tagiarigodaedo tumaedo tawabo tada. 7Mare du inodu tabo imagomode tai boe jokoduji pemegare tai ituwo tabiji, paga karega, itumodukare ma, cewu makomode tawugejewu aregodumodukare tagae. Mare itumode dukeje, imode rojai tawogai. 8Aregodumode du kodiboe keje, awu moto umode boe pa boe ero pegarewu ji, boe jetororewu ji, boe ji tugogado boeiboeji. 9Umode awu motodo boe pa boe ero pegarewu ji, emearutorukare ii kodi. 1 Umode udo boe pa boe jetotorewu ji, mare paga karega, itumode Pao ae, du rekodajire icare taerudumode ii pugeje. 1 Umode udo boe pa boe ji tugogado boeiboeji, mare paga karega, boere tugogado awu moto kejeboe eimejeraji marigudu. 1 Imagomode ji taiboe makaguragare kimo, mare tugiwa rakamodukare ji oino. 1 Mare makomode tawugejewu, cewu boe rikirewu Aroe Pemegarewu aregodumode dukeje, umode taeruduwado boe rikirewu jamedu boeji, mare paga karega, taobiji karega makomode, mare makomode tumearudure jiboe ji; umode tawie aregodumodeboeji jamedu. 1 Ema umode ikurido, mare paga karega, inoe makudumode ai du kodi, umode tawie ji jamedu. 1 Ure Ioga apoboe jamedu boe inonure ema jamedu. Dukodire inagore tai inoe makudumode ai, umode kogado tawiegai jamedu. 
Boe ekiarimode, mare boe eegaremode pugeje, Cristo koia. 1 Biegatu kimo, teardumodukare ii, mare biegatu pugeje, taerudumode ii pugeje, mare paga karega, itumode Pao ae imuguwo apo kodi. 1 Nowu inodu koia, nowu ia ure joruduwadowuge enorare pui jice woje, jice woje, egore Kaboba jiba akore oino pai. Biegatu kimo taerudumodukare ii, biegatu kimo pugeje, dukeje taerudumode ii pugeje? Inobadu jiba akomode oino itumode Pao ae? 1 Dukeje egore Inobadu jiba akore biegatu kimo? Paeruduwakare kaboba jiba aidure tagoi oinono. 1 Jesus ure boe pa ei tunoragoduiagu iaboe bogai duji, du kodi icare akore Tanorare pui jice woje, jice woje, cewu imagore jiboe ji, inagoi biegatu kimo, dukeje teardumodukare ii pugeje, du ia biegatu pugeje dukeje taerudumode ii pugeje duji. 2 Boe jokodu jire imagomode oino tai tagi tagoragudumode, tamode maido, mare awu moto kejewu boe eegaremode. Tagiarigodumode, mare tagiarigodae umode taegareaedo pudumi. 2 Aredu tui tuguri butuiagu dukeje, kiarigodure, boe aregodure pudae ji dukoia, mare tuguri butu rekodaji, bia puredukare cewu tugiarigodaeji pugeje, tuiegare koia, ia imedurogu buture kodi. 2 Du reorere tagi tagiarigodure oino jamedu, mare iorudumode tai pugeje, nono tawabo jekaremode pugeje, iaboe iaboe emodukare taegareae barigu tabiji. 2 Nowu meri ji tanoramodukare ii iaboe iaboe bogai pugeje. 
Boe enogwamaguduwo Jesus ie tabo. - Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino tai tagogwamagudumode Pao ji ikie tabo bogaiboe jamedu boe, umode maku tagai. 2 Jii oino tagogwamagudukare iaboe iaboe bogai ikie tabo roga. Tagogwamagududo du makudumode tagai, duma taegareae kororogoduwo. 2 Ire iwadaru jeonado ia bakaruji dutabore inagore tai, mare boe aregodumode pudae ikai iwadaru jeonado jice woje, jice woje ia bakaru boeji tai, du umodukare pugeje, mare imago awadumode tai Pao jiboe ji. 2 Nowu du kodiwu keje tagogwamagudumode ikie tabo dukeje, inogwamagudukare Pao ji tagai pugeje. 2 Mare paga karega, Pao mearudu kuricigore tai, tamearudu kuricigore ii, tamearutorure itaregodui Pao piji kodi. 2 Ire itawuje Pao piji ituwo mato moto kae. Ica, oinore icare imode moto pijido, ituwo Pao ae pugeje. 
Jesus ure joruduwadowuge emeartorae. 2 Nowu ure joruduwadowuge emagore ji ica, oinore icare are awadaru awadudo rugadu, akarega ure awadaru jeonado iaboeji pugeje. 3 Ica, oinore icare cere boe pa aeruduwai boe jamedu boe jituji, akogeamodukai iaboe iaboe enorawo ai pugeje duji. Nowu inodu koiare cemearutorure akaregodui Pao piji duji rugadu. 3 Jesus akore ei Oinore icare tamearutorure? 3 Ica, boe aregodumode, boe aregodure marigudu, dukejere tamode tagaodo tagogwacemodewo jaogwai, tamode ipijido, tamode ido mito tu je. Mare ikare mito tu je. Ioga mugure itabo. 3 Inagore awu inoduji tai, duma boe pemegareuwo, boe butugureuwo tai igoia. Awu moto keje taiwomode. Mare tabewudo tai. Imire ire imorido awu motoji. 

Jesus makoi tubaru tabodu. 1Jesus ure tuioku awogado baruto, dutabore akore Ioga, icare boe aregodure pudae; akonaregedu kurido, duma, akonaregedu uwo akurido jamedu. 2Are ro rakarewu makai, are boe jamedu maku iera kai, uwo jere jii jeboe maku cewu are maku aiwuge eiamedu boe etai. 3Mare jere jii jeboe reo boe eruduwawo ai ure mitotu jewu boe jokoduwu Aroe Eimejera ji, mare boe eruduwawo are rojaiwu Jesus Cristo ji jamedu. 4Ire akurido awu moto keje. Ire are iroiagudu jiwu imaragodae iado. 5Kodi icare, oino, Ioga, ikurido akabo, amagai ikurido akabo moto todudumodedu otodai. 6Imagore akieji are maku inaiwu moto kejewu ime ewiegai, akogere emage du are emagu inai, duwuge erore nono awadaru rekodaji. 7Icare oino ere boe pa are maku inaiboe jamedu boe apijie aregodure duji. 8Mare paga karega, ara maku inaiwu awadaru ire maku etai, ere tugeragu ji, ere boe pa boe jokoduie ure apijie itawujedure, emearutorure ai irojai duji. 9Nowuge etaire inogwamagudure ai. Inogwamagudukare moto paru tabo, mare cewu are maku inaiwuge eparu tabo inogwamagudure ai, akogere emage kodi. 1 Inore emaboe jamedu boe akore ema jamedu, akore emaboe jamedu boe inore ema. Eigoiare itagaru kuridodure. 1 Iragojemodukare moto keje pugeje, emagerema eragojemode moto keje. Imire itumode akae. Ioga pemegarewu, eedu otorogado akie tabo, cewu are maku inaiwu akie tabo, ewo mitogodu tu pureore. 1 Iragoje kimoi ebo dutabo, ieture ei cewu are maku inaiwu akie tabo. Ieture cewu are maku inaiwugei ia emage ewogwakare, mare tu cewu ure tuwarigu pegareboeto tu rugadu, uwo nono bapera atugo reore. 1 Mare oino itumode akae. Ire awu inogwamagudae towuje iragojei moto kejedu tonaji, duma iegareae jamedu boe metuwo ebo. 1 Ire awadaru maku etai, mare moto kodu kagirire ei, mare paga karega, moto kejewugekare emage kodi, imagai moto kejewukare imidu reore. 1 Inogwamagudukare ai awo etawuje moto piji, mare awo einorudo boe pegarewu piji. 1 Moto kejewugekare emaga imagai moto kejewukare imi jamedu. 1 Boe pemegarewugedo emage boe rikirewu tabo; awadarure boe rikirewu rema. 1 Amagai irojai moto kae du reorere imode erojai moto kae jamedu. 1 Imire ipemegado etai, duma ewo tubemegado boe rikirewu tabo jamedu. 2 Inogwamagudukare tu etai rugadu, mare inogwamagudure cewu mearutorumode ii ewadaru koiawuge etai jamedu. 2 Duma eiamedu boewo mito tu je. Ioga, amedu magai itada, imedu magai atada du reorere emeduwo padoda jamedu, du tabowo moto mearutorure aigoiaie are irojai duji. 2 Are irugu kurirewu maku inaidu, ire maku etai jamedu, duma ewo mitotu, pamagai mito tu je du reore. 2 Imi etada, aki itada, duma ewo turugadu tui mito tu je dutabo, duma moto mearutoruwo akie are irojai duji, amearudu kurie ei amearudu kuri magai ii du reore duji. 2 Ioga, itaidure cewu are maku inaiwuge eeduwo itabo iragojerewo keje, duma eeruduwo are maku inaiwu irugu kurirewu ji, mare paga karega, amearudu kurire ii moto towujedumodedu otodai. 2 Ioga pemegarewu, awu moto kejeboe eruduwakare ai, mare imi ioruduware ai, awuge jamedu eruduware akie are irojai duji. 2 Ire eruduwado akieji, imode eruduwado kimo pugeje, duma amearudu kurii iidu metuwo ebo, imuguwo etada jamedu. 

Boe ji tugeragu Jesus jitu. 1Nowu tuwadaru rekodaji, Jesus uture nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo ia paga kurirewu iere Cedron cedu okwa bakowu kae, ia okureboe pa jeturewo kae, du tore ure turemo ture joruduwadowuge ebo. 2Judas, cewu umode makuwu, joruduware nowu boe eedaji, Jesus utu kigodure toro nowu ture joruduwadowuge ebo kodi, 3Icare Judas ure tugeragu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare fariseudoge eno tarigaraidogei, ure eko pudabo, etaregodure nono joru tabo, baigadoge ebo. 4Icare Jesus tuioruduwai inoba boemode puduidu jamedu boe jitu du kodi ure tuwure taru etogi, icare unorare ei, akore ioguduba bogaiba taro oino? 5Egore: - Jesus Nazaré kejewu bogaire cero oino. Akore ei Imireo (Judas, ure makuwu, rakojere ebo jamedu). 6Akore: -Imireo, ino dukeje kuri je, ere tuwure taru tugujebiji, tuwudui moto keje dutabo. 7Icare unoragodure ei pugeje: - Ioguduba bogaiba taro oino? Egore Jesus Nazaré pijiwu bogaire cero oino 8Jesus akore ei pugeje Inagore imireo, oinore inagore tai. Kode iwogaire taro oino dukeje, awuge etudo. 9Nowu inodu tabo ure nono bataru reore cewu are maku inaiwuge ia ewogwakare ipiji. 1 Simão Pedro ia toriga rairewu mugure apo, du ure tawuje tuia piji, ure sacerdotedoge eimejera ia utugare okorido, tui okwacere kana pemegarewu jaogwaiwu bia kado dutabo (Nowu utugare iere Malco). 1 Mare Jesus akore Pedro ji Atoriga tugu tuiato! Ikudumodukare Iogare maku inaiwu jirireboece? 
Jesus rakojei baire eimejerage eegoraidu. 1 Kodi icare utorigaraidoge ere tugeragu Jesus ji, ere kogudo. 1 Ere reko boeto ji Anás ae, cewu Caifás uiedoga, duwure baire eimejera rema nowu joruji. 1 Cewu okituware judeudogei tagoi oino dutabo: - Ema remawure mitotu jewu biwo boe etai du rema. 1 Simão Pedro kodure Jesus apo ia ure joruduwadowu mitotu jedu apo. Nowu ure joruduwadowu ui mito tu jedu sacerdotedoge eimejera joruduware ji, dure ure turemo Jesus apo nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera uwai tadawu uwororo kae. 1 Pedro rema mugure baiporo keje baawadu jaogwai, mare cewu sacerdotedoge eimejera joruduware jiwu makore jeture baiporo jiwudoji, duwudo ure udo turemo. 1 Nowu jeture baiporo jiwudo unoragodure Pedro ji, akore Awu imedu ure joruduwadowuge ia karega ure aki? Akore Boro! Imi karega. 1 Nowu maragodure nonowuge, nowu jeture boeji nonowuge ere jorugo tuwo towarudo, biaku barikare kodi. Pedro rakojere ebo tui towarudo dutabo. 1 Nowu baire eimejera unoragodure Jesus ji nowu ure joruduwadowuge eiboeji, ure boe eruduwado jiboe ji jamedu. 2 Icare Jesus akore ji Imagore imago awadu tabo motoji, ire boe eruduwadodu maedo sinagoga tada, Pao uwai tada, cewu judeudoge ere tudo puiwo keje; podu karega imago imagore ei. 2 Kodiba anorare ii? Anorado cewu mearudure imagoi puduiwugei. Nowuge eruduware kaboba jiba ire tuioruduwado. 2 Awu bataru keje, ia jeture boeji nonowu, ure tugera to Jesus jeji, akore Kodiba akagoino awu baire eimejeraji? 2 Jesus akore ji Iwadaru pegare dukeje, iwadaru pegare jiboe kuo, mare imago pemeganure dukeje, kodiba are akera to ii? 2 Icare Anás ure edo reko toro baire eimejera Caifás ae, iera kogu tabo. 2 Simão Pedro mugure nono tui towarudo dutabo. Icare enoragodure ji: - Iarema aki cewu ure joruduwadowuge ia kana ure aki? Icare ure tuioruduwa bokwado ji, akore Boro! Imi karega! 2 Icare baire eimejera ia utugare, cewu Pedrore bia kadowu ia uwobe, akore ji Iordukare ai apo cewu okureboe pa tada? 2 Mare Pedrore tuioruduwa bokwado ji pugeje. Ca, kuri je kogoriga akogodure. 
Jesus rakojei Pilato jokoraidu. 2 Ere Jesus reko nowu Caifás uwai piji brae eimejera uwai kae, meri rutu tabo. Mare judeudoge ekare turemo nowu brae eimejera uwaito, turorogodu kawo, duma tuwo Páscoa kowuje. 2 Kodi icare Pilatos ure tuiebu etae, unoragodure ei: - Kakoduwu ia ro pegarewu koiaba tare awu imedu arego woe? 3 Egore ji Awu ro pegarewu umodukare ma, cemodukare maku akai. 3 Dukoiare icare Pilato akore Emareo, tagire tare tagogado ji nono taroia reore. Icare judeudoge egore Cegi, ukare turugadu cewo iaboe iaboe ewido. 3 Awu inodu tabore ure nono Jesus bataru reore tagoi inobadu taboba tuwimode duji. 3 Pilatore turemo tuwaito, makore Jesus bogai, unoragodure ji: - Akina judeudoge eimejerare aki? 3 Jesus akore Akaobijina akagoino, iarema iage kana egoino awiegai? Pilato akore 3 Kode, judeunure imi? Ako moto kejewu baire eimejerage ere amagu inai. Inoba arore? 3 Jesus akore Boe eimejerai imidu, awu moto kejeboe karega. Boe eimejerai imidu umode awu moto keje ma, boe jokodure itugarege emode tubewudo iwugeje imagudu kawo judeudoge etai. Mare boe eiemejerai imidu woeboe karega. 3 Kodi icare Pilato unoragodure ji: - Kode, akina boe eimejare aki? Jesus akore U! Imire boe eimejerare imi. Imagowo boe rikirewu ji du bogaire iwudure, itaregodure awu moto kae. Boe rikirewu mugure apowuge eiamedu boe emearudumode imagore jiboe ji. 3 Icare Pilato akore ji Kaboba boe rikirewu rema? Tagoi oino dutabo, ure tuiebu pugeje, uture judeudoge etae, akore ei Iordukare ia ro pegarewu boeji. 3 Mare taroiare Páscoa keje tare ido ia meture baicorewu tadawu ro pegarewu tawuje du rema. Kode tagaidure iwo judeudoge eimejera inorudo? 4 Dukeje icare eiamedu boe enoiogwarire pugeje, tagoi: - Boro! Awu karega, Mare Barrabás! (Barrabasre ia iwogu kigodurewu, boe ewidowu epa rema). 

Jesus bitodu rumode. 1Kodi icare Pilatore boe edo boe to Jesus biri kajeje. 2Utorigaraidogere ia boto jerigigarewu udo nono boe etaogajejewu reoredu ere tugu aoto, ere aroia kujagurewu tugu ji. 3Ere tuburedo ji, egore ji Akireo! Judeudoge eimejera! Oino tui tugera to to jeji dutabo. 4Icare Pilatore tuiebu pugeje, akore judeudogei Ica, imode arego woe baawadu kae tagai, duma taeruduwo iorudukai ia ro pegarewu boe jituji. 5Dukeje icare Jesus ure tuiebu boto jerigigarewu kogui taogajeje dutabo. Icare Pilato akore Cewu imedu reo. 6Icare baire eimejerage mare utorigaraidoge, tuiorudui jitu keje, enoiogwarigodure, egore Nowu bu i padui pugajejedu keje, nowu bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Icare Pilato akore ei Tagi tageragu ji, bu i padui pugajejedu keje, iorudukare ia ro pegarewu jitu kodi. 7Icare judeudoge egore ji Ia ceroiare dukoiare awu bitodu rumode, mare paga karega akore Aroe Eimejera Onaregeduie ure pudumi du kodi. 8Kodi icare nowu egoinodu ure Pilato pagudugo. 9Ure turemo pugeje nowu brae eimejera tumuga kae, unoragodure Jesus ji, akore ji Kaibawuba ure aki? Mare Jesus makokare ji. 1 Kodi icare Pilato akore ji Amagomodukare ii? Aeruduwakare ie irugadu iwo akinorudo iarema iwo aporu bu i padui pugajejedu keje? 1 Icare Jesus akore Aro rakarewu umodukare ii, makudukai akai baru piji dukeje. Kodire ure imagu akaiwu ro pega kodure aro pega kori. 1 Nowu otobijire icare Pilato jemarure tuwo inorudo. Mare judeudoge enoiogwarire tagoi oino dutabo: - Amode inorudo ma, kode brae eimejera kurirewu César metuia karega ure aki, mare paga karega, cewu ure boe eimejerado pudumiwu onanure Cesar ji. 1 Tumearudui nowu egoinodu jitu keje, Pilatore tuiebu Jesus apo, ure tumugudo brae eiemejera muga keje; nowu muga iere Pariri (hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo iere Gabata). 1 Nowu meri ji ere tugera pemegado boeji Páscoa kae. Meri jeture baru oiadoda. Icare Pilato akore judeudogei Ca, tagimejera reo! 1 Mare ere iogwarido, egore Toro apo! Toro apo! Bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Icare Pilato unorare ei: - Imode tagimejera bu i padui pugajejedu keje?
