Icare baire eiemejerage egore Ia cegimejerakare ia toro pugeje, mare César tu rugadu. 1 Dukeje icare Pilato ure maku etai, ewo bu i padui pugajedu keje rugadu. 
Ere Jesus bu i padui pugajejedu keje. 1 Dukeje icare ere Jesus reko pudabo. Ema taobijire ure i padui pugajejedu reko bakurirewu piji jice ia iere Calvário ceboe kae (Hebrewudoge ewadaru iere Gólgota, boe ewadaru tabo ure oino boe era jeta). 1 Nonore ere bu i padui pugajejedu keje. Iagere pobe apo ia okwacere kana pemegarewu jaogwai, ia okwacere kana koborewu jaogwai, Jesusre rakojere boiadoda. 1 Pilatore ia bapera atugo pemegado du ure bu aora bukajeje, nowu i padui pugajejedu keje, du akore oino Jesus Nazaré kejewu, Judeudoge Eimejera. 2 Makarewu judeudoge emagore nowu atugoji, paga karega, Jesus padure i padui pugajejedu keje puredu tu bakurirewu ji. 2 Icare judeudoge eno baire eimejerage egore Pilato ji Akaba atugodo Judeudoge Eimejera oino, mare Awu imedu akore judeudoge eimejeraie ure pudumi oino. 2 Mare Pilato akore ei Ire atugodoboe, atugododure. 2 Utorigaraidoge ere Jesus bu i padui pugajejedu keje, icare ere tugeragu ukudaeji ere kado pobe puibiji, megawo mito tu tu pudai. Mare nowu ukudae kujiagiwu maegodunure, kamidukare. 2 Dukodi icare egore pui Pamodukare bowuje, mare pamode pageragudu caido tabo, paeruduwo ioguduba onagodumode jiwu bogai. Awu inodu tabore ure nono bapera atugo reore ere ikudae pedo pui, ikudae kujiagiwure ere tugeragu caireboedo tabo. . Oinore utorigaraidoge erore. 

Jesus uce. 2 Puredu tu Jesus o i padui pugajeje duji, uce rakojere, uce uwie iei Maria cedu, cewu Cleofas oreduje, rakojere nono jamedu, Maria Madalena apo. 2 Icare Jesus, tuiorudui tuje jitu keje, cewu mearudu kurire jiwu ture joruduwadowu rakojei nono duji jamedu dukeje, akore tujeji Aredu, akonaregedu reo. 2 Dukejere akore nowu ture joruduwadowu ji Ica, Ace reo. Nowu inodu otobiji nowu ure joruduwadowu ure uce reko pudabo tuwai kae. 

Jesus biredu. 2 Icare Jesus, tuioruduwai boe jamedu boe ui turugadu dukeje, uwo nono bapera atugo jamedu reore, akore Pobo boire ii. 2 Ia ruwobo mugure nono, pobo pagodurewu tabo, icare utorigaraidogere boe otogugudu tugu nowu pobo pagodurewu to, ere boe otogugudu bu ia ipo oto keje, ere raido okwa kae. 3 Jesus tugudui nowu pobo pagodureuce dukeje akore Icare boe jamedu boere turugadu. Icare ure tuie jodo, icare akurure. 
Ia utorigarairewu ure Jesus mo porodo meriri otoboarewu tabo. 3 Judeudoge epagudure, eedumode nowu i padui pugajejedu keje Sábado meri jituji, paga karega, enure tugera pamegado petaji, du kodire cewu sabadore jiwu meri motu rakaguragamode. Kodi icare enogwamagudure Pilato ji, uwo edo epogora ra kado, ewo erodo oino nowu piji. 3 Utorigaraidoge etaregodure, ere cewuge ei pobedu epadure i keje apodu, ere epogora kado. 3 Mare etaregodui Jesus ae dukeje, eerudure bie marigudu duji, du kodire ekare pogora ra kado. 3 Mare ia utorigarairewu ure ia meriri otoboarewu bu jura otogajeje uwabo kae. Kuri je kure ceredo pobo tabo. 3 Jorudure awu inodu jiwu ureadodure awu inoduji tamearutoruwo. Ceruduware makoi boe riki jituji. 3 Awu inodu ure nono bapera atugo reore ia ra boe kadodumodukare. 3 Nowu bapera atugo akore ia toro jamedu boe etaiwomode cewu meriri otoboarewu padure kajejewu ji... 3 Nowu inodu rekodaji, José Arimatéia kejewu, ia Jesusre joruduwadowu, mare podu tabo tubagudu koia judeudogece, okwamagudure Pilato ji uwo boedo Jesus rawuje i padui pugajejedu piji. Icare Pilatore udo ino rugadu. Icare uture, ure Jesus rawuje i piji. 3 Nicodemo kodure apo (cewu makore Jesus ji boe co ji ia boe kejedu kodiwu). Ere ia roreboe jirirewu reko pudabo. 4 Ere tugeragu Jesus ji, ere nowu roreboe jirirewu tugu nowu aroiato dure ere upodo apo, nono judeudoge ero magai tui pu tugu moto to du reore. 4 Cewu Jesus birewo kejere ia okureboe pa mugure, nowu okureboe pa tada ia boe emedumodewo maiwu mugure, mare iaboe iaboe emedukare tada roga. 4 Dukodi icare ere Jesus tugu nono, paga karega, judeudoge enure tugera pemegado Páscoa jitu kodi, nowu meta mugu puredure nono jamedu kodi. 

Jesus meturewo biororedu. 1Kodure Sábado rekodaji boeto jiwu meri ji, Maria Madalena uture meturewo kae, kuri barogwa kododu tabo, boe guguco kimo tabo. Boekarema, jorudure tori kurirewu padukai meturewo je keje duji. 2Rekodure tuibagi, uture Simão Pedro ae, mare cewu Jesus mearudu kurire jiwu ure joruduwadowu ae, akore ei Ere Pagimejera tawuje tumedurewo piji, ceruduwakare kaiba ere bu. 3Kodi icare Pedro mare cewu ure joruduwadowu ere tudawuje, eture meturewo kae. 4Eregodure puapo, mare nowu ia ure joruduwadowu rekodure Pedro kori, aregodure boeto ji meturewo kae. 5Ure tuie jodo jice, jorudure aroiadogei moto keje, mare ukare turemo. 6Simão Pedro, kodure rekodajidu, aregodure, ure turemo nowu meturewoto, jorudure aroiadogei moto keje. 7Jorudure padure aora kejewu aroia kigadurewu ji, mare awu padukare nowu ia aroiadoge ebo: boere opodo tuginoi tu je. 8Dukodi icare cewu aregodure boeto jiwu ia ure joruduwadowu ure turemo jamedu nowu metato. Jorudure, icare mearutorure. 9Boe jokodure ekare bapera atugo akoi oinoie Jesus jewodumoduie birewuge epijidu pawuje roga. 1 Kodi icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere tugirimi tuwai kae. 
Jesus ui towadudo Maria Madalena jekaidu. 1 Nowu inodu boe tada, Maria rakojere baawadu keje, puredu tu nowu meturewoji toragudu tabo. Du tabore icare ure tuie jodo taiwowo meturewoto. 1 Du tabore icare jorudure tupadogei pobe duji: ekudae kigadure, emugure padurewo okwa keje, ia mugure ao keje, ia mugure bure keje. 1 Duwugere enoragodure ji: - Aredu, kodiba akoragudure? Akore ei Paga karega, boere ikimejera reko mare ioruduwakare kaiba ere bu. 1 Nowu tagoino dutabo ure tugirimi tuibagi, jorudure Jesus rakojei nono duji, mare joruduwakare ji. 1 Icare Jesus akore ji Aredu, kodiba akoragudure? Meardaere nowu jeture okureboe jiwu rakuduie ako oino, kodi dukeje akore ji Ikimejera, akimode are akeragu ji dukeje, iwie kaiba are bu, icare itumode bogai. 1 Icare Jesus akore ji Maria! Tui tugirimi bai jaogwai dutabo, ure tumago rakado, akore hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo, akore Rabboni! (Boe ewadaru tabo ure oino Ikimejera! Oino). 1 Jesus akore ji Akera jetu kaba ii, mare paga karega, irudukare Ioga ae roga, mare toro iwiemage etae, amagodo ei irudumode Ioga ae, Tao ae, ino Aroe Eimejera ae, tago Aroe Eimejera ae. 1 Icare Maria Madalena rekodure nowu ure joruduwadowuge etae tuwo ewie tuioruduie Pagimejera jituji. 

Jesus ui towadudo ture joruduwadowuge eegaidu. 1 Nowu meri rekodu tabo, duwure semana o meri boeto jiwu rema, nowu ure joruduwadowuge ere baiporo mi pudui tuieduwo nowu bai tada, tubagudu koia judeudogece. Du kaere icare Jesus aregodure, ure turagojedo tu etoiadoda, akore ei Boe butugurewu muguwo tagabo. 2 Tagoi oino dukeje, ure eerududo tugeraji, ure eerududo tawubowu ji. Icare nowu ure joruduwadowuge eegare kuricigore tuiorudui tugimejera jitu keje. 2 Icare akore ei Boe butugurewu muguwo tagabo. Ioga magai irojai du reorere, inure tarojai jamedu. 2 Icare ure togwamu ei, akore ei Aroe Pemegarewu makudure tagai. 2 Tamode ro pegarewuge ero pegarewu butugugo dukeje, butugugodaereboe umode ei. Tamodukare ero pegarewu butugugo ma, butugugodaereboe umodukare ei jamedu. 2 Ia ure joruduwadowu iere Tomé cedu, metukare etada nowu Jesus aregodu keje. 2 Icare nowu metage egore ji Ceerudure Pagimejera ji. Ure kirimi pai ei, akore Iordumodukare meriri oiaji ierato ma, imodukare ikerako tugu meriri oioato ma, imodukare ikera tugu mo awubouto ma, imearutorumodukare. 2 Meri ikera awubodure pobe ma awu metuia bokware taci ikera awubowuto du rekodaji, nowu ure joruduwadowuge eedure nowu tuieda mitodu keje pugeje, dutabore icare Tomé rakojere etada. Baiporo miture ei dutabore Jesus aregodure, ure turagojedo etoiadoda, akore ei Boe butugurewu muguwo tagabo. 2 Dukejere icare makore Tomé ji, akore ji Mato, akerako bu woe, akaiwodo ikeraji, akera raido awo tugu imo awubowuto. Amearutoru bokwa kaba, amearutorudo. 2 Icare Tomé akore ji Ikimejera, ino Aroe Eimejera. 2 Icare Jesus akore ji Amearutorure aerudure ii dukoia. Pemega remawugere emearutorumode tuiorudukai ii dutabo. 3 Jesus ure ia turo kurirewu makarewu towuje nowu ture joruduwadowuge eegai kimo, du padukare awu bapera keje. 3 Mare awuge epadure bapera keje, du koiawo tamearutorure Cristo Aroe Eimejera Onaregeduie Jesusce duji, duma jereboe jetuwo tagabo ie koia, tamearutorui ji dutabo. 

Jesus ui towadudo Tiberades kejewu kuruga kurirewu okwaidu. 1Nowu inodu rekodajire icare, Jesus ure towadudo pugeje, nowu ture joruduwadowuge eegai, puredu tu kuruga kurirewu iere Tiberades ceduji. Ure towadudo oino dutabo: 2Simão Pedro mare Tomé iere Dídimo cedu, mare Natanael, cewu Galiléia tadawu Caná kejewu, mare Zebedeu ore, mare ia ure joruduwadowuge ei pobedu, eedure tu puapo. 3Simão Pedro makore nowu tumedagei, akore Iwoguwo. Egore ji Cedumode akabo jamedu. Icare eture. Ere taredo ikato. Mare nowu boe co ji ekare tugeragu iaboeji iaboeji. 4Barogwa kododure tu je dutabore, Jesus rakojere nowu kuruga kurirewu okwai. Mare nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekare pawuje. 5Icare Jesus onoragodure ei: - Itore kugure, ia tage karo rogukare tu tagabo iwo kowuje? Egore. - Boro. 6Icare akore ei Tawuge barigu nowu tago ika ukana pemegarewu jaogwai, du taerudumode ji. Icare ere barigu. Dukejere icare ero rakakare tuwo tumugudo keje, kare emagaguragare tada kodi. 7Dukodi icare cewu Jesus mearudu kuricigore jiwu ia ure joruduwadowu makore Pedro ji, akore Cewu Pagimejera rabodu! Simão Pedro, tumearudui Pagimejera raboduie dukeje, ure tugudae kogudo tugajeje (Paga karega, biri kedore du je du kodi), ure taredo taci pobo to. 8Metage ekodure mato ika tabo, tui tumugudo buke keje kare ebo dutabo (mare paga karega, eedu jaekare motoji). 9Tui taredo ika piji dukeje, eerudure ia jorui turugadu duji, ia karo padui joradu keje duji, ia amirewu tabo duji. 1 Jesus akore ei Tare tageragu jiwu ia kare erego mato. 1 Icare Simão Pedro ruture ikato ure tumugudo mato buke keje, kare kurirewuge makarewuge ebo boeki kae. Nowu kare kurirewuge emagai inodu, buke ukare tubowuje ebo. 1 Icare Jesus akore ei Mato, tagogwagewo. Nowu ure joruduwadowuge ia emage ekidakare tunorawo ji: - Ioguduba akibao? Inodu bogai, mare paga karega, eruduware tugimejeraie ure ema kodi. 1 Icare Jesus ure tuburedo mato, ure tugeragu amirewu ji, ure maku etai. Du reorere ure cewu karo kodu ure maku etai jamedu. 1 Awure Jesus ui towadudo pobe ma jewu metuia bokware tuiewodu rekodaji nowu ture joruduwadowuge eegai du rema. 1 Nowu enogwage akedu kejere icare, Jesus unoragodure Simão Pedro ji, akore ji Simão, João onaregedu, amearudu kurire ii awuge ekori? Akore U! Ikimejera, aeruduware imearudu kuricigoi ai duji. Icare Jesus akore ji Aetudo inagu cordeirodogei. 1 Unoragodure ji pugeje, akore ji Simão, João onaregedu, amearudu kurire ii? Akore ji U! Ikimejera, aeruduware imearudu kuricigoi ai duji. Jesus akore ji Aetudo inagu cordeirodogei. 1 Unoragodure ji pugeje pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, akore Simão, João onaregedu, amearudu kurire ii? Icare Pedro kiarigodu buture keje tu je. Mare paga karega, unoragodure ji tagoi: - Amearudu kurire ii? Oino pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, dukoia. Icare akore ji Ikimejera, aeruduware boe jamedu ji, aeruduware imearudu kuricigoi ai duji. Icare Jesus akore ji Aetudo inagu ovelhadogei. 1 Boe jokodu jire inagomode oino ai: iparedu kimoi aki dutabo, are apeagajejewu bukigu kogudo akudae kajeje, ature akaidurewo boe kae. Mare akaregodumode kuridogedui aki du kae dukeje, amode akera raido, iaboe emode apeagajejewu kogudo, emode arego akaidukarewo kae. 1 Nowu tagoino dutabo, ure bie kakoduwu tuwi taboba umode Pao kurido duji. Tumagoi inodu jitu rekodaji, akore ji pugeje Akodudo itabo. 2 Pedro, tui tumegido pai tuibagi dutabo, jorudure cewu Jesusre joruduwadowu, cewu mearudu kurire jiwu ji (cewu ure taora bu mo keje, cewu enogwage boigoduwu du kodiwu keje, du unoragodure ji: - Ikimejera, ioguduba koiaba umode amagu? Oino jiwu ji). 2 Icare, tuiorudui jitu keje, Pedro unoragodure Jesus ji akore Ikimejera, awu, inoba boemode ji? 2 Jesus akore ji Itaidumode rakojewo jii ii ikirimi du kae ma, akaiboe karega. Aki akodudo itabo. 2 Kodi icare bakaru merekereure taodo nowu ure joruduwadowuge ekao, cewu ure joruduwadowu bimodukae. Mare Jesus akokare: - bimodukare, ino, mare: - Itaidumode rakojewo jii ii ikirimi du kae, akaiboe karega. Oino. 
Bapera ao. 2 Awu cewu ure joruduwadowu rema, dure readodure awu boe jamedu boeji, ure bu bapera keje jamedu. Paeruduware readodure jiboe boe jokoduie duji. 2 Jesus ure ia boe makarewu towuje kimo. Bapera atugododumode jamedu boeji ma, imeardaere awu moto jamedu boe umodukae turugadu bapera atugododumode tabodu jituji. 

Boe paru. 1Imeduia Teófilo, nowu boeto jiwu ino bapera keje, ire Jesus rore jiboe jamedu boe, ure boe eruduwado jiboe jamedu boe, bu, 2jii paru piji jii ruture baruto du kae, tui to apostolodoge eruduwado Aroe Pemegarewu koia dukeje. 3Ica, ure tuiwodo du rekodaji icare ure towadudo tuie tabo to apostolodoge eegai, tui eruduwadodu makaguragado dutabo. Merire ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du tonajire ure towadudo eegai, tumagoi Pao baru tadawu o boe pemegarewu ji ewiegai dutabo. 
Jesus rutui baru todu. 4Nowu boigoduwu togwagei ebodu keje, makore ei ekawo tuiaedo Jerusalém piji, mare epagawo nono jii Tuo makore jiboe ui tudowuje du kae, - du jire tamearudure iiabiji. Oinore akore. - 5Paga karega, João ure boe etaimo pobo tabo, tagirema, tagao pegododumode Aroe Pemegarewu tabo oino maigodu. 6Emagerema, tui tudo pui dutabore, enorare ji, egore Cegimejera, oino maigodu kana amode Israeldoge eeda pemegado pugeje? Akore ei 7Piji, ukare turugadu taeruduwawo Pao ure biado pudabo boeji. 8Mare ica, Aroe Pemegarewu umode turawuje tawugeje, umode tabewudo, dukoiare tamagomode iiboeji Jerusalém tada, Samaria o moto jamedu keje, jii moto okwa kae toro. 9Ako oinodu tonajire icare ruture baruto eegai, icare okware pi tuku eeku piji boetugu tada. 1 Etaiwore ji du tonajire icare ime ei pobedu, ekudae kigadure eidu, ere towadudo eegai, egore ei 1 Galiléia pijiwu ime, kodiba tagaiwore baruto tu oino tamugui? Ica, awu Jesus arudure tabiji barutowu, umode turawuje tuibagi pugeje, umagai taerudure rutui barutodu jitu du reore pugeje. 
1 Dukejere icare ere tugirimi Jerusalemto, cewu mugu puredure tu Jerusalemji boe aoporu iei Oliveira cedu piji, jae karega, ure nono Sábado jiwu awara tu je. 1 Ere turemo cewu togwagere Jesus apo tadawu baito, erudure toro bai cobojewuto, cewu emugu emugure tadawuto. Emagereo Pedro, João, Tiago, André, Filipe, Tomé, Bartolomeu, Mateus, Tiago (cewu Alfeu onaregedu), Simão (cewu Zelota), mare Judas (nowu Tiago onaregedu). 1 Emugure tuiamedu tabo tumagoi baruto dutabo; ia areme emugure ebo jamedu, duwuge etoiado Jesus uce Maria rema; Jesus uwiemage emugure ebo jamedu. 
Ere Matias tawuje muguwo Judas mugato. 1 Icá emugui nono dukeje, ia meri keje, Pedrore turagojedo tuwiemage etada, ere nono 1, icare akore ei 1 Iwiemage, umode turugadu uwo nono Aroe Pemegareure Davi makodo cewu uture ure tugeragu Jesus jiwuge etododaiwu iei Judas cedu jiboere. 1 Emare remagudure apostolodoge cedoda, maragodure cedabo jamedu. 1 Awu imedu ure moto aru turo pegarewu mori tabo. Dukejere icare buture togea tabo, icare ure tuwo toiagi, icare peguru kubiri jamedure tuwowuje jamedu. 1 Awu inodu akaru ure taodo Jerusalém kejewuge ewiegai, dukoiare cewu moto iere Acéldama, oino ewadaru tabo, du jire boe egore Boe Eku Pa, oino ji. Paga karega, judeudoge ekeroia epa bapera kejere atugododure oino uwai bioromode, boe emugumodukare tada. Ia pugeje atugododure oino pugeje ia tuginoiwu muguwo mugato. 2 Dukodi icare umode turugadu, mugure pagabo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo rakojei padodadu tonaji jii João o boe etao pegododu piji jii arudui pabiji jiwu meri kaewu ime, 2 ia etada mitotu jewu readoduwo cedabo Jesus jewodui tuwi piji duji. 2 Icare ere etawuje pobe, duwugere José iei Barsabá cedu, iei Jetororewu cedu, mare Matias remage. 2 Icare emagore Pao ji eparu tabo, egore Pao Aroe Eimejera, akire aeruduware boe ewabo jamedu ji, kode, ceruduwado awuge ei pobedu kakoduwu bogaiba amagore, 2 muguwo Judas mugato awu cemaragodae keje, paga karega, cewure ure tuwarigu tuduwo ia tuieda kae. 2 Icare ere tuiwa aidugirireboe barigu, dukoiare ere tugeragu Matias ji duwure icare metagere apostolodogece. 

Aroe Pemegarewu aregodu. 1Judeudoge ia eno peta iei Pentecoste cedu o meri ji, nowu Jesusre joruduwadowuge emugure tuiamedu tabo nowu bai mitodu tada. 2Dukejere icare ia biaruru aregodure pi tuku, umagai ia bakuru rakarewu aregodu reore, duwure nowu emugure tadawu bai korobadudo tu. 3Dukeje icare ia ure nono boe ekeru reoreboe jorugu ure tumaedo eiogi tu tu ewugeje. 4Icare Aroe Pemegarewu ure turemo eto, ure ewabo, etaora korawu pudabo. Dukodi icare emagore ia boe tuginoiwuge ewadaru ji, emagore nono Aroe Pemegareui emago emago du reore. 5Nowu du kodi, aidure tumagowo Pao jiwu ia judeudoge makarewuge, duwugere etaregodure ia moto tuginoiwuge eiamedu boe piji, eedure Jerusalém bakurirewu tada. 6Icare tumearudui nowu biaruru jitu kejere icare, ia boe makarewuge ere tudo pui nono, eebogodure ei, paga karega, eiamedu biapagare emagoi tuwadaru tabo duji. 7Ere tumearudu awadudo pudui, eeku kidugodure, egore Galiléia kejewuge karega egoino? 8Kode, kodiba paiamedu tabore pamearudure egoi pawadaru tabo duji? 9Parto pijiwuge, Média pijiwuge, Elam pijiwuge, Mesopotâmia pijiwuge, Capadócia, Ponto, Asia pijiwuge, 1 Frígia pijiwuge, Egito pijiwuge, Líbia mugui puredu tu Cirene ji o moto pijiwuge, Roma pijiwu awararewuge, 1 Judeudoge, judeudoge ere joruduwadowuge, Creta pijiwuge, Arábia pijiwuge, paiamedu tabore pamearudure ereadodui pawadaru tabo Pao o boe pemegarewu kurirewu jituji. 1 Dukodi icare eiamedu matadure, eruduwakare inoba tumeardaemode duji, enora enorare pui: - Kabobao? 1 Iagerema egore Eiamedu etaora bai baire parera kuru kori koia. Ino tumago pegai ei dutabo. 
Pedro uwadodae. 1 Dukeje icare Pedrore turagojedo tumedage ebo, icare makore tumago raka tabo, akore Judéia kejewu ime, Jerusalém tadawu taiamedu boe, tawiapagado iwadaru ji, taeruduwado. 1 Tameardaere awuge etaora bai baie, mare etaora bai bai karega ure. Tagado, meri rekare boe kao roga. 1 Mare profeta Joel makore jiboere tudowuje oino. 1 Pao koiare ure nowu profeta akodo oino ica, meri boiwu kejere imode Itaroe Pemegarewu maedo boe eiamedu joki. Tagore ime, tagore areme emagomode iwadaru ji. Tagore ipare eerudumode Aroei, taopegamage enuiaomode jamedu. 1 Nowu meri ji imode Itaroe Pemegarewu maedo itugare ime eiogi, du kodi icare emagomode iwadaru ji. 1 Imode iro rakarewu udo tuguo coboje baru tada, imode iro rakarewu udo tuguo cebegi moto keje. Boe eku umode tumaedo, joru umode tumaedo, jeredudu umode tumaedo. 2 Meri joku okwamode, ari umode nono boe eku reore, cewu Pao o meri kuricigorewu aregodumodedu otodai. 2 Dukeje icare makomode Pao bogaiwu jamedu boe umode cinorudo, umode tubemegado. - 2 Tawiapagado mato iwadaru ji, Israeldoge nowu Jesus Nazaré kejewu, Pao jore keje taegai turo rakarewu tabo, tui udo turo rakarewu towuje tagoiadoda dutabo. Tagire taeruduware ro oino duji. 2 Emare makududodure uwo nono Pao aidure, joruduware. Dukejere tare bito, tare ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu ime edo bu i padui pugajejedu keje. 2 Mare Paore jewodudo, ure boe ekera kogure tabowu boe ewi kado, paga karega, boe ewi jetumodukare jii pudabo kodi. 2 Ica, profeta Davi makore jiboe reo iorudure Aroe Eimejera ji jii je itododai, paga karega, rakojere ikana pemegarewu jaogwai, imegikawo jice woje, jice woje. 2 Dukoiare iwabo jekarere, ikerure tojarodo pudui, ikodu umode tamudo, tubaga tabo boe pemegarewu bogai dutabo. 2 Paga karega, amodukare akera ra ipiji birewuge eeda keje, amodukare akonaregedu kodu kodu pegado. 2 Are jereboe kaewu awara ioruduwado ji, amode iegaredo du kuricigodo, imugui aegai dutabo (Sl 1, -). 2 Iwiemage, imode awadudo tawiegai paedoga Davi bire, tugudure moto to, jaore mugure padoda jii awu meri kae. 3 Mare profetanure ema, du kodire joruduware Pao akoe pudui ia tuwagedu mugumode tumuga keje duji. 3 Tuioruduwai oinoie boemode du kodire Cristo jewodumode duji, akore pijidodukare birewuge eeda keje, kodu pegadodukare. 3 Paore awu Jesus jewodudo, awu inodu jire ceruduware, cereadodure. 3 Paore akaru kurido turo rakarewu tabo, ure Aroe Pemegarewu makai, du ure udo tumaedo boe eiogi. Oinodu jire taerudure, tamearudure oino. 3 Paga karega, Davi mitodu rutukare baruto, mare du inodu tabore akore Pagimejera akore Pagimejera ji amugudo ikana pemegarewu jaogwai, 3 Jii imode onare aiwuge ewu awure kuda du kae. 3 Dukodi icare Israeldoge taiamedu, taeruduwa remawudo, awu Jesus tare bu i padui pugajejedu kejewu ema, jire Paore boe eimejerado, ure Cristodo ema duji. 
Meartorure boeto jiwuge. 3 Tumearudui oinodu jitu keje, ekiarigodure tuwabo tada, enoragodure Pedro ji mare ia apostolodogei, egore Cemanamage, kode, inoba ceromode? 3 Icare Pedro akore ei Tamearutorudo, tae jodo taro pegarewu piji, tai mito tu tu jedu tagao pegodo Jesus Cristo ie tabo ma, taro pegarewu okwawo, dukejere Aroe Pemegarewu makudumode tagai. 3 Paga karega, Pao akore tumoduie maku boe etaiboe pemegarewu makudumode tagai, tagore etai, mearudure Pao makore jiboe jiwuge etai jamedu. 4 Pedro mako kuricigore iaboeji kimo, okituwai ei oino dutabo: - Taginorudo awu boe pegarewuge epiji. 4 Icare mearutorure bataru jiwuge etao pegododure. Dukodi icare, mearutorurewuge ere 3. 0 bega bega tu je nowu meri ji. 
Meartorure boeto jiwuge ero pemegarewu. 4 Ere tumearutorudo apostolodoge ere boe eruduwado jiboe ji, tumearudu kurii pui dutabo, togwagei baru tadawu boe eke pemegarewu jitu tabo, tumagoi Pao jitu tabo. 4 Epagudu kuricigore, mare paga karega, apostolodoge ere turo kurirewu awadudo nowu Jerusalém tada, dukoiare eiamedu boe epagudu rakaguragare. 4 Meartorurewuge eiamedu boe eiore puwugeje, enoroere toroece puapo. 4 Ere to moto, toroe jamedu, ere maku, ere pedu puiamedu ai tu tu je. 4 Emearudu kurire pui, etu eture Pao uwaito meri jamedu ji. Ere amirewu kado oiado tuwai tada, enogwagere ji tuiegare tabo, tuwabo jetororewu tabo. 4 Ere Pao ocaro ocarodo. Ere boe eiamedu aidu aidudo pudui. Paore iage eto eto pui etae, duwugere etaidure tuwo tubemegado. 

Ia imedu pogora pegarewu pemegagodure. 1Pedro mare João erudunure Pao uwai kae togwamaguduwo ji meri jogodu tabo. 2Du tabore icare boere ia pogora pegare jii tuwodu tabowu imedu reko mato, dure ere mugu mugudo Pao uwaiporo iere moturewu cedu paru, meri jamedu ji. 3Icare nowu imedu, tuiorudui Pedro ji, João ji, ei turemo Pao uwaito dukeje, makore ei eno mea bogai. 4Icare Pedrore tuioku kidudo ji, João jamedu ure tuioku kidudo ji, icare Pedro akore ji Akaiwodo cei. 5Aiwore ei tu je, tubaga tabo ia eno mea bogai. 6Boekarema, Padro akore ji Ino meriri bokwa, mare imode mugure itaboboe maku akai. Nazaré pijiwu Jesus Cristo ie tabo, aragojedo, amerudo! 7Icare ure tugera kogudo iera kajeje, dutabore ure rakojedo. Dukeje kuri je, bure, bureraparure turagoje rakado, ure taredo coboje, icare merure. 8Ure turemo Pao uwaito, tumerui, turerui, tui Pao ocarodo dutabo. 9Eiamedu boe jorudure meruji, jorudure ui Pao ocarodo duji. 1 Eeruduware nowu mugu mugure Pao uwai poro moturewu paru tumagoi boe eno mea bogaiwu mitodu raboduie ure duji. Dukodi icare epagudu kuricigore nowu ure tudowuje jiboe kodi. 1 Nowu imedu mugu puredure Pedro, João magei, du kodire jordu paga pagawu ia boe makarewuge ere tudo pui etae, nowu baiporo kurirewu iei Salomão cedu kae. 1 Dukodi icare Pedro makore boe ji, akore Israeldoge ime, kodiba taebogodure oino? Kodiba taeku kidu barikare cei, uwo nono ceigoiaie cere awu imedu merudo du kodiwore? 1 Abraão o Aroe Eimejera, Isaac o Aroe Eimejera, Jacó o Aroe Eimejera, paedogamage eno Aroe Eimejera ure tonaregedu Jesus kurido, dure tare maku, dure tare pijido brae eimejera Pilato jekai, aidure tuwo inorudo, kodi karega. 1 Tagirema, tare imedu pemegarewu pijido, tamagoi ia imeceba remawu imedu bogai dutabo. 1 Tare ure boe eiamedu boe botudowu bito, du Paore jewodudo birewuge epiji pugeje, awu inodu jire ceruduware, jire cereadodure. 1 Cemearutorure ie jitu dukoiare, ie mitodu koiare ure awu taerudure jiwu, taeruduware jiwu imedudo turagojedo. Meartorure Jesus jitu dukoiare ure tubemega remawudo taiamedu jekai. 1 Oinore icare, imanamage, iwiemage, ioruduware, taeruduwakare du koiaie tarore oino, tagimejeragere oinono jamedu. 1 Mare oinodu tabore Paore, makore profetadoge eiabiji turomode jiboe towuje tonaregedu Cristo umoduie tuiwodo. 1 Dukodi icare tagiarigo taro pegarewu ji, tameardae pemegado ma, taro pegarewu okwawo. 2 Du inodu tabore boe pemegarewu, boe butugurewu umode tuburedo tai, Pao koia, icare umode makudumode tagaiwu Jesus Cristo rojai tagae. 2 Mare umode turugadu muguwo baru tada jii, moto, baru jamedu boe umode tubemegado du kae, uwo nono Pao makore profetadoge eiabiji, awu moto paru piji. 2 Boekare, Moisés makore marigudu, akore Pao Aroe Eimejera umode ia profeta ure nono ireorewu kuo tamanamage etoiabiji, dure tamearudumode bataru jamedu ji. 2 Biapagamodukare awu profeta bataru jiuge eiamedu boe ewogwamode pi tuku boe epiji. 2 Profetadoge eiamedu boe ereadodure nowu inoduji jii Samuel piji jii awu meri kae. 2 Profetadoge etorere tagi. Paore tuwadaru maku taomage etai, tagai jamedu, cewu makore Abraão jitu awagedu koiare umode awu moto kejewu boe eiamedu boe eiwa aidugirido ma, taiameduwo taiaedo taro pegarewu piji. 2 Paore, tui Tonaregedu jewodudo dukeje, ure arego tagae boeto ji, uwo taiwo aidugirido ma, taiamedu boewo taiaedo taro pegarewu piji. 

Boere Pedro, João mage etugu baicorewu to. 1Apostolodoge emagoi boe ji du tonajire icare, sacerdotedoge mare saduceudoge, mare Pao uwai tadawuge eimejera etaregodure. 2Ekorigodure ei, enure boe eruduwado kodi, emagore boe eewodumode Jesus ie tabodu jitu kodi. 3Icare ere tugeragu ei, ere tugu baicorewu to jii barogwa kododu kae, boe copuredugodunure kodi. 4Mare mearudure ewadaru jiwu ia makarewuge emearutorure ei, du kodi icare mearutorurewuge ere 5. 0 bega bega tu je. 5Barogwa tore icare, nowu boe eimejerage, nowu codudoge, nowu bapera epage, ere tudo pui nowu Jerusalém bakurirewu tada. 6Ere tudo pui nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera iei Anás cedu apo, Caifás, João, Alexandre mare sacerdotedoge eiamedu apo. 7Ere apostolodoge eragojedo toiadoda, enoragodure ei, agore Ioguduba ie taboba torore oinono? 8Icare Pedro, Aroe Pemegarewu metui tudada dutabore akore Boe eimejerage, paopegamage, tawiapagado mato iwadaru ji: 9Awu ji tanoranure cei awu kogodurewu bogai, ioguduba ie taboba pemegagodure du bogai. 1 Icá, taiamedu boe, mare Israeldoge eiamedu, taeruduwado Jesus Cristo Nazaré pijiwu, cewu tare bu i padui pugajejedu kejewu, mare Paore jewodudo birewuge epijiwu, ie mitodu tabore awu imedu pemegagodure, rakojere taegai. 1 Tagire tare awu Jesus pijido ui nono ia ipo paga pagawu, mare ure turagojedo ure nono bai ipo remawu. 1 Iaboe iaboe koia karega boe emode tuginorudo, boe emode tubemegado, paga karega, awu baru kuda iaboe iaboe ekie makudukare ime etai du koiawo pabemegagodure, mare ie mitodu tabore umode pabemegado. 1 Tuiorudui Pedro, João mage ekidagoduji dukoiare icare eebogodure, paga karega, eruduware joruduwakare bapera jiwugeie emageduji. Eeruduware Jesus metageie emageduji. 1 Mare eerudui nowu imedu pemegadodurewu mugui ebodu jitu koiare, egoiwakare tumagowo ei. 1 Ere apostolodoge edo tudawuje nowu emugure tadawu bai piji, dukejere icare emagore pui. 1 Egore Inoba paromode awu imei? Paga karega, ero kurirewu akaru ure taodo Jerusalém tadawuge eiamedu joki, du kodire paroiwakare paeruduwa bokwado ero oino duji. 1 Mare awu akaru ukawo taododu kuricigodo pugeje boe ekao, pamode epagududo emago kawo awu ie tabo iaboe ji iaboe ji awu otobiji pugeje. 1 Icare emagore ewogai, egore ei emago kawo, ekawo boe eruduwado awu Jesus ieji pugeje. 1 Icare Pedro mare João egore ewadaru jipagi Tamagodo ji ka kakoduwuba pemegamode Pao jekai: cemearutoruwo tawadaru ji, iarema cemearutoruwo Pao bataru ji? 2 Ceroiwakare cemago kawo ceerudure jiboe ji, cemearudure jiboe ji. 2 Dukejere icare enogituware ei pugeje, icare ere tugera ra epiji, erorerumode eidu kodiboe bokware kodi, epagudugodure boece jamedu, paga karega, boe eiamedu boe ere Pao akaru pemegado nowu ure tudowuje du kodi. 2 Paga karega, cewu pemegadodurewu imedu o jorure kodure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogiduredu kori. 
Meartorurewuge ere Pao kurido tuiorudui apostolodegei pugeje dukoia. 2 Nowu apostolodoge ere tudawuje nowu piji, dukeje ere tugirimi tumanamage etae, ereadodure ewiegai cewu sacerdotedoge, boe codudoge, egore puduiboe jamedu boeji. 2 Tumearudui awu inodu jitu kejere icare, eiamedu boe ere tumago rakado Pao ji, egore Cegimejera, akire are awu baru to, are awu moto to, are mugure baru tadaboe, mugure moto kejeboe jamedu to. 2 Akire Akaroe Pemegarewu koiare akagore cewu Davi okwabiji kodiba padure pumekejewu boe ekodu kagirire pui? Kodiba boe emeardaere paga tu je, kodiba? 2 Awu moto kejewu boe eimejerage ere turagojedo, ere tudo pui tumago pegawo Pao ji, tumago pegawo o Cristo ji. 2 Paga karega, ica, Herodes, Pôncio Pilato, padure pumekejewu brae eiamedu boe mare Israeldoge ere tudo pui awu bakurirewu tada, etonare atugare pemegarewu Jesus ji, dure are boe eimejerado ema. 2 Mare du tabowo erore nono akaidure marigudu uwo tudowuje. 2 Dukodi icare, Cegimejera, akaiwodo ewadaru pegarewu ji, dukejere atugaregedo awadaru arego boe etae tubagudu bokwa tabo rugadu. 3 Akera raido boe ewugeje ma, boe ekogodae akeduwo, aro kurirewu, aro rakarewu awadudo, atugare pemegarewu Jesus ie tabo. 3 Awu enogwa kurirewu akedu keje kuri je, nowu ere tudo pui kejewu moto amagadure, eiamedure okorobadure Aroe Pemegarewu tabo, icare ereadodure Pao bataru ji boe ewiegai, tubagudu bokwa tabo. 3 Meartorurewuge eiamedu ure nono ia boe ewabo ui mito tu je du reore. Iaboe iaboe emagokare toroeie toroece, mare eiamedu boe boe eiamedu oroere. 3 Apostolodoge eragare, ekidare dutabore ereadodure Pagimejera Jesus jewoduji. Pao o boe pemegarewu awadure eiameduji. 3 Iaboe iaboe marenarukare emage, paga karega, o motorewuge eiamedu boe, uwairewuge eiamedu boe, ere maku, 3 ere mori arego mato, ere bu apostolodoge ewure paru, du pedodure eiamedu ai tu tu tuboi du reore. 3 Du reorere ia imedu iei José cedu (du apostolodogere iedo Barnabé, boe ewadaru tabo boe Eegareae epa), ia maragodure Pao uwai tadawu, Cipre moto pijiwu, o motore. 3 Icare ure maku, ure mori reko mato, ure bu apostolodoge ewure paru jamedu. 

Ananias mare Safira ero pegarewu. 1Ia imedu iei Ananias cedu, ure ia to moto maku, ure toreduje bie. 2Dukejere icare ure mori kado oiado, ia kobo mugure pudabo, toreduje aidui ji jamedu dutabo, ure ia kobo reko apostolodoge ewure paru kae. 3Mare Pedro akore ji Ananias, kodiba Aroe pegareure tuienado awaboji, dutabore awadararodure Aroe Pemegarewu ji? Dukodi icare awadararodure ako moto moriji. 4Umodukana turugadu amuguwo tabo, akai maku dukeje, iarema ai maku dukeje aroiwamodukare amuguwo mori tabo akaidui jitu keje? Kodiba ameardaere oinono awabo tada tu je? Ime ei karega, Pao jire awadararodure. 5Tumearudui nowu bataru jitu keje kuri je, cewu Ananias buture tuwi tabo tu je. Mearudure awu inodu akaru jiwuge eiamedu boe epegudugodu kuricigore. 6Dukejere icare ia ipare ere birewu reko nowu piji toro baawadu kae, ere tugu moto to. 7Boe raikare dukeje, oredujere turemo jamedu, tuioruduwa bokwa tabo ure tudowuje duji. 8Icare Pedro unoragodure ji akore Aredu, amagodo iwiegai: tare tago moto maku awu inodu mori bogai? Akore U! Nowu inodu bogaire cere maku. 9Icare Pedro akore ji kodiba tare tawadaru maku puai tawo tarokogado Aroe Pemegarewu ji? Ica, ure akoredu tugu moto towuge ewure mugure jice baiporo keje, emode arego jamedu. 1 Kuri je nowu aredu buture bure paru, icare bire tu je. Dukejere icare cewu ipare ere turemo, eerudure bireduji, ere reko toro baawadu kae, ere tugu moto to tu oino toredu meki, 1 Nowu boe eiamedu boe epagudu kuricigore; mearudure akaru jiwuge epagudu kuricigore jamedu. 
Apostolodoge ero kurirewu. 1 Du tabore icare apostolodoge ere turo kurirewu makaguragado boe etoiadoda, ere tudo tudo pui cewu baiporo kurirewu iei Salomão cedu keje. 1 Iage epagudure tuwo tuburedo ei, boerema emago pemegaguragare ei. 1 Meartorure Pagimejera jiwu ime areme emagagodure gu gu gu je. 1 Du tabore icare ere kogodurewuge etarego awara kae, ere emugudo kugadoge etada, Pedro o boetugu butuwo iage etae, kodui nono dukeje. 1 Mugu puredure Jerusalém jiwu bakurirewuge epijiwu ia boe makarewuge etaregodure jamedu, ere kogodurewuge erego mato, ere Aroe pegarewuge emedure tadawu boe erego mato, icare epemegagodure. 
Braere apostolodoge etugu baicorewu to pugeje. 1 Dukejere icare sacerdotedoge eimejera mare okwacere jaogwaiwuge (duwugere saduceudogere emage), ere turagojedo tugori kuricigorewu tabo. 1 Ere tugeragu apostolodogei, ere etugu baicorewu to. 1 Boekimorema, Pao ia o tupa ure nowu baiporo jado boe cooia keje, ure eebu baawadu kae, akore ei Toro Pao uwai kae, tareadodudo boe etae bataru pemegarewu ji. 2 Tumearudui nowu bataru jitu tabore icare, ere turemo Pao uwaito, icare ere boe eruduwado. Du tonajire icere nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera mare okwacere tuiaogwaiwuge ere tudo pui, dukejere ere brae eiemejera kurirewuge, mare codudoge eto pui, dukejere emagore apostolodoge ewogai, etuwo mato nowu baicorewu piji. 2 Icare nowu tugobaigarege eture toro. Boekarema, tui nowu baicorewu baiporo jado dutabore icare eerudukare ei, icare ere tugirimi tuibagi akaru tabo. 2 Egore Ceerudure baicorewu mitu pemegaji, tugobaigarege eedure baiporo keje, icare cere baiporo jado, mare ceerudukare boeji nowu bai tada. 2 Nowu akaru kejere icare, nowu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare Pao uwai tadawuge eimejerage tori buture eiagi dugu dugu, enorare pui kaboba kodiba? 2 Boekarema, iage etaregodure akaru tabo, egore Cewu tare tugu baicorewu towu ime eedunure toro Pao uwai tada, tui boe eruduwado dutabo. 2 Dukejere icare nowu Pao uwai kejewu tugobaigarege eimejera uture tudugarege ebo toro etae, ure erego mato, mare butugu tabo, epagudure boe emode tori to pudui dukoia. 2 Ere erego mato, ere eremo toro brae eimejerage kurirewuge ere tudo puiwo kae. Dukejere sacerdotedoge eimejera unoragodure ei, akore 2 Cemago awadure tai takawo boe eruduwado cewu ie tabo. Dukodi karega, tare Jerusalém korawu tare boe eruduwado jiboe tabo. Tagaidure tawo awu imedu ku butudo ceiogi? 2 Icare Pedro mare ia apostolodoge egore bataru jipagi Ure turugadu cemearutoruwo Pao ji ime ekori. 3 Ica, paomage eno Aroe Eimejera ure cewu tare bito tai bu i padui pugajejedu kejewu Jesus jewodudo. 3 Tugera pemegarewu tabore Pao ure rakojedo, ure boe eimejerado ema, ure boe einorudowudo ema, tuwo Israeldoge epemegado, tuwo ero pegarewu okwado. 3 Awu inodu jire ceerudure, jire cereadodure, cewu Paore maku mearutorure jiwuge eiamedu boe etaiwu Aroe Pemegarewu koia. 3 Icare tumearudui nowu ewadaru jitu kejere icare nowu brae eiemejerage boe korire pudui, etaidure tuwo nowu apostolodoge ewido. 
Gamaliel mearudae. 3 Boekimorema, ia nowu brae eimejerage ui mito tu jedu, ia fariseu iei Gamaliel cedu, joruduwa rakarewu, boe eiamedu mearutorure jiwu, ure turagojedo. 3 Makore boewo apostolodoge etawuje nowu piji biega tu je, dukejere akore tumedage ewiegai, akore Israeldoge ime, tameardae tugu, tameardae pemegado taromode awu ime eiwoji. 3 Tawiapagado: marigudu ia imedu iei Teuda cedu ure tuguwo tui tudo nono ia imedu kurirewu ureore dutabo. Ia ime ei puredu tu 4 0 cedu ere tudo pui ae. Mare bitodure, dukejere icare mearutorure jiwuge eiamedu boe ere taodo, icare etagedure. 3 Awu rekodajire icare, Judas Galiléia pijiwu, ure turagojedo pugeje boere cie bu bapera kejedu kodiboe keje, ure tumugudo boe eiamedu boe keje toro pudabo, mare ema jamedu bire, du kodi icare uture rekodajiwuge eiamedu boe ere taodo boe paru kajeje, etagedure jamedu. 3 Oinore icare imode taeruduwado taro pega kawo awu imei. Nowu ime epiji, etudo. Paga karega, etaidure jiboe, erore jiboe aregodure ime epiji ma, okwamode taobiji. 3 Mare aregodumode Pao piji ma, taroiwamodukare tawo okwado. Tamode tagonado Pao mitoduji. Icare emearutorure bataru ji. 4 Emagore apostolodoge ewogai, ere boe edo iwara to ei. Dukejere icare emagore ei ekawo boe eruduwado Jesus ie tabo pugeje, icare ere tugera ra epiji, ere etudo. 4 Icare apostolodoge ere tudawuje nowu brae eimejerage ere tudo puiwo piji tuiegare tabo, mare ure turugadu brae eroreruwo pudui Jesus ie koiadu kodi. 4 Meri jamedu ji jii je ere boe eruduwa eruduwado Pao uwai tada, boe ewai tada jamedu. 
Diaconodoge. 1Nowu du kodi mearutorurewuge eidodu kuricigore, du kodire nowu Grécia o moto pijiwu ime emago pegagodure hebrewudogei, paga karega, to okoge bokwarewu areme eredugodure, nowu ei toroe pedo pudui dukeje tu tu tu je. 2Dukodire icare nowu apostolodoge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ere mearutorurewuge eto pui, egore ei Ukare turugadu cewo boe enoroe remagu, cei Pao bataru pijido dutabo. 3Dukodi icare, iwiemage, tamode ia ime pemegarewuge, joruduwarewuge, Aroe Pemegarewu jore kejewuge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu, tamode etawuje tabiji, duwugere cemode awu maragodae maku etai. 4Cegirema, cenogwamagudumode Pao ji cereadodumode Pao bataru ji. 5Dukodi, ere tawujewuge reo estêvão, ia mearutoru kurirewu imedu, Aroe Pemegarewu jore kejewu; Filipe, Prócoro, Nicanor, Timon, Parmena, mare ia mearutorurewu Antioquia pijiwu iei Nicolau cedu. 6Ere awuge erego apostolodoge etae, duwugere, togwamagudui Pao ji eparu tabodu tabore icare ere tugera bu ewugeje. 7Icare Pao bataru ure taododu kuricigodo, mearutorure Pao bataru jiwuge emagagodu remawunure nowu Jerusalém tada, nowu judeudoge eno sacerdotedoge makaguragarewuge emearutorure jamedu. 
Diácono Estêvão. 8Cewu Estêvão, Pao o boe pemegarewu, ro rakarewu jore kejewu imedu, ure turo kurirewu towuje towuje boe etoiadoda. 9Boekimorema, ia boe keje, ia sinagoga tadawuge, duwuge ekiere libertodoge ia Cirene pijiwuge, Alexandria pijiwuge; Cilícia, Asia pijiwuge eno sinagoga tadawu ia emage ere turagojedo tumago pegawo Estevao ji. 1 Mare egoiwakare ji, joruduwa rakareure ema kodi, Aroe Pemegarewu jore keje kodi. 1 Dukodi icare ere ia ime ero pegado emagowo tumearuduie mako pegai Moisés jituji, Pao jituji. 1 Icare ere boe eiamedu boe, codudoge, escribadoge, eiodo tuwadaru keje Estevao ji. Icare ere tugeragu ji, ere reko toro brae eimejerage etae. 1 Icare ere nowu batararodurewu ime erego mato, duwuge egore Awu imedu mako pega pegare Pao uwai ji, Moisésre boe eroiaguduji jamedu. 1 Cemearudure makoi oinoduji Jesus Nazaré pijiwu umoduie awu Pao uwai butudo, umoduie Moisere cerodo boe barigu puibagi. 1 Dukejere icare nowu brae eiemejerage eiamedu boe ere tuioku kidudo ji, etaiwore ji. Boekarema, je urugure nono ia Pao o tupare. 

Estêvão uwadodae. 1Icare sacerdotedoge eimejera unoragodure ji, akore Oino rugaduna? 2Akore ei: -Iwiemage, imanamage, iogamage, tawiapagado mato. Pao Aroe Eimejera ure towadudo paedoga Abraão jekai, mugure Mesopotâmia kimo dutabo, kodumode tumuguwo Hara keje duotodai. 3Akore ji atawuje ako moto piji, awobe epiji, atudo toro imode aerududo jiwu moto kae. 4Icare ure tudawuje Caldéia moto piji, uture toro Hara moto kae, dupijire, uo okware dukeje, Pao Aroe Eimejera ure aru awu tumugure kejewu moto kae. 5Ukare ia moto makai o motoce rugadu, mare akore tumoduie makai, dukejere tumeduie maku ore etai, orekare roga dutabo. 6Pao akore ji mugumoduie ia moto tuginoiwu keje, toroie ia brae emode tudugaregedo emage, erorerumode ei, jorumode ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du tonaji. 7Mare Pao akore oino jamedu Irorerumode rorerure eiwugei, dukejere etaregodumode nowu piji tumaragoduwo inai awu moto keje. 8Icare Paore tumeduiado Abraãoce, du kodire Abraão ure tuwiri kado, du kodire ure Isaac botudo, dukejere, merire ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto dukeje ure Isaac biri kado jamedu. Isaac ure tonaregedu Jacó biri kado jamedu, duwure tore ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ewiri kado jamedu, duwugere paedogamagere emage. 9Icare nowu Jacó ore ekorire tuwie José ji, du ere maku Egito kejewuge ekera kae. Mare Pao mugure apo. 1 Ure inorudo ucebae jamedu boe piji, ure jiwo aidugirido, ure joruduwa rakaguragaredu makai nowu Faraão, Egito kejewuge eimejera kurirewu jekai, duwu ure Egito kejewuge eimejerado ema, ure jetudo tuwai jamedu ji jamedu. 1 Dukejere boe eke boi kurireure Egito kejewugei, boe ere tuiwo kuricigodo. Paedogamage eruduwakare kaboba emode ko. 1 Mare Paedoga Jacó joruduware trigoie Egito keje duji, dukeje ure tore ekodudo toro boeto ji. 1 Du rekodajire eture toro pugeje, dukeje José ure tumanamage edo boe pa pudui, icare ure brae eimejera kurirewu Faraão jordudo tuwobei. 1 Dukejere José makore tuo bogai uwobe eiamedu tabo, duwugere emagare, ere 7. 1 Icare Jacó ure turawuje Egito kae, nonore akurure, paedogamagere jamedu. 1 Icare ere era reko jice Siquém moto kae ere etugu Abraão ure aruwu aroe eiaro tada. Ure nowu aroe eiaro aru mori kuri inodu tabo, Henoc ore ekera piji, duwu Henoc nowu Siquém kejewure ema. 1 Boe aregodure pudae Pao makore Abraão jiboe umode tudowuje du kae. Abraão uwobe eidodure, erijodure Egito keje. 1 Jii ia Egito kejewuge eimejera kurirewu tuginoiwu boture, du joruduwakare José jiboe ji. 1 Nowu brae eimejera pega remawunure paobei, rorerure paomagei, ure edo tore ewarigu ewiwo. 2 Nowu du kodi Moisés boture. Moture Pao jekai, mugure tuwai tada arii pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. 2 Dukejere, barigudure dukeje, Faraão onaregedu aredu ure tugeragu ji, ure ricodudo umagai tonaregedu jiture. 2 Moisés joruduwadodure Egito kejewuge eruduware jiboe jamedu boeji, ure tudurudo tuwadaru tabo, turo tabo. 2 Aregodure tuioru ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogiduredu kae dukeje, aidure tuioruduwo tuwobe Israeldogei. 2 Nonore icare jorudure ia Egito kejewu imedu rorerui ia jituji, aidure tuwo tugerabraredo ji, ure marenaru morido, ure nowu Ejito kejewu bito. 2 Upagare tuwobe emode boe pa Pao umoduie einorudo tugera taboduji, mare ekare boe pa. 2 Nowu meri rekodajire icare, ia emage ei pobedu erugodunure pui, icare jemarure tuwo ewudugugo pui. Icare akore ei imedage, tawobenure puje, kodiba tagorigodunure pui? 2 Mare nowu ure tuwie okoridowu akore ji ioguduba koiba ure cegimejerado aki? 2 Amodukana iwido nowu aro magai Egito kejewu jitudu reore? 2 Awu bataru keje, Moisés rekodure, ure tuwiado, mugure Madian moto keje, tui nono ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu reore, torore ure toredo pobe. 3 Joru makaguragare dukejere Pao ia o tupare towadudo jekai, toro boe pagawu tada, puredu Sinai torekoduji, ia botoguru uru oiabiji. 3 Icare Moisere tumeardaedo pudui, tuiorudui nowu jitu koia, ure tuburedo tuioruduwo kaboba jiba inoba ureuba. 3 Dukejere Pao makore ji, akore imire aomage eno Aroe Eimejeranure imi, Abraão, Isaac, Jacó eno Aroe Eimejeranure imi. Icare Moisés pagudugodure, ukare tuioku awogado. 3 Icare Pao akore ji awure tadawu tawuje. Boe pagawu moto keje karega aragojere. 3 Iordu birigodure mugure Egito kejewu iwobe ecebaeji. Imearudure etoraguduji, icare itaregodure iwo edo cinorudo. Ica, mato, imode atudo Egito kae. 3 Awu Moisés mitodu, du ere barigu tagoi oino jitu tabo ioguduba ure cegimejerado aki? Emare Paore utudo tui boe eimejerado ema, tui boe einorudowudo ema dutabo, nowu ure towadudo botoguru tadawu Pao o tupa jetui jitu tabo. 3 Emare ure paomage etawuje Egito piji, tui turo kurirewu awadudo Egito keje, Pobo Kujagurewu keje, boe pagawu keje jorure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du tonaji. 3 Awu Moisés mitodu makore israeldogei, akore Pao umode ia profeta tawuje tabiji tawogai, du umode nono ireore. 3 Awu Moisés mitodu mugure paomage eedui boe matadu tadawuge ebo, mugure makore ji Sinai torekodu ao kejewu Pao o tupa apo jamedu. Aire boe eemode koiawu bataru makudure ai, tuwo maku cenai. 3 Paomagerema, emearutorukare ji; tuwabo tadare ere tugirimi Egito kae. 4 Emagore Aarão biegai, egore ia aroe eimejerage etawuje cenai ewo cerego. Paga karega, ure cedawuje Egito pijiwu Moisés jire ceruduwakare kaiba kodure. 4 Nowu du kodi ere ia tapira imedu to meriri ekurewu tabo, tui ia aroe eimejera pagawudo ema, ere barege ewido jekai, eegarere nowu turore tugera tabo boeji. 4 Dukodi icare Pao ure tuiaedo epiji, ure epijido ewo tubujodo baru tadawu kuiejedogei, uwo magai atugododure profetadoge eno bapera kejedu reore israeldoge, tare barege ewido tawo ikurido, nowu boe matadu keje, jorure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure pugeje du tonaji? 4 Ukare ino. Mare tagaidure Maloque uwai ji, tagodure tao pagawu Refa awaraji, tare awague etowuje tagera tabo tawo tabujodo ei (Am 5, 5 2). 4 Pao bataru jaira mugure paomage ebo boe pagawu tada. Awu Pao bataru jaira todure nono Pao makore Moisés jitu du reore. 4 Makudure paomage etai duwugere arego biri kadodukarewuge eno moto kae, tugimejerai Josué du tonaji. Dukodi, Paore nowu biri kadodukarewuge etawuje nowu piji, ure eiaedo paomage ei. Icare nowu Pao bataru jaira mugure toro ebo jii paomage eimejera Davi aregodu kae. 4 Awu imedu pemegare Pao jekai, akore pudui tuwo ia bai mugudo Jacó o Aroe Eimejera ai. 4 Boekarema, paomage eimejera Salomão rugadure ure Pao kurirewu uwai mugudo. 4 Du inodu tabo, Pao Aroe Eimejera mugukare ime ere pemegadowu baidoge etada, ure nono profeta akore 4 Barure imuga reno, motore iwure pa reno. Kakoduwu baiba tamode pemegado inai? Oinore Pao akore kakoduwu boe eedaba imugure tada? 5 Imi karega ire boe jamedu pemegado? . 5 Aora rakarewu ime, birikadodukarewu tawabo tawiaja tabowu ime, tare tadugu tadugu Aroe Pemegarewu ro kuda. Taro tarore nono taedogamage ereore. 5 Kakoduwu profetadoge eiba taomage ekodu kagirikare ei? Taomagere makore Imedu Pemegarewu aregodumoduiedu jiwuge ewido, tagirema nowu Imedu Pemegarewu maku, tare bito. 5 Tagaire Moisés o boe eroiagu makudure tagai, Pao o tupadoge ekera piji, mare tamearutorukare ji. 5 Emearudui awu bataru jitu kejere icare, ekodu kagirire ji, ere boe to ji boe kori koia ji. 5 Emarema, Aroe Pemegarewu mugure apo, ure tuioku kidudo baruto, Aiwore Pao Aroe Eimejera uruguji. 5 Icare akore Ica, iorudunure barui tuiado duji, Imedu Onaregedu rakojei Pao Aroe Eimejera kana pemegarewu jaogwai duji. 5 Dukeje icare enoiogwari kuricigore, ere tugera bu tuwiaja keje, eiamedure ere tubodo apo turugodu tabo ji, boe kori koia ji. 5 Ere reko toro bakurirewu kujebiji, ere tori to ji tuwo bito. Ure tori to jiwuge ere to aroia boarewu tawuje, ere bu nono ia iparedu iei Saulo cedu apo. 5 Dukejere ere tori to nowu Estevao ji. Emarema okwamagudunure Pao ji, akore Ikimejera Jesus, akeragu itaroe ji akabo 6 Dukejere ure tubujodo, icare oiogwarire, akore Pao Aroe Eimejera, awiagodudo awuge eroi ii duji. Icare, awu tuwadaru kejere icare akurure. 

Saulo. 1Saulo jore ewugeje, ei nowu Estêvão bito duji. Nowu meri mitodu jire icare brae erugodu kuricigore Jerusalém kejewu mearutorurewugeidu ure tubaru towuje. Dukodi icare nowu mearutorurewuge ere taodo Judéia kao, Samaria kao; tu apostolodoge emugure Jerusalém tada. 2Du tonajire ia mearutorurewu ime eemarure tuwo Estêvão tugu moto to, etoragudu kuricigore bukeje. 3Saulo rema, kodu kagirinure Igraja ji. Dukodire ure turemo baidoge eto, ure ime, areme etawuje nowu piji, ure erego baicorewu to. 
Dicono Filipe maragodui Samaria kejedu. 4Boekarema, ure taodowuge etu eture boe jamedu keje tureadodui Pao bataru jitu dutabo. 5Ia emage iei Filipe cedu, ure turawuje Samaria moto kae, readodure Cristo ji mugure nowu moto kejewuge ewiegai. 6Makarewuge ewiapaga awadure nowu Filipe bataru ji, ewiapagare ji, eerudure ro pemegarewu kurirewu ji. 7Boekimorema, Aroe pegareure tudawuje Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge epiji, tuiogwari kuricigo tabo. Jamedu meru bokwarewu, pogora bokwarewu makarewuge epemegagodure jamedu. 8Dukodi icare boe eegare kuricigore nowu bakurirewu tada. 
Bari Simão. 9Nonore ia imedu iei Simão cedu, mugure nono, dure turo rakarewu to to bakurirewu tada, dukoiare Samaria kejewuge eebogodure roji, du ure nono ia bari ro rakareure. 1 Biegarewuge, ricorewuge eiamedu boe ewiapagare ji, egore Awu imedu ure nono Aroe Eimejera iei Kuirirewu cedu ro rakareboere. 1 Emearutorure ji, paga karega, marigudu ure eekuri paga pagado turoi bidugudugu jitu tabo eegai. 1 Mare emearudure Filipe makoi Pao o boe pemegarewu ji, Jesus Cristo akaruji, du rekodajire icare emearutorure bataru ji, icare ime, arema, etaidure tuwo tao pegodo. 1 Icare nowu Simão jamedu mearutorure, icare ao pegododure. Icare ukare tuiaedo Filipe ji, tuiebogodui ro pemegarewu, ro kurirewu makarewu ji. 1 Apostolodoge emugure Jerusalém tadadu, emearudure Samaria kejewuge ei tugeragu Pao bataru jituji, icare ere Pedro mare João etudo toro etae. 1 Awuge etaregodure toro dukejere icare enogwamagudure Pao ji nowu mearutorure maiwuge eparu tabo, Aroe Pemegarewu makuduwo etai. 1 Awurema karega, nowu du kodi Aroe Pemegarewu makudukare ia etai ia etai roga, mare etao pegododure Jesus ie tabo tu je. 1 Dukodi icare nowu apostolodoge ei pobedu ere tugera bu etaora keje Aroe Pemegarewu makuduwo etai du bogai. 1 Icare cewu Simão jorudure Aroe Pemegarewu makudui etai Apostolodoge ei tugera bu etaora keje dutabo duji, icare akore tumoduie diiero maku etai, tagoi oino dutabo: - 1 Awu taro raka maku inai jamedu ma, imode ikera bu aora kejewu jamedu boe Aroe Pemegarewu makuduwo etai. 2 Icare Pedro akore bataru jipagi Ako diiero okwawo pi tuku akabo, ameardaere Pao o boe pemegarewu akomoduie diiero morice dukoia. 2 Awu Pao maragodae ia koborogu makudukare akai rugadu, paga karega, awabo rorogodure Pao jekai kodi. 2 Akodorogado ai awu aro pegarewu ji, akogwamagududo Pao ji, boe jokodu kare kare, awu aro pegarewu okwawo. 2 Mare paga karega, itaiwonure ai, jirireboe kuricigorewu tadare amugure, boe pegarewu ure akogudo. 2 Icare nowu Simão akore Tagogwamagududo Pao ji iparu tabo ma, tamagore jiboe iaboe iaboe ekawo tudowuje ii. 2 Icare apostolodoge ereadodure Pao bataru ji, tui tuiodo keje turo pemegarewu tabo dutabo, dukeje icare ere tugirimi Jerusalém kae. Ere Pao bataru kogado Samaria kejewuge eno moto kao. 
Etiópia kejewuge eimejerago utugare kurirewu. 2 Icare Pao o tupa aregodure Filipe ae, akore ji Aragojedo, atudo woje cebegi, ure turawuje Jerusalém pijiwu nowu moto biororewu iei Gaza cedu kaewu awaraji. 2 Icare Filipe ure turagojedo, uture toro. Boekarema, ia Etiopia kejewu ia eunuco imedu, duwure Etiopia kejewuge eimejerago iei Candace cedu utugare kurirewu rema, jeture oroe jamedu boeji, du uture Jerusalemto togwamaguduwo Pao uwai tada. 2 Icarema unure tugirimi to imaridorewu tabo, dutabore makore profeta Isaias o bapera ji. 2 Icare Aroe Pemegarewu makore Filipe ji, akore Apuredu pemegado nowu imaridorewu ji. 3 Icare Filipe ure tuburedo ji, mearudure cewu eunuco makoi profeta Isaias o bapera 1atugoji. Icare unorare ji akore Are boe pa amagoi bapera jituji? Aeruduware ji? 3 Akore Inoba ioruduwamode, boekai inodu kogado iwiegai dutabo? Icare makore Filipe ji rutuwo uwo tumugudo tumegi. 3 Boekare, padure bapera kejeboe reo ere reko bitoduwo umagai ia barogo rogu ureore, umagai mako bokwarewu ia cordeiro rogu du ere bu rogu kado du reore, du reorere ukare togwa jado. 3 Ure tuwiegado dukoiare ere pegado, Ioguduba umode ore eremagu? Paga karega bimode du kodi. (Is 5, s). 3 Icare nowu eunuco akore Filipe ji Areadodudo iwiegai ioguduba jiba profeta ako oino? Pudumi na? Ia tumeduia jina? 3 Dukodi icare readodure. Ure tuwadaru paru tawuje nowu padure bapera kejewu bataru piji, icare readodure biegai Jesus jiboe ji. 3 Eture todobiji, dutabore etaregodure ia pobo ja kae, icare nowu eunuco akore Pobo reo. Kodiba umodukare turugadu itao pegododuwo? 3 Icare Filipe akore Amearutorumode awabo jamedu tabo dukeje, umode turugadu. Icare akore Imearutorure Pao Onaregedui Jesus Cristo ceduji. 3 Ure imaridorewu buredo, icare ei pobedu ere turawuje pobo kae, icare Filipere nowu eunuco ao pegodo tu je. 3 Ere tudawuje pobo piji kuri je dukejere icare Pao o Aroe Pemegarewu ure tugeragu Filipe ji pi tuku toro eunuco joku piji. Icare nowu eunuco uture todobiji tadawaraji, tuiegare kuricigo tabo. 4 Du tonajire Filipe rekodudodure Azoto kae. Icare uture toro kujebiji, ure Pao bataru kogado bakurirewuge eiamedu tada, jii taregodui Cesaréia moto kae du kae.
. Saulo mearutorui Pagimejera bataru jidu. 1Du tonajire icare Saulore akedo pudui tuwo Pagimejerare joruduwadowuge epagududo tuwo ewido. Dukodi icare uture sacerdotedoge eimejera ae. 2Makore ji bapera bogai tuduwo Damasco bakurirewu kejewu judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao o bapera ji tadawu baidoge eiere sinagogadoge cedu etae. Aidure tuwo mearutorurewuge ime areme eiamedu reko ekera kogu tabo, toro Jerusalém kae. 3Boekarema, kodure awaraji du tonaji, puredu tu Damasco bakurirewu ji, icare, aregodure baru pijiwu ia urugureboe rakarewu ure taiado apo pi tuku je. 4Emarema, buture moto kae tuku. Icare mearudure ia boe emago ji akore ji Saulo, Saulo, kodiba akonare ii awo iwido? 5Icare Saulo akore ji Ikimejera, ioguduba akiba? Icare Pagimejera akore ji Jesusnure imi dure are aiagu iwido. Boe pegareure, ai awure to meriri oto todu rema. 6Icare amagadure tubagudu koia, icare akore Ikimejera, inoba akaidure irowo? Icare Pagimejera akore ji Aragojedo, awo aremo bakurirewu to, dukejere boe emagomode ai inoba aromode duji. 7Boekarema, uture apowuge epagudu rakaguragare, eemeradure makoji, mare eerudukare boeji. 8Dukejere icare Saulo ure turagojedo moto piji, ure tuioku jado, mare jordukare boeji. 9Dukodire icare uture apowuge ere tugeragu ieraji du apore ere turemo Damasco bakurirewu to, du tadare mugure merire pobe ma awu metuia bokware jordukai, okwagekai, kudukai boece dutabo. 
Ananias ure Saulo ao pegodo. 1 Boekimorema, ia mearutorurewu imedu iei Ananaias cedu mugure Damasco tada. Pagimejera makore ji unuiao tada, akore Ananias, Ananias. Akore Ikimejera, imireo. 1 Icare Pagimejera akore ji Aragojedo, atudo toro ia awara iei jetororewu cedu kae, icare anorare ia Tarso pijiwu imedu iei Saulo cedu bogai, Judas uwai tada. Unure togwa kurido. 1 Du tonajire nowu Saulo jorudure tunuiao tada ia imedu iei Ananias cedu ui turemo tuwo tugera bu tuwugeje tuioruduwo pugejeduji. 1 Icare Ananias akore pagimejeraji Ikimejera, makarewuge emagore iwiegai awu imedu jiboe ji. Uie ure turo pegado mearutorure aiwugei, Jerusalém tada duji. 1 Woerema ure bapera arego sacerdotedoge eiemejerage ekera piji tuwo tugeragu mearutorure aiwuge eiameduji. 1 Mare Pagimejera akore ji Atudo toro ae, paga karega, ire nowu imedu tawuje tuwo itagaru reko boe eiamedu boe etae, boe eimejerage eegai, Israeldoge eegai jamedu. 1 Imode udo boe pa uie turugadu boewo togorido igoia duji. 1 Dukodi icare Ananias uture, ure turemo nowu baito, ure tugera bu ao keje, akore Iwie Saulo, Pagimejera Jesus ure towadudo awaraji aegaidu, ure itudo mato akae, aeku jadoduwo pugeje, akaroe okorobaduwo Aroe Pemegarewu tabodu bogai. 1 Dukeje kuri je, iaboe ui nono kare ewodoredu buture joku piji, dutabore icare jorudure pugeje. Ure turagojedo taci je, icare ao pegododure. 1 Dukeje okwagere, icare rakare pugeje. Mugure nowu Pagimejerare joruduwadowuge ebo, nowu Damasco keje meri makakare. 
Saulo uwadodae boeto jiwu Damasco kejedu. 2 Du tonajire kuri je uwadodure sinagogadoge ekao, akore boe ewiegai Pao Onaregeduie ure Jesus Cristo ceduji. 2 Mearudure bataru jiwuge eiamedu boe eebogodure, egore Cewu onare mearutorure Jesus jiwugei Jerusalém tada kanao? Aregodukana tuwo erego ekera kogu tabo toro sacerdotedoge eimejerage etae? 2 Saulorema, ure boe pa turo raka awadu iure, ure Damasco kejewu judeudoge epogurudo, tago awadui Jesusie Cristo rema. 2 Meri makakare dukeje icare judeudoge ere tudo pui, ere tumeardaedo tuwo bito. 2 Awu emeardae aregodure Saulo biaja kae. Emagerema eedure bakurirewu baiporo keje meri ji boe co ji, tuwo bito. 2 Mare mearutorurewuge ere tugeragu ji boe co ji, ere rawuje nowu bakurirewu tori paru joki, metui kodo tada dutabo. 
Saulo maragodae Jerusalém tadadu. 2 Du pijire icare aregodure Jerusalemto. Aidure tuwo tumeduiado mearutorurewuge ebo, mare eiamedu boe epagudunure ce, emearutorukare mearutoruie Jesus jituji. 2 Dukodi icare Barnabé ure tugeragu ji pudabo, ure reko apostolodoge etae, readodure ewiegai jorduie Pagimejera ji awara keje, pagimejera makoe ji, uie Jesus akaru kogado taidu raka tabo Damasco tada duji. 2 Du otobijire icare, Saulo mugure ebo, tui tudawuje Jerusalém piji, tui turemo to pugeje, tui Pao akaru kogado tubagudu bokwa tabo. 2 Makore Grécia kejewu judeudogei jamedu, awugerema etaidure tuwo bito. 3 Icare mearutorurewu umanamage ere boe pa, dukejere icare eture apo jii Cesaréia kae, dupijire ere utudo toro Tarso bakurirewu kae. 3 Nowu du kodi Pao o Igreja butugugodure Judéia o moto jamedu keje, Samaria keje. Ricodure tumearudu kurii Pao jitu tabo. Aroe Pemegarewu koiare ure eidodudo. 
Pedro maragodui Lida kejedu. 3 Pedro meru merure boe jamedu ji, bakurirewu jamedu ji, ure turawuje Lida kejewu mearutorurewuge etae jamedu. 3 Nonore jorudure ia imedu iei Enéias cedu, du padu pagare tuba keje jii jorure ikera awubodure pobe ma jewu metuia bokware ikera awobowuto padu pagai tuba kejeduji, ukare tubogora inogido kodi. 3 Icare Pedro akore ji Enéias, Jesus Cristo koiare ure apemegago. Aragojedo, akera pemegado apaji. Kuri je ure turagojedo taci je. 3 Icare Lida kejewuge eiamedu boe, Saron kejewuge eiamedu boe eerudure ji, du kodi icare emearutorure Pagimejera ji. 
Ia aredu jewodui Jope kejedu. 3 Icare Jope bakurirewu tadare ia mearutorurewu aredu iei Tabita cedu, mugure nono. Gregodoge ewadaru tabo iere Dorkas. Awu aredu pemegaguragare boe ji. Ure toroe maku maku du kuricigodo marenarue etai. 3 Boekimorema, nowu boe keje, kogodure, icare bire. Icare ere aimo dukeje, erudure apo bairia cobojewu kae. 3 Lida bakurirewu mugu puredure tu Jope bakurirewu ji. Dukodi icare Jope tadawu mearutorurewuge emearudure Pedro mugui Lida tadaduji. Icare ere imei pobedu etudo toro togwamaguduwo ji: - Mato cedae kuri je. 3 Icare Pedro ure turagojedo kuri je, icare uture ebo. Aregodure dukeje kuri je, ere reko cobojiwu bairiato. Ukoge bire pijiwu areme eiamedu boe ere tubodo Pedro apo, icare etoragudure tuiamedu tabo, ere jordudo nowu Dorkare tugera pemegado pudaewu eroia boarewu boe, ia tugudae makarewu ji. 4 Icare Pedrore eiamedu jeebu baawadu kae, dukejere icare ure tubujodo moto keje, okwamagudure Pao ji. Dukejere ure tugirimi nowu birewudo ae, dutabore akore Tabita, aragojedo! Icare ure tuioku jado, jorudure Pedro ji, icare ure tumugudo. 4 Icare Pedro ure tugera raido iera kae, ure turagojedo. Icare makore tuwiemage ewogai, nowu ukoge bokwarewuge ewogai jamedu, ure maku etai jewodu tabo. 4 Awu akaru ure tumaedo Jope jamedu ji, du kodi icare makarewuge emearutorure Pao ji. 4 Pedro mugure Jope tada meri makaguragare, ia ure barege ewiri pemegadowu imedu iei Simão cedu uwai tada. 
Judeukare emawu mearutorure Pagimejera ji boeto jiwu ia tugobaigarege eimejera iei Cornlio cedu. 1Nowu du kodi ia imedu iei Cornélio cedu, mugure Cesaréia keje, duwure ia Itália pijiwu tugobaigarege eimejeranure ema, 2Rore nono Pao aidu reore. Meartorure Pao ji tuwobe eiamedu tabo. Ure toroe maku makudu kuricigodo marenarue etai, okwamagudure jii je Pao ji. 3Ia meri keje, meri jogodu tabo, awu imedu jordu awadure ia Pao o tupai tuburedo pudui duji, akoi: - Cornélio, Cornélio. Oino pudui duji. 4Icare Cornélio ure tuioku kidudo ji tubagudui ce dutabo, akore Kaboba, Ikimejera? Nowu Pao o tupa akore Akogwamagudure bogaiboe, are maku marenarue etaiboe, aregodure Pao jekai du kodire biapagare ai. 5Dukodire amode ia ime etudo Jope bakurirewu kae, emagowo ia imedu iere Simão cedu bogai, du ie bio Pedro rema, utuwo mato. 6Emare mugure ia ure barege ewiri pemegadowu imedu iei Simão cedu uwai tada. Uwai mugure pobo maerewu okwai. 7Icare Pao o tupa uture pijidu kejere, makore tudugarege ei pobedu ewogai, makore ia tugobaigare mugure pudabowu, mearutorure Pao jiwu bogai. 8Icare readodure ewiegai tuiorudure jiboe jamedu boeji, icare ure etudo Jope bakurirewu kae. 
Pedro jorudure jiboe. 9Nowu meri rekodaji, emeru kimoi puredu tu nowu bakurirewu jitu tonaji, meri pagaia keje, Pedro ruture bai ao boarewu kae tuwo togwa kurido. 1 Icare uke boire ji, icare aidure togwagewo. Mare ere uke pemegado du tonaji, ure tunuiao pemegado taci je. 1 Icare jorudure barui tuiado duji, iaboe ure nono ia aroia kurirewu ui turawuje baru piji moto kae, oto kogure pobe puibiji duji. 1 Nowu aroia tadare barege eiamedu, kiege eiamedu, awague eiamedu meture tada. 1 Icare iaboe emagore ji Pedro, aragojedo, awo bito, awo kowuje. 1 Icare Pedro akore Umodukare ino, Ikimejera! Ikare boe pegarewu kowuje jii je rugadu. 1 Icare nowu boe emago akore ji pugeje Amago pega kaba Paore pemegado boeji, akagokaba pegaie. 1 Awu inodure tuguwo pobe pugeje. Dukejere nowu aroia kurirewu todure baruto pugeje. 1 Pedrore tumeardaedo nowu jorudure jiboe ji, kabobao? Du tonajire icare nowu Corneliore etudo torowu ime eragojere baiporo keje tuiemarui Simão uwai bogai. 1 Ere tugera to baiporoji, enorare boe ji Simão iei Pedro cedu mugu rakuduie nono du bogai. 1 Pedro mearudunure tuiorudure jiboe ji du tonajire icare Aroe Pemegarewu akore ji Ica, imei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu eemarunure awogai, duwuge emugure nono. 2 Aragojedo, arawuje, atudo ebo apagudu bokwa tabo, inure etudo mato awogai du kodi. 2 Icare Pedrore turawuje, jorudure nowu imei, icare akore ei Imireo. Taemarure bogaiwu imireo. Kaboba bogaiba taro oino? 2 Icare egore Tugobaigarege eimejera Cornélio, imedu pemegarewu, mearutorure Pao jiwu, duwure judeudoge eiamedu jordu pemegare ji, emare jorudure Pao ia o tupaji, duwure akore ji makoiagu awogai, mearuduwo awadaru ji. 2 Icare Pedro makore ei ewo turemo. Icare ure emugudo tuwai tada, enuduwo nono. Barogwa tore icare uture ebo, ia Jope kejewu uwiemage ebo jamedu. 
Pedro rakojei Cesaréia kejedu. 2 Nowu meri rekodajire icare etaregodure Cesaréia kae. Nowu Cornélio upaganure ewogai. Makore tuwobei, makore tumearudu kurire jiwu tumedagei, ure ewie, du kodire emugure uwai tada tubaga tabo ewogai. 2 Pedrore tuiagu turemo dukejere Cornélio ure tudawuje tuwo tugeragu ji, icare ure tubujodo Pedro bure paru tuwo tubujodo ji. 2 Boekimorema, Pedrore rakojedo taci je, akore ji Pao Kurirewu karega ure imi, imedunure imi jamedu, aragojedo. 2 Icare, makoi jitu tabore icare, Pedrore turemo uwaito, jorudure boe makarewuge eedui nonodu ji, akore ei 2 Taeruduware ukae turugadu ia judeu uwo tumeduiado ia moto tuginoiwu pijiwu imeduji, iarema uwo turemo uwaito, macare Paore ioruduwado ukae turugadu cewo iaboe iaboe ewarigu cebiji. 2 Dukodire itaregodure mato kuri je, boe emagore iwogai dukeje. Kode, kodiba tagagoino iwogai? 3 Icare Cornélio akore ji Merire pobe puibiji duotodaire, imugure iwai tada imagoi Pao jitu tabo, meri jogodu tabo, du tonajire icare ia aroia kigadurewu meture jiwu imedu ure towadudo iegai, akore ii 3 Cornélio, akogwamagudure bogaiboe aregodure Pao ae, Pao biabuture are maku marenarue etaiboe bukeje. 3 Dukodi icare amode iaboe etudo Jope bakurirewu kae, makowo ia Simão iei Pedro cedu bogai, utuwo mato. Mugure ia barege ewiri pemegadowu imedu uwai tada, pobo maerewu okwai. 3 Dukodi icare ire boedo tumagowo awogai kuri je, atuwo mato, icare iegarere atui mato duji. Oinore icare, cegireo cedui pui Pao jekai, cemearuduwo Paore amagodo cewiegaiboe jamedu boeji. 3 Icare Pedrore tuwadaru parudo, akore Boe jokodu ioruduware Pao ukae iaboe iaboe kurido iaboe biegado pugori duji. 3 Mare boe eeda jamedu boe keje aidu pemegare mearutorure jiwugei, ro pemegarewuge eiamedu boeji. 3 Paore tuwadaru maku Israeldoge etae, ure boe pemegarewu, boe butugurewu readodudo ewiegai Jesus Cristo okwabiji, dure boe eiamedu boe eimejeranure ema. 3 Taeruduware awu jamedu boe ui tudowuje Judéia keje, tui paru tugu Galiléia piji, João o boe etaimodu rekodaji. 3 Taeruduware Paoi Jesus Nazaré kejewu kurido Aroe Pemegarewu tabo, turo raka tabo duji, dukoiare ro pemegare, ure Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge epemegago, Pao mugure apo dukoia. 3 Cegire ceerudure, cereadodure, ure towuje Judéia keje boeji, Jerusalém tada boeji. Dukejere ere bito, ere tugu i padui pugajejedu keje. 4 Mare Paore jewodudo meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, ure udo towadudo. 4 Mare eiamedu eegai karega, mare tu Pao aidure jiwuge eegai, ceegai, duwuge cenogwagere apo, cegudure apo, jewoduredu rekodaji. 4 Ure cemagodo tuwadaru ji boe etae, ure cereadodu pemegado Pudumie Paore jerewuge, birewuge eimejerado Pudumi duji. 4 Jire profetadoge eiamedu emagore mearutorumode jiwuge eiamedu boe ero pegarewu okwadodumoduie ie tabo. 4 Boekarema, Pedro ako oinodu tonaji, Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje mearudure bataru pemegarewu jiwuge eiamedu boe ewugeje. 4 Aregodure Pedro apowu mearutorurewu judeudoge eebogodu kuricigore tuiorudui Aroe Pemegarewu o boe pemegarewu ui turorido biri kadodukarewuge ewugeje jamedu jituji. 4 Emearudure emagoi ia boe ewadaru tuginoiwu jituji, ei Pao kurido duji. 4 Icare Pedro akore Umodukana turugadu awuge etao pegododuwo? Awurema karega, Aroe Pemegarewu makudure etai ui nono makudure cenai du reore. 4 Icare ure boedo etao pegodo Jesus Cristo ie tabo. Dukodi icare enogwamagudure ji emuguwo pudabo biegatu kimo. 

Pedro ui tuwiemage Jerusalém kejewuge edo boe pa turo oinoduji. 1Dukejere icare apostolodoge, Judéia kejewu mearutorurewuge emearudure biri kadodukarewuge ei tugeragu Pao bataru ji jamedu duji. 2Du Kodi icare Pedro ruture Jerusalémto, dukejere icare enogituware ji. 3Egore: - Kodiba are aremo biri kadodukarewuge ewaito, icare, akogwagere ebo? 4Macare Pedro readodure ewiegai ure tudowuje jamedu boeji, tagoi oino dutabo: - 5Inogwamagudunure Pao ji Jope bakurirewu tada, icare ire ido ikinoi, dutabore iorudure aroe ji: iaboe ui nono aroia kurirewu reore, oto kogure pobe puibiji, ure tudawuje baru piji puredu tu ii. 6Itaiwo birigodure ji, icare iorudu awadure barege, awague, kiege barege, emedui tada duji. 7Icare imearudure ia boe emagoi iwiegai oino duji Pedro, aragojedo awo bito, awo kowuje. 8Imirema, inagore umodukare ino, Ikimejera, iaboe iaboe pegarewu ukare turemo iiagi jii je. 9Icare cewu boe emago akore iwiegai baru piji pugeje, akore amagokaba Paore pemegado boeji akagokaba pegaie. 1 Awu inodu ure tudowuje pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, dukejere jamedu boe todure baruto pugeje. 1 Dukejere icare ia ime ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu etaregodure nowu imugure tadawu bai kae, duwugere boere etudo iwogai Cesaréia piji. 1 Boekimorema, Aroe Pemegarewu akore ii ikoduwo ebo ipagudu bokwa tabo. Awu cewiemage ei ikera awubodure mito taci jedu ekodure itabo jamedu. Icare cere ceremo Cornélio uwaito. 1 Emare icare readodure cewiegai tuioruduie ia Pao o tupa ui towadudo tuiegai akoi pudui oinodu jituji amode iaboe etudo Jope bakurirewu kae tumagowo Simão iei Pedro cedu bogai. 1 Emare makomode ai bakaru pemegarewu ji dukoiare amode akinorudo, awobe eiamedu tabo. 1 Icare ire iwadaru paru tawuje du tonajire kuri je Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje ewugeje ure nono ure turawuje pawugeje marigu du reore. 1 Du tabore icare iwiabuture Pagimejera ako oino dukeje joãore boe etao pegodo pobo tabo, tagirema tagao pegododumode Aroe Pemegarewu tabo. 1 Kode makudure mearutorure jiwuge cenaiwu Pao o boe pemegarewu mitodu makudure etai jamedu ma, ioguduba imiba iwo ituu Pao Aroe Eimejera aidu kuda? 1 Emearudure awu bataru jitu kejere icare emago bokware ji pugeje, ere Pao jekaredo, egore Kode, biri kadodukarewuge etai jamedu Paore ero pegarewu kiarigodae maku etai, etaregoduwo boe eerewo kae. 
Antioquia tadawu Pao uwobe eparu ui tudowujedu. 1 Du tonajire nowu ure taodo boe jamedu boe kaowuge, cewu brae etonare pudui boe keje, Estêvão o meri keje, etaregodure Fenícia kae, Chipre kae, Antioquia kae, tui Pao bataru kogado tu judeudoge ewiegai dutabo. 2 Mare ia Chipre kejewuge, ia Cirene kejewuge, enogore ekaodu, etaregodui Antioquia kae dukeje, emagore gregodoge ei jamedu, ere Pagimejera o bakaru kogado ewiegai jamedu. 2 Pagimejera mugure ebo du kodire icare boe makarewuge emearutorure, ere tugirimi Pao ae. 2 Awu boe jamedu boe akaru aregodure Jerusalém tadawu mearutorurewuge ewiegai. Dukodire ere Barnabé utudo Antioquia kae. 2 Aregodure toro dukejere jekarere tumearudui Pao o boe pemegarewu jitu koia, icare makore ei emugu kiduwo Pao apo, turo raka tabo. 2 Paga karega, emare imedu pemegarewu rema, mearutoru kuricigore, Aroe Pemegarewu mugure apo. Dukodire ia boe makarewuge ere tumeduiado Paoce. 2 Kuri je dukeje icare Barnabé uture toro Tarso kae, tuiemaruwo Saulo bogai, icare jorudure ji, ure reko Antioquia kae. 2 Joru mito tu jedu oto kae, etu eture mearutorurewuge ere tudo puiwo kae tu tu tu je, ere makaguragarewuge eruduwado. Dukodire Antioquia kejere nowu mearutorure Cristo jiwuge eiere cristãodoge oino boeto ji. 2 Nowu kodiboe keje ia profetadoge ere turawuje Jerusalém piji Antioquia kae. 2 Ia emage ui mito tu jedu iei Agabo cedu, ure turagojedo, icare Aroe Pemegarewu koiare readodure ia boe eke boi moduie boe ji du kuricigomode moto jamedu boe keje. Boekimorema, awu boe eke boi aregodure nowu Cláudio brae eimejera kurireui pudumi du tonaji. 2 Dukodi icare Antioquia kejeu mearutorurewuge etaidure tuwo tugera braredo, tuwo toroe maku Judéia kejewu tumanamage etai, tu tu, turoia reore. 3 Icare erore oino rugadu ere maku toro Barnabe, Saulo mage ekera tabo. 

Herodes onare Pao uwobei, ure Tiago bito. 1Nowu joru mitoduji, brae eimejera Herodes ure tudugarege edo ia mearutorurewuge eiemejerage ekera gogudo turoreruwo ei. 2Dukodire ure João umana iei Tiago cedu bito toriga rairewu tabo. 
Pedro tugudure baicorewu to dupijire Paore inorudo. 3Icare nowu Herodes ure boe pa judeudoge etaiduie awu ro oinodu jitu duji, du kodire ure tudugarege edo Pedro ieragogudo jamedu. Awu inodu ure tudowuje nowu judeudoge ere amirewu iogoae metukare tadawu kowuje jiwu meri ji. 4Icare ure tudugarege edo iera gogudo, edo tugu baicorewu to. Ure tugobaigarege ei pobedu jetu nono eetuwo ji, rekodu kawo. Aidure tuwo boe eerududo ji, nowu Páscoa rekodaji. 5Icare Pedro meture baicorewu tada, du tonajire icare Pao uwobe enogwamagudunure Pao ji jii je Pedro paru tabo. 6Boekarema, Herodes uiagu boe eerududo jiwu meri otodaiwu boe cotada, Pedro unudunure baicorewu tada, ia tugobaigarege ei pobedu etoiadoda, iera gogure meriri ikui pobe dutabo. Ia tugobaigarege eedure baiporo keje taiwo tabo ji. 7Boekimorema, Pao Aroe Eimejera ia o tupare ure towadudo. Kuri je boeragudure nowu bai otoji krk! Icare nowu tupare amagadudo Pedro meto, icare ure jetadudo, akore ji Aragojedo kuri je. Icare nowu meriri iku buture iera piji kuri tai je. 8Icare nowu tupa akore ji Akudawu tugu ai, awurekea kejewu tugu awurekoto. Icare rore ino rugadu. Icare nowu tupa akore ji pugeje Akudawu aroia bai tugu ai, ako itabo. 9Pedrore tudawuje, uture rekodaji tuioruduwakai boe jokoduie kodi karega; meardaere tunuiaoie ure duji. 1 Ekodure boeto jiwu tugobaigarege ekori, rekodajiwuge ekori jamedu. Dukejere etaregodure bakurirewu okwaiwu baiporo meriri kurirewu kae, ure tuiado taobiji, icare ere pagado kajeje taci, eture puapo nowu bakurirewu kejewu ia awaraji, dukeje icare kuri je nowu Pao o tupa okware pi tuku je. 1 Dukejere icare Pedrore boe pa, icare akore Icare iorudure boe jokoduie Pao koiaie ure to tupa arego iwogai tuwo ikinorudo Herodes iera piji, judeudoge epagare bogaiboe jamedu boe piji jamedu. 1 Ure tumeardaedo dukejere icare uture João Marcos uce Maria uwai kae, nonore makarewuge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao ji. 1 Ure tugera to baiporoji, icare maragodure nonowu ia aredu iei Rosa cedu, uture jice tumearuduwo ioguduba ba? 1 Icare mearudui Pedro mako jitu koia, ukare baiporo jado tuiegare koia, mare rekodure tuibagi toro baito tureadoduwo tumedage ewiegai Pedro rakojeie baiporo keje duji. 1 Egore ji Akaora bai baire? Akore ei pugeje ema rugaduie, ema rugaduie. Icare egore O Tupamode. 1 Du tonajire icare Pedrore tugera to to baiporoji pugeje. Boe oto kejere icare ere baiporo jado, eerudure ji, icare erore poku, tori buture eiagi. 1 Icare ure tugera onado ei emago kaiagu, icare readodure ei Pao Kurirewu ui tuginorudo baicorewu pijiduji. Icare akore Tamode Tiago bie, tamode pawiemage ewie. Dukejere ure tudawuje nowu piji, uture ia boe eeda kae. 1 Barogwa tore icare tugobaigaegere tumorora amagadure du kuricigodo nowu ure tudowuje Pedro jitu koia. 1 Herodes jemarure bogai, jordukare ji, du kodire boedo tugogado nowu tugobaigaregei, icare ure edo ewido. Boe raikare dukejere icare Herodes ure tudawuje nowu Judéia moto piji, nowu Cesaréia kae, icare rakojere nono. 
Herodes bi. 2 Herodes rugodunure nowu Tiro, Sidnia kejewugei. Awugerema emagore pui, dukejere eture ae, icare enogwamagudure ia utugare iei Blasto ceduji makowo ji, butuguguduwo pudui (Paga karega, awu Blastore etaidure jiwu boe eke maku maku etai). 2 Icare makore jiwu meri jire icare Herodes ure brae eimejera epa aroia meture pudui dutabore ure tumugudo ture tugogado boe ji kejewu muga keje, dupijire makore ewiegai. 2 Icare boere tugera to pui, egore Ia aroe eimejerare ako oino! 2 Nowu inodu keje kuri je Pao o tupa ure okorido, ukare Pao jekaredo dukoia. Icare ate ere kodu kowuje, icare bire. 
Barnabé, Paulo mage ere tugirimi Antioquia kae. 2 Du tonajire Pao bataru itodure, ure tumaedo tu tu tugori. 2 Barnabá, Paulo mage ere tumaragodae akedudo Jerusalém keje, dukejere icare ere tugirimi Antioquia kae pugeje. Ere João iei Marcos cedu ko pudabo. 

Barnabé mare Paulo emeru boeto jiwu. 1Antioquia tadawu Pao uwobe etada profetadogere, joruduwarewugere jamedu. Ia emage reo Barnabé Simão iei Corewu cedu, Lúcio Cirene pijiwu, Manam cewu Herodes metuia tugodui puregodajidu kimoboe keje, mare Saulo. 2Ia meri keje, awuge ere todorogado pudui, dukejere ere Pao jora ko, dutabore icare Aroe Pemegarewu makore ei, akore Tamode Barnabé mare Saulo etawuje inai emaragoduwo itaidure jiboe keje. 3Dukejere icare, ei todorogado pudui dukejere, ere togwakurido eparu tabo, icare ere tugera bu ewugeje, dukejere ere etudo. 4Dukoiare Aroe Pemegarewu koiare ure etudo, dutabore eture bakurirewu mugui pobo maerewu okwai du iere Seléucia cedu kae. Du pijire eture ika kurirewu tabo ia pobo aiare moto tabowu iei Chipre cedu kae. 5Etaregodure Salamina bakurirewu to dukejere ere Pao bataru kogado nono judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao bataru jiwu baidoge etada. João (Marcos) kodure ebo tuwo tugera braredo ei. 6Dukejere emerure jii je, nowu pobo aiare moto tabowu kajeje jii etaregodure Pafos bakurirewu to, du tadare eerudure ia judeu iei Barjesu ceduji, duwure boe eekuri pagado turo tuginoiwu tabo, profeta pagarewunure ema. 7Mugure brae eimejera pemegarewu iei Sérgio Paulo cedu apo. Awu brae eimejera makore Barnabé mare Saulo ewogai, aidure tumearuduwo Pao bataru ji kodi. 8Icare nowu profeta paga pagarewu, du iere jamedu Elimas cedu, ure tonado ei, aidure tuwo nowu brae eimejera mearutoru kado Pao ji. 9Dukodi icare Saulo, du iere Paulo, Aroe Pemegarewu mugui apo dukoia, ure tuioku kidudo ji, akore 1 Aroe pegarewu onaregedu, ure boe eekuri pagadowu, batararodurewu, onare boe jetororewu jiwu imedu, anure Pao Aroe Eimejera utawara jetororewu meki mekido. 1 Ica, oinonore icare iera butumode awugeje, dukoiare aeku bokwamode. Aerudumodukare meri jokuji jii boe emagomode ai pugeje du kae. Kuri je dukejere icare boe cobuture joki, icare merure, ure taiado bai bai bai, jemarure ioguduba umode tugera maku pudai du bogai. 1 Nowu brae eiemejera tuiorudui nowu Saulo ro rakarewu jitu kejere icare, mearutorure Pao ji, jeebogodu kuricigore Paulo makore jiboe ji. 
Paulo uwadodae Antioquia bakurirewu mugui Pisídia kejewu keje. 1 Dukejere icare Paulo uture tumedage ebo ika kurirewu tabo nowu Pafos bakurirewu piji, etaregodure Perge bakurirewu mugui Panfília moto kejewu kae. Nonore icare cewu João Marcos uture epiji, ure tugirimi Jerusalemto pugeje. 1 Ekodure toro Perge bakurirewu kori toro Antioquia bakurirewu mugure Pisídia moto kejewu kae. Dukejere icare ere turemo judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao bataru ji tadawu baito, icare ere tumugudo. 1 Dukejere boe emagore profetadoge eno bapera ji, emagore boe eroiagudu padui bapera keje duji; dukejere nowu judeudoge ewai tadawu eimejerage emagore Saulo, Barnabé ewogai, egore Cemanamage, tagaidure tamagowo iaboeji boe ewiegai dukeje, tamagodo. 1 Icare Paulore turagojedo, ure tugana aogado boe etae, akore Israeldoge, mearutorure Pao jiwuge tagi, tawiapagado. 1 Israel uwobe eno Aroe Eimejera ure tugeragu paomagei pudae, ure eidodudo, emugui Egito kejedu tonaji, dupijire ure etawuje tugana rakarewu tabo. 1 Jorui 40 du tonaji, ure enogwagedo ia kugaru awadure jiwu moto keje. 1 Dukejere ure Canaã moto kejewu boe etuwobe makarewuge eeda kedodo, icare ure nowu moto pedo etai jorui 45 du tonaji. 2 Dukejere ure jeture eiwuge emagu etai jii Samuel aregodure du kae. 2 Dukejere icare enogwamagudure ia boe eimejera kurirewu bogai pudai. Dukejere icare Paore Saul, Cis onaregedu, Benjamim uwobe, maku etai jorui 40 du tonaji. 2 Dukejere Paore Saul pijido, ure eimejera Davi maku etai, du jire Pao akore iorudure Jessé onaregedu Davi ji, itaidure jiwu imedu duwu romode itaidure jiboe jamedu boeji. 2 Rekodajiwuge epijire Paore nowu ure boe einorudowu Jesus tawuje epiji uwo nono profetadoge emagore marigudu du reore. 2 Nowu Jesus aregodu otodaire, Joãore boe eedorodowu boe etaimodu kogado, nowu Israel uwobe eiamedu boe ewiegai. 2 Emare, tui tumaragodae akedudo du tonajire akore cewu tameardaere jiwu imedu, imi karega, mare iregodajire icare ia ikare irugadu iwo bure tadawu iku kiwujewu aregodumode. 2 Iwiemage, Abraão ore tagi, mearutorure Pao jiwugere tagi, pagaire awu umode paginorudowu bakaru rojaidodure. 2 Paga karega, Jerusalém tadawuge mare eimejerage eruduwakare Jesus ji, ere tugogado ji, ere bito, dutabore ere tumagore bapera ji Sábado meri jiwu profetadoge ewadaru ere towuje. 2 Enogwamagudure Pilato ji uwo bito, eerudukare ro pegarewu ji kodi karega. 2 Icare ere bapera atugododure taboboe jamedu towuje, dukejere ere tawuje i padui pugajejedu piji icare ere tugu aroe eiaoto. 3 Macare Pao Aroe Eimejera ure jewodudo birewuge epiji. 3 Icare cewu ruture apo Galiléia piji Jerusalém kaewuge eerudure ji meri makaguragare du tonaji, duwugere ereadodure boe ewiegai. 3 Cereadodunure tawiegai Pao makore paedogamege eiboeji. 3 Ure tumagore eiboe towuje etore ceegai, ure Jesus rakojedo ure nono bapera atugododure Pao roia tabodu reore itonaregedunure aki, awu ji ire atowuje. 3 Paore tonaregedu jewodudo birewuge epiji ukawo tugirimi tubegagoduwo, ure nono ako reore imode imagore Davi jiwu ino boe pemegarewu maku tagai. 3 Davi mitodu ia boe keje akore amodukare atugare pemegarewu kodu pegadodudo. 3 Aró, kode, Davi rore nono Pao ui turoiagudu reore dukejere bire. Tugudure moto to puredu tu taomagei, icare kodu pegagodure. 3 Mare cewu Paore jewodudo bierewuge epijiwu kodu pegagodukare. 3 Dukodire, iwiemage, taeruduwado koiaie cereadodunure tawiegai boe ero pegarewu akedumode duji. 3 Emare ure mearutorure jiwuge eiamedu boe epemegago, mare Moisés boe eroiagudodu koia karega. 4 Icare tamearudu awadudo tai cewu profetadoge emagore jiboe butukawo tawugeje. 4 Nowu profetadoge egore ure boe epijidowuge tagi, tamearudu awadudo tai, tadugu tai, tabagudu kuricigodo.
