Paga karega, imode iro kurirewu tuginoiwu towuje taegai, du jire tamearutorumodukare ji, iaboe ereadodumode tawiegai dukeje. 4 Dukeje icare, ere tudawuje du tonajire icare enogwamagudure ei emagowo pudai pugeje aregodumode pugejewu Sábado meri ji. 4 Nowu ere tudo pui dukejere icare, judeudoge makarewuge, judeukare emawu mearutorurewu makarewuge eture Paulo, Barnabé mage ebo, duwugere emago emagore ei ekidawo tumugui Pao apo jii je. 4 Nowu Sábado rekodajiwu meri ji icare nowu bakurirewu tadawuge eiamedu etaregodure tumearuduwo Pao bataru ji. 4 Icare judeudoge tuiorudui nowu boe makarewugei dukoiare, ekorire ei, emago pegare Paulo makore jiboe ji. 4 Dukodi icare Paulo mare Barnabé emagore ei tumago raka tabo, egore Tagaire Pao bataru kogadodumode tagai boeto ji, macare tanure pijido, du kodi icare cemode cemegido judeukare emawuege etai. 4 Paga karega, oinore Pao akore ire atawuje awo boe eno moto tuginoiwu kejewuge erugudo, iwo moto kejewuge eiamedu boe einorudo. 4 Awu bataru koiare ure jedukare emawuge eegare kuricigodo, duwuge ere Pao bataru kurido. Icare ere turugadu tuwo tumagu Pao ai, duwugere emearutorure ji. 4 Du tabore icare Pao bataru ure taodo nowu moto jamedu joki. 5 Macare nowu judeudoge ere nowu bakurirewu tadawu ia areme kurirewuge edo brae eimejerage erugo Paulo ji, Barnabe ji, icare ere etudo nowu to moto piji. 5 Icare nowuge ei pobedu ere tuwureko tadawu moto urugudu jukodo ei. Ere tudawuje nowu piji, icare eture Icônio kae. 5 Meartorurewuge rema eegare kuricigore Aroe Pemegarewu ji. 

Paulo mare Barnabé emugui Icônio kejedu. 1Paulo mare Barnabé etaregodure Icônio kae, dukejere icare ere turemo judeudoge ere tudo pui tadawu baito, nowu turo oino reore, du tadare icare ere Pao bataru kogado. Dukodi icare judeudoge makarewuge, gregodoge makarewuge emearutorure. 2Mare ia mearutorukarewu judeudoge, ere judeukare emawuge erugo nowu mearutorurewugei. 3Dukodi karega, Paulo mare Barnabé emugu raire nono kimo, epagudu bokware, emearutorure Pao ji, Pao ierabrarere ewadaru ji kodi, ure turo rakarewu to to nowu apostolodoge ekera tabo. 4Icare nowu bakurirewu tadawuge ere tugado puiato: iage ere tumegido judeudoge eiaogwai, iage ere tumegido apostolodoge eiaogwai. 5Macare ia judeudoge, ia judeukare emawuge ere turagojedo turugoduwo apostolodogei, tuwo tori to ei. 6Dukeje icare Apostolodoge ere boe pa, du kodire eregodure Licaônia, Listre, Derbe bakurirewuge ekae, oieiwu moto kae jamedu. 7Nonore icare ereadodure Pao o bakaru pemegarewu ji. 
Ure tudowuje Listra, Derbe bakurirewuge etadaboe. 8Nowu Listra tadare ia imedu pogora pegarewu mugure tada, meru bokware jii boture dupiji jii oino du kae. 9Mearudunure Paulo bataru ji tumugui nono dutabo, icare Paulore tuioku kidudo ji, jorudure mearutoruie tuwo tubemegado. 1 Dukoiare ure tumago rakado ji, akore ji Aragojedo, aedorodo awure keje. Icare ure taredo taci je, icare merure. 1 Icare nowu boe makarewuge, tuiorudui Paulo ro oinoduji dukeje, ere tumago rakado, enoiogwarire Licaônia kejewuge ewadaru tabo, egore Ime ereorewu Aroe Eimejerage ere turawuje pagae! 1 Icare ere Barnabé iedo Zeusce, ere Paulo iedo Hermesce, paga karega, awu mako makore du kodi. 1 Icare ia Zeus bure joia imedu iei Propeleo cedu ure ia tapiradoge ime eerego mato, nowu bakurirewu baiporo kae, ure ekenawudo, ure edugodo tuwo ewido nowu Paulo mare Barnabé etai, tumearudui Aroe Eimejerageie ure emage, nowu boe eiamedu emeardaere oino jamedu. 1 Mare nowu apostolodoge ei pobedu, tui boe pa nowu oinodu jitu kejere, ere tugudae bowuje, ere taredo nowu makarewuge etoiado. 1 Egore: - Ime, kodiba taro oino? Boe bimodeugere cegi jamedu tareore. Ica, cenogituwanure tai tawo taedorodo, tawo tagirimi boe pegarewu piji, Pao jerewu kae, koiare ure baru to, ure awu moto to, ure pobo maerewu to, ure mugure jekeboe jamedu boe ure towuje jamedu. 1 Marigudu ure moto kejewu boe etawarado mitotu mitotu tu ereore. 1 Dukodi karega ure towadudo paiamedu jekai jii je, turo pemegarewu tabo, ure butaodoge ewududo pagai baru piji, ure boe pemegarewudo pagai, ure page kuricigodo boe jamedu ji, ure pawabo jekare kuricigodo. 1 Mare rakare ei tukawo edo tapiradoge ewido, tukawo edo tubujodo tuiegai. 1 Macare ia Antioquia pijiwu, ia Icônio pijiwu judeudoge etaregodure, duwugere ere boe makarewuge etaora pegado. Dukodi icare ere tori to Paulo ji, icare emeardaere tuie bito duji, du kodi icare ere tumugudo keje kororo, toro nowu bakurirewu baawadu kae. 2 Dukejere icare ure joruduwadowuge ere taiado apo. Icare ure turagojedo taci, ure turemo bakurirewu to pugeje. Nowu rekodajiwu meri jire icare uture Barnabé apo toro Derbe bakurirewu kae. 2 Icare ereadodure Pao bataru ji nowu Derbe kejewuge ewiegai, ere ture joruduwadowuge emagado nono. Dukejere icare ere tugirimi nowu piji, toro Listra, Icônio, Antioquia (Pisídia kejewu) bakurirewuge etae. 2 Ere mearutorurewuge emearudu awadudo pudui tuwo tudurudo tumearutorui Pao jitu tabo. Egore ei uie turugadu pawo paremo Pao mugurewo kae pabagai boe ecebae makarewu kajeje dutabo. 2 Dukejere ere Pao bure jore kejewuge emugudo Igreja jamedu tada. Enogwamagudure Pao ji eparu tabo, tui todorogado pudui dutabo, tui togwa kurido dutabo. 2 Icare ere pagado Pisídia moto kajeje, etaregodure Panfília moto kae. 2 Ereadodure Pao bataru ji Perge bakurirewu tada, dukejere ere turawuje Atália kae. 2 Du pijire icare ere taredo ika kurirewu to, ekodure Antioquia (Sria kejewu) kae pugeje. Nowu bakurirewu pijire ere tudawuje marigudu tui tumagu Pao ai awu tumaragodae akedugoduredu kae. 2 Etaregodure nono dukeje, ere mearutorurewuge eto pui, icare ereadodure ewiegai Paoi turo kurirewu towuje etaiduji, ui judeukare emawuge emearutorudo tuwadaru jituji. 2 Icare emugu raire nono ebo. 

Judeudoge ei tuwiri kadodu jiboe. 1Icarema ure turawuje Jerusalém pijiwu ia ime emagore Pao uwobei, egore Tamodukare tawiri kado, Moisesre boe eroiagudo du reore ma, tamodukare taginorudo. Oinore egore ei. 2Icare Paulo mare Barnabé enogituwa kuricigore ei, mare ekare tuwudugugo Icare eiamedu etaidure tuwo Paulo mare Barnabé etudo toro Jerusalém kae, ia tuwiemage ebo, tunorawo apostolodogei, inoba umode duji. 3Icare ere tugimadudo nowu Pao uwobe epiji, icare ekodure toro Fenícia, Samaria kajejewu awaraji. Icare ereadodure Pao uwobe eiamedu ewiegai icai judeukare emawuge emearutoruie Pao jituji. Dukoiare eiamedu jekare kuricigore. 
Apostolodoge eiamedu ere tudo pui Jerusalém tadadu. 4Icare etaregodure Jerusalémto. Nonore Pao uwobe, apostolodoge, Pao uwobe eimejerage ere tugeragu ei tuiegare tabo. Dukejere ereadodure ewiegai Pao rore puduiboe jamedu boeji. 5Macare iage, duwugere fariseudogere emage marigudu tumearutorure Pao jitu otodai, ere turagojedo, egore umoduie turugadu boewo judeukare emawuge ewiri kado jamedu, uwo nono Moisés ure boe eroiagudo du reore. 6Icare apostolodoge, mare nowu Pao uwobe ia eimejerage, ere tudo pui tumagowo nowu inoduji, inoba umode duji. 7Emago raire pui, dukejere icare Pedrore turagojedo, akore ei Iwiemage, taeruduware jii paru pijie Paore tugeragu ii tabiji ireadoduwo tuwadaru ji judeukare emawuge ewiegai ma, emearutoruwo ji. 8Emare joruduware ime ewaboji, dukoiare ure turodo nono tumearudu kurii ei du kodiwore, ure Aroe Pemegarewu maku etai, umagai maku pagai du reore. 9Aiwore ei taiwo magai pai du reore, ure ewabo pemegado emearutorure ji kodi. 1 Kode, kodiba tagomare Pao ji? Tare joruduwadowuge enoredudo paomage eroiwakare jiboe tabo, paroiwakare jiboe tabo, kodiba? 1 Pagire pamearutorure paginorudoduie Pagimejera Jesus Cristo o boe pemegarewu koia duji. Oinore umode etai jamedu. 1 Eiamedu biapagare Pedro bataru ji tumago bokwa tabo. Dukeje icare ewiapagare Barnabé mare Paulo ereadodui tuwiegai Paoi tudowuje ekera tabo judeukare emawuge etaiwu turo pemegarewu kurirewu jamedu ji. 1 Emago akedu kejere icare, Tiago akore Iwiemage tawiapagado: 1 Oino maigodu Simão Pedro readodure pawiegai Pao aiwoi judeukare emawuge eiduji, tuwo tuwobedo emage. 1 Ica, awu inodu ure nono profetadoge ewadaru padui bapera kejedu reore: 1 Awu inodu otobiji imode ikirimi, imode Davi uwai buturewu rakojedo pugeje, imode uwai kobo rogu boe pemegado, imode rakojedo. 1 Ma, rakoje kimomodeu ime ekoduwo Aroe Eimejera bogai, boe emagore ikie bogai bukejewu boe epadui pumekejedu jamedu boe ekoduwo bogai jamedu. 1 Oinore Pao akore, duwure awu jamedu towuje, joruduware jamedu boeji jii paru piji (Am 9, s). 1 Dukodi icare imeardaere uie turugadu pakawo judeukare emawuge ei tugirimi Pao ae tuibagi pugejewu emorora amagadudo. 2 Imeardaere uie turugadu pawo bapera atugodo etai ekawo makudure aroe eimejerage pagarewuge etaiwu barege ekodu kowuje, eerebari kawo, ekawo akere bitowu barege ekodu, eku, kowuje. Oino tu je. 2 Paga karega, padure bapera kejewu Moisés ure boe eroiagudodu makodu makodure Sábado jamedu ji bakurirewuge eiamedu tada boe eiamedu padui pumekejedu ewiegai jii marigudu jii oino. 2 Dukodi icare apostolodoge, Pao uwobe eimejerage, Pao uwobe eiamedu boe eerudu pemegare tuwo ia ime etawuje tubiji, etuwo Paulo apo, Barnabé apo, Antioquia kae. Ere etawujewuge reo judas, iei Barsaba cedu, mare Silas, duwuge kurirewugere emage tumedage etada. 
Jerusalém pijiwu boe eroiagudu. 2 Ere reko pudabowu bapera atugo reo: - Apostolodoge cegi, Pao uwobe eimejerage cegi, cegimadunure judeukare emawu Antioquia tadawu, Sria tadawu, Cilícia tadawu cewiemage tagai. 2 Cemearudure boe egoi ia uture cebijiwuge ei tumago maere tai, tui tamorora amagadudo dutabo. Mare cegire cekare etudo tawogai. 2 Dukodi icare cere cedo pui, cere ia ime etawuje cebiji cewo etudo tawogai, cemearudu kurire jiwu Barnabé, Paulo mage ebo. 2 Duwuge ere tumagu tuwidoduwo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo ie koia. 2 Icare cere Judas mare Sila etudo ebo tawogai, duwuge ereadodumode nowu inoduji tawiegai. 2 Aroe Pemegarewu apore ceerudu pemegare cekawo tagoredudo iaboe iaboe tabo, mare awu inodu tabo tu je: 2 Tagogwagekawo makudure aroe eimejerage pagarewuge etaiwu barege ekoduji, takawo akere bitowu barege ekodu, eku kowuje, tagera keadu kawo jamedu. Umode turugadu tawo inoduboe pijido. Cegimadunure tawogai. 3 Dukejere icare nowugere tugimadudo epiji, icare eture toro Antioquia kae, torore icare ere Pao uwobe eto pui, icare ere bapera maku etai. 3 Emagore bapera ji, dutabore eiamedu jekarere, icare emearudu awadure pudui pugeje. 3 Icare Judas, Silamage, duwugere profetadogere emage jamedu, emago awadure nowu Pao uwobei, tui eruduwado, tui emeardae awadudo pudui jamedu dutabo. 3 Meri makakare ei nono, dukejere Pao uwobe ere tugimadudo ebo pugeje, boe butugu tabo. Icare ere tugirimi tuibagi cewu ure tududo torowuge etae pugeje. 3 (Boekarema. Silas jordu pemegare tumuguwo nono, Judas rema ure tugirimi Jerusalém kae tuibagi). 3 Paulo mare Barnabé emugure Antioquia tada jamedu. Ere boe eruduwado, ere Pao bataru kogado ia tumedage makarewuge ebo. 
Paulo mare Sila emeru rekodajiwu. 3 Meri makakare pugeje dukeje, Paulo makore Barnabe ji, akore Pawo pagirimi, paeruduwo pawiemagei pugeje, nowu pare Pao bataru kogado tadawu bakurirewuge eiamedu boe ekao. Paeruduwo inoba ere, epemegare, iarema epegare du bogai. 3 Boekimorema, Barnabé aidure tuwo João iei Marcos cedu ko pudabo. 3 Paulorema meardaere boroie, paga karega, marigudu, emugui Panfília keje dukeje, João uturadu Paulo mare Barnabé epiji, ukare tugerabraredo ei emaragodae keje. 3 Dukodi icare Paulo, Barnabé emeardaekare pureore, icare ere tudo tuginoi. Icare Barnabé uture Chipre kae, ika kurirewu tabo, ure Marcos reko pudabo. 4 Paulorema ure Silas reko pudabo, icare Pao uwobe emagore Pao ji eparu tabo, icare uture jamedu. Merure Síria moto kae, Cilícia moto kae, tui Pao uwobe emearudu awadudo pudui dutabo. 

Paulore tumeduiado Timoteoce. 1Aregodure Derbe bakurirewu kae dukejere uture Listra bakurirewu to. Nonore icare ia ure joruduwadowu iei Timóteo cedu mugure nono. Uce Judéia cristãorodo rema, uo Grécia kejeu rema. 2Awu imedu pemega remawunure Listra, Icõnio kejewu Pao uwobe eegai. 3Dukodi icare Paulo aidure koduwo pudabo, mare ure biri kado jao, judeudoge eigoia, eiamedu joruduware uoie Grêcia kejewuie ure ema kodi. 4Ekodure kaewu bakurirewuge etada ere boe eruduwado emearutoruwo apostolodoge mare Pao uwobe eimejerage ere boe eroiagudu Jerusalém tadaduji. 5Oinodu tabore Pao uwobe ere tubewudo tumearutoru tabo, ere cidodudo gu gu meri jamedu ji. 6Dukejere ere pagado Frígia moto kajeje, Galácia moto kajeje, mare ekodukare Asia moto kae, Aroe Pemegarewu aidukare kodi. 7Etaregodui Mísia moto kae dukeje, etaidure tugoduwo Bitínia moto kae, mare Pagimejera Jesus Utaroe Pemegarewu aidukare jamedu. 8Dukejere icare ere pagado goro goro tabo Mísia moto kajeje, icare ere turawuje Tróades bakurirewu padui pobo maerewu okwai du kae. 
Ere pagado Macedônia kae. 9Ia boe cojire Paulo unuiaore jorudure ia Macedônia pijiwu imedu rakojei tuiegai, okwamagudi pudui duji, akore Amode pagado pobo maerewu okwa bakowu kae, amode akera braredo cei. 1 Awu unuiao akedu kejere icare akore cei cegoduwo toro Macedônia kae, ceruduware Pao makoi cewogai, cewo tuwadaru kogado nonowuge ewiegai duji kodi. 
Emugure Filipo bakurirewu tada. Lídia ure tumagu Pao ai. 1 Dukodi icare, nowu Tróade bakurirewu pijire icare cere cedaredo ika kurirewu to, cegodure kuri toro Samotrácia kae, dupijire cegodure Necápoli kae. 1 Du pijire cegodure pugeje Macedônia kejewu kurire tumedage ekoriwu bakurirewu iei Filipo cedu kae. Awu Macedônia moto mugure Roma kejewuge ero kuda. Meri makakare cei nono. 1 Icare, nowu Sábado meri ji, cere cedawuje nowu bakurirewu o baiporo piji toro pobo okwato, cemeardaere toroie pemegamode cenogwamaguduwo Pao ji kodi. Nonore icare cemugure, dutabore cereadodure ia areme etui pui nonodu biegai. 1 Ia emage ui mitodu, iei Lídia cedu, Tiatira bakurirewu pijiwudo, duwudore aroia akirodo tabo, pagudure Pao ji, biapaganure cei, Paore uwabo jado biapaga pemegawo Paulo bataru ji. 1 Dukodi icare ao pegododure, uwobe jamedu, dukejere okwamagudure cei, akore Tameardaemode imearutoruie Pao ji ma, taremo iwaito, tamugudo itabo. Icare ure cerodo ino rugadu. 
Braere Paulo mare Sila etugu baicorewu to. 1 Boekimorema, ia meri keje, cedui pagogwamagudure Pao ji kejewo kae dukeje, ia nogwaredu aregodure cedogi, brae etugareredonure ema, duwudo, Paokare emawu iei Piton cedu utaroe meture tada, du kodire joruduware boe biarewu ji, dutabore ure cimejerage eno diiero maka makado. 1 Icare uture ceregodaji, Paulo rekodaji, tagoi oino dutabo: - Awu imere Aroe Eimejera Kurirewu utugaregere emage duwugere taeruduwado baru kaewu awaraji. 1 Mako makore awu inoduji meri makaguragare tu tu tu je. Du inodu otobiji, Paulo korigodure ji, ure tuie kirimi bogai, icare makore nowu aroe ji, akore Jesus Cristo ie tabo imagonure ai: atawuje piji. Kuri je dukejere icare ure tudawuje piji. 1 Boekimorema, nowu imejerage ere boe pa tumodukae tugeragu o diieroji pugeje duji. Dukodi icare ere tugeragu Paulo ji, Sila ji, ere erego toro brae eimejerage ere tudo pui tuwo tugogado boeiwo kae. 2 Dukejere ere brae eimejerage eerududo ei, tagoi oino dutabo: - Awu imere judeudogere emage, enure pago bakurirewu tadawuge etago turugoduwo, enure boe eruduwado erowo nono Roma pijiwuge cegi cedaidukare, ceroiwakare jiboe reore. 2 Dukodi icare nowu bakurirewu tadawuge ere turagojedu turugoduwo ei. Icare brae eiemejerage ere boedo ekudae tawuje tuwo iwara to ei. 2 Ere iwara to ei dutabore ere ecebae kuricigodo, dukejere ere etugu baicorewu to, egore jeture eiwu ji jetu pemegawo ei. 2 Nowure icare mearutorure tugimejerage ewadaru ji dukoiare ure etugu baicorewu to toro upo kae, ure ewure gogudo iku meriri tabo, ure nowu meriri iku kogudo ipo kajeje pugeje tuku. 2 Boekimorema, boe cooia keje, Paulo mare Sila enogwamagudunure Pao ji, eranure Pao o roia pemegarewu ji; meture baicorewu tadawuge ewiapagare ei. 2 Kuri je dukejere icare, moto amagadu kuricigore, du kodire nowu baicorewu bure amagadure jamedu. Icare baiporodoge ere tuiado, mugure baicorewu tadawuge ewure kajejewu iku meriri ure tugiwuje jamedu. 2 Icare nowu jeture eiwu imedu jetadure, jorudure baiporodoge ei tuiado duji, icare meardaere meture baicorewu tadawuge eregoduie marigudu duji. Icare ure toriga rairewu tawuje tuwo tuwido. 2 Macare Paulo oiogwarire ji, akore Akaba akogorido! Cemugure woe ceiamedu tabo. 2 Dukejere, nowu jeture eiwu makore jorugu bogai, icare ure turemo nowu baito, ure tuwu tai je Paulo mare Sila ewure paru. 3 Dukejere ure turagojedo, ure erego baawadu kae, unorare ei, akore Ikimejerage, inoba iromode iwo ikinorudo? 3 Icare egore ji Amearutorudo Pagimejera Jesus Cristo ji, dutabore amode akinorudo, aki awobe eiamedu tabo. 3 Icare ere Pao bataru kogado ji, uwobei jamedu. 3 Icare nowu boe comitoduji, ure jetu pemegare ei, ure ecebae kabi. Kuri je dukejere icare ere ao pegodo jamedu. 3 Dukejere ure erego toro tuwai kae coboji, ure eke pemegado, icare jekare kuricigore, tuwobe eiamedu tabo, icai tumearutorui Pao jitu koia. 3 Barogwa tore icare brae eimejerage ere ia tugobaigarege emagodo ji. Nowu ime etawuje, etudo. 3 Icare nowu jeture baicorewu jiwu imedu readodure Paulo biegai, akore Nowu ikimejerage emagore iwiegai iwo taginorudo, du kodi icare tadawuje, tadudo boe butugurewu tabo. 3 Macare Paulo akore Roma kejewugere cegi, du kodi karega ere iwara to cei boe eegai, icare ere cedugu baicorewu to tukai tugogado cei dutabo. Macare oino ere cedo cedawuje oino podu tabo. Umodukare ino! Etuwo mato cedae, ewo cegiwuje tugera tabo ewo cedawuje awu piji. 3 Icare nowu tugobaigarege ereadodure nowu bataru ji nowu brae eimejerage ewiegai, duwugere epagudugodure tumearudui Roma kejewugeie emage. 3 Icare eture toro etae, emagore ei butugu tabo, emagore ewo tuwudugugo pudui, enogwamagudure ei etuwo nowu bakurirewu piji. 4 Icare ere tudawuje nowu bakurirewu piji, dukejere icare ere turemo Lídia uwaito, du tadare eerudure tuwiemagei, ere emearudu awadudo pudui pugeje, dukejere eture nowu bakurirewu piji. 

Paulo mare Sila emugui Tessalônica kejedu. 1Ere pagado Anfípoli bakurirewu kajeje, dukejere ere pagado Apolônia bakurirewu kajeje, icare etaregodure Tessalônica bakurirewu to. Nonore judeudoge ia eno sinagoga mugure. 2Icare Paulo uture etae turorewoji, icare makore ei, emagore ji, emagore pui puibagi, sabadore ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. 3Readodure ewiegai, ure eruduwado Pao o bapera tabo uie turugadu Cristowo tuiwodo dukeje tuiewoduwo birewuge epiji duji. - Awu ireadodure tawiegaiwu Jesus, emare Cristo rema. Oinore akore ei. 4Icare ia emage emearutorure Pao ji, ere tumedagedo Paulo, Sila magece. Ia judeukare emawu makarewuge duwugere emearutorure Pao ji marigudu, mare ia areme kurirewuge, ere tumedagedo emage jamedu. 5Icare judeudoge ekorire ei, ere ia ime eto pui dutabore icare ere boedo turagojedo turugoduwo ei. Icare eture Jason uwai kae, ere turemo to, tuiemarui ewogai tuwo emagu boe etai ewo ewido. 6Mare eerudukare ei nono, du kodi icare ere tugeragu Jason ji, ia Pao uwobe ebo, icare ere erego toro brae eiemejerage eegai egore Awuge ere boedo turugoduwo pui boe jamedu boe keje. Icare emugure oino woe. Icare Jason ure tugeragu ei tuwai tada. 7Eiamedu etonare pagimejera kurirewu Cesar ji, tui ia eimejera kurirewu mugudo mugato, dure Jesus reno. 8Awu tuwadaru tabore ere boe ekorigo, ere eiemejerage ekorigo. 9Macare Jason mare ia uwobe ere diiero maku etai, dukejere ere etudo. 1 Icare, boe coaregodure dukeje, Pao uwobe ere Paulo mare Sila etudo Beréia bakurirewu kae. Etaregodure to dukejere icare ere turemo judeudoge ere tudo pui tumagowo Pao bataru ji tadawu baito. 1 Awu judeudoge epemega kodure nowu Tessalônica tadawuge epemega kori, du kodi icare ere tugeragu Pao bataru ji taidu kuricigo tabo. Eemarure Pao o bapera keje umode ino rugadu du bogai. 1 Makarewuge emearutorure Pao ji, ia judeukare emawu areme kurirewuge emearutorure jamedu, ia ime makarewuge emearutorure jamedu. 1 Macare nowu Tessalôica kejewu judeudoge ere boe pa Pauloie Pao bataru kogado Beréia keje duji, dukoiare icare eture toro tuwo nowu boe erugo ji pugeje. 1 Dukodi icare Pao uwobe ere Paulo utudo nowu piji toro pobo maerewu okwa kae. Sila mare Timóteo emugure nono. 1 Uture Paulo apowuge ere reko Atenas bakurirewu kae, dupijire ere tugirimi tuibagi, icare emagore Sila mare Timóteo ewiegai Paulo bataru ji, etuwo tuwogai kuri je. 
Paulo uwadodae Atenas kejedu. 1 Paulo paganure tumedage ewogai Atenas bakurirewu keje, du tonajire icare kiarigodu kuricigore tuiorudui boe emugui Paokare emawuge ekuda duji kodi. 1 Meri jamedu ji mako makore judeudogei, mearutorure Pao jiwu judeukare emawugei, jorudure ji bororo jiwugei jamedu. 1 Ia joruduwarewuge, epicurewuge, estoicodoge emagore ji. Iage egore Kaba jiba awu mako paga pagarewu ako oino? Iage egore Readodunure Aroe Eimejerage maiwugei rakudu. 1 Dukodi icare ere tugeragu ji, ere reko toro pudabo, joruduwarewuge ewai kae, icare egore ji amagodo kakoduwu bataru maiwu jiba akagoino? 2 Cemearudure aiabiji jiboe ure tuginoi ceegai. Cedaidure ceruduwawo kaboba jiba akagoino. 2 Paga karega, Atenas kejewuge, aregodure Atenas kaewuge, erokare ia turo, mare etaidure tuioruduwawo kakoduwu bataru maiwu jiboe egoino tu je. 2 Icare Paulore turagojedo nowu joruduwarewuge ewai oiabiji, akore Atenas kejewu ime, inure boe pa tamearutoru kuricigoi Aroe Eimejerage eiduji. 2 Imerure tago bakurirewu kao, dutabore iorudure tare tabujodo jiwu tagoroei, icare itaregodure ia tago Aroe Eimejera muga kae dukejere atugododure oino: - Boe eruduwakare jiwu Aroe Eimejera ai. Oino. Ica, tare tabujodo ji taeruduwakai jitu tabowu Aroe Eimejera jire ireadodunure tawiegai. 2 Ure awu moto towuje, ure mugure kejewu boe jamedu boe towujewu Pao Kurirewu rema. Ore awu moto, awu baru rema. Mugukare ime ere towujewu baidoge etada. 2 Makokare boewo tugerabraredo pudui, okeakare iaboe bogai iaboe bogai. Emare ure boe eiamedu jedo, ure ake arego boe eiamedu ja piji, ure boe jamedu boe maku boe etai. 2 Ure ime eiamedu botudo ia imedu mito tu je dupiji, emuguwo awu moto jamedu boe kao. Ure eno joru, eno moto ure remagu etai. 2 Aidure boe eiamedu boe eemaruwo Pao Kurirewu bogai, etaregoduwo ae, eeruduwo ji. Ica, Pao Aroe Eimejera mugu jaekare pai. 2 Paga karega, tadare pamugure, tadare pamagadure, tadare paragojere. Umagai ia tageroia epa akore pagi jamedu uwobere pagi. 2 Kode Pao Kurirewu uwobere pagi dukeje, pameardaemodukare Pao Kurireuie nono meriri ekurewu, iarema meriri kigadurewu, iarema imere towuje tuioruduwa tabowu tori mori kurirewu reore. 3 Mare Pao Kurirewu aiwokare ime eruduwakai puduidu kodiwoji. Oino makonure padure boe jamedu boe kejewu ime eiamedu bogai ewo tugirimi pudae tuibagi. 3 Joruduware tumode tugogado awu moto kejewu ime eiamedu boe ji du kejewu meri ji. Aidure tuwo tugogado ime eiamedu boe ji ia imedu mito tu jewu maragodae tabo. Ure awu inodu awadudo boe eegai, tui nowu imedu jewodudo birewuge epiji dutabo. 3 Icare emearudure makoi boe ewodumodeduji dukeje, ia emage ewadarurerure ji, iage egore Pi ji jao, ia boe keje cemearudumode awu ako oinoduji pugeje. 3 Dukodi icare Paulore tudawuje epiji. 3 Boekimorema, ia ime enogwaceradu Paulo jaogwai, emearutorure bataru ji, duwuge etada Dionísio joruduwa rakarewu mugure, mare ia aredu iei Dêmaris mare iage emugure jamedu. 
Paulo mugui Corinto kejedu. 1Nowu inodu rekodajire icare Paulore tudawuje Atenas bakurirewu piji, icare uture Corinto bakurirewu kae. 2Nonore jorudure ia judeu iei Aquila cedu, Ponto pijiwu, oreduje apo duji, Awuge etaregodure maigodu Itália piji. Brae eimejera kurirewu iei Cláudio cedu ure judeudoge eiamedu edo tudawuje Roma piji kodi. Icare Paulore tumedagedo emage. 3Emaragodaere pureore, du kodi icare mugure ebo, maragodunure ebo jamedu (Ere aroia bai towuje brae ewaice). 4Sábado jamedu ji mako makore sinagoga bai tada, ure tubewudo tuwo judeudoge, gregodoge emearutorudo. 5Dukejere icare Sila, mare Timóteo etaregodure Macedônia moto piji. Icare Paulore tumagu tuiamedu tabo tuwo Pao bataru kogado, mako makore judeudoge ewiegai Jesusie ure Cristo rema duji. 6Nowugerema emearutorukare, emago pegare ji, du kodi icare ure tugudae aroia jukodo ei, akore ei Tagu butuwo taiogi. Ikera rorogodukare. Ica, awu otobiji iemarumode judeukare emawuge ewogai. 7Icare ure tudawuje nowu piji, ure turemo ia judeukare emawu mearutorure Pao jiwu iei Tito Jetororewu cedu uwaito, uwai mugure nowu sinagoga bai meki. 8Du inodu tabo ia imedu iei Crispo cedu, nowu sinagoga bai kejewuge eimejera, mearutorure Pao ji uwobe apo du kodire, Corinto bakurirewu tadawu ia makarewuge emearudure Paulo bataru ji, emearutorure jamedu, icare etao pegododure. 9Icare ia boe co ji Pao makore Paulo ji unuiao pemegarewu tada, akore Apagudu kaba, amagodo boe ji, amago bokwa kaba. Ica, iragojere akabo. 1 Iaboe iaboe emodukare tuburedo ai tuwo akogorido, iwobe emagare awu bakurirewu tada du kodi. 1 Paulo rakojere nono joru mito, ari ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowuto, unure boe eruduwado Pao bataru ji. 
Paulo rakojei brae eimejera jekaidu. 1 Nowu Acaia moto kejewuge eimejera Galião rema, dutabore nowu judeudoge ere turagojedo tuiamedu tabo Paulo togi. Icare ere tugeragu ji, ere reko brae eiemejera ae, egore 1 Awu imedu ure boedo tubujodo ia Aroe Eimejera ukai nono judeudoge eroiagudu reoreduji. 1 Icare Paulo aidure tumagowo, macare nowu brae eimejera Galião makore judeudogei, akore Awu inodu umode ia boe ero pegarewu rugadu dukeje, umode turugadu iwiapagawo tai. 1 Mare taeruduwa reno, taroiagudu reno, du kodire tagire tamode tagogado ji. Itaidukare iwo ikogado awu inoduji. 1 Icare ure etudo nowu bai piji. 1 Dukodi icare eiamedure tugeragu Sostenes ji, nowu sinagoga kejewuge eimejera, ere boe to ji nowu brae eiemejera jekai. Du tabore nowu brae eiemejera Galião makokare iaboeji. 
Pauloi tugirimi Antioquia kaedu. 1 Paulo mugure Corinto tada biega tu je kimo, dukejere ure tugimadudo nowu Pao uwobe epiji, icare uture ika kurirewu tabo Síria moto kae. Priscila, mare Aquila ekodure apo jamedu. Mare etaregodumode Síria kaedu otodai, Paulo rakojere jao Cencréia ba kurirewu tada tuwo tao rawuje, ia boe keje makore Pao ji oinoie turomode pudui du kodi. 1 Dukejere etaregodure feso bakurirewu kae du tadare ure nowuge ei pobedu mugudo nono. Emare ure turemo sinagoga baito du tadare makore nowu judeudogei. 2 Awuge enogwamagudure ji muguwo nono ebo kimo, mare aidukare. 2 Imadure ebo tuberabiji, akore Imode ikirimi tawogai Pao aidumode dukeje. Dukejere icare uture nowu feso piji. 2 Uture jii Cesaréia moto kae, icare ruture Jerusalém bakurirewu kae, cimaduwo nowu Pao uwobe ebo, dupijire kuri je ure turawuje Antioquia kae. 2 Nonore mugure biega tu je, dukejere uture pugeje ure pagado Galácia moto kajeje, icare ure pagado Frígia moto kajeje, tui Pao uwobe emearudu awadudo pudui dutabo. 
Apolo maragodae feso kejedu. 2 Du tonajire icare ia judeu iei Apolo cedu, ia Alexandria pijiwu imedu, mako pemegarewu, joruduwa kuricigore Pao bataru jiwu imedu, aregodure feso bakurirewu to. 2 Emare joruduwa rakare Pao utawaraji, mako kuricigore tumeardae pemegarewu tabo Jesus jiboe ji, joruduware João o boe etao pegoji tu rugadu kodi karega. 2 Dukodire makore nowu sinagoga bai tada tubagudu bokwa tabo. Icare Priscila, Aquila emearudure ji, du kodi icare ere ko pudabo ere Pao utawara awadudodu pemegado jekai. 2 Icare aidure tuduwo Acáia moto kae, du kodi icare feso tadawu mearutorurewuge ere mearudu awadudo pudui, ere aidudo, ere bapera atugodo nowu Acáia kejewu mearutorurewuge etai ewo tugeragu ji. Tumugui toro dutabore ure tugera braredodu kuricigodo nowu mearutorurewugei Pao o boe pemegarewu koia. 2 Ure tumago rakado judeudoge ewadaru jipagi boe eegai, tui eruduwado, Pao o bapera tabo, Cristoie ure Jesusce duji. 

Feso kejewu Joãore joruduwadowuge. 1Apolo mugui Corinto bakurirewu tada du tonaji, Paulore pagado mugure cobojiwu moto kajeje, icare aregodure feso bakurirewu to. Nonore jorudure ia mearutorurewugei, unorare ei, akore 2Nowu tamearutorure boeto ji du kodiboe keje, Aroe Pemegarewu makudure tagai? 3Icare egore ji Boro. Mare cemearudukare Aroe Pemegareuie ure duji jamedu. 3. Icare Paulo akore Kode, kakoduwu boe etao pegododu taboba tagao pegore? Egore João o boe etao pego tabore cedao pegododure. 4Icare Paulo akore Joãore boe etao pegodo boe eedorore tabowu boe etao pego tabo, makore boe ji emearutoruwo aregodumode turegodajiwu imeduji, duwure Jesus rema. 5Emearudure awu inodu jitu kejere icare etao pegododure Pagimejera Jesus ie tabo. 6Icare Paulore tugera bu ewugeje, dukejere Aroe Pemegarewu ure turawuje ewugeje. Icare emagore boe ewadaru tuginoiwu ji, emagore Pao bataru ji jamedu. 7Nowu ime ere pagera pudogidure ere pobe pugeje. 
Pao uwobe ei tuguo feso bakurirewu tadadu. 8Icare Paulore turemo sinagoga baito du tadare readodure Pao bataru ji tubagudu bokwa tabo, Arire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware duji, ure eruduwado Pao o boe pemegarewu ji. 9Mare ia emage emearutorukare, ewabo rakare, emago pega kuricigore Pao bataru ji boe eegai, du kodi icare Paulore tuiaedo ei. Icare ure mearutorurewuge eto pui pudabo, ure eruduwado meri jamedu ji, ia imedu iei Tirano cedu uwai tada. 1 Oinore ure jorui pobedu keje. Dukodire Asia kejewuge eiamedu boe, judeudoge, judeukare emawuge emearudure Pao bataru ji. 1 Paore turo kurirewu towuje towuje Paulo iera tabo. Dukodire ere jore Paulo jiwu kigadurewu aroiarogu, mare ia aroia boe reko kogodurewuge etai. 1 Dukeje epemegagodure, Aroe pegareure tudawuj tumedure tadawuge epiji jamedu. 1 Boekarema, ia judeudoge, duwugere Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu boe epiji jamedu, emerure nono, icare ere tumeardae tawuje tuwo Aroe pegarewuge ewarigu Jesus ie tabo Aroe pegarewu meture tadawuge epiji. Icare egore Aroe pegarewu dogei Cenure tado etadawuje Paulo readodure jiwu Jesus ie tabo. 1 Rore oinowugere ia sacerdote judeu iei Scevas cedu orenure emage. 1 Macare Aroe pegarewu akore ewadaru jipagi, akore Ioruduware Jesus ji, ioruduware Paulo ji, tagirema, kakoduwuge tagiba? 1 Du tabore nowu Aroe pegarewu meture tadawu imedu ure taredo ewugeje, ure etogorido, dukoiare eregodure nowu bai piji, togoridodu tabo, tugudae aroia mega mega rogu tabo. 1 Awu bakaru aregodure nowu mugure feso bakurirewu tadawu judeudoge eiamedu boe, gregodoge eiamedu boe etae. Icare eiamedu pagudugodu kuricigore. Kodi icare ere Pagimejera Jesus ie kurido. 1 Icare makarewuge etaregodure tumagowo turo pegarewu ji. 1 Ia makarewuge emaragodure Aroe pegarewuge ebo, duwugere to bapera arego, ere kowu boe eiamedu jekai. Nowu baperadoge emori kuricigore kodi karega. 2 Oinore Pao bataru ure tugidado, ure taododu kuricigodo. 
Paulo mearudae. 2 Dukejere Paulo aidure tuduwo Jerusalemto, mare umode pagado Macedônia moto kajeje, Acáia moto kajeje jao. Icare akore Imugumode toro (Jerusalém keje) dukeje umode turugadu ituwo Roma bakurirewu kae jorduwo ji. 2 Ure tumedage Timóteo mare Erosto ei pobedu etudo Macedônia kae, pudumire mugure eiageje Asia moto keje jao. 
Meriri kigadurewu epage erugodui Paulo jidu. 2 Nowu du kodi ia boe pegarewu ure tuguo Pao bataru ji. 2 Ia imedu meriri kigadurewu epa iei Demétrio cedu duwure aroe eimejerago pagarewudo iei Diana cedu uwai meriri kigadurewu rogudoge etowuje, dutabore ure tumedage edo tugeragu mori kuricigorewu ji. 2 Icare ure nowu tumedage meriri epage eto pui, akore ei Taeruduware pai pageragu du kuricigoie diieroji awu pamaragodae morice duji. 2 Macare taerudure, tamearudunure awu Paulo akoi makarewuge ewiegai, imere towujewu aroe eimejerageie, aroe eimejerage kaegae. Ure awu feso tadawuge eiamedu boce kodi emearutorudo tagoino duji. 2 Awu imedu pemegakare pai, pamaragodae umode tubegado. Boe emearutorumodukare pagimejerago Diana Kurirewudo uwai ji pugeje. Cewu Asia kejewuge eiamedu, moto kejewuge eiamedu ere tubujodo jekaiwu pagimejerago Diana biegamode pugeje. 2 Kodi icare, awu bataru koiare ure enogorawu boe kori tabo, du kodire enoiogwarigodure, egore feso kejewuge eimejerago Diana kuricigore. 2 Icare nowu bakurirewu tadawuge eiamedu boe ere turagojedo eregodure nowu bai kurirewu kae, ere tugeragu Caio ji, Aristarco ji, duwugere Paulo metagere emage, Macedônia moto pijiwugere emage. 3 Paulo aidure tuwo boe eerududo pudui, mare metage etaidukare rowo ino. 3 Ia Asia kejewuge eiemejarage duwugere tumeduiado ema marigudu, ere bakaru maku bogai jamedu utukawo nowu bakurirewu kae. 3 Nowu boe etui puidu pega remawunure: enoiogwarire jice woje, jice woje, mare eiamedu joruduwakare kodiba turagojere nono duji. 3 Dukejere ere ia judeu iei Alexandre cedu tawuje tubiji, metage ere tugera jodo keje tuwo rakojedo boe etogea keje makowo boe ji. Icare Alexandre ure tugera awogado boe eegai tumagowo. 3 Mare boe eerudure judeuie ure emaduji, dukeje eiamedu oiogwarire jii je horare pobe duji, egore feso kejewuge eimejerago Diana kuricigo remawunure. Oinore egore tu tu tu je. 3 Dukeje, nowu bakurirewu tadawuge eimejera rekodajiwu aregodure tuwo boe ewudugugo. Akore feso tadawuge tagi, ime eiamedure eruduware awu feso bakureuie akarurewu Diana kurido, eiamedu boe eruduware Diana ureurewu meriri butuie baru piji duji. 3 Iaboe iaboe emodukare tuioruduwa bokwado awu inoduji, du kodire ure turugadu tawudugugoduwo, tarokawo ia taro tameardae bokwa tabo. 3 Awu tare tageragu jiwu ekare tagimejerago pegado, emago pega karega ure ji. 3 Kode, Demétrio iarema ia metage etaidure tumagowo iaboe rogu boeji iaboe ji ma, boe eimejerage ewai mugure nono, jadodure, eimejerage emugure nono jamedu, emode tugogado ei. 3 Tagaidure tamagowo iaboeji ma, boe eimejerage emode tugogado. 4 Boe puredumode pai boewo parego brae eimejerage etae awu ure tudowuje awu ji oinono dukoia. Paga karega, boe kodiboe bokware awu boe enogo kuricigoi pui turugoduwo pui, tokiwo pui, togoriwo pui du bogai. 4 Nowu bataru koiare icare nowu boe etui puidu ure taodo, akedure. 

Paulo utui Macedônia kaedu, Grécia kaedu. 1Nowu boe enogoi puidu akedu keje, Paulore tumedage eto pui pudae, icare makore ei; dukeje imadure ebo tudui epiji toro Macednia kae dutabo. 2Merure nowu moto kao jii je, ure Pao uwobe eruduwado tumago kuricigo tabo, dukejere aregodure Grécia moto kae. 3Nonore rakojere arire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. Uiagu taredo ika kurirewu to tuduwo Sria moto kae, du tonajire judeudogere jorubo reko utawaraji. Dukodi icare ure tugirimi tuibagi Macedônia moto kae. 4Ia metage ekodure apo, duwugere Sápatro, Beréia moto pijiwu, Pitro onaregedu, mare Aristarco, mare Segundo, Tessalônica pijiwuge, mare Gaio, Derbe pijiwu, mare Timóteo, mare Títico, mare Trófico, Asia pijiwuge. 5Awugere eture cedododai, icare epagare cewogai Tróade bakurirewu keje. 6Cegirema cemugure nono jao. Icare, Páscoa akedu keje, cere cedaredo ika kurirewu to, nowu Filipo bakurirewu piji toro Tróade kae etae. Nonore ceragojere semanare mito. 7Nowu semana boeto jiwu meri ji cere cedo pui cewo Pao o amirewu kowuje. Icare Paulore tuduiagu nowu piji nowu meri rekodajiwu ji, du kodire mako makore nowu Pao uwobei, makore ei jii boe cooia kae tu... 8Jorugu makare nono cemugure tadawu bai tada. 9Boekimorema, ia iparedu iei Eutico cedu, muguradu ia baiporo koborigodu keje, icare unudure, Paulo mako tonaji. Nori kori remawunure jokuji du kodire buture baire pobe ma awu metuia bokware dupiji moto kae, nori kori koia. Icare bire. Ere tugeragu ji bi inoduji. 1 Icare Paulore turawuje ae, ure tumegido bukeje, ure tugeragu ji tugana pobe dutabo, ure bu todogajeje, akore Tamorora amagadu kaba, jeere pugeje. 1 Icare ruture pugeje, dukejere mako raire ei pugeje jii barogwa kododu kae. 1 Nowu iparedu rema, ere reko, je inodu tabo, tuiegare kuricigo tabo. 1 Icare cere cedaredo ika kurirewu to, icare cegodure Assos bakurirewu kae; Paulorema uture moto kajeje. Assos keje cebagare bogai, taidu rekodaji. 1 Nowu Assos bakurirewu kaere icare aregodure cedae, cere cegeragu ji ika kurirewu tada dutabore cegodure Mitilene bakurirewu kae. 1 Du pijire cegodure pugeje nowu pobo maerewu kajeje pugeje. Barogwa tore icare cedaregodure Quios bakurirewu kae. Nowu meri rekodajiwu ji pugeje cedaregodure Samos bakurirewu kae. barogwa to pugeje icare cedaregodure Mileto bakurirewu to. 1 Paulo kiarire tuduwo feso bakurirewu to, tumugu raikawo Asia moto keje, akere ji taregoduwo Jerusalém kae tuwo Pentecostes o peta ko. 
Paulo uwadodae feso kejewu codudoge ewiegaiwu. 1 Mare nowu Mileto mito dupijire makore feso tadawu Pao uwobe eimejerage ewogai. 1 Icare etaregodure ae, ere tuiamedu to pui, dukejere icare akore ei Taeruduware inoba iro irore tai boe jaeduji jii ire iremo awu Asia moto kaewu boeto jiwu meri otobiji. 1 Imaragodure Pao ai, ire iwiegado tu je dutabo, itoragudu tabo, judeudoge ere mugudo inaiwu jorubo oiagi. 2 Taeruduware ikae umode turugadu tagaiboe iaboe iaboe pijido, ikare biado, mare ire awadudo tawiegai boe eegai tawai otoji duji. 2 Inogituware judeudogei, inogituware judeukare emawugei, ewo tugirimi tuibagi Pao ae, emearutoruwo pagimejera Jesus Cristo ji. 2 Oinore icare Aroe Pemegareure tumugudo ikeje ikoduwo Jerusalemto, mare ioruduwakare iwo aidugirimode toroduji. 2 Ioruduware tu jiboe reo aroe Pemegarewu ure ido boe pa itu iture kaewu bakurirewu jamedu kejeie, baicorewu, boe ecebae epagare iwogaiduji. 2 Mare ipagudukare iaboeji iaboeji, ipagudukare iwiwo. Umode turugadu iwo Pagimejera Jesusre maku inaiwu imaragodae akedudo, umode turugadu ireadoduwo o boe pemegarewu akaruji. 2 Oino ioruduware taiamedu taboie, duwuge etoiagire imeru imerure ireadodui Pao o boe pemegarewu ji, taerudumodukare ii pugeje duji. 2 Dukodire inagoino tawiegai ia tagi tawogwamode ma, boe jomodukere iwugeje. 2 Paga karega, ikiarikare imagowo tawiegai Pao aidure jiboe ji. 2 Taeto tai, taeto Aroe Pemegareure maku tagaiboeji. Aroe Pemegarewu ure boe eimejeragedo tagi taetuwo Pao uwobei, duwuge ure etaru Tonaregedu ku tabo. 2 Ioruduware iiagejeie icare riedoge emode turemo tado, tuwo barege pemegarewuge ewido. 3 Jamedu ime pegarewuge emode turemo tadoda jamedu duwugere emode bakaru pegarewu kogado, tuwo Pao uwobe erego pudabo. 3 Tamearudu awadudo tai, tawiagodu kaba jorure pobe ma awu metuia bokwaredu meri ji boe co ji inogituware tai tu tu tu je, itoragudu tabo, ikiarigodu tabo. 3 Oinore icare inure tamagu Pao ai, inure tamagu Pao o bataru pemegare ai, emare joruduware tuwo tarijodudo, roiware tuwo tamugudo pemegarewuge etada. 3 Imagokare iaboeji meriri ekurewu bogai, meriri kigadurewu bogai du kare. 3 Taeruduware awu ikera tabore imaragodure iwo ikerogudo, iwo ikudae rogudo, iwo imedage ekerogudo jamedu. 3 Jii je ire taeruduwado uie turugadu pamaragoduwo, pawo pagerabraredo roiwakarewugei du bogai, uwo nono Pagimejera bataru reore nowu ure boe makuwu jekare kodure nowu boe makudure aiwu jekare kori. 3 Awu tuwadaru rekodajire icare Paulore tubujodo moto to, okwamagudure Pao ji ebo. 3 Rakojere nonowuge eiamedu etoragudugodure, icare ere todomo Paulo kajeje, imadui puabo du tonaji. 3 Ekiarigodu kuricigore Paulo akore ei eerudumodukae pudui pugeje du kodi. Icare eture apo toro ika kurirewu kae. 

Paulo aregodui Tiro bakurirewu kaedu. 1Cedure epiji dukeje cere cedaredo ika kurirewu to, dutabore cegodure Cós bakurirewu kae. Barogwa tore icare cegodure pugeje Rodes bakurirewu kae, dupijire cegodure pugeje Pátara bakurirewu kae. 2Nonore ceerudure kodumode Fenícia kaewu ia ika kurirewu ji. I, care cere cedaredo to, dutabore cegodure cenodobiji. 3Icare ceerudure ia pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Chipre ceduji, okwacere woje cegana koborewu jaogwai; cegodure kori toro Síria moto kae. Icare cedaregodure ia bakurirewu mugui pobo okwai iei Tiro cedu kae. Nonore boe emode nowu ika kurirewu biorodo, du kodire cerudure moto kae nono. 4Nonore ceerudure ia Pao uwobei, du kodi icare cere cemugudo ebo merire ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto; Aroe Pemegarewu jore ewugeje, dukoiare enogituware Paulo ji rutu kawo Jerusalemto. 5Nowu merire ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu akedure dukejere icare cegodure cedawaraji pugeje. Eiamedu rore taci cedabo tuwiremage ebo, tore ebo jii bakurirewu kujeto. Dukejere cere cebujodo nowu kugaru keje icare cenogwamagudure Pao ji. 6Dukeje icare cegimadure ebo, icare cere cedaredo ika kurirewu to, emage ere tugirimi tuwai kae. 7Cegodure ika kurirewu tabo nowu Tiro bakurirewu piji jii ia bakurirewu iei Ptolomaida cedu kae. Nonore cegimadure cewiemage ebo, icare cemugure ebo nowu meri ji. 
Profeta Agabo akore Paulo jiboe Cesareia kejedu. 8Barogwa tore icare cegodure pugeje, icare cedaregodure Cesareia bakurirewu to pugeje. Dukejere cere ceremo Filipe uwaito. Emare Pao bataru epa rema, nowu diaconodoge ei sete ia emagenure ema. Icare cemugure uwai tada. 9Ore areme ere pobe puibiji duwuge emugukare imedu apo roga; emagere emago emagore Pao bataru ji. 1 Cemugure nono meri makakare, dukeje ia profeta aregodure Judéia piji, iere Agabo. 1 Aregodure mato cewogai, dukejere icare ure tugeragu Paulo peagajejewu, dutabore ure tugeragogudo tabo, ure tuwure gogudo tabo, icare akore Oinore Aroe Pemegarewu akore Oinore judeudoge emode ore awu boe epeagajejewu iera gogudo, buregogudo, emode maku judeukare emawuge ekera kai toro Jerusalém tada. 1 Awu bataru koiare icare cegi mare mugure nonowu Pao uwobe cenogwamagudure ji rutu kawo Jerusalemto. 1 Mare Paulo akore Kodiba tagoragudure? Icare tare ikiarigodu kuricigodo! Ica, inure irugadu boewo ikeragogudo, boewo iwido jamedu Pagimejera Jesus ie koia. 1 Icare cewadaru iwakare rutu kawo toro. Dukodire cemagokare ji pugeje, icare cemagore Boewo nono Pao aidu reore. 1 Meri makakare dukejere icare cere cerugadu cemeruwo, icare cerudure Jerusalém kae. 1 Cesaréia tadawu ia pawobe ekodure cedabo, duwuge ere cerego ia Chipre pijiwu imedu iei Menason cedu uwai kae, nonore cenudumode. 
Paulo rakojei Jerusalém tadadu. 1 Icare cedaregodure Jerusalemto, dukejere pawiemage ere tugeragu cei tuiegare tabo taidu tabo. 1 Barogwa tore icare Paulo uture cedabo Tiago uwai kae, nonore icare nowu Pao uwobe eimejerage eiamedure tudo pui nono cedaregodu kae. 1 Icare Paulo imadure ebo, icare readodure ewiegai Pao rore judeukare emawuge etai tugera tabowu jamedu jiboe ji. 2 Emearudui awu inodu jamedu jitu koiare ere Pao kurido, icare emagore Paulo ji, egore Cemana, aerudu pemeganure, awu judeudoge makarewuge duwugere emearutorure Pao bataru ji tukai judeudoge eroiagudu pijido dutabo duji. 2 Emagere emearudure boe egoi akie are nowu mugure judeukare emawuge etadawu judeudoge eruduwado ewo tugera ra Moisés piji, akagoi ei: ekawo tore ewiri kado, erokawo nono judeudoge eroiagudu reore. 2 Inoba paromode? Eeruduwamode akaregoduie rugadu. 2 Kode, arodo nono cemagomode ai du reore. Imere pobe puibiji woe, tuwo tumorido Pao ai. 2 Eko akabo, aedorodo ebo, mori maku eparu tabo tuwo etao rawuje. Du tabore eiamedu boe eruduwamode tumearudure jiwu aiboe boe kaegae, aki jamedu aroie nono judeudoge eroiagudu reore. 2 Judeukare emawu mearutorurewuge eiboe rema, cere bapera atugodo etai, ewo tugera ra tui mori maku aroe eimejerage pagarewuge etai dupiji, ekawo ake todure towu barege eku ekodu kowuje, ekera keadu kawo jamedu. 2 Barogwa tore icare Paulo kodure nowu ime ebo, icare ure tuiedorodo ebo, ure turemo Pao uwaito, nonore icare ure remagu umode mori maku tubaru tabowu eparu tabowu moriji. 2 Merire pagera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto dukeje, ia judeudoge etaregodui Asia moto piji, eerudure Paulo ji nowu Pao uwai tada, du kodire ere boe erugo ji. Ere tugeragu ji, icare enoiogwarire. 2 Egore Judeudoge, tagerabraredo cei! Mako pagare cewobei, Pao uwai ji, ceroiagudu boe jiwu imedu reo! Emareo! Unure Grécia pijiwu ime edo turemo Pao uwaito jamedu, tui pegado dutabo. 2 Egore oino, eerudure Trofimo, feso pijiwu, kodui apo bakurirewu tada duji, dukoiare emeardaere uie turemo Pao uwaito, kodire egoino. 3 Mugure nowu bakurirewu tadawuge eiamedu boe emorora amagadure, icare ere tudo puidu emagaguragare. Ere tugeragu Paulo ji, ere reko oino motoji Pao uwai piji toro baawadu kae, icare Pao uwai porodoge ere tumi pi tuku peragajeje. 3 Etaidure tuwo bito, mare iage ere tugobaigarege eimejera bie Jerusalém tadawuge eiameduie turagojedo turugoduwo. 3 Dukodire icare kuri je ure tugobaigarege mare ia tugobaigarege eimejerage eko pudabo toro rugodurewuge etae. Awugerema, eerudui nowu tugobaigarege eimejera aregodui tudugarege eboduji dukeje kuri je, ere tugera ra tui boe to Paulo jitu piji. 3 Icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera ure tuburedo Paulo ji, ure tugeragu ji, ure tudugarege edo ieragogudo meriri iku pobe dutabo. Icare unorare boe ji iogudubabao, kaboba jiba ro oino. 3 Eiamedu boe enoiogwarire jice woje, jice woje, du kodire roiwakare tuioruduwawo nowu boe enogoi pui dukoia. Dukodi icare ure tudugarege edo reko baicorewu rakarewu to. 3 Icare Paulo aregodui bai kurirewu o escala kae dukeje, tugobaigarege ere tudugu ji tuietuwo ji boe ekorii ji tu piji. 3 Nowu boe makarewuge ekodure rekodaji toiogwari tabo, tagoi oino dutabo: - Bito rugau. 3 Umode turemo nowu baicorewu rakarewu to dukeje, Paulo unoragodure nowu tugobaigarege eimejeraji, akore ji Awudugugo ii biegatu je, imagowo boe ji jao. Nowu tugobaigarege eimejera akore Aeruduware gregodoge ewadaru ji? 3 Nowu Egito pijiwu imedu, duwure boe erugo pui marigudu, icare ure rugodurewu ime ei quatro mil reko pudabo boe matadu kaewu aki kanao? 3 Icare Paulo akore judeunure imi, Cilécia moto kejewu bakurirewu iei Tarso cedu pijiwunure imi, inogwamagudunure ai awo imagodo boe ji. 4 Icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera ure makodo. Icare Paulo, turagojei nowu escala keje dupiji, ure tugera aogado boe ji, icare boe makodure pi tuku. Icare makore ei hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo, akore.

Paulo uwadodae judeudoge ewiegaidu. - 1Imanamage, iwiemage, iogamage, tawiapagado iwadaru ji: ireadodumode tawiegai kodiba iro oino. 2Emearudure makoi hebrewudoge ewadaru ji dukejere ewiapaga awadure ji. 3Icare akore pugeje Judeunure imi. Cilécia moto kejewu bakurirewu iei Tarso cedu kejere iwodure, mare irijodure awu bakurirewu tada, nowu joruduwa rakarewu iei Gamaliel cedu bure paru ioruduwadodure paomage eroji. Pao Kurirewu jaogwaire inogwacere tareore, tare tagogwacere Pao jaogwai jii oino jamedu, du reorere ire ino jamedu marigudu. 4Marigudu itonare Cristo metagei iwo ewido. Ire ikeragu mearutorure Cristo jiwu imei, aremei, ire erego baicorewu to. 5Sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare boe eimejerage eruduware iro oinoduji. Ere bapera maku inai iwo reko Damasco kejewu judeudoge etae, icare iture nowu bakurirewu kae iwo ikeragu mearutorurewuge emugui toro duji, iwo erego Jerusalém kae boewo eedorodo. 6Boekimorema, ikodui awaraji, puredu tu Damasco bakurirewu ji, meri jetui pagaia keje dutabo, icare baru pijiwu ia urugureboe kuricigorewu ure itaiado pi tuku je. 7Icare iwudure moto kae, icare imearudure ia boe emagoi ii duji, akore Saulo, Saulo, kodiba akonare ii? Kodiba? 8Icare imagore ji Ioguduba akagoino, ikimejera? Icare nowu ako oinoboe makore ii pugeje, akore Jesus Nazaré pijiwu imireo, cewu akonare jiwu imireo. 9Boekimorema, imedage eerudure urugureboeji, mare emearudukare nowu ako oino iiboe makoji. 1 Icare imagore ji Ikimejera, inoba iromode? Icare akore ii Aragojedo, atudo Damasco bakurirewu to, torore boe emode awiie inoba aromode duji. 1 Iordukare iaboeji nowu urugureboe kuricigorewu koia, du kodire imedage ere tugera kogudo ikera kajeje dutabore itaregodure Damascoto. 1 Ia imedu iei Ananias cedu, mako makore Pao jiwu imedu, duwu rore nono judeudoge eroiagudo du reore, nowu bakurirewu tadawu judeudoge eerudu pemegare jiwu imedu, 1 Aregodure itae, akore ii iwie Saulo, aeku pemegare pugeje. Dukeje kuri je itaiwore. 1 Icare akore pugeje paomage eno Aroe Eimejera ure atawuje aeruduwawo taidure jiboe ji, aeruduwawo Imedu Pemegarewu ji, amearuduwo jabijiwu bataru ji. 1 Ica, areadodumode ime eiamedu boe ewiegai aerudure jiboe ji, amearudure jiboe jamedu boeji. 1 Kodi icare, amara tabo! Aragojedo, akao pegodo, awabo kigadudo aro pegarewu piji nowu Pemegarewu Imedu ie tabo. 1 Dukejere icare ire ikirimi Jerusalemto, icare inogwamagudure Pao ji uwai tada, du tonajire Paore ido ikinoi, ure iorududo boe pemegarewu ji. 1 Icare iorudure Jesus makoi ii duji, akore amara tabo! Atudo Jerusalém piji, paga karega, awuge emearudumodukare areadodui iiboe jituji 1 Icare imagore Ikimejera, emage eruduware iie mearutorure aiwuge etugu etugu baicorewu to, eruduware iie iwara to to ei duji. 2 Icare Estêvão ure tuiwodo akie koia dukeje, iragojere nono jamedu, ieture ure bitowuge ekudawu aroiaji. 2 Macare Jesus akore toro, imode atudo toro ia boe etae jaegiri. 
Paulo mugui baicorewu rakarewu tadadu. 2 Judeudoge emearudure jii je nowu bataru kae, dukeje icare enoiogwarire, egore Nowu imedu tawuje nowu piji, umodukare turugadu tuiewo. 2 Dukeje icare enoiogwari kuricigore, ere tugudae aroia tawuje, ere moto urugudu barigu baruto boekori koia ji. 2 Dukodi icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera ure tudugarege edo tugeragu ji ewo reko baicorewu rakarewu to, ewo iwara to ji, ewo okoridodu kuricigodo, tuioruduwawo kodiba boe enoiogwarire boe kori koia ji du bogai. 2 Icare enure kogudo barogo biri bukigu tabodu kejere Paulo unorare ia tugobaigarege eimejera mugui nonodu ji, akore Umodukana turugadu boewo boe to ia Roma kejewu imeduji, brae eiemejerage ekai tugogado jitu otodai? 2 Icare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera mearudure awu bataru jitu keje kuri je, uture tugimejera ae, ure bie, akore Inoba aromode? Awu imedu Roma kejewunure ema. 2 Icare nowu brae eimejera uture mato Paulo ae, akore ji Roma kejewu akinao? Amagodo. Paulo akore U! 2 Icare nowu brae eiemejera akore Ire Roma kejewudo imi mori kuricigo tabo. Icare Paulo akore Ica, Roma kejewunure imi iwodure dupiji. 2 Dukeje kuri je, nowu umode okoridowuge ere tuiaedo ji pi tuku. Nowu brae eiemejera morora amagadure, paga karega, ure tudugarege eedo kogudo Roma kejewui ema dutabo. 3 Barogwa tore icare, nowu brae eiemejera aidure tuioruduwa birigoduwo kodiba rakuduie judeudoge emago pegare ji. Ure iera kiwuje, icare ure sacerdotedoge eiemejerage eto pui. Icare ure Paulo arego etae. 

Paulo rakojei boe eimejerage eegaidu. 1Icare Paulore tuioku kidudo nowu judeudoge eimejerage ei tu... Icare akore Imanamage, imire imerure Pao jekai iwabo pemegarewu tabo, imeardae pemegarewu tabo jii awu meri kae. 2Macare nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera iei Ananias cedu, ure mugure mekiwuge edo tugera to okwaji. 3Icare Paulo akore ji imedu roarodurewu, Pao umode akogorido jamedu. Amugure awo akogado ii paroiagudu rekodaji, macare akonai paroiagudu jitu tabore are boedo itogorido. Kodiba? 4Icare mugure nonowuge egore Awadaru pegare Pao bure joia kurirewu ji. 5Icare Paulo akore Iwiemage ioruduwakare Pao burejoiaie ure emaduji. Paga karega, Pao o bapera keje atugododure oino amago pega kaba awobe eimejerajii. 6Paulo joruduware nowu judeudoge eiemejerageie tuginoi duji. Iage fariseudogere emage, iage saduceudogere emage. Dukodi lcare akore tumago raka tabo Imanamage, fariseunure imi, fariseudoge etonaregedunure imi. Ica, imearutorure birewuge eewodumode tuwi piji pugeje duji, dukoiare boere tugogado ii 7Awu bataru keje, nowu fariseudoge mare nowu saduceudoge etokire pui, emagore pui puibagi, icare nowu boe eimejerage etonare pui. 8(Paga karega, saduceudoge egore birewuge ewodumodukae, tupadoge bokwae, aroedoge bokwae; fariseudogerema emearutorure nowu boe jamedu ji). 9Dukodi icare ia boe enoiogwari kuricigorewu ure tuguo. Icare ia fariseudoge, ere turagojedo, emago rakare, egore Ceruduwakare awu imedu ia ro pegarewu ji. Ia Pao o tupa, iarema ia Aroe emago kana ji? 1 Icare nowu emagoi puidu nowu etokii puidu icare rakagodure. Dukodi icare nowu brae eimejera pagudugodure emode Paulo roto oino pa je duji, du kodi icare ure tugobaigarege edo turawuje, ewo Paulo aru epiji, ewo reko baicorewu rakarewu kae. 1 Nowu boe co ji icare Paore towadudo Paulo jekai, akore ji Amearudu awadudo ai, areadodure ii Jerusalém tadadu reorere umode turugadu areadoduwo ii pugeje Roma bakurirewu tada jamedu. 1 Barogwa kododu tabore icare ia judeudoge ere tudo pui, emagore pui togwagemodukae iaboe boeji, tugudumodukae iaboe boece, tumode Paulo bito duotodai. 1 Nowu makore oinowuge ere nono ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure du reore. 1 Icare eture nowu sacerdotedoge eiemejerage etae, egore ei Cemagore Pao jekai, cenogwagemodukae iaboe boeji jii cemode Paulo bito du kae. 1 Kode, tagi mare pagimejerage tamagodo brae eiemejeraji uwo Paulo reko mato tawogai. Tamagodo ji tamode tagoga pemagado ji pugeje. Cegirema, umode tuburedo mato dukeje, cemode cedo cerugadu cewo bito. 1 Boekimorema, Paulo utuie ia onaregedu, urade nowu emeardae pegarewu pawuje, du kodi icare kodure toro baicorewu rakarewu kae, ure Paulo bie. 1 Awure icare makore tugobaigarege eimejera bogai, akore ji Awu iparedu reko toro akimejera ae, aidure tumagowo ji iaboeji. 1 Icare ure reko nowu brae eimejera jekae, akore ji Nowu meture baicorewu tadawu iei Paulo cedu okwamagudure ii iwo awu iparedu reko mato aegai, aidure tumagowo ai iaboeji du kodi. 1 Icare nowu brae eimejera ure tugera kogudo nowu iparedu iera kajeje, ure reko jice baiporo kae, akore ji Kaboba jiba akaidure amagowo ii? 2 Akore Judeudoge emagore pui barogwatoie togwamagudumode ai awo Paulo reko judeudoge eimejerage eegai pugeje, ewo tugogadodu pemegado ji. 2 Akirema, awiapaga kaba ewadaru ji. Paga karega, ia ime ere ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogiduredu, duwuge emode tuwiado awara okwai tuwo bito. Ere togwatugu Pao jekai togwagemodukae iaboe oeji, tugudumodukae iaboe boece jii tumode bito duotodai. Enure turugadu, epagamode awadaru bogai tu je. 2 Icare nowu brae eimejera ure nowu iparedu utudo, akore ji mako kaiagu iaboe boe ji tuie bie pudui duji. 
Paulo rekodudodui Cesaria kaedu. 2 Dukeje icare makore tugobaigarege eimejerage ei pobedu bogai, akore ei.
Tamode tugobaigarege ei 2 0 cedu edo turugadu etuwo Cesaréia kae, awu boe cokajeje. 2 Tamode kawarudoge edo turugadu Paulo bogai jamedu, dure tamode reko pagimejera Félix ae. Taetu pemegado ji. 2 Ure ia bapera atugodo tagoi oino dutabo: 2 Cludio Lísia ikimadunure pagimejera kurirewu Félix awogai. 2 Judeudoge ere awu imedu ieragogudo, eiagu bito, dukejere icare itaregodure ae ino tugobaigarege ebo, icare iorudure Roma kejewuie ure ema duji, du kodire ire inorudo ekera piji. 2 Dukeje icare itaidure ioruduwawo kaba kodiba ere tuiagu bito, du kodire ire reko judeudoge eimejerage eegai, ewo tugogado ji, 2 Icare imearudure eie tuiagu bito turoiagudu koia, mare ia ro pegarewu bokware ewo bito, iarema ewo tugu baicorewu to. 3 Mare dukejere icare ia boere iwie ia judeudogeie tudo turugadu tuwo bito rugadu, du kodire icare ire boedo reko toro akae, imagore onare jiwugei etuwo akae jamedu. Urugadu. Amugu pemegado. 3 Icare, nowu boe co ji nowu tugobaigarege ere tugeragu Paulo ji, nowu tugimejera mako rekodaji, icare ere reko toro Antipátride kae. 3 Barogwa tore icare ere maku kawaru epage etae, ewo reko tododai, pudumire icare ere tugirimi tuibagi tumuga kae pugeje. 3 Etaregodure Cesaréia bakurirewu to dukeje, ere bapera maku nowu brae eimejera ai, ere jordudo Paulo ji jamedu. 3 Icare makore nowu bapera atugoji, dukejere icare unoragodure ei kakoduwu moto kajeba. Egore cilécia moto kejewu reno. Icare akore 35 Iwiapagamode ai, onare aiwuge etaregodumode dukeje. Icare ure edo Paulo jetu otorogado judeudoge eimejera Herodes uwai kurirewu tada. 

Brae eimejerage ere tugogado Paulo ji. 1Merire pagera awubodure du rekodajire icare nowu sacerdotedoge eimejera kurirewu ure turawuje nowu kae, ia codurewuge ebo, ia boe eroiagudu epa iei Tertulo cedu kodure ebo. Etaregodure dukejere, eture nowu brae eimejera kurirewu ae, tumago pegawo Paulo ji biegai. 2Emagore Paulo bogai tuwo tugogado ji. Icare nowu Tertulo mako pegare ji nowu brae eimejera jekai, akore Akire are boe pemegado cei, are boe butugudo cei. Aro koiare boe ero pegarewu makarewu kadodure ceno moto keje. 3Ceruduware aro oinoduji, boe jamedu boeji jii je, boe jamedu boe keje, akarurewu Félix, du kodire cenure tukutaido ai. 4Macare itaidukare boe koriwo ai jii je du kodire inogwamagudunure ai awiapagawo iwadaru ji jao. 5Ceerudure awu imeduji, pega remawure, ure boe erugo pui boe jamedu boe keje, judeudoge etada. Nazarewudoge ia eimejeranure ema. 6Uiagu Pao uwai pegado jamedu, macare cere cegeragu ji. 7(Cedaidure cewo cegogado ji, ceroiagudu rekodaji, mare nowu brae eimejera iei Lísias cedu aregodure, icare ure tugeragu cegera piji turaga tabo taci je, icare ure onare jiwuge cedudo mato aegai). 8Ica, aki mitodu anoramode ji, dutabore aeruduwamode cemagore ai jiboe ji jamedu boe ema remawuie. 9Icare nowu judeudoge ere tuiodo nowu turoiagudu epa bataru keje, egore oinoie ure rugadu. 1 Dukeje icare nowu brae eimejera ure tugera amagadudo Paulo bogai, icare Paulo akore.
Ioruduware joru makaguragare aetui awu moto jitu duji, du kodire imagomode iparu tabo aegai ipagudu bokwa tabo, imearutorui ai dutabo. 1 Boe rakamodukare ai aeruduwawo meri kodukae ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu kori irudui Jerusalém bakurirewu to dupiji. Irudure toro, inogwamaguduwo Pao ji. 1 Iaboe iaboe eerudukare ii inogirui iaboeji iaboeji; eerudukare ii boe erugo Pao uwai tada duji, iarema sinagoga tada, iarema bakurirewu tada. 1 Jamedu eroiwakare tuwo aerududo tumago peganure iiboeji. 1 Imagonure oino aegai ikodure paedogamage eno Aroe Eimejera utawaraji, imearutorure atugododure Moisés o bapera kejeboeji, profetadoge eno bapera kejeboe jamedu boeji, ikodui emagore tuginoiwu oino jiwu bakaru rekodaji. 1 Ipaganure Pao ji epagamagai jitudu reore, pemegarewuge, pegarewuge eewodumode pugeje duji. 1 Kodire inure idurudo ikoduwo imeardae pemegarewu tabo Pao jekai, ime eegai jamedu. 1 Joru makaguragare dukeje, itaregodure iwobe etae, makudu pagare etaiboe rogu tabo, makudumode Pao uwai tada boe tabo jamedu. 1 Icare iroi nono dukeje, eerudure ii ipemegado Pao uwai tada duji, mare boe ekare tago, boe erugodukare pui nono. 1 Eerudure iiwu, ia judeudoge etaregodui Asia pijiwugere emage, emagere etaregodumode aegai emagowo iiboeji, eerudure iro pegarewu ji rugadu dukeje, kodi karega. 2 Mare mugure oinowuge emagowo awiegai eerudu rakuduie ia iro pegarewu ji nowu ere irego judeudoge eimejerage eegai dukeje. 2 Imagore tu jiboe imago raka tabodu reo birewuge eewodumodedu koiare judeudoge eimejerage ere tugogado ii taegai. 2 Boekare. Nowu brae eimejera Félix joruduwa birigodure emeartoraeji, du kodire ure nowu judeudoge eimejerage etudo jao, akore Nowu boe eimejera Lísias aregodumode mato dukeje imearudu birigodumode tai. 2 Icare ure nowu tugobaigarege eimejerado tugedo pemegado Paulo ji, akore ji jetuwo ji butugu tabo, ukawu metage ei tugerabraredo jitudu pijido. 2 Meri makakare dukeje, nowu brae eimejera Félix aregodure toreduje Drusila apo, duwudo judeudore ema. Makore Paulo bogai, icare biapagare makoi boe emearutorui Jesus Cristo jituduji. 2 Dukejere Paulo makore ei boe emodukae pu pegado, pu barigududo, boe ekera keadukawo pudui, ia meri keje Pao umoduie tugogado boe ji, du kodi icare nowu Félix pagudugodure, icare akore Paulo ji Urugadu jao, atudo jao, ia kodiboe keje imagomode awogai pugeje. 2 Upagare jamedu Paulo umoduie diiero maku pudai du bogai, du kodire mako makore bogai tu tu tumagowo ji. 2 Jorure pobe du rekodaji, brae eimejerage ere Félix tawuje nowu moto piji, ere Pórcio Festo mugudo mugato. Boekimorema, nowu Félix aidure tuwo judeudoge eegaredo, du kodire ure Paulo mugudo baicorewu tada tuiageje. 

Paulo makoi brae eimejera kurirewu César bogaidu. 1Meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, nowu brae eimejera Festo aregodure nowu moto kae, icere ruture Jerusalém bakurirewu kae. 2Nonore icare nowu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare judeudoge kurirewuge eture ae, emago pegare Paulo ji biegai. 3Enogwamagudure ji tuwo boedo Paulo reko mato Jerusalém kae pugeje. Paga karega, etaidure tuwo tuwiado awara okwai tuwo bito. 4Mare Festo akore Paulo muguie baicorewu tada Cesaréia bakurirewu keje, pudumie tudumoduie toro meri makakare dukeje. 5Icare akore ei Kode, ia kurirewuge tagi tamode tarawuje itabo, icare nowu imedu ia ropegareure dukeje, tamagomode iiegai toro. 6Icare mugure nono kimo meri ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto rakudu dukejere icare ure turawuje Cesaréia bakurirewu kae, icare makore Paulo bogai. 7Paulo aregodure ae, dukejere icare aregodure Jerusalém pijiwu judeudoge ere taiado apo, enogirure Paulo ro pegarewu makaguragarewu ji, mare enogiru paganure. 8Paulo rema, mako makore tubaru tabo, akore Iro pega bokwa. Iro pegakare judeudoge eroiaguduji, iro pegakare Pao uwai ji, iro pegakare Roma kejewu brae eimejera kurirewu ji. 9Mare nowu brae eimejera Festo aidure tuwo judeudoge eegaredo, du kodi icare makore Paulo ji, akore.
Akaidure aruduwo Jerusalém kae ewo tugogado ai iegai? 1 Icare Paulo akore Roma kejewu ia brae eimejera jekaire imugure, du kodi icare umode turugadu boewo tugogado ii toro Roma bakurirewu keje. Iro pegarewu bokwa judeudogei, akire aeruduware. 1 Iro pegarewu umode ei, ewo iwido rugadu ma, ipagudumodukare iwiwo. Mare awu ereadodure jiwu iro pegarewu bokware dukeje, iaboe iaboe eroiwamodukare tuwo imagu mako pegare iiwuge ekera kai. Itaidure ituwo Roma kejewu brae eimejera kurirewu César ae. 1 Dukeje icare Festo makore jao tumedage ebo, icare akore ji Amagore César bogai, du kodi icare atumode César ae. 
Brae eimejera Festo makoi judeudoge eimejera Agripa biegai Paulo jiboe ji. 1 Meri makakare dukeje, nowu judeudoge eimejera Agripa ure turawuje toreduje Berenice apo toro Cesaréia bakurirewu kae, tugimaduwo Festo apo. 1 Icare emugu raire nono, dutabore icare Festo readodure nowu judeudoge eimejera biegai Paulo jiboe ji. Akore Félix ure ia imedu mugudo baicorewu tada tuiageje. 1 Icare iture Jerusalémto dukeje, nowu sacerdotedoge eimejerage mare judeudoge codurewuge etaregodure tumago pegawo ji iwiegai, enogwamagudure ii iwo boedo bito. 1 Icare imagore ei Roma kejewuge ceroiwakae cewo boedo iaboe iaboe ewido, cemode nowu bitodumodewu udo turagojedo mako pegare puduiwuge eegai tumagowo tubaru tabo duotodai. 1 Icare etaregodure mato. Icare nowu barogwato kuri je inure iwiapagawo ei, icare ire itugarege edo nowu imedu reko mato jamedu. 1 Icare nowu onare jiwuge etaregodure mato iegai, mare emago emagokare ia imeardaere ro pegare jiboe ji. 1 Emago pegare pui tumearutorure jiboe koia. Emagore pui ia birewu imedu iei Jesus cedu jiboe ji, duwure Paulo akore jewoduie. 2 Dukodi icare irore ta... Ioruduwakare inoba iromode ji nowu tagoino dukoia. Dukodire inoragodure ji aidurakuduie tuduwo Jerusalemto boewo tugogado pudui toro. 2 Macare Paulo akore taiduie tuduwo Roma kejewu cegimejera kurirewu César ae. Dukodi icare ire Paulo mugudo baicorewu tada jii imode boedo reko toro César ae du kae. 2 Icare nowu judeudoge eimejera Agripa akore nowu brae eimejera Festo ji Imi jamedu itaidure imearuduwo nowu imedu bataru ji. Icare Festo akore barogwa to amearudumode ji. 
Paulo rakojei judeudoge eimejera Agripa jekaidu. 2 Barogwa tore icare nowu Agripa aregodure toreduje Berenice apo, tuguri kuricigo tabo, ure turemo nowu brae eimejera uwaito, ia brae eimejerage ebo, mare nowu bakurirewu ia brae kurirewuge ebo jamedu. 2 Icare Festo akore Akarurewu judeudoge eimejera Agripa, awiapagado. Mugure woewu boe taiamedu, tawiapagado. Taerudunure awu imeduji oino, du judeudoge eiamedu emago emagore, enoiogwarire bitoduwo. Emagoino woe, emagoino Jerusalém tada jamedu. 2 Mare iemarure inoba rore du bogai, icare iorudukare ia roji bitoduwo. Mare makore tudumoduie César ae, dukoiare ire imeardaedo rekoduwo toro César ae. 2 Mare iwo bapera atugodo cegimejera kurirewu Roma kejewu bogai tabowu ro pegarewu bokwa. Dukodire ire arego woe taegai, akarurewu tagimejera jekai, taeruduwo ia ro pegarewu ji ma, iwo bapera atugodo ji. 2 Paga karega, iegaire umodukare turugadu iwo boedo reko toro ireadodukai onare jiwuge emagore jiboe jitu tabo. 

Paulo uwadodae Agripa biegaidu. 1Icare nowu judeudoge eimejera Agripa akore Paulo ji Amagodo aparu tabo. Icare Paulore tugera onado boe ji, akore 2Iegarenure, paga karega, imagomode iparu tabo cegimejera kurirewu Agripa aegai, nowu judeudoge emagore ii jiboe jamedu boeji. 3Paga karega, aerudu birigodure judeudoge eroji, mugure pumegiwu emeartoraeji jamedu. Dukodi icare inogwamagudunure ai, awiapagawo awudugu tabo iwadaru ji. 4Judeudoge eruduware iro oino duji jii negedurogu imi dupiji, eerudure ii ino moto keje, bakurirewu tada jamedu. 5Marigudu eruduware inogwacei fariseudoge eiaogwai duji, duwuge emearutoru raka kodure ia judeudoge emearutoru raka kori. 6Macare oino ipaganure Pao akore paedogamagei tumoduie maku pagaiboe jitudu bogai, du kodire emago pegare ii aegai. 7Padure pumekejewu pawobe ei pagera pudogidure ere pobe pugejedu epaganure Pao ako oinodu bogai, tumaragodui Pao ai boe co ji meri ji jii je. Awu ipagare bogaiboe koiare judeudoge emago pegare ii. 8Imi jamedu imeardaere marigudu umoduie turugadu iwo itonado du kuricigodo Jesus jituji. 1 Oinonore irore rugadu Jerusalém tada. Ire makarewu iwiemage etugu baicorewu to, sacerdotedoge eimejerage ei tuwadaru maku inai dutabo. Icare sacerdotedoge eimejerage ere boedo ewido dukeje, ire iiodo ewadaru keje jamedu. 1 Iture eregodaji itonai ei dutabo nowu sinagogadoge ekao, irorerure ei iwo ewarigu tumearutorure jiboe piji. Nowu ikorigodure eiwu itodure gu gu gu je, icare itonare ei, iture eregodaji jii moto tuginoiboe kae. 1 Dukodire iture Damasco bakurirewu kae, sacerdotedoge eimejerage eno bapera tabo. 1 Du tabore icare, ikimejera kurirewu, itunure awaraji meri pagaia keje, dutabore baru pijiwu ia urugureboe aregodure, nowu urugureboe kodure meri joku urugu kori, urugu ure tumaedo iiogi, imedage eiogi. 1 Boekimorema, ceiamedu buture moto to kuri tuku je. Icare imearudure ia boe akoi ii duji, hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo, akore Saulo, Saulo, kodiba akonare ii, kodiba? Rakare ai awo awure to meriri ototo. 1 Icare imagore ioguduba akiba akagoino, ikimejera? Icare Pagimejera akore Akonare jiwu Jesus imireo. 1 Mare aragojedo! Inure ikuo akai iwo itugaredo aki awadoduwo boe etai awu aerudure jiboe jamedu boeji. Imode ikuo akai pugeje iwo aerududo makaguragareboeji du jire areadodumode boe etai jamedu. 1 Ire akinorudo judeudoge epiji, judeukare emawuge epiji. 1 Inure atudo etae, awo eeku jado, ewo tugirimi boe copiji urugureboe kae, ewo tugirimi boe pegarewu piji Pao ae ma, tumearutorui ii dutabo turo pegarewu okwawo, emuguwo pemegarewuge etada. 1 Nowu kodiboe pijire, ikimejera kurirewu Agripa, imearutoru bokwakare nowu iorudure jiwu baru tadaboeji. 2 Ire Pao bataru kogado Damasco kejewuge ewiegai boeto ji, dukejere ire kogado Jerusalém tada, dukejere ire kogado judeukare emawuge ewiegai, ewo tuiedorodo, ewo tugirimi Pao ae, turo pemega tabo. 2 Awu iro oino dukoiare icare judeudoge ere tugeragu ii, ere tuiagu iwido. 2 Mare Paore tugera braredo ii, dukoiare iragoje kimore jii oino. Moisés mare profetadoge egore umoduie tudowujeboe du jire imago imagore biegarewuge ewiegai, kurirewuge ewiegai. 2 Du reo Cristo umoduie tuiwodo, jewodumoduie birewuge epiji boeto jiwu, dutabore umoduie urugureboe awadudo judeudoge etai, judeukare emawuge etai jamedu. 2 Nowu Paulo ako oinodu kejere icare Festore tumago rakaguragado, akore Akaora bai baire, Paulo, aeruduwa kuricigo dukoiare ure ameardae pegado. 2 Icare Paulo akore ji Itaora pegakare, akarurewu Festo, mare boe jokoduwu, boe jetororewu jire inagoino. 2 Ica, awu cegimejera kurirewu Agripa, duwu jekaire inagoino ipagudu bokwa tabo, joruduwa birigodure inagoino jamedu boeji. Ioruduware inagoino jiboe iaboe iaboe biadodukae joku piji, paga karega, iaboe iaboe ukare tudowuje boe biarewu tada. 2 Ikimejera kurirewu Agripa, amearutorure profetadoge ewadaru ji? Ioruduware amearutoruie ure duji. 2 Icare Agripa makore Paulo ji: - Boce kodi anure cristaodo imi, kodi karega. 2 Icare Paulo akore Inogwamagudunure Pao ji uwo ado nono ireore, mare tu aki karega, mearudure iwadaru jiwuge eiamedu boe ewo tudo nono ireore, mare awu ikeragogui oino dutabo karega. 3 Icare nowu judeudoge eimejera, nowu brae eimejera, nowu Berenice, mare mugure nono ebowu jamedu boe, ere turagojedo. 3 Icare ei tudawuje du tonaji emagore pui, egore Awu imedu ukare iaboe iaboe towuje bitoduwo. 3 Agripa akore Festo ji jamedu Awu imedu okwamagudumodukare tuduwo César ae ma, uia turugadu boewo kiwuje uwo tuginorudo. 

Paulo kodui Roma kaedu. 1Nowu brae eimejera aidure cegoduwo Itália moto kae dukeje, ure Paulo mare ia ieragogudodurewuge emagu ia tugobaigarege eimejera iei Júlio cedu ai, duwure nowu brae eimejera kurirewu uwai tadawunure ema. 2Icare cere cedaredo ia Adrumeto bakurirewu pijiwu ika kurirewu to, du kodumode Asia moto okwaji, icare ure meriri aogado moto piji. Ia imedu iei Aristarco cedu, ia Macedônia moto kejewu bakurirewu iei Tessalônica cedu pijiwu imedu, kodure cedabo jamedu. 3Barogwa tore icare cere cedaredo jao Sidônia bakurirewu okwai, icare nowu ika kurirewu tadawuge eimejera Júlio, turo pemegai Paulo ji dutabo, ure udo tudaru tumedage ewai kae, tuwo tugeragu taidure jiboe ji. 4Du pijire icare cere ceremo pobo maerewu to, icare cegodure pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Chipre cedu okwaji, bakuru aregodure cedogi du kodi. 5Cere pagado Cilícia mare Panfília eno pobo maerewu kajeje, icare cedaregodure ia Lícia moto kejewu bakurirewu iei Mira cedu kae. 6Nowu ika tadawuge eimejera jorudure ia Alexandria bakurirewu pijiwu ika kurirewu ji du kodure Itália moto kae, icare ure cedo cedaredo to. 7Cero butugure ceno ika kurirewu tabo meri makaguragare jii cegodure Cnido bakurirewu kae. Nonore icare bakuru ukare cedo ceburedo to. 8Icare cerore pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Creta cedu okwaji, puredu tu moto joi pobo todu iei Salamina ceduji. Cero kodu pegare nowu moto okwaji, dukejere cedaregodure okwa iei Bons Portos cedu kae, puredu tu ji Laséia bakurirewu mugure. 9Boere marigudu, boere todorogado pudui du kejewu boe ure marigudu. Boe ekodui nowu ika kurirewu tabodu pegagodure. Dukodire Paulore tumedage ewie nowu inoduji, akore 1 Imedage, iorudunure awu cegodui tabodu pegagoduie ure cei, ikaji, ika oredure tabo boeji. 1 Mare nowu tugobaigarege eimejera mearutorure ika epaji, ore ika cewu ji, mare Paulo bataru ji karega. 1 Jamedu nowu ikadoge epa pegare emuguwo keje nowu biaku keje, du kodire boce kodi eiamedu meardaere umoduie turugadu tuwo tugirimi pobo maerewu to, epagare turegodumode Creta moto tadawu bakurirewu iei Fênice cedu kae du bogai, tumuguwo tada nowu biaku tonaji; paga karega, mugure meri rutu jaogwai, bakuru aregodure to. 
Bakuru rakarewu koiare ure emeru pegadodu. 1 Sul jaogwaiwu bakuriri aregodure, du kodire emeardaere tumoduie turowo nono taidu reore. Icare ere meriri aogado pobo piji, ekodure pobo okwaji, puredu tu nowu pobo aiare tabowu moto iei Creta ceduji. 1 Boekimorema, boe raikare du rekodaji nowu pobo aiare moto tabowu pijire ia aroe medobo aregodure, du iere Europa pijiwu Aroe Medobo. 1 Nowu ika kurirewu roiwakare nowu bakuru rakarewu ji, du ure tumugudo keje taci; cere udo cerego rugadu taci. 1 Ure cewarigu kuri ia pobo aiare tabowu moto biegarewu iei Clauda cedu kae, dukejere icare cere cemugudo, nowu ika kurirewu o boe ewurejoia keje. Icare cere jetu otorogado. 1 Dukejere ere bukigu kurirewu upodo nowu ika kurirewu tabo, boe jokodu kadu kawo (nowu pobo butoborewu ukawo bowuje, ukawo pegado). Icare epagudure nowu ika kurirewu jomode Sirte kejewu kugaru uporuto duji. Dukodi icare ere ao jiwu aroia rawuje, ere bakurudo turego toro boeto. 1 Barogwa tore icare bakuru rakaguragare kimo, du kodire ere ika kurirewu oredure taboboe barigu barigu pobo to. 1 Rekodajiwu meri ji pugeje cere ia ika epa meriridoge ewarigu ewarigu pobo to jamedu cegera tabo rugadu. 2 Boe raire du tonaji meri joku aregodukare kuiejedoge ewogware jamedu. Bakuru rakaguragare kimo. Cebagakare cemode ceginorudo du bogai pugeje. 2 Boe raicigore cekai boe ko dutabo, du rekodajire icare Paulore turagojedo boe etoiado, icare akore Iwiemage, tawiapagamode iwadaru ji takawo tadawuje Creta piji ma, pawudumodukare awu boe pegarewu to, pamodukare awu pagoroe barigu barigu, kodi karega. 2 Ica, oinore icare inure taeruduwado: tagidado, tabagudu kaba, ia tagi ia tagi tawogwamoduka. Ikare okwamode mito tuje. 2 Awu boe co ji, imaragodure aiwu Are Eimejera, du ore imi jamedu, ia o tupare towadudo iiegai, akore ii 2 Apagudu kaba, Paulo, umode turugadu akoduwo Roma kejewu César ae. Paore awu kodure akabowuge emagu akai, ewo tuginorudo. 2 Dukodi icare, imedage, tabagudu kaba. Imearutorure boemode nono Pao o tupa akore iwiegai du reore. 2 Cewarigududodumode ia pobo aiare tabowu moto kae. 2 Cemugure pobo maerewu iei Adriático cedu kajeje boecore pobe puibiji du rekodaji, boekimorema, boe cooia kejere icare nowu ika kurirewu epage ere boe pa tuburedugoduie ia moto kae duji. 2 Icare ere meriri barigu pobo to bukigu tabo tuioruduwo pobo koji; ure pagera pudogidure ure ino pugeje. Otobi ji pugeje biegatu je, boe ekana remagudure, ure pagera pudogidure pagera awubodure turegodaji pugeje. 2 Dukodi icare epagudure tumode ika to ia toritoduji; du kodire ere meriri motudurewu ui pobe puibijidu barigu pobo to ika upo jaogwai, tuiedu rakawo ji, nonore epagare jii barogwa kododu kae. 3 Kuri je nowu ika kurirewu epagere turegoduiagu, du kodire ere tuiagu nowu ika kurirewu je kejewu meriri motudurewu barigu pobo to mare ero arodunure, ere nowu ika biegarewu rawuje, ere tumugudo keje pobo to turegoduwo tada. 3 Paulorema ure nowu ika kurirewu tadawu tugogobaigarege eimejera bie, ure tugobaigarege ewie jamedu, akore Nowu ime emugumodukare ika kurirewu tada ma, taroiwamodukare tawo taginorudo. 3 Dukodi icare nowu tugobaigarege ere nowu ika biegarewu iku kado, ere udo tuwududo. 3 Barogwa kododu tabore icare Paulore eiamedu edo tudugu tudo, ure edo iaboe rogu boe kowuje, akore ei Merire pagera pudogidure ere pobe puibiji tuwugeje 3 tanudukai, takai ia ko dutabo. Oinore icare inogwamagudunure tai tawo iaboe rogu ko, tawo tadurudo. Ica, ia tagaorogu okwamodukare tagaora piji rugadu. 3 Awu tagoinodu tabore icare Paulore tugeragu ia amirewu ji, mako pemegare Pao ji eiamedu jekai, dukeje icare ure bowuje, ure togwage paru to. 3 Awu ro oinodu kejere icare eiamedure tudugu tudo, ere togwage paru to jamedu. 3 Eiamedure 2 6 nowu ika tada. 3 Icare ekuredure, dukeje ere nowu ika kurirewu barigodudo, tui trigo barigu pobo to dutabo. 3 Dukejere icare, meri awadure dukeje, nowu ika epage ere boe pa tuioruduwakae nowu motoji. Icare eerudure ia pobo maerewu ui turemo moto to duji, kugarubo padure nowu pobo okwaji. Etaidure tuwo nowu ika kurirewu jodo to, turoiwamode dukeje. 4 Icare ere nowu meriri motudurewu eceba bukigu kado kado, ere pijido toro pobo to, ere ika bure kiwuje, ere ika aroia jeture ipo towu jado, icare nowu ika puredugodure nowu kugaru okwa kae. 4 Boekimore, nowu ika kurirewu jeture ia kugaru ao otorewu ji. Nowu ika jore kugaruto, tudure to, dukeje ukare tudawuje piji, dutabore nowu ika upore tubegado, ure tuwowuje nowu pobo rakarewu koia. 4 Icare nowu tugobaigarege etaidure tuwo nowu iera kogurewuge ewido ma, eregodukawo poboji. 4 Mare owu eimejera iei Júlio cedu, aidure tuwo Paulo inorudo, dukoiare makore ei erokawo ino. Icare akore joruduware tugurugoduwowuge ei ewo tuwarigu boeto ji pobo to etuwo kuri toro moto kae. 4 Iagerema etaregodure moto kae tubadui ira keje dutabo, iage etaregodure moto kae tubadui nowu ika kobo rogu boe ewugeje dutabo. Oinore icare eiamedu etaregodure moto kae tuie tabo, tubemega tabo. 

Paulo rakojei pobo aiare tabowu iei Malta cedu kejedu. 1Icai cei ceginorudo dukeje, cere boe pa nowu pobo aiai tabowu moto ieie Malta, oino. 2Nowu moto kejewu boe eetu pemegaguragare cei, ere ia jorugu kurirewu mugudo, du oiadodare ere cemugudo, paga karega, bubutunure, biakunure. 3Icare Paulore tudugu jerigi upo kuda tuwo barigu joruto, du tonajire icare ia awagu eworirewu, rekodure joru pijidu, ure taredo ta, okwa jore tuku ierato. 4Nowu boe eerudure nowu awagu bararei Paulo kanajura jituji, dukeje emagore pui, egore Boe jokodu awu imedu ure boe ewido, paga karega, ure tuginorudo pobo pegarewu piji, mare Pao aidukare jewo. 5Ure tugera jukodo awagu apo joruto boe puredukai pudui dutabo. 6Nowu boe emeardaere kana bokumoduie dukejere bimode kuri je duji. Mare epaga raicigore bogai dukejere ere boe pa boe puredukae ji rugadu duji. Dukodire ere tumardae kirimi, egore Aroe Eimejeranure ema rugadu rabodu. 7Nowu oiei, nowu moto kejewu ia imedu iere Públio cedu o baidoge emugure. Awu imedu ure tugeragu cei tuwaito, merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, jetu pemegare cei. 8Boekimorema, nowu Publio uo kogodure, padure tuba keje, biri urunure, kuri kugudure jamedu. Paulo uture ae, okwamagudure Pao ji paru tabo, ure tugera bu ao keje, icare ure pemegago. 9Awu Paulo roi oinodu kejere icare, nowu pobo aiare tabowu moto kejewu kogodurewuge eiamedu etaregodure ae, epemegagodure jamedu, du kodire eetu pemegaguragare cei. 1 Icare cedui nowu piji dukeje, ere cedaidure jiboe jamedu boe maku cenai. 
Ekodui Malta piji Roma kaedu. 1 Arire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, cere cedaredo ia Alexandria pijiwu ika kurirewu to, duwu muguradu nowu pobo aiare tabowu moto keje nowu biaku tonaji. Dioscorodoge eie mugure ika kurirewu keje. 1 Cedaregodure Siracusa bakurirewu to, dukeje icare cere cewuredo tada, du tadare cemugure merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. 1 Du pijire cegodure oino pobo okwaji jii cedaregodure Régio bakurirewu to du kae. Barogwa tore icare, Sul jaogwaiwu bakuru aregodure, dutabore cegodure. Icare merire pobe dukeje cedaregodure Pozzuoli bakurirewu to. 1 Nonore ceerudure ia cewiemagei, duwugere etaidure cemuguwo pudabo merimode ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto. Dukeje cegodure Roma bakurirewu kae. 1 Roma kejewu pawiemage ewiedure marigudu cedaregodumode duji. Dukodire etaregodure cedogi jii ia bororo iei Apia cedu kae, ia boe eda iei Três Tabernas cedu kae. Icare Paulo jorudure ei dukejere ure tudugu tudo pugeje, jekarere Pao ji. 
Paulo roi Roma kejedu. 1 Icare cedaregodure Roma bakurirewu to dukeje, tugobaigarege ere Paulodo tumugudo ewai tada, ia tugobaigare jeture ji. 1 Merire pobe ma jewu metuia bokware dukeje, Paulo makore nowu judeudoge kurirewuge ewogai, etuwo pudae. Ere tudo pui ae, dukeje icare akore ei Imanamage, iro pegakare boe ji, iro pegakare paedogamage eroji, du kodi karega icare boere tugeragu ii Jerusalém tada, ere imagu Roma kejewuge ekera kai. 1 Awugere icare tui tugogado ii dukeje, etaidure tuwo ikinorudo, eerudukare ia iro pegarewu ji iwiwo kodi. 1 Mare judeudoge ekiarire, du kodire inogwamagudure César bogai, mare itaidukare imago pegawo iwobei. 2 Kodire imagore tawogai, imagowo tai, paga karega, Israeldoge epagare bogai boe koia boere ikera kogudo awu meriri iku tabo. 2 Icare egore ji Ia bapera aregodukare cewogai Judéia piji iaboe tabo, ia cewiemage etaregodukare nowu moto piji jamedu tumago pegai ai dutabo. 2 Mare cedaidure aki rugadu amagowo cewiegai ameardae jiboe ji. Paga karega, ceruduware tu jiboe reo boe etona etonare nowu boe ji boe jamedu boe keje. 2 Icare ere ia meri remagu tumagowo pui. Dukejere makarewuge etaregodure bogai nowu mugure tadawu baito. Meri jamedu jire emagore pui meri rutu piji jii meri butu kae. Paulo readodure ewiegai Pao o boe pemegarewu ji, ure tubewudo Moisés mare profetadoge ewadaru tabo tuwo emearutorudo Jesus ji. 2 Iage emearutorure bataru ji, iagerema emearutorukare. 2 Eerudu pemegakare pu meardaere puibagi, du kodi icare eture, du kodire Paulo akore ei Boe jokodu Aroe Pemegarewu akore taomagei profetadoge eiabiji 2 Atudo nowu boe etae, amagodo ei tawiaja tabore tamearudumode, mare taeruduwamodukare; taeku tabore taerudumode, mare tamodukare boe pawuje. 2 Paga karega, awu boe ewabo rakare, ere tuwiaja mi, ere tuioku mi, tukawo tuiedorodo ma, ikawo epemegado (Is 6, s). 2 Dukodi icare, taeruduwado: awu Pao o boe pemegarewu makudumode judeukare emawuge etai. 2 (Dukejere icare judeudoge ere tudawuje nowu piji tumago rakai pui dutabo). 3 Paulo mugure nowu ture aruwu bai tada jorure pobe. Nonore ure tugeragu jemarure tuwogaiwuge eiamedu boe ji. 3 Readodure brae ewiegai Pao o boe pemegarewu ji, ure boe eruduwado Jesus jiboe ji, turaga tabo, taidu tabo rugadu, iaboe iaboe emagokare ji rokawo ino. 

Boe eimadu. 1Imi, Paulo, imode awu bapera atugodo.
