Hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo iere Abadon, gregodoge ewadaru iere Epoluon, boe ewadaru tabo iere Ure Boe Pegadowu. 1 Awu boe ecebae boeto jiwu akedu keje, iage ere pobe kimo. 
Ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowutowu meriri iworewu. 1 Ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowutowu tupare togwa tugu to meriri iworewu to. Nowu inodu keje imearudure iaboe emago aregodui nowu mugure Pao otodaiwu altar jeke boe piji. 4Akore nowu iedure meriri iworewu jiwu ikera awubodure mito taci ikera awubowutowu tupaji, akore Nowu tupadoge ei pobe puibijidu ekera kogure nowu Eufrate pobo kurirewu kejewuge ekera goga kiwuje. 1 Icare nowu tupadoge ei pobe puibijidu ekera goga kiwujedure. Ere tudo turugadu ia boe makarewuge ewidodumode kejewu meri, ari, joru kae. 1 Eno tugobaigarege kawarudoge ewugejewuge emagaguragare rugadu. Iorudure enodo padure kejeboeji. 1 Oinore iorudure nowu kawarudogei, mugure ewugejewugei padure emorora kejewu meriri boarewu atugore nono jorugu atugore, atugore nono jacinto atugore, atugore nono jorubo ekurewu atugore. Kawarudoge etaorare nono adugo agarewuge etaorare. Joru, jeredudu, jorubo ekurewu reoreboere aregodure ekenoja piji. 1 Awu boe ecebae ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, joru, jeredudu, jorubo ekurewu aregodui ekenoja pijidu koiare ure boe ewidodu makaguragado. 1 Nowu kawarudoge ero pegai boeidu jeture enogwa keje eto keje jamedu. Etore nono awague ereore, duwuge ere boe etogorido etaora tabo. 2 Mare nowu boe ecebae ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokwaredu ukare bitowuge ekare tuiaedo turo pegarewu piji. Ekare tugera ra tui tubujodu Aroe pegarewu jitu piji. Ekare tamudo tui tubujodo joku bokwarewu, biaja bokwarewu, meru bokwarewu meriri ekurewu ji, meriri kigadurewu ji, meriri kujagurewu ji, toriji, iraji dupiji. 2 Ekare tugera ra tui boe ewido dupiji, turo pegarewu piji, turo pogurukarewu piji, tugiwogui boe ji dupiji. 

Ia tupa iedui ia bapera rogu ja jitudu. 1Dukeje icare iorudure ia tupa ro rakarewu ui turawuje boetugu tada baru piji duji. Ia baru otojiwu jure padure aora bukajeje. Jere nono meri jokure, pogorare nono joru rutui baru todu reore. 2Iedure ia bapera rogu jadodurewu ji. Ure tuwure pemegarewu bu pobo maerewu aogeje, ure tuwure koborewu bu moto keje. 3Icare jarurugodure nono adugo agarewu jarurure. Jaruru aregodu kejere icare boiarurudoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowotodu eiarurugodure. 4Eiaruru rekodaji, ire iiagu bapera atugodo, mare imearudure iaboe emagoi baru piji duji, akore nowu boiarurudoge emagore jiboe padu biado, akaba bapera atugodo ji. 5Dukejere cewu iorudure jiwu tupa rakojei pobo, moto kejedu ure tugana pemegarewu awogado baruto. 6Ure togwa kurido nowu jere jii jeboe ie tabo, ure baru towuje jeture kejeboe jamedu boe tabowu ie tabo, ure moto towuje jeture kejeboe jamedu boe tabowu ie tabo, ure pobo maerewu towuje jeture tadaboe jamedu boe tabowu ie tabo. Akore Boere marigudu. 7Mare nowu ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutowu tupa o ika akomode kejewu meri ji, Pao o boe biadodurewu umode turugadu, ure kogado tudugarege profetadoge eiabijiwu bakaru maiwu rekodaji. Oinore akore. 8Nowu inodu rekodaji, cewu boe emagoi baru pijidu, imearudure jidu, makore ii pemega pugeje, akore Toro! Akeragu nowu bapera rogu jarewu mugui cewu rakojere pobo moto kejewu tupa iera piji duji. 9Icare iture nowu tupa ae, inagore ji uiagu nowu bapera rogu maku inai. Icare akore oino ii Emareo. Kowuje. Jirimode akuri tada, mare akogwa keje betumode moiawe eweguru betu reore. 1 Icare ire ikeragu nowu bapera biegarewu rogu ji nowu tupa iera piji, icare ire kowuje. Boe jokodu: inogwa keje beture nono meiawe eweguru betu reore, mare ii ko du rekodaji jirire ikuri tada. 1 Icare akore ii pugeje Ure turugadu amagowo Pao bataru ji makarewu mugure pumekejewu boe eeda boeji, mugure pumekejewu boe eiboeji, mugure pumekejewu boe ewadaru boeji, mugure pumekejewu boe eimejerage ei. 

Makore Pao ro rakajiwuge ei pobedu. 1Dukejere moto kadodu epa o iwara makudure inai, icare iaboe emagore oino ii Aragojedo. Boe remagu Pao uwai ji, nowu altarji jamedu, nowu ure tubujodo jiwuge ei jamedu. 2Nowu padure Pao uwai oieiwu bororo akaba boe remagu ji, makudure aopegokarewuge etai, duwugere emode tuwure jodo bakurirewu pemegarewu keje arimode ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu reore. 3Imode makore irojiwuge ei pobedu, aroia marenaru meture eidu emagodo iwadaru ji merimode 1. 4Emagere figueira idoge ei pobedure emage. Emagere joru jai pobedure emage, duwugere eedure jeture moto jiwu joku otodai. 5Iaboe etaidumode tuwo turopegado ei ma, jorumode tudawuje eiabiji, umode onare eiwuge enoikowuje. Iaboe etaidure tuwo etogorido ma, oinonore bitodurumode. 6Nowu ime eroiware tuwo baru mitudo bubutu kawo tagoi Pao bataru jitu utonaji. Eroiware tuwo pobodo nono boe eku reore, eroiware tuwo moto kejeboe etogorido boe pegarewu jamedu boe tabo, taidu reore. 7Mare emagoi Pao bataru jitu jamedu akedu keje, barogo pegarewu rutumode jewoduio piji, rugodumode ei, umode tumorido ei, umode ewido. 8Ewi padumode bakurirewu uwororo oiadoda. Nowu bakurirewu ie bioi Sodoma cedu, Egito cedu, kejere eimejera padure i padui pugajejedu keje jamedu. 9Moto padui pumekejedu pijiwu, boe ewadaru padui pumekejedu pijiwu, ia moto tuginoiwuge epijiwu boe makarewuge etaregodumode tuioruduwo ewiji meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware mega taci iato du tonaji, emodukare boedo etugu moto to. 1 Awu moto kejewu boe eegare kuricigomode, eegaremode pui jice woje, emode mea maku puwogai eigoia. Dure karega, nowu profetadoge ei pobedure ecebaere emage kodi. 1 Mare nowu meri pobe ma jewu metuia bokware mega taci iatodu rekodaji Paore togwamu eto dutabore ere turagojedo pugeje taci je, nowu jorudurewuge epagudu kuricigore. 1 Emearudure iaboe emagoi baru pijidu akore Taru mato! Icare erudure baruto ia boetugu keje, onare eiwuge etaiwoi ei du tonaji. 1 Kuri inodu otonaji moto amagadu kuricigore, nowu bakurirewu ia oia buture, birewugere 7. 0 nowu moto amagadu koia. Iage epagudugodu kuricigore, ere Pao baru tadawu akaru kuricigodo. 1 Oinore nowu rekodajiwu boe ecebae akedure. Kuri inodu rekodaji, ia rekodajiwu aregodure. 
Boiwu meriri iworewu. 1 Ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutowu tupa ure togwa tugu to meriri iworewu to. Dukeje icare boe emago rakaguragareure baru tada. Egore Pao baru tadawu ro raka, Cristo ro raka ure tumaedo moto joki, emare jetumode boe ji boe jamedu ji jii je. 1 Nowu paopegamage ei ikera pudogidure iwure pudodgidure pobe puibiji pugejedu, emugui tumuga keje Pao jekaidu, ere tuie jodo moto to, ere tubujodo Pao ji. 1 Egore Cenure tukutaido ai, Cegimejera ro rakarewu Pao. Are oino, are marigudu, amode jii je, are boe eimejera remawudo aki, aeture boe ji rugadu. 1 Ao pegokarewuge ekodu kagirire, mare ica, akodu kagirii boeidu aregodure, amode akogado birewuge eidu aregodure jamedu, dukejere amode atugarege profetadoge, pemegarewuge, pagudure akie cewuge, biegarewuge, kurirewuge, ero pemegarewu mori maku etai, amode ure moto pegadowuge eeda kedodo. 1 Icare Pao uwai baru tadawu baiporore tuiado, icare nowu Pao uwai tadare Pao o bakaru meture tadawu ira ure towadudo. Du tonajire boe jeragudure, boe emagore, moto amagadure, boporira rakarewu buture. 

Aredu mare barogo pegarewu. 1Dukejere boe eerudure iaboe tuginoiwu ji baru tada. Ia aredu meri joku reorewu aroia meture jiwudo, ari mugure bure kuda, ia boe etaogajejewu ui kuiejedoge ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu kogure aogajeje. 2Oiogwari kuricigore tuguiaru kori koia, mearudure tuguri jirigoduji tonaregedu butuwo du bogai. 3Dukejere icare ia aroe etarigo reorewu kurirewu ure towadudo baru tada. Aorare ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, ukigare ikera pudogidure, aogejewure ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto. 4Ure to jodo baru tadawu makarewu kuiejedoge ewugeje, ure ewarigu moto kae. Nowu aroe etarigo reorewu ure tuburedo nowu aredu kuri butugodurewudo otodai, tuwo onaregedu kowuje kuri butu keje. 5Kuri buture ia imedu rogu apo, emare jetumode boe eiamedu boe ji tugedui iwara meriri jitu tabo. Mare nowu onaregedu rekodudodure baruto Pao ae, tumuga kae. 7Icare nowu aredu rekodure boe makodurewu to, Paoi tugera pemegado jitu kae, okwagemode nono, kudumode nono merimode 1 0 ce duji. 7Aroedoge erugodure pui baru tada. Tupadoge eimejera iei Miguel cedu rugodure tudugarege ebo nowu aroe tarigo reorewu ji. Nowu aroe barogo pegarewu rugodure tudugarege ebo jamedu. 8Mare awuge ekare tumorido. Dukodire eeda bokware pugeje baru tada. 9Dukodi icare nowu aroe barogo pegarewu, nowu mariguduwu awagu iei Aroe pegarewuge eimejera cedu, ure moto kejeboe eiamedu boe ewarigu turo pegarewu todu, barigududodure moto kae nowu tudugarege ebo. 1 Imearudure iaboe emago rakaguragai baru tada duji, akore Icare Pao ro rakarewu ui paginorudodu aregodure nowu tonaregedu Cristo ro raka tabo. Mare paga karega, mako pegare pawiemage eiwu, mako pegare ei meri ji boe co ji Pao jekaiwu barigududodure. 1 Mare awugere tumorido ji Cordeiro ku koia, egoi bataru jitu koia. Ewiapagakare pudui, tui tumagu tuwi kaedu kai. 1 Kodire, aki baru, aegaredo, mugure baru tadawuge eiamedu boe, taegaredo. Mare tagi, moto, pobo, tamearudu awadudo tai. Paga karega, Aroe pegarewuge eimejera ure turawuje tagae, boekori rakaguragai pudui dutabo, joruduware boe puredugodui pudui du kodi. 1 Nowu aroe tarigo reorewu jordui tuwarigudodui moto kae duji dukeje ure tudugu tudo nowu kuri buture negedurogu apowu aredu bogai turugoduwo ji. 1 Mare aroeceba ikodo kuricigorewu makudure nowu aredu ai tugoduwo boe makodurewu to, nowu tumugumodewo kae. Kejere okwagemode jorumode pobe ma jewu metuia bokware padumode taci ia oiado. Nonore mugu jaemode nowu awagu aora piji. 1 Nowu awagu owearigodure pobo tabo nowu aredu bogai, aredu okwawo nowu pobo to. 1 Mare moto aregodure tuwo tugerabraredo nowu areduji, ure togwa jado tuwo nowu awagu owearigodure tabowu pobo okwado tudo. 1 Dukodi icare nowu awagu korigodu kuricigore nowu aredu bogai, du kodi icare rugodure mugure awu moto kejewu orei, biapagare Paore boe eroiagudujiwuge ei, iedure Jesus bataru jiwuge ei. 1 Ure tumugudo kugaru padui pobo maerewu okwai dukeje. 

Barege ei pobedu. 1Icare iorudure ia barogo ui tudawuje pobo maerewu piji duji. Nowu barogo ukigadogere ikera pudogidure, aoradogere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, boe etaogajejeboere nono ikera pudogidure ukiga boe oto keje, boe emago pegaidu padure aora boe keje. 2Nowu iorudure jiwu barogo ure nono aigore; burere nono riedoge ewurere, okware nono adugo agarewu okware. Nowu aroe tarigo reorewu ure tuduru maku ai tumuga tabo, turo rakarewu tabo. 3Boe ecebae ui boe ewidodu padure ia aora keje, mare ecebae bitudodure. Dukodi icare boe eiamedu boe epagudugodu kuricigore, ekodure nowu barogo apo, 4ere tubujodo cewu aroe tarigo reoreboeji, ure turoraka maku nowu barogo ai kodi. Ere tubujodo nowu barogoji jamedu, tagoi: - Ioguduba umode nono awu barogore? Ioguduba rugodumode ji? 5Boe emago pegarewu korirewu makudure ai. Nowu romode oinodu makudure ai, ari ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure pobe taci pugeje duji. 6Dukodi icare ure tuia barido tumago pegawo Pao ji, tumago pegawo Pao ieji, Pao uwai ji, eedure baru tadawuge ei jamedu. 7Ro raka makudure ai rugoduwo pemegarewugei, uwo tumorido ei. Ro raka makudure ai boe eiamedu boe ji, boe ewadaru padui pumekeje duji, boe eno moto padui pumekeje duji. 8Icare cewu ie padukare nowu Cordeiro jiworewu o bapera jerewu keje, jii boe toduidu oto piji mato, mugure awu moto kejewuge emode tubujodo ji. 9Biajarewu biapagamode awu inoduji. 1 Aidure tuwo tumedage ewarigu baicorewu towuge, ewarigudumode baicorewu to jamedu. Umode tumedage ewido toriga rairewu tabowuge ewimode toriga rairewu tabo jamedu. Awu inodu tabore pemegarewuge emode turokogado tuduruji tumeartoraeji. 1 Icare iorudure ia barogo rutui moto piji duji. Ukigare pobe, ia Cordeiro reore, mare makore nono aroe tarigorewu mako reore. 1 Ro pegare nono boeto jiwu barogo ro pega reore, meardae, jordae rekodaji. Ure moto, moto kejewuge edo tubujodo cewu umode bitowu ucebae biturewu boeto jiwu barogoji. 1 Ure turo tago rakarewu towuje. Ure joru udo turawuje baru piji boe eiamedu boe eegai jamedu. 1 Ure jeture moto kejewuge eto pui nowu turore betojiwu barogo jekai dutabo, tui boe edo nowu boere okorido toriga rairewu tabo mare pemegagodure pugejewu boeto jiwu barogo ureoredu towuje dutabo. 1 Makudure ai tuwo boeto jiwu barogo ureoredu utaroedo, makowo du bogai, uwo ukare tubujodo nowu barogo ureoredu jiwuge ewido. 1 Ure boedo kruca bu boe eiamedu boe ekana pemegarewu keje, eri keje: biegarewuge, kurirewuge, oroe kurirewuge, marenarure emawuge, boe etugerekare emawuge, boe etugaregere emawuge. 1 Ukare nowu barogo ie iarema ie oto pa padukare ewugejewuge edo boe aru iarema boe maku. 1 Joruduwa rakarewu joruduwamode awu inoduji. Mearuduwarewu iemarumode nowu barogo oto pa bogai, paga karega, ia imedu o oto pa rema kodi. Awu oto pare 6 6 rema. 

Cordeiro oge pemegarewuge. 1Itaiwore Cordeiro rakojere torekari iei Sião cedu aogeje. Apore boe ei 1. 0 cewuge etaregodure, ie padure eeri keje, Uo ie padure eeri keje jamedu. 2Du tonajire icare imearudure ia baru tadaboe eragoduji, eragodu ure nono ia pobo makarewuge eiaruru reore, ure nono biaruru rakarewu jaruru reore. Nowu imearudure jiwu boe eragodu ure nono cítara epage ei to cítara akodo du reore. 3Eragodure ia turagodure jiboe maiwu ji, nowu Pao muga otodai. Iaboe iaboe eroiwakare turagoduwo eragodure jiboe ji, mare tu cewu 1. 0 cedu, duwugere etarudodure moto piji tu rugadu. 4Awugere ekera keadukare aremei, iaboe iaboe jetukare etaroeto kodi. Emagere ekodure Cordeiro apo kodurewu jamedu boe kae. Etawujedure ime epiji, makudure boetijiboere emage Pao ai, Cordeiro ai. 5Boe eerudukare ewadararodaeji eiabiji; ero, emago pegarewu bokwa Pao jekai. 
Tupadogere boe ji tugogadodu awadudo. 6Icare iorudure ia tupa kodui baru oia jiduji, iedui bakaru maiwu akedu bokwarewu ji tuwo kogado moto kejewuge etai, padure pumekejewu boe eiamedu boe etai. 7Ure tumago rakaguragado tagoi oino dutabo: - Tabagududo Pao ji, ie kurido. Icare boe aregodure umode tugogado boe ji du kae. Tabujodo cewu ure baru, moto, pobo maerewu, pobojari boe towujewu ji. 8Ia tupa kodure rekodaji, tagoi oino dutabo: - Bakurirewu iei Babilônia cedu buture, buture, ure moto padui pumekejedu boe ekududo turo pegareuce, tuboguru bokwareuce kodi. 9Ia tupa kodure eregodajiwu akore tumago raka tabo Iaboe emode tubujodo barogoji, iarema ureoreduji, iarema etaidumode o kruca paduwo tuieri keje, iarema tugera keje ma, 1 eruduwamode Pao kodu kagiriae remawu ji. Jorubo ekurewu o joru umode eerududo tujebaeji, baru tadawu tupadoge eegai, Cordeiro jekai. 1 Nowu ecebae uredudu rutumode baruto boe jamedu ji jii je. Ure tubujodo barogo jiwuge, barogo ureoredu jiwuge, barogo ie kruca makudure aiwuge, etamudodumodukare meri ji, boe co ji jii je. 1 Awu inodu koiare pemegarewuge eduru awadudodure, cewu rore nono Paoi boe eroiagudu jiwuge, mearutorure Jesus jiwuge. 1 Imearudure iaboe emagoi baru piji duji, akore ii Awu inodu bu bapera keje aroe Pemegarewu akore u! Eiwo aidugirinure ewire Pao iera kejewuge, ewo tamudo tumaragodaeji. Ero, ego, kodumode eregodaji. 
Boe ji jepara jodo parera iguru enari kejedu. 1 Itaiwore kimo: ia boetugu kigadurewu kejere ia Imedu Onaregedureboe mugure keje. Ia meriri ekurewu kogure aogajeje, iedure ia jepara o micigirewu ji. 1 Ia tupare tudawuje Pao uwai piji tumago rakaguraga tabo cewu mugure boetugu kejewu ae, akore Aebara jodo, boe kado. Icare boe aregodure pudae boewo boe kado, moto kejeboe kurodure kodi. 1 Icare mugure nowu boetugu kejewu ure tuiebara jodo, icare moto kejeboe kadodure. 1 Icare ia tupare tudawuje baru tadawu Pao uwai piji. Uiebara o micigireure jamedu. 1 Icare ia tupa, cewu jeonare joru jiwu, ure tudawuje altar piji, makore tumago raka.
Guragarewu tabo cewu uiebara o micigirewu ae, akore Aebara o micigirewu jodo boe keje, awu moto kejewu parera iguru ekenari kado, ekenari kurodure kodi. 1 Icare tupare tuiebara o micigirewu jodo moto keje, ure parera iguru kado, ure ekenari barigu boemode tuwure jodo kejeboeto, mare tagoino dutabore, Pao kodu kagirae jire ako oino. 2 Boere tuwure jodo keje bakurirewu kujei, dukejere boe eku ure tadawuje piji. Nowu boe eku aregodure jii kawarudoge eia tadawu meriri kae, ure tumaedodu kuricigodo moto joki. 

Pao jiwu jora kurirewu. 1Iorudure iaboeji kimo baru tada, ia motu rakaguragareboeji: tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowotodu ekedure boe ecebae boiwu ui ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto duji. Eigoiare emode Pao kodu kagirae oto bu nowu boiwu boe ecebae tabo. 4Iorudure ia pobo maerewu ui nono meriri kuru reoreboeji, joru padure oiei. Ure tumorido barogo pegarewu jiwuge, ure tumorido nowu barogo ureoredu jiwuge, ure tumorido nowu barogo ie oto pa jiwuge eragojere nowu pobo maerewu meriri kururewu bukeje tugedui Pao o citaradoge ei dutabo. 3Eragodure Pao utugare Moisés o joraji, Cordeiro o joraji, egore Ure tumorido boe jamedu jiwu Pao baru tadawu, aró, akago kuricigo remawunure; jeture moto padui pumekejedu jamedu boe jiwu Pao, boe jetororewu, boe jokodurewunure akawarace. 4Pagimejera, ioguduba pagudumodukare akieji? Aki mito tu jere apemegare. Moto padui pumekejedu jamedu boe etaregodumode tuwo tubujodo ai, boe eerudu awadumode are akogado jiboe ji. 5Awu inodu rekodaji, iorudure Pao bataru meture tadawu ira mugure tadawu Pao uwai ui tuiado duji. 6Nowu Pao uwai pijire tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowotodu ere tuiebu tugedui nowu boe ecebae ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto duji. Aroia pemegarewu kigadurewu meture ei, aroia boarewu meriri ekurewu kogure emorora kajeje. 7Cewu jereboe ei pobe puibijidu ia ure ruwobo meriri ekurewuge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowotodu maku nowu tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowotodu etai, enorogobadure Pao jere jii jewu kodu kagirae tabo. 8Icare nowu Pao uwai korobadure aregodure Pao urugu pijiwu ro raka pijiwu jeredudu tabo. Iaboe iaboe eroiwakare tuwo turemo nowu Pao uwaito, nowu tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu eroi boe ecebae tabo boe ji kimodu otonaji. 

1Icare imearudure iaboe emago padui templo pijiduji. Akore oino nowu tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto duji: - Tadudo, tawo nowu Pao kodu kagirae metui nowu ruwobodoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowotodu tadadu redo moto joki. 2Dukodi icare nowu boeto jiwure meture turuwobo tadaboe redo moto joki, icare ia boe enogurodudae pegarewu ure tudowuje cewu barogo pegarewu kruca padure kejewuge eiogi, ure tubujodo ure nono reoredu jiwuge eiogi. 3Rekodajiwure meture turuwobo tadaboe redo pobo maerewu joki. Pobo maerewu ure tudo nono bireboe eku reore. Meture tadaboe eiamedu boe ewire. 4Eregodajiwure meture turuwobo tadaboe redo pobodoge eiogi, pobojari boe joki. Ere boekudo pudumi. 5Icare imearudure jeture pobo jiwu tupa akoi: - Jetororeboenure aki, akire boeto jiboere aki, Pemegarewunure aki, oinore are akogado boe ji. 6Ere pemegarewuge eku, ere profetadoge eku redo, kodire are ekududo boekuce jamedu. Oinore ure turugadu ei. 7Icare imearudure iaboe emagoi altar piji duji, akore U! Ema rugadu! Pagimejera Pao roiwa rakarewu, ai akogado boeidu rikire, jetorore. 8Pobepuibijiwure meture turuwobo tadaboe redo meri joku joki, joru makudure ai uwo ime ekowu. 9Icare boeru rakareure ime ekowu, emago pegare Pao ieji, ui boe ecebae rodo boe eiduji. Etaidukare tuwo tuiedorodo, etaidukare tuwo ie kurido. 1 Pagera awubodureure meture turuwobo tadaboe redo barogo pegarewu muga joki. Icare boecodure jeture jiwuge eiogi, utugarege ere toedo tugeruji tujebae kori koia. 1 Emago pegare baru tadawu Pao ji, boe korii pudui dukoia, ekare tuiaedo turo pegarewu piji. 1 Eregodajiwure meture turuwobo tadaboe barigu pobo kurirewu iei Eufrates cedu joki, icare pobo biture tuwo awara jado meri rutu jaogwaiwu boe eimejerage kurirewuge etai. 1 Icare iorudure ia aroe pegarewuge ei pobe ma jewu metuia bokware duji, ere nono ruiere, ere tudawuje nowu aroe tarigo ja piji, nowu barogo pegarewu ja piji, nowu paga pagawu profeta ja piji. 1 Aroe Aroe pegarewu rewugenure emage, ere turo tuginoiwu towuje, eture moto jamedu kejewu boe eimejerage ewogai, tuwo eto pui, ewo tudo turugadu turugoduwo nowu Pao ro rakarewu o meri kurirewu aregodumodedu keje. 1 Pao akore Ca! Iwogureboe aregodu reorere itaregodumode. Jiwo aidugirireure umode tugudae pado pemegado, merumodukare tuwiri kedo tabo, umodukare boe eerududo tuboguraeji. 1 Ure eto pui ia boe eeda keje. Hebrewudoge ewadaru tabo iere Armagedon (boe ewadaru tabo boe Eimejerage Ewire Kejeboe). 1 Kodure boigodu eregodajiwu ure meture turuwobo tadaboe barigu baru otoji, icare ia boe emago rakarewu aregodure nowu Pao muga piji, akore Ure turugadu. Oino. 1 Icare boe jeragudure, boe emagore, boiarurugodure, ia moto amagadu kurireure, boekare ino jii boe eedui moto kejedu paru piji. 1 Nowu bakurirewu remawu kadodure tuiado pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. Moto padui pumekejedu kejewu bakurirewuge ewudure. Pao biabuture nowu bakurirewu iei Babilônia cedu keje tuwo udo turokogado tugodu kagirae korireuce. 2 Pobo aiare tabowu moto jamadu boe eregodure. Torekaridoge eiamedu boe ewogware pi tuku je. 2 Poborirewu kuricigorewu buture baru piji ime ewugeje. Ime emago pegare Pao ji ui tujebaedo poborirewu ceduji, awure pega jokodure kodi. 

Babilônia ucebae. 1Icare cewu iedure turuwobo jiwu tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu, ia emage, uture mato itae, akore ii Mato, imode aerududo mugure pobo maerewu aogejewu aredu ro pegarewudo ucebaeji. 2Awu moto kejewu boe eimejerage ero pegare apo. Ure moto kejewuge etaora bai baido, tui ekududo tumeardae pegareuce dutabo. 3Icare ure irego itaroe tabo toro boe makodurewu to. Iorudure ia aredu mugui ia barogo pegarewu kujagurewu keje duji; boe enogirudodae pegarewu padure jamedu keje; aoradogere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, ukigadogere ikera awubodure. 4Nowu aredu ukudae kujagu rakareure meture ji, oroere meriri ekureuce, tori mori kuricigoreuce, tori motureuce; iedure ia ruwobo meriri ekurewu okorobadui turo, tago, tagemo pegarewu tabo duji. 5Ia boe ekie bioreure padure jeri keje: - Babilnia, bakurirewu kurirewu, awu moto kejewu boe ero pegarewu boe emeardae pegarewu jamedu boe etuje. 6Iorudure nowu aredu joku pegai pemegarewuge eku tabo, ure tuiwodo Jesus aiwuge eku tabo duji. 7Mare nowu tupa akore oino ii kodiba apagudugodure? Imi rugadure imode aeruduwado nowu aredu kodiboeji, nowu aoradogere ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, ukigadogere ikera pudogidure, oredure nowu aredu apowu barogo pegarewu kodiboeji. 8Aerudure jiwu barogo pegarewu ure marigudu, ukare pugeje, mare jepadumode jewoduio piji, utumode tuwogwadodu kae. Mugure awu moto kejewuge, ie padure bapera jerewu keje boe paru pijiwuge, eebogodu kuricigomode tuiorudui barogo pegarewu ui tuguo pugeje duji. 9Mare oino, ure turugadu boewo tumeardae tugu. Nowu barogo aoradogei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu, ere nono torekodudogei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto, du ewugejere nowu aredu mugure. 1 Nowu barogo aoradogei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu, ure nono brae eimejerage ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowuto jamedu. Ei ikera awubodu reorewuge ewudure marigudu, ia rakoje kimore, boigoduwu aregodukare roga, mare aregodu keje rakoje raigirimoduka. 1 Nowu barogo pegarewu ure marigudu mare ukare pugejewu, ure ikera awubodure pobe ma jewu metuia bokware ikera awubowutowu brae eimejera rema. Ia nowuge emeduianure ema, utumode tuwogwarewo kae. 1 Ca! Cewu aerudure jiwu ukigadoge ei ikera pudogiduredu ere nono ia brae eimejerage ei ikera pudogiduredu remage, duwugere eetukare boe ji roga, mare eedumode boe ji kobori tu je nowu barogo pegarewu apo. 1 Emeardaemode nono pu meardaere, ewo turo raka maku barogo pegarewu ai. 1 Erugodumode Cordeiro ji, mare Cordeiro umode tumorido ei, emare boe eimejerage eimejera rema, boe eimejerage kurirewuge eimejera kurirewunure ema kodi. Nowu jeture apowuge, makore ewogaiwuge, ure tugeragu ji pudaiwuge, mearutorure jiwuge, emode tumorido apo jamedu. 1 Nowu tupa akore ii pugeje.
Aerudure jiwu pobodoge aredu mugure kejewuge ere nono moto padui pumekejewuge ereore, boe makarewuge ereore, boe ewadaru padui pumekejewuge ereore. 1 Nowu aerudure jiwu barogo ukigadoge ei ikera pudogiduredu ekodu kagirimode nowu aredu pegarewudoji. Emode ukudae tawuje piji, emode biri kedodo, emode kodu kowuje, emode kowu joru tabo. 1 Paga karega, Paore etaidudo erowo tumeardae reore, erowo puapo ewo tugerabraredo barogo pegarewu ji jii boe kodui Pao bataru rekodajidu kae. 1 Aerudure jiwu aredu ure nono bakurirewu kurirewu reore, dure jeture moto kejewu brae eimejeragei. 

Babilônia buturedu. 1Nowu inodu rekodaji, iorudure ia tupai turawuje baru pijiduji, du ro rakaguragare, ure moto urugudo tuiorugu tabo. 2Ure tumago rakaguragado tagoi oino dutabo: - Buture. Babilônia kurirewu buture. Aroe pegarewuge eeda, aroe pegarewuge eiari, kiege pegarewuge eiarinure ema pugeje. 3Paga karega, moto padui pumekejedu eiamedu boe ekudure ro ako pegarewu kodu kagiraece, moto kejewu brae eimejerage ero pegare apo, awu moto kejewu ure akirodo boejiwuge ere toroe kuricigodo oroe kuricigorewu tabo. 4Imearudure ia boe emago ji pugeje, akore Iwobe, taebu piji, tarokawo nono ro pega reore, takawo metagedo tagi ucebae keje. 5Paga karega, ro pegarewu itodure, aregodure baruto, Pao biabuture ro pegarewu keje. 6Ro magai tai du reorere taromode ji jamedu, ro pegarewu mori maku ai tao kae. Ure tagududo towu ruwobo, okorawu, maku ai pugeje tao kae. 7Umagai boe eerududo toroe kurirewu jitu reore, tamode ucebae, oragudu, maku ai jamedu. Paga karega, akore oino tuwabo keje imugure boe eimejerage emuga keje boe eimejeragoi imi dutabo, mare oredu birewu aredu reore karega, imarenarudumodukare iaboe keje iaboe keje. 8Dukodire awu ucebae boe aregodumode ae meri mitoduji: boe ewi, boe etoragudu, boe eke boi jidu, jorumode akedudo, mare paga karega, ure tugogado jiwu Pagimejera Aroe Eimejera ro rakare. 9Ro pegare apowu awu moto kejewu brae eimejerage etoragudu kuricigomode bukeje, erudui jeredudui tudawuje piji dukeje. 1 Eragoje jaemode ji tubagudu koia ucebae roi jituji, egomode: - Iai, iai! Babilônia bakurirewu! Babilônia bakurirewu! Boe raigirikare boe ji tugogado ai dutabo! 1 Awu moto kejewu baare akiró tabowuge etoragudumode etogeamode bukeje jamedu, ure akirodo enoroe jiboe bokware pugeje kodi. 1 Enoroe meriri ekurewu, meriri kigadurewu, tori mori kuricigorewu! Tori moturewu, aroia kigadurewu, aroia kujagurewu, aroia kurukururewu, aroia kujagu rakaguragarewu, awu ira boe rorewu jamedu boe, enoroe barege eto rakarewu, enoroe ira mori kuricigorewu, enoroe meriri kujagurewu, meriri koadurewu. 1 Enoroe tori kororogodurewu, ia enoe roreboe padui pumekejedu jamedu boe, bokadoboe rorewu, eke boe parera kuru, boe kaguru, eke iro boe, eguiee jamedu boe, eguiee ovelhadoge, kawarudoge, eno imarido boe, etugarege boe, ime boe. 1 Akagemore jiboe rugadu akedure akoe kuri inodu, boe urugu boe akedure, aerudumodukare inoduji pugeje. 1 Ure akirodo awu inodu boe jiwuge emode tuburedodu jaedo tubagudu tabo ucebaece, etoragudumode etogeamode, tagoi oino dutabo: - 1 Jiwo pegarewu bakurirewu kurirewu! Ure aroia pemegarewu, aroia kujagurewu, aroia kurukururewu upodo pudabo, ure cenawudo meriri ekurewu tabo, tori mori kuricigorewu tabo, tori moturewu tabo. 1 Mare awu oroe kuri inodu jamedu boe akedure pi tuku je. Ure ika kurirewu redowuge eiamedu boe, pobo maerewu kaowuge eiamedu boe, ika kurirewu epage eiamedu boe, maragodure pobo kaowuge eiamedu boe ere tuburedodu jaedo ji. 1 Etaiwoi jeredudui tudawuje nowu joru cei nowu bakurirewu to dupiji du kae, egore.
Kakoduwu bakurirewu ure nono awu bakurirewu kurirewu reore? 1 Ere moto rugudu tugu taoto, toragudu tabo, tumago tabo: 
Jiwo pegarewu bakurirewu kurirewu! Ure ika kurirewu epage eiamedu boe enoroe kuricigodo toe kurirewu tabo. Mare akedure pi tuku je. 2 Aki, baru, aegaredo ji, tagi jamedu, pemegarewuge, apostolodoge, profetadoge, taegaredo ji, paga karega, Paore tugogado ji tui tamorido dutabo. 2 Icare ia tupa ro rakarewu ure tugeragu ia tori kurirewu ji, ure barigu pobo maerewu to, akore Oinore Babilônia bakurirewu kurirewu barigudumode, boe eerudumodukare ji pugeje. 2 Boe emearudumodukare awugeje iera akore citara jiwuge ekera akoji, urarewuge eraji, okwa akorewuge enogwa akoji pugeje. Boe eerudumodukare atoda ia maragodureboeji pugeje, boe emearudumodukare atoda pugeje ure boe a kududowu tori akoji pugeje. 2 Jorugu ja urugumodukare awugeje pugeje, boe emearudumodukare awugeje uwirerewu, ukogerewudo emago ji pugeje. Paga karega, ure akirodo akoroe taboboe awu moto kejeboe eimejerare emage moto padui pumekejedu eiamedu boe ere tuwogwado boeto aro pegarewu koia. 2 Awugejere boe eerudure profetadoge ekuji, pemegarewuge ekuji, cewu bitodure moto kejewuge eiamedu boe ekuji. 

Baru tadawu jora. 1Oinodu rekodaji imearudure baru tada ia makareboe eragoduji. Egore Paegarewo. Pao ore boe einorudae, urugureboe, rorakareboe. 2Paoi tugogado boeidu rikire, jetorogodure. Ure tugogado cewu aredu kurirewudo, ro pegarewudoji, duwudo ure moto pegado turo pegarewu tabo. 3Ure tugogado ji tudugarege eku mori bogai. Dukejere icare eragodure pugeje, egore Paegarewo, nowu aredu pegarewudo uredudu rutumode baruto boe jamedu ji jii je kodi. 4Dukeje icare cewu Paopegadogei ikera pudogidure iwure pudogidure pobepuibiji pugejedu, cewu jereboe ei pobepuibijidu ere tubujodo Pao ui tumugudo nowu mugurewu keje duji, egore Oino rugadu! Paegarewo! 5Nowu muga piji iaboe emago aregodure, akore Tagi taiamedu boe, Pao utugarege biegarewuge, kurirewuge tabagudui cedu, tarago ji. 6Awu inodu keje imearudure ia makarewuge eragoduji, eiarurure nono pobo makarewuge eiarurure, ure nono boiaruru rakarewuge eiarurure, egore Paegarewo, Pagimejera Pao ro rakarewu jeture boe ji kodi. 7Paegarewo, paegare kuricigowo, pawo akaru kurido. Paga karega, nowu Cordeiro iera makudumode aredu aidu puredugodunure, nowu iera makudumode aiwudo ure tudo turugadu kodi. 8Boere jeonado aroia pemegarewu moturewu ji, awu aroia jebatodure pemegarewuge ero pemegarewu ji. 9Dukejera akore oino ii Awu inodu bu bapera keje returudodure ewogaiwuge eeruduwo Cordeiro iera makudui aredu aidu jiwuge eiwo aidugirinure. Icare akore oino ii kimo Awu Pao bataru boe rikirewunure ema. 1 Iwudure bure paru iwo ipujodo ji, mare akore oino ii Aro kaba ino! Pao utugarenure imi areore, amanamage emeatorure Jesus bataru jiwuge ereore. Pao jire amode apujodo. Boe jokodu Jesus Cristo bataru jire profetadoge emagore. 
Cristo ui tumorido barege pegarewuge eidu. 1 Iorudure kimo baru jaji: ia kawaru kigadurewu jepadure piji. Mugure kejeboe iere Boe Rikirewu, Boe Jokodurewu; boe jetororewu tabore ure tugogado boe ji, rugodure tonare jiwugei. 1 Joku jeragudure. Boe etaogajejewu makare aogajeje, ia boe eruduwakare jiwu boe ekie padure keje, ema mitotu jere joruduware ji. 1 Ia aroia, boekure jokiwure, meture ji. Iere Pao o Bataru rema. 1 Baru tadawu tugobaigarege emugui kawaru kigadurewuge ewugejedure ekodure apo, aroia kigadurewu moturewu meture ei. 1 Ia toriga rairewu ore puibijiwure aregodure ja piji, uwo padure pumekejewu mearutorukarewuge etogorido tabo. Umode tuwure jodo boere tuwure jodo parera kejeboe okorobadui Pao kodu kagirae tabo dukeje. 1 Opore apowu aroia keje, upeagajejewu keje, atugododure oino boe eimejerage Eimejera, boe eimejerage kurirewuge Eimejera Kurirewu. 1 Icare iorudure ia tupa rakojei meri joku bukeje duji, akore tumago raka tabo kodure baru otojiwu kiege baregei: - Tado pui mato, Paore tagogwage kuricigomode jiboe udo turugado du kae. 1 Tawo brae eimejerage ekodu kowuje, tawo tugobaigarege eimejerage ekodu, ro rakarewuge ekodu kowuje, tawo kawarudoge ekodu, mugure ewugejewuge ekodu kowuje, tawo boe etugarekare emawuge, boe etugare emawuge, biegarewuge, kurirewuge ime ekodu kowuje. 1 Iorudure cewu barogo pegarewu ji, iorudure awu moto kejewu boe eimejerage ei tudo pui to tugobaigarege ebo, turugoduwo cewu mugure nowu kawaru kejewu tugobaigarege ei jamedu du bogai. 2 Mare cewu barogo pegarewu ieragogudodure, cewu profeta pegarewu apo, dure ure turo tuginoiwu towuje tui cewu barogo pegarewu kruca padure ewugejewuge, ure tubujodo ure nono reoredu jiwuge eekuri pagado dutabo. Ei pobedu ewarigudodure jorubo ekurewu ure nono kuruga reoreboe uruto. 2 Cewu mugure kawaru kejewu ure iage ewido cewu aregodure tuiabijiwu tariga rairewu tabo. Kiege barege eiamedu boe ere tuguredudo nowuge ekodu tabo. 

Aroe tarigorewu jeonare jiboe. 1Icare iorudure ia tupai turawuje baru piji duji, iedure jewoduio baiporo epaji, iedure ia meriri iku rairewu ji. 2Ure tugeragu nowu aroe tarigorewu ji, nowu mariguduwu awagu, duwu Aroe pegarewuge eimejara rema, ure iera gogudo jii jorumode mil cedu kae. 3Ure barigu jewoduioto, ure baiporo mi baiporo epa tabo, ure ia kruca bu baiporo keje, ukawo boe epadui pumekejedu eekuri pagado pugeje, jii jorumode mil cedu akedumode du kae. Awu inodu rekodaji ieragoga kiwujedumode biega tu je. 4Iorudure boe emuga boeji, kejere umode tugogado boeiwuge emugure, cewu itoru kadodure egoi Pao bataru ji, Jesus bataru jitu koiawuge etaroe rabodu, cewu ukare tubujodo barogo pegarewu jiwuge, ureoredu jiwuge, kruca padukare eri kejewuge, ekera kejewuge eiamedu boe rabodu, eedodu maidure, eeture boe ji Cristo apo jorure mil ceduji. 5Cewu ia birewuge emodukare tugirimi tuibagi, eewodumodukare jii jorumode mil cedu akedumodedu kae. Dure boeto jiwu boe eewodu reno. 6Cewu rakojere jewodure ca boeto jiwuge ebowu, pemegare, jiwo aidugirire. Boe ewi rekodajiwu ro rakamodukare ji, mare Pao burejoiadogemode emage, Cristo burejoiadoge mode emage, etumode apo boe ji jorumode mil ceduji. 7Jorumode mil cedu akedu keje, Aroe pegarewuge eimejera umode tudawuje tuwaicorewu piji. 8Umode tudawuje tuwo boe padui pumekeje moto okwajidu (Gog, Magog) eekuri pagado du bogai. Umode eeto pui turugoduwo. Emagaguragamode nono pobo maerewu tadawu kugaru reore. Emode taodo moto joki, emode bakuredo pemegarewuge eedaji, Pao mearudu kurire jiwu bakurirewu ji. 9Mare ia jorure tudawuje baru piji, ure erugadu kowu. Nowu ure ekuri pagadowu Aroe pegarewu, barigududodure ia jorubo ekurewu kuruga uruto; 1 cewu barogo pegarewu meture tada marigudu nowu profeta pagarewu apo duto. Du tadare ewudugugodumodukare boekoriji meri ji, boe co ji, boe jamedu ji jii je. 
Paoi tugogado boe jamedu boe jitu. 1 Icare iorudure ia boe emuga kurirewu urugurewu ji. Iaboe ure tumugudo keje. Baru, moto eregodure je piji, icare boe eerudumodukare eedumode kejeboeji. 1 Iorudure birewuge kurirewuge, biegarewuge eragojei nowu muga otodai duji. Baperadogere tuiado, ia baperare tuiado jamedu, bapera jerewu. Boere tugogado birewugei, boe padu magai nowu bapera kejedu reore, ero boe rekodaji. 1 Pobo maereure meture tudodawuge emagu. Du reorere meture boe ewi tadawuge, moto tadawuge emagudure jamedu. Boere tugogado ei, ero boe rekodaji. 1 Boe ewi, birewuge eeda moto kudawu, barigududodure kuruga joruto. Nowu kuruga joru boe ewi rekodajiwunure ema. 1 Cewu ie padukare bapera jerewu kejewu, barigudure kuruga joruto. 

Baru tadawu Jerusalém. 1Icare iorudure ia baru maiwu ji, ia moto maiwu ji, mare boeto jiwu baru, boeto jiwu moto ewogware, pobo maerewu bokware pugeje. 2Iorudure bakurirewu pemegarewu Jerusalém maiwu ui turawuje baru piji duji, ia aredu magai tugera pemegado pudui toredu togidu reore. 3Du tonajire imearudure ia boe emago kurirewu aregodui nowu boe mugurewu piji duji. Akore Pao mugui ime ebowu uwai reo. Mugumode ebo, uwobemode emage. Pao rugadure rakojemode ebo. 4Umode eeguru rugadu kabi. Boe ewimodukare pugeje, boe emarenarudumodukare pugeje, boe enoiogwarimodukare pugeje, boe ecebaemodukare pugeje, mariguduboe akedure kodi. 5Icare cewu mugure tumuga kejewu akore Ca! Imode boe jamedu boe maidudo pugeje. Akore oino kimo awu inodu boe bu bapera keje, mare awu bataru boe remawu boe jokodunure ema kodi. 6Akore oino pugeje: - Ure turugadu! Alfanure imi, Omeganure imi. Dure oino boe paru boe otonure imi. Imode pobo jari pijiwu po jerewu makudu pagado pobo boire jiwu ai, kuduwo ce. 7Awu jamedu boe makudumode umode tumoridowu ai. Uomode imi, itonaregedumode ema. 8Uru barigodurewuge, poguru bokwarewuge, ropegarewuge, ure tubujodo boe pega jiwuge, batararodurewuge eiamedu boe, jorubo ekurewu urukori rakarewu, rekodajiwu boe ewi, makudumode etai. 
Baru tadawu bakurirewu motu. 9Dukeje icare cewu tupadoge ei ikera awubodure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu eedure turuwobo boe enorogobadui boiwu boe ecebae tabodu ia emeduia aregodure, akore oino ii Mato, imode aerududo Cordeiro mugumode apowu areduji. 1 Ure irego itaroe tada ia torekari rico rairewu ao kae, ure iorududo bakurirewu pemegarewu ji, aregodure baru pijiwu puredu Pao pijiwu Jerusalemji. 1 Meture Pao urugu tada duji. Nowu urugu ure nono meriri kururewu tori moturewu reore. 1 Motori okwatorurewu ricoraireure padure oiei, baiporodogere ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowuto. Tupadogei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu eragojere nowu baiporodoge ewugeje tuietu tabo ei. Israeldoge etuwobe ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ekie padure nowu baiporodoge ewugeje. 1 Baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware meri rutu jaogwai, ecerae eiaogwaire baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, tugarege eiaogwaire baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware, meri butu jaogwaire baiporodogere pobe ma jewu metuia bokware. 1 Nowu motori padui bakurirewu oieidu bure jore toridogei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu keje, nowu Cordeiro utugarege ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu ekie padure ewugeje. 1 Nowu makore iiboe iedure ia iwarameriri ekurewu ji, tuwo nowu bakurirewu baiporodoge, motori padui oieidu remagu tabo. 1 Nowu bakurirewu ure nono ia quadrado reore: raire nono boare. Kodi icare ure nowu bakurirewu remagu nowu to iwarameriri ekurewu tabo. Remagudure estadiodogei 1. 0 cedu reore. Rai, boa, rico ure nono pureore. 1 Ure nowu motori remagu jamedu, remagudure boe ekana ra ui 1 4 cedu reore. Oinore Tupare boe remagu boe eno boe remagudu tabo. 1 Nowu motori padure bakurirewu oieidu, tori moturewunure jamedu boece. Meriri ekureure nowu bakurirewu rema, ure nono meriri kuru ri reoreboe reore. 1 Tori mori kuricigorewu padure pumekejewure padure nowu motori bure jore kejeboe keje. Boeto jiwu torire jaspe rema, rekodajiwu safira rema, eregodajiwu calcedônia rema, calcedônia rekodajiwu torikuieje kawarurewu rema, 2 Eregodajiwu sardônio rema, sardônio rekodajiwure cornalina rema, cornalina rekodajiwure crisálito rema, rekodajiwure berilo rema, rekodajiwure topázio rema, rekodajiwure crisóparo rema, rekodajiwure jacinto rema, boigoduwure ametista rema. 2 Nowu baiporodogere ei ikera pudogidure pobe taci ikera awubowutodu todure tu tu mitotu jewu tori tabo. Nowu ewororore meriri ekurewu remawu rema, ure nono meriri kuru reore. 2 Iordukare ia uwai ji toda, mare paga karega, Pagimejera Pao ro rakareure boe ewai pemegareure ema, Cordeiro jamedu. 2 Nowu bakurirewu okeakare merijoku bogai, ari bogai, eruguwo ji, mare Pao urugure jore keje, nowu urugure Cordeiro rema. 2 Boe epadui pumekejedu emerumode uruguji. Moto kejewu boe eimejerage emode tugurireboe reko bogai. 2 Uwaiporodoge emodukare tumi boe jamedu ji, boecomodukare kodi. 2 Boe etaregodumode tuwo moto padui pumekejedu kurireboe reko bogai. 2 Ia pegareboe umodukare turemo to, ia ro pegarewu, batararodurewu umodukare turemo to, mare ie padure Cordeiro o bapera jerewu kejewuge tu rugadu emode turemo to. 

1Dukeje icare nowu tupare iorududo ia pobo jerewu ui tudawuje Pao muga piji, nowu Cordeiro muga piji, du kigadure nono ia tori kigadure. 2Nowu bororo oiado, nowu pobo okwai, ia i jerewu rakojere, tudure ikera pudogidure pobe taci iwurekotodu, ari kodu reorere tudu boture mitotu tu je. Nowu i aru jorubokurunure ema boe epadui pumekejedu etai. 3Nono, boe emago pegare jiboe bokwamode nono, mare kejere Pao muga mugumode, Cordeiro muga mugumode keje. Pao utugarege emode tubujodo ji. 4Eerudumode jeji, ie padumode eeri keje. 5Boecomodukare ei pugeje boe etogeamodukare jorugu bogai, meri joku bogai pugeje, Pao urugumode ei kodi, eedumode torodu oto padumoduka. 
Awu bapera ao. 6Akore ii: - Awu Pao bataru boe jokodu, boe rikinure ema. Pagimejera, Profetadoge etaroe eno Aroe Eimejera ure to tupa utudo mato uwo tudugarege eerududo inoba boemode kuri je duji. 7Ica! Itaregodu puredugodunure. Romode nono awu bapera kejewu bataru reorewuge eiwo aidugirimode. 8Imi, Joãore, imearudure iorudure awu boe oinoduji. Imearudui, iorudui inodu jitu rekodaji, ire ipujodo nowu ure inodu awadudo iwu tupa jokorai iwo Aroe Eimejerado ema. 9Mare akore oino ii Aro kaba ino. Pao utugarenure imi areore, mearutorure awu bapera kejewu bataru jiwuge ereore. Pao jire amode apujodo ji. 1 Akore oino kimo Akaba padure awu bapera kejewu bataru biadodudo, mare boe puredugodunure kodi. 1 Nowu jetorokarewu romode turo jetorokarewu ji kimo, ro pegarewu romode turo pegarewu ji kimo. Mare jetororewu ro jetororewu kodumode tao kae, pemegarewu pemega kodumode tao kae jamedu. 1 Itaregodu puredugodunure; imode makuboe mugure itabo, iwo maku tu tu boe etai, ero reore. 1 Alfanure imi, Omeganure imi. Dure oino: boeto jiwunure imi, boiwunure imi; boe paru, boe otonure imi. 1 Ure tugudawu kabi Cordeiro ku tabowuge eiwo aidugirimode, eonamode i jerewu ji, emode turemo bakurirewu to baiporoji. 1 Nowu ure nono arigao reorewuge, ure jorubodo boeiwuge, poguru bokwarewuge, ure tubujodo boe paga jiwuge, cewu batararodurewuge eiamedu boe, eedumode baawadu keje. 1 Imi Jesus, ire ino tupa rojai tawogai uwo tawie Pao uwobe eiboe oinoduji. Davi ukwa rekodajiboenure imi. Barogwa tabowu kuieje urugurewunure imi. 1 Pao Utaroe Pemegarewu, Oreduje, egore mato! Mearudure awu inodu jiwu akomode: - Mato! Jamedu. Pobo boire jiwu, mato! Meardae aidae pemegarewu imedu, mato, pobo jerewu makuduwo ai mori bokwa tabo. 1 Imagomode mearudure padure awu bapera kejewu Pao bataru jiwuge ewiegai iaboe emode iaboe to ji ma, Pao umode padure awu bapera kejewu boe ecebae to pui bukeje. 1 Iaboemode iaboe tawuje piji ma, Pao umode jeonare jiboe padui bapera jerewu kejedu, ba kurirewu tadadu, aru piji. 2 Cewu akore oinowu akore pugeje U! Itaregodu marigumode. Oino rugadu. Mato! Pagimejera Jesus! 2 Pagimejera Jesus Cristo o boe pemegarewu jetuwo taiamedu boe apo. Oino godu.
